name: BORDER Petitions
subject: Sign the GOP Petition to FIRE DHS Secretary Mayorkas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Conservative Victory Fund
body:
Fellow Patriot - closing at 9:59 PM.

|
---
Friend, the petition to FIRE DHS Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas, who is directly responsible for the crisis at the Southern Border, [**IS LIVE UNTIL 10 PM.**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=cc7ff87ce6b043eab5f3977a9141a79f&_e=3j23eB_JeT_XS1MtHmmhSQNXmk-8XDp5dz2GWOdE5YaHiIJyJZGotaVnVUmTRf5h0BySaKDCZ7YwtOy9BGgSjrXByfWmNZJr46ZU7-2r93QccGEZjOlXlLziTJ-r8rGTG7KEiEFSphusWbPpCLesV2GKRv3jtL6G2BPfuNUwD8SyUE-c3n_u0vK-U0gsiO6hdkAgasv6HmLRDSd-XAbPGFJoPYPFt99IDjYZtU8J6G8I47_xy6x0m56ytTuxXYr_EMW5QQNPsTxI5OFjL0jSUohHozrUGkteNy-ruVvt2Evt4EG3kHV4u7pfVD9DowDYybqtEfzHt-tJ-BmFq_owZXIV-Xf09uAfD1DU12saTbadno2b5GM8riHZ9szZQy6Rly_AgaUzd4kKODTP8BhnqJIlOm3PwFpBdIM6MLdxxfQ%3D) **America deserves better.** | [ **ADD YOUR NAME TO THE PETITION** ](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=cc7ff87ce6b043eab5f3977a9141a79f&_e=3j23eB_JeT_XS1MtHmmhSQNXmk-8XDp5dz2GWOdE5YaHiIJyJZGotaVnVUmTRf5h0BySaKDCZ7YwtOy9BGgSjrXByfWmNZJr46ZU7-2r93QccGEZjOlXlLziTJ-r8rGTG7KEiEFSphusWbPpCLesV2GKRv3jtL6G2BPfuNUwD8SyUE-c3n_u0vK-U0gsiO6hdkAgasv6HmLRDSd-XAbPGFJoPYPFt99IDjYZtU8J6G8I47_xy6x0m56ytTuxXYr_EMW5QQNPsTxI5OFjL0jSUlZg6PLtqJtYOb9XnhJv19HzVxysOgKCT9UYWrl3JeJaSrdt37z9Q9SOVNjmMgRmZqH3YwFL6EcdUm2YPiij2BeL2NMvLvoG8O9CneG0QL-L6rAie41R48gGzUjCx5thl31ho40ubwBcQ9nmbBDQqe8%3D)

**Under the Biden Administration and the failed leadership of Mayorkas, a full-blown crisis has unfolded at our Southern Border. Anyone and everyone can enter our country without any resistance.**

What is America without borders? It is not a nation at all. This is a matter of national security, and we need the support of patriots like you to hold the Democrats accountable.
[ **SIGN THE PETITION** ](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=cc7ff87ce6b043eab5f3977a9141a79f&_e=3j23eB_JeT_XS1MtHmmhSQNXmk-8XDp5dz2GWOdE5YaHiIJyJZGotaVnVUmTRf5h0BySaKDCZ7YwtOy9BGgSjrXByfWmNZJr46ZU7-2r93QccGEZjOlXlLziTJ-r8rGTG7KEiEFSphusWbPpCLesV2GKRv3jtL6G2BPfuNUwD8SyUE-c3n_u0vK-U0gsiO6hdkAgasv6HmLRDSd-XAbPGFJoPYPFt99IDjYZtU8J6G8I47_xy6x0m56ytTuxXYr_EMW5QQNPsTxI5OFjL0jSUnw-nbJlQh6iTJq05P9EWuuAUPWCsLqZ364JUjgKBgxA81sn7e2OuiHaZiFGOSL-8LDkNFsUqMqXkADS9U00DOGtCrn-z-_d-B1PuvkjR5cEANXZobas1wG_Oy-aGCw9bd9D9hSiajoc8-3eSm1tETE%3D)

name: Bob Lorinser
subject: Re: The border bill
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/TOP.png]
About the border bill that Bergman won't consider
Rep. Bergman doesn't want to secure the U.S. border; he wants to use it to power-play on a campaign wedge issue.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
Your contributions help Dr. Bob promote compassionate immigration reform and border security. If you've saved your payment information with Act Blue Express, your donation will be processed immediately:
CONTRIBUTE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
CONTRIBUTE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
CONTRIBUTE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50]
Friend,
Here's a synopsis of the 370-page bill [https://www.votedrbob.com/post/what-s-in-the-border-bill-bergman-won-t-consider] concerning border security.
*
$20
Billion
Funding
*
Asylum
Threshold
*
Expedited
Asylum
Review
Process
*
Detention
Bed
Mandate
*
Near-immediate
work
permits
*
Humanitarian
Parole
Rules
*
Emergency
Border
Closure
Provisions
*
Visa
Expansion
*
No
Pathway
to
Citizenship
Notably, the bill does not provide a pathway to citizenship for existing illegal immigrants or Dreamers. It is primarily focused on border security rather than comprehensive immigration reform.
Endorsed by the U.S. Border Patrol Union, this bill is strict. Republicans couldn't have asked for a more stringent bill. It's far from the so-called "liberal agenda."
Yet, Rep. Bergman and Speaker Johnson won't support it because border chaos is better for GOP elections. Their lack of integrity shouldn't be so predictable.
Good politicians must make decisions based on facts, not hyperbole and political blackmail. Congress should pass or improve the bill. Next, Congress needs to work on comprehensive immigration reform, and with your support, we can bring back dignity and reason to these difficult decisions.
Thank you.
-Dr Bob
Bob Lorinser
Candidate for Congress
Northern Michigan / Upper Peninsula
Democrat, MI01

If you've saved your payment information with Act Blue Express, your donation will be processed immediately: CONTRIBUTE $10 [] CONTRIBUTE $25 [] CONTRIBUTE $50 [] Friend, Here's a synopsis of the 370-page bill [] concerning border security. $20 Billion Funding Asylum Threshold Expedited Asylum Review Process Detention Bed Mandate Near-immediate work permits Humanitarian Parole Rules Emergency Border Closure Provisions Visa Expansion * No Pathway to Citizenship Notably, the bill does not provide a pathway to citizenship for existing illegal immigrants or Dreamers. It is primarily focused on border security rather than comprehensive immigration reform. Endorsed by the U.S. Border Patrol Union, this bill is strict. name: Team AOC
subject: What is the deal with Democratic Socialism?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
A lot of people across the political spectrum want to fear-monger about the idea of Democratic Socialism — do you know what it means?
It means we value democracy and society over the love of capital. That's what it means.
As opposed to loving capital more than we love the integrity of our democracy and society, which is what we have right now.
[People like to paint Alexandria as extreme, but the reality is that we’re fighting to protect what should be basic rights — things like healthcare and voting. Will you make a $5 contribution today to power Alexandria’s fight? ](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20240206.cU8HRn&refcode=em20240206-5774-P_FND_EGR_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5774%2E2526796%2EkK5PWY)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20240206.cU8HRn&refcode=em20240206-5774-P_FND_EGR_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=5774%2E2526796%2EkK5PWY)**
Although Alexandria is a Democrat, she operates independently from either party’s establishment. She is willing to challenge her own party’s leadership and, when necessary, break from the party line.
She doesn’t believe in the extreme pursuit of profit at any and all human or environmental cost. She believes in guaranteed healthcare for all and tackling the climate crisis with a much more serious mobilization than what we’re doing now.
[Alexandria also accepts $0 in corporate money — our campaign is 100% funded by grassroots, small-dollar donations. Will you contribute $5 today to stand with our campaign for progress?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20240206.cU8HRn&refcode=em20240206-5774-P_FND_EGR_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=5774%2E2526796%2EkK5PWY)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20240206.cU8HRn&refcode=em20240206-5774-P_FND_EGR_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=5774%2E2526796%2EkK5PWY)**
With resolve,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20240206?refcode=em20240206-5774-P_FND_EGR_MIS&t=23&refcode2=5774_2526796_kK5PWY&akid=5774%2E2526796%2EkK5PWY)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20240206-5774-P_FND_EGR_MIS&t=24&akid=5774%2E2526796%2EkK5PWY)**

name: Jim
subject: My last words for this email
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Banks for Senate
body:
Friend...

|
---
[](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=215b01ef147f48dc9b71c47db2e0133e&_e=Skh8xi8Q2NO6B4QnA_KdL0KVQZcI1i1rsbMc55QzkV-o_h_nHvb8e1KnA9k3hmyn2s6SUY-GdUbw4nGi-MIlUfN6mKUWALp2y-Hu57FETI6VnwpXEm256-EQMndiyXLa3H69j54K72uAcgFsN_vuNnz3NP2AnUPvN_0Kabu0JF37lFwUOpDq8Xb_Wl6V9kc6VreuzLub1U7ge4wpgosChUonpfCzrQBV4dYu7EABpW0PCWa4ceQYt-RlCKbYVQWkx790plvIlCUvpcQy6_YuJ5zmVLm-cfk2byCUPGaF6c7M6osa7O4N8QOLJkMK1OcFqwcOkcXlRq2exE2LIbZmg3E-M9kSjSsKGYI_TQdxaJ47-OMH_0VFBZjnGCS492ic4LvlcByFCUEYPWUXD51oEA%3D%3D)
Hello...

This could be the last email I ever send you, Friend.

But I have to be honest with you — no matter how weary I am about opening up.

**Right now, the odds are stacked against us, and I need to know how you’ll react to this email to understand how to move forward. Your response could change everything.**

My name is Jim Banks. If you haven’t heard of me, I’m an Afghanistan veteran from Indiana now serving in Congress.

I worked hard to serve my community alongside my wife, Amanda. And above all, I am a father to three amazing girls.

**Now, I am also a Senate candidate in a crucial race in Indiana. The outcome of this election will determine if we can take back the Senate.**

Joe Biden and his Leftist collaborators are pouring millions into key races across the country in an effort to wipe out GOP candidates. But I won’t let them win so easily.

[**That’s why I’m reaching out today and humbly asking you for support.**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=215b01ef147f48dc9b71c47db2e0133e&_e=Skh8xi8Q2NO6B4QnA_KdL0KVQZcI1i1rsbMc55QzkV-o_h_nHvb8e1KnA9k3hmyn2s6SUY-GdUbw4nGi-MIlUfN6mKUWALp2y-Hu57FETI6VnwpXEm256-EQMndiyXLa3H69j54K72uAcgFsN_vuNnz3NP2AnUPvN_0Kabu0JF37lFwUOpDq8Xb_Wl6V9kc6VreuzLub1U7ge4wpgosChUonpfCzrQBV4dYu7EABpW0PCWa4ceQYt-RlCKbYVQWk_WliZgFE1mxXyOn1HyC7tmG6Vb2l9vQgqtSliRT1OgWyw7pqfgu4eXWAoiZr-reSi5m9XIq5R2cfZR52bNZCuDahtbWGdhcm4_sx2CeEJCH2_59MUcEM-ushheAWNshaiFn_n4uEv-RkuQZ2psAteg%3D%3D)
The Democrats have planted a fake Republican in my race to stop me from winning. They don’t realize that I’ve been in this community for years, and I know that Americans are fed up with the progressive narrative.

I’m not usually the type of person to ask for help, but there’s no way I can make it on my own.

The Democrats are attacking us from ALL angles because they hate what we stand for: freedom and American pride.

[**So please help me out this one time, Friend:**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=215b01ef147f48dc9b71c47db2e0133e&_e=Skh8xi8Q2NO6B4QnA_KdL0KVQZcI1i1rsbMc55QzkV-o_h_nHvb8e1KnA9k3hmyn2s6SUY-GdUbw4nGi-MIlUfN6mKUWALp2y-Hu57FETI6VnwpXEm256-EQMndiyXLa3H69j54K72uAcgFsN_vuNnz3NP2AnUPvN_0Kabu0JF37lFwUOpDq8Xb_Wl6V9kc6VreuzLub1U7ge4wpgosChUonpfCzrQBV4dYu7EABpW0PCWa4ceQYt-RlCKbYVQWk9w663o_cuI-5e0bTxajz-gGMUsVZtLrD37HL3SsZoGXyWoMXDGzDhHqy-RDYtyI8vmy59_Tn0ozfJDQ_cNiKFnyQWPnBsHkUHG07ASSCHm80PxXpz6lvmnyDBmacY--WEy-EMQ-DIPBOR3a3F7jaeg%3D%3D)
| [ **CONTRIBUTE $15** ](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=215b01ef147f48dc9b71c47db2e0133e&_e=Skh8xi8Q2NO6B4QnA_KdL0KVQZcI1i1rsbMc55QzkV-o_h_nHvb8e1KnA9k3hmyn2s6SUY-GdUbw4nGi-MIlUfN6mKUWALp2y-Hu57FETI6VnwpXEm256-EQMndiyXLa3H69j54K72uAcgFsN_vuNnz3NP2AnUPvN_0Kabu0JF37lFwUOpDq8Xb_Wl6V9kc6VreuzLub1U7ge4wpgosChSoQhwQbNrmmxekXwPvJCPXOZdY2B7bAEfLbW01wxUn8aGwZ01aqY9ZMzFGIJ7jQiQ_J6nLKgtIyTrQFj-DwI4RSiFfjvQ4EWf29Rlq-EYedB5Rz1OTbODVVxLd09aZ0MEmBPz8Ea1KeRcdlaT9WrfjTLwYVnJPSxjag5L-6iHR3UZTv9wocX-awd-_od-NC8g%3D%3D)

clean_body: Friend... | Hello... This could be the last email I ever send you, Friend. But I have to be honest with you — no matter how weary I am about opening up. Right now, the odds are stacked against us, and I need to know how you’ll react to this email to understand how to move forward. Your response could change everything. My name is Jim Banks. If you haven’t heard of me, I’m an Afghanistan veteran from Indiana now serving in Congress. I worked hard to serve my community alongside my wife, Amanda. And above all, I am a father to three amazing girls. Now, I am also a Senate candidate in a crucial race in Indiana. The outcome of this election will determine if we can take back the Senate. Joe Biden and his Leftist collaborators are pouring millions into key races across the country in an effort to wipe out GOP candidates. But I won’t let them win so easily. The Democrats have planted a fake Republican in my race to stop me from winning. They don’t realize that I’ve been in this community for years, and I know that Americans are fed up with the progressive narrative. I’m not usually the type of person to ask for help, but there’s no way I can make it on my own. The Democrats are attacking us from ALL angles because they hate what we stand for: freedom and American pride. | Friend, I’m not an establishment politician who will play games with the American people. I am a Patriot who wants to save America for the next generation. That’s why I’m being so candid with you today. I’m not going to make false promises and tell you I can fix our country overnight. But I can promise you that I will make it my mission to restore faith in our government and put the American people before political deals. I intend to make you proud. God Bless, Jim Banks Paid for by Banks for Senate Copyright (C) 2023 Banks for Senate, All rights reserved.

That's why I'm leading the charge to Impeach Secretary Mayorkas this week, not empower him with a legalized invasion of 1.8 million per year with amnesty while funding the defense of other country's borders. name: Ruben Gallego for Arizona
subject: Humbly asking if there is ANYTHING we can say —
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Kari Lake is objectively one of the most extreme, most radical, most dangerous Senate candidates in the country this year
#

Peter,
We’re racking our brains over here. This won’t be the first email you’ve ever opened from us, but we’re trying to figure out how to convince you to make it the first email you make a donation to.
And we’re wondering if there is ANYTHING we can say that might make that happen.
What if we told you that Kari Lake is objectively one of the most extreme, most radical, most dangerous Senate candidates in the country this year? She’s called herself the “most dangerous politician in the world,” and she means it.
What if we told you that the clock is ticking for Kyrsten Sinema? She has to decide whether or not to run for re-election any day now — really — and we’ve got to be ready for that decision either way.
And what if we told you that this campaign runs on donations from folks like you? Less than 5% of Ruben’s supporters chip in, and we need you to join them.
Those donations will determine the future of this campaign. And that’s why we’re asking you, very humbly:
[**If you care about victory in Arizona, if you care about stopping Kari Lake, if you care about holding control in the Senate, please: Make a donation of $3 today.](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-feb24.Oewwi1&refcode=em240206-2-120&t=1&akid=1933%2E734936%2EKalzAJ)**

name: Eric H. Holder, Jr.
subject: I'm sounding the alarm in Louisiana...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
They want to dismantle the new congressional map.
|
---

After years of disenfranchisement, Black Louisianans, who make up one-third of the state’s population, finally have the opportunity to elect candidates of their choice in one-third of the state’s congressional districts—what commonsense would lead us all to consider equal representation, and what federal law requires. But there are anti-democratic forces who remain set on reversing this progress, and we are committed to fighting them every step of the way.
The recent challenge against Louisiana’s new representative map is yet another attempt to weaken the Voting Rights Act, and it underscores the perpetual nature of the fight for equal representation.
Since the U.S. Supreme Court’s landmark decision in _Allen v. Milligan_ , we have seen progress in places once thought to be unreachable in the fight for fairness. But that progress has not come easily. Legislatures have openly attempted to defy court orders. Anti-democratic voices at the national level have continued to push for gerrymandered maps. At each turn, we have used every tool at our disposal and prevented these anti-democratic forces from prevailing.
**We cannot allow a sordid part of American history to be repeated. Yet again, anti-democracy forces must be stopped.**
Thank you for standing with us,
Eric H. Holder, Jr.
82nd Attorney General of the United States

**_All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering._**

Texas is a pro-energy state - indeed, we are THE #1 energy state in the nation. But since President Biden took office, he has pushed an anti-energy agenda that threatens to weaken our state's energy agenda.

**The men and women who work in the energy industry help power our lives, and they are vital to our booming Texas economy. Governor Abbott won 't stand idly by as the Biden Administration pushes strict regulations that jeopardize affordable energy prices and the livelihoods of hardworking Texans. **

By joining Governor Abbott today and **[voicing your support](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7258eea948964591a47bfd37b0ce13b6&_e=LfhIcUE7vh6rNTSB1t2h1eoeyQ4kjptV6Jbu7083edEor9v5q7qBNKIH9nOTpVsROkY4ohFLOQWiy9pLeXQZdVWcIdcGzcogOMO5K56aY9xwZLh3-o0B81elAOamtAuZs3YNktidnh89KsQfpSzL2Ti856B_2iTiY8idcdsh2mVPOLgCZaEASFofcGpwLJel5JR_Bcchxbeh1DVDEChPifmtDDvKfL-hQ-XTXJV-gdJJSps141q5tDvi-tZ9az4OmGi-d-bTV1pE-68lPYrksH6N6lmfz-_0D6Ekyt2L-LBu0lGOfdvmjFOPF5XvHydMDTlagl4XPqd6zBb22f1pzw%3D%3D)** to protect Texas' energy industry from Biden's overreach, you will play a pivotal role in keeping our state the #1 energy producer for years to come!

Thank you in advance for your support.

\- Team Abbott

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Seeking asylum is a human right
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
That is not reform—that’s throwing immigrants under the political bus.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20240206-3477-footer&t=1&akid=3477%2E420207%2EhOuAnS)
Peter,
As someone who came to this country at 16 years old with nothing in my pockets, I will always fight for those looking for asylum in the United States. **And that’s exactly why I’ve fought for comprehensive, humane immigration reform.**
We must reject any attempt to bring back Trump-era immigration policies that would only repeat our mistakes—with migrant lives in the crosshairs.
Shutting down the asylum system and exacting further harm on the vulnerable people seeking refuge in the U.S. is not a responsible deal. _That is not reform—that’s throwing immigrants under the political bus._
Seeking asylum is a human right and I am proud to be a part of the movement to defend immigrants’ rights and fix the broken, cruel immigration system. [**If you stand with me in this fight, donate today to amplify our people-powered efforts and keep up this momentum for immigrants’ rights.
**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20240206._xAWeu&refcode=em20240206-3477&t=2&akid=3477%2E420207%2EhOuAnS)

Together,
Pramila Jayapal

name: Team Alsobrooks
subject: in a tough spot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
|
---

| | **_FIRST:_** This formidable grassroots team helped Angela set state grassroots fundraising records — we’ve received contributions from _every single jurisdiction in Maryland._ **_THEN:_ **Angela’s self-funding, multi-millionaire opponent shelled out $30.4 MILLION to run ads non-stop on Maryland airwaves to try to buy this Senate race. **_NOW:_ Angela needs to respond ASAP with a powerful wave of grassroots support.** We _don’t_ need endless piles of money to win this race, Peter. name: Hillary Scholten
subject: Big Money in Politics
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten for Congress
body:
For decades the ultra-wealthy in West Michigan have controlled politics–influencing gerrymandering, funding extremist groups at the Capitol, and efforts to restrict women’s reproductive choices.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78533643/453684901/591366051?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2024-02-06_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjYxYmJlMy00ZWM1LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q65iKSDyqkAiB7jlrSD8MSh39v8Bj-pGAVHpMiGWvi0=)
---
| The FEC reports came out last week, disclosing the financial contributions of all candidates. My opponents are backed by some of the deepest pockets of Michigan Republican politics, including their own! Each of my opponents received financing from some of the most well-known Republicans or cut themselves a hefty check for tens of thousands of dollars.

For decades the ultra-wealthy in West Michigan have controlled politics–influencing gerrymandering, funding extremist groups at the Capitol, and efforts to restrict women’s reproductive choices.

_**But no more.**_

In 2022, we changed the course of history by flipping this seat and electing the first Democratic woman EVER from West Michigan to Congress. You know how? We did it with the support of small-dollar contributions from folks like you.

**I’m one of the strongest supporters of campaign finance reform you’ll find.** I don’t come from money or a political dynasty. I hate how much time I have to spend away from my legislating, parenting, and connecting with my constituents about their issues to...fundraise. It was never supposed to be this way. That’s why I support legislative efforts to reform the system and get us back to work for the people – but we need a Democratic majority to do it. So, until then, I’ll keep working with grit and determination to win again the way I won last year. But I can’t do it alone.

[_**If every single one of my supporters gave $5 to this email, we would more than TRIPLE their big money influence. Will you help me send a message today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78533644/453684902/591366051?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2024-02-06_1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjYxYmJlMy00ZWM1LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q65iKSDyqkAiB7jlrSD8MSh39v8Bj-pGAVHpMiGWvi0=)

body:
| | | Hi team, it's Diana, the Research Director here at the DSCC.

I'm reaching out because even after multiple indictments and pushing our democracy to the brink, Donald Trump is _still_ statistically tied with Joe Biden in the polls!

We need to know that Democrats everywhere are prepared to stand against Donald Trump -- because it's going to take _all of us_ to keep him from inflicting four more years of misery on the country.

**We've launched our Official 2024 Straw Poll to make sure our grassroots team is prepared to take on Donald Trump once again, but I just checked our records and didn't see your response --_so please answer immediately:_**

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/17133?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240206-Diana-DianaOfficialStrawPoll23RF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240206-Diana-DianaOfficialStrawPoll23RF-Pros-sl1&akid=13455%2E9716520%2Eg_8dOL)

subject: This is a sound-the-alarm moment for democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78533786/453689174/-664527026?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2RiOWUwYi01MGM1LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_0bW1CYpy8NCboN_-kurxtVTQXR7MoP3gQUOaS2Ki6g=)
Arizona State Sen. Anthony Kern couldn’t overrule the will of the voters by posing as a fake elector, so now he’s got a new plan: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78533787/453689175/38783913?refcode=em-2.6.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2RiOWUwYi01MGM1LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_0bW1CYpy8NCboN_-kurxtVTQXR7MoP3gQUOaS2Ki6g=) Kern hasn’t exactly been a democracy defender, but this is truly a new low. If passed, Kern's legislation would give the state legislature _complete_ control over appointing electors. In other words, the popular vote would mean absolutely nothing in Arizona’s presidential elections. [We can’t stress this enough: our democracy is under attack. Can you help elect Democratic Secretaries of State keep the power of elections firmly in the hands of the people? Chip in now→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78533788/453689176/38783913?refcode=em-2.6.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2RiOWUwYi01MGM1LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_0bW1CYpy8NCboN_-kurxtVTQXR7MoP3gQUOaS2Ki6g=) __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __ | | | **[Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78533789/453689177/38783913?refcode=em-2.6.24-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2RiOWUwYi01MGM1LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_0bW1CYpy8NCboN_-kurxtVTQXR7MoP3gQUOaS2Ki6g=)**

name: Janelle Bynum
subject: Join me in celebrating Black History Month
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JANELLE BYNUM FOR CONGRESS
body:
Happy Black History Month! As we kick off the month, I wanted to take a moment to uplift and celebrate some of the Black trailblazers who have changed history, shaped our country, and opened the door for the opportunities we have today.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78533861/453691475/476240478?refcode=em_fr_2024.02.06_b1_jb_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjZjOGI1ZTEtNTBjNS1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=TZzcjCTPTO9LzzunuxoDyZ09aVcil1eVQYLL3jN1KDI=) Happy Black History Month! As we kick off the month, I wanted to take a moment to uplift and celebrate some of the Black trailblazers who have changed history, shaped our country, and opened the door for the opportunities we have today. I recognize that I’m standing on the shoulders of generations of Black women who have paved the way. Oregon women like Avel Gordly, Margaret Carter, Jackie Winters, and countless others have brought us closer to a government that mirrors the diverse tapestry of America. Their courage to fight for change in their communities and the halls of Congress has inspired a new generation – myself included – to pick up the torch and champion the crucial issues impacting our community. This Black History Month, I invite you to join me in reflecting on the remarkable contributions of Black Americans to our country. And while we celebrate, we should all consider how we can work together to continue their remarkable legacies. Happy Black History Month! Janelle

---

**Janelle Bynum is running to represent Oregon's Fifth Congressional District. With a reputation as a tireless champion for real progress, Janelle has worked in the State Legislature to safeguard our rights, lower costs, and create pathways to success for the next generation.

Oregon's 5th District is one of the most competitive – and most flippable – seats in the country. Janelle has what it takes to win, but she can't do it without you. Will you make a grassroots donation today? ** | [**DONATE »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78533862/453691476/-438343666?refcode=em_fr_2024.02.06_b1_jb_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjZjOGI1ZTEtNTBjNS1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=TZzcjCTPTO9LzzunuxoDyZ09aVcil1eVQYLL3jN1KDI=)

name: Alexandra Rojas
subject: re: AIPAC
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

New reports show AIPAC’s war chest only continues to grow day by day since
last October, and they’re preparing to use it to try and unseat the Squad
this year.

The Lever reports that internal documents show the right-wing lobby group
now has at least $90 million to spend against our progressive incumbents.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240206.FQsEws&refcode=em20240206-33200&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=33200%2E1203867%2EhceF0g ]The Lever: Inside The Israel Lobby's New $90 Million War Chest

That obscene amount of money came from “a cross-section of the U.S. elite,
including pro sports teams owners; heads of private equity firms; real
estate titans; a Maryland congressman now running for the U.S. Senate; the
former CEO of Victoria’s Secret; the co-founder of the dance-exercise
company Zumba; and the creator of Squishmallows.” According to Rolling
Stone, they also received $11 million from billionaire OnlyFans owner
Leonid Radvinsky and his wife.

It’s beyond clear: AIPAC is funded by millionaires and billionaires,
corporate interests, as well as Trump and other GOP mega-donors, and they
want to wipe out our progressive Squad from Congress in order to maintain
the status quo and push a pro-war agenda.

Not on our watch. We’ve taken on the AIPAC network before and won when we
elected Squad members like Jamaal Bowman and Summer Lee, and through the
power of grassroots fundraising, we can do it again to re-elect them this
year.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240206.FQsEws&refcode=em20240206-33200&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1002&akid=33200%2E1203867%2EhceF0g ]Please, if you can afford to, pitch in a contribution of
$3 or more today to help Justice Democrats fight back
against AIPAC and protect the Squad →

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240206.FQsEws&refcode=em20240206-33200&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1021&akid=33200%2E1203867%2EhceF0g ]Contribute $3

We appreciate each and every dollar you give to fuel our critical work and
defend our progressive movement.

In solidarity,

Alexandra Rojas
Executive Director

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time.

There are other ways to make an impact in support of peace and equality in
Israel and Palestine: please urge your member of Congress to support a
ceasefire through [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139873?t=1022&akid=33200%2E1203867%2EhceF0g ]Adalah Justice Project’s petition or by calling them
using [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139874?t=1023&akid=33200%2E1203867%2EhceF0g ]Jewish Voice for Peace’s dialer here. Your voice matters in this
critical moment.

clean_body: [1]Justice Democrats Peter, New reports show AIPAC’s war chest only continues to grow day by day since last October, and they’re preparing to use it to try and unseat the Squad this year. The Lever reports that internal documents show the right-wing lobby group now has at least $90 million to spend against our progressive incumbents. [ ]The Lever: Inside The Israel Lobby's New $90 Million War Chest That obscene amount of money came from “a cross-section of the U.S. elite, including pro sports teams owners; heads of private equity firms; real estate titans; a Maryland congressman now running for the U.S. Senate; the former CEO of Victoria’s Secret; the co-founder of the dance-exercise company Zumba; and the creator of Squishmallows.” According to Rolling Stone, they also received $11 million from billionaire OnlyFans owner Leonid Radvinsky and his wife. It’s beyond clear: AIPAC is funded by millionaires and billionaires, corporate interests, as well as Trump and other GOP mega-donors, and they want to wipe out our progressive Squad from Congress in order to maintain the status quo and push a pro-war agenda. Not on our watch. We’ve taken on the AIPAC network before and won when we elected Squad members like Jamaal Bowman and Summer Lee, and through the power of grassroots fundraising, we can do it again to re-elect them this year. [ ]Please, if you can afford to, pitch in a contribution of $3 or more today to help Justice Democrats fight back against AIPAC and protect the Squad → [ ]Contribute $3 We appreciate each and every dollar you give to fuel our critical work and defend our progressive movement. In solidarity, Alexandra Rojas Executive Director Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. There are other ways to make an impact in support of peace and equality in Israel and Palestine: please urge your member of Congress to support a ceasefire through [ ]Adalah Justice Project’s petition or by calling them using [ ]Jewish Voice for Peace’s dialer here. Your voice matters in this critical moment. Contribute to Justice Democrats:

name: Representative Vikki Breese Iverson
subject: Representing real Oregonians - Stand with Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Vikki 20022
body:
Give a summary of your email to your recipients

View online version https://026s4.mjt.lu/nl3/7ZQJxGfxD4-pQKouiB940A?m=AWsAADejoy8AAAAPrGwAAC7a4LMAAAAATF0AAUT4ABvaFABlwtGlXPUwNTm5TdmMKoxX0dLaKAAasDI&b=2d6924c3&e=04ac7c0a&x=tfLWWkgYyQnikGdJV5PgPO7Do1p91l8ijm7Oi_gXjrQ

[https://026s4.mjt.lu/img2/026s4/576d713f-627c-4b2a-9e49-73fa5c44b898/content]

We're drawing a line in the sand.
Electing more Democrats in Oregon will only make our situation worse. The gaslighting, false narratives, government overreach and power grabs must come to an end. 2022 is the year we draw the line in the sand.

As the House Republican Leader in Oregon, I have seen first hand the communist agenda of Kate Brown, Joe Biden and Ron Wyden - it is earth shattering to see their desire to ruin our country and our state. They want Republicans gone from Oregon.

The consequences of Democrats in the Oregon Legislature and Governor Brown have proven to be devastating for our families and our small businesses for years, now they are taking aim at our children.

DON’T LET THEM WIN. We can make a difference, but it needs to be this year. It needs to start today.

You have witnessed the hypocrisy, the political “science”, and utter destruction of kids in the school system. You see the truth. You see past the teachers union bosses and the power grabbing state agencies in Oregon.

In 2022, we get an opportunity to change the leadership in Oregon.

You have the opportunity to send a message to Kate Brown and liberal democrats that they have done enough damage to our state and our children’s future with their never-ending attack on small business, enabling government overreach and mandating school shutdowns. Enough is enough!
<<HELP STOP THE DEMOCRATS!>> [https://secure.winred.com/friends-of-vikki]

As the House Republican Leader, I am putting everything I have on the line. Will you help me win? Your contribution of $100, $250, $500, or $1000 is going to send a message - Enough.

Enough of Portland Democrats and liberal national agendas controlling our state. Portland Democrats can’t even control their own city from the nightly shootouts and rampant crime. They would rather put more criminals on the street, over hiring police to protect the citizens they were elected to serve.

National groups like the Republican State Leadership Committee are looking to turn the tide where it matters most—and Oregon is on their top-target list for the 2022 election.

We can WIN! But we need to raise $72,000 this month to reach critical deadlines.

Our team is ready to take majority in the Legislature and show that common-sense still has a place in our governing process. We are excited about our candidate recruitment effort this year; there is a path to victory. We have a campaign operation ready to win, but I need your help to do it.

Will you support me in making the strong effort to win in 2022? The RED WAVE is real, but we need to feed it, and push it to victory. We are going to every corner of the state–to every person who cares about the future of Oregon. Will you help? Will you be the difference in 2022 and bring balance to Oregon? We can win, but I need you today.

If you can make a contribution of $50, $250, $500, or even $1,000 to our fight, it will help us greatly in building a campaign effort that sends a message to Kate Brown, Joe Biden and socialist Democrat legislators–Not this year. Not Oregon.

For the future of Oregon.

Sincerely,

<<Vikki Breese Iverson Signature>> [https://026s4.mjt.lu/tplimg/026s4/b/1qm75/s4t3.png]

Vikki Breese-Iverson
House Republicans
Oregon State Representative for HD 59

P.S. Help us stop the over-taxing, over-spending, over-regulating and over-mandating of our lives. When we take back the Legislature, we will move quickly to advance an agenda to roll back mandates and taxes while putting our police back to work cleaning up our streets.

<<DONATE TODAY>> [https://secure.winred.com/friends-of-vikki]

[https://friendsofvikki.com/contribute/]

This e-mail has been sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. click here to unsubscribe https://026s4.mjt.lu/unsub2?hl=en&m=AWsAADejoy8AAAAPrGwAAC7a4LMAAAAATF0AAUT4ABvaFABlwtGlXPUwNTm5TdmMKoxX0dLaKAAasDI&b=2d6924c3&e=04ac7c0a&x=tfLWWkgYyQnikGdJV5PgPO7Do1p91l8ijm7Oi_gXjrQ.
Paid for by Friends of Vikki 20022
PO Box 249 97754 Prineville US

subject: January 2024 e-newsletter
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
# 2024 January e-newsletter
News and information for District 5 in San Mateo County.
---
|
---
|
---
| **San Mateo County first in nation to declare loneliness a public health crisis**
---
| Dear friends,

San Mateo County was the first in the nation to declare loneliness a public health crisis after the Board of Supervisors unanimously passed a resolution my office authored Tuesday, January 30.

Loneliness has a profound impact on health and is comparable to smoking a pack of cigarettes a day. It leads to poor health outcomes according to the U.S. Surgeon General Dr. Vivek Murthy such as heart attack, depression and even early death. That’s why I’m calling for the state of California to establish a Minister of Loneliness position to help those suffering in silence to restore meaningful connections that were lost during the pandemic.
Many people are suffering alone in silence and there’s no cure for it. Loneliness, isolation and lack of connection can lead to profound health impacts that send many of our most vulnerable residents on the path to homelessness, as we’ve seen in the county’s one-day homeless count conducted recently.
---
While there is no cure, there are ways we all can make a difference by extending love, support and real help to our neighbors, older adults and families before loneliness does become a crisis and leads to horrible outcomes such as suicide. They say loneliness can have the same health consequences as smoking a pack of cigarettes a day, an alarming fact that I think should be addressed by the state by establishing a Minister of Loneliness similar to what the UK and Japan have instituted.” The recent Surgeon General Advisory issued by Dr. Vivek Murthy underscores the severity of this issue, highlighting its profound impact on mental, physical, and societal health. In San Mateo County alone, 45% of residents reported experiencing difficulty with isolation and loneliness, with certain demographic groups facing heightened challenges in accessing social support networks. Here’s a link to an NBC story after the resolution passed: [http://nbcbay.com/dygsW1c](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=e359e9c8d3&e=c0babbc643)
---
| **Board of Supervisors picks new President, Vice President**

The Board of Supervisors unanimously voted in Warren Slocum as President of the Board of Supervisors Tuesday, Jan. 9 and I was proud to be voted in to serve as his Vice President for 2024 with the same unanimous vote.

President Slocum said the county has changed considerably since the time he first joined the Board in 2013.

He also said change is inevitable and required and called for amplifying public voices and strengthening the county’s equity work including passing an ordinance codifying the county’s commitment to it and “recalibrating” the Office of Equity and Social Justice. I look forward to advancing President Slocum’s vision this year and will continue to advance my own priorities of climate adaptation, fire mitigation, mental health and public safety.

Slocum replaces Dave Pine, who served as the Board’s President last year. I want to thank Supervisor Pine for his steady leadership last year as it started with unprecedented storms and flooding, followed shortly thereafter by the deadly mass shooting in Half Moon Bay.
---
---
| **
COVID-19 closed therapy pool, community finally opens it back up**

I was proud to announce the groundbreaking of Sutter Health’s project to reopen the Mack E. Mickelson Arthritis and Rehabilitation Center Therapeutic Pool in downtown San Mateo at Mills Health Center at a press conference I conducted on Saturday, Jan. 6.

Sutter announced in 2020 as the pandemic started that the pool would be closed permanently. Sutter now plans to reopen the pool in July 2024.

As many of you may know, the Mickelson warm water therapy pool is the only facility in San Mateo County that provides a wheelchair-accessible warm pool specifically designed for therapeutic use by seniors, adults and children with chronic pain or disabilities, patients recovering from surgery, pregnant women, and others who find the warm water healing.

Shortly after the pool was closed nearly four years ago, Lindsay Raike formed the nonprofit advocacy group Warm Water Wellness and coordinated a grassroots effort with the support of my office to reopen the pool. With her support, I authored a resolution in February, 2022 urging Sutter to reopen the pool that the San Mateo County Board of Supervisors unanimously passed.

Many in need of this warm water therapy pool were told it would close forever but Sutter has listened to the community and is keeping its promise to rehabilitate Mickelson and open it back up to the community in July. It wasn’t easy and took a coordinated grassroots effort to make this happen and I applaud the hundreds and even thousands in our community who did not give up, who did not take “no” for an answer.
---
| **
UCSF conference highlights emergency preparedness**

I was honored to be the keynote speaker at the 2024 UCSF Campus Center of Excellence, COE conference 8.0, Monday Jan. 29. The theme of this year’s four-day conference was organizational resilience.

UCSF is one of the world’s most renowned public institutions and the leading university dedicated to advancing health worldwide through preeminent biomedical research, graduate-level education in the life sciences and health professions and excellence in patient care.

But none of that could be achieved without the nearly 500 employees in Facilities Services, the trade workers in operations, custodial services, maintenance, landscaping, public safety and engineering.

It is their task to keep UCSF’s facilities and operations resilient, sustainable and prepared for any emergency.
>From severe storms and flooding, deadly diseases and active shooter scenarios, it takes coordination across several departments to ensure the facilities, staff and patients are safe in any emergency situation.

I applaud Cesar Sanchez, the Assistant Vice Chancellor of Facilities Services and his team for putting this incredible conference together with an emphasis on sustaining the 43,000 jobs and $8.9 billion in economic activity UCSF generates annually.
---
| **Interns wanted to join our team ** We are looking to add to our great group of interns we are currently working with. If you or someone you know may be interested in applying to my Internship Program, submitting this form is the first step: [https://forms.gle/hiKqtn7Rird5vXwB9](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=867658559c&e=c0babbc643). You can also reach out to Mike Richardson on my staff directly with any questions at [mrichardson@smcgov.org](mailto:mrichardson@smcgov.org)
---
| **Battling food insecurity **
Food insecurity is a problem some residents may still face as we continue to emerge from the pandemic. Here are some resources residents can access: **CalFresh:**
Is a program for people with low-income who meet federal income eligibility rules and want to add to their budget to put healthy and nutritious food on the table. Website: [https://www.cdss.ca.gov/food-nutrition/calfresh](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=945e22c8ad&e=c0babbc643) Contact: (650) 802-6576, [antorres@smcgov.org](mailto:antorres@smcgov.org) **Daly City Partnership:**
DC Partnership is a local partnership that was formed to guide collaborative efforts and connect our community to services that promote well-being. Check out their website for times and locations. Website: [https://www.dcpartnership.org/covid19/](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=35d9632fc8&e=c0babbc643) **Second Harvest Food Bank:**
Second Harvest offers food at various locations throughout San Mateo County listed on its webpage. Website: [https://www.shfb.org/get-food/](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=d77a482e92&e=c0babbc643) Contacts: Call (800) 984-3663 or text GETFOOD to (408) 455-5181 **Interns wanted to join our team **

We are looking to add to our great group of interns we are currently working with. If you or someone you know may be interested in applying to my Internship Program, submitting this form is the first step: [https://forms.gle/hiKqtn7Rird5vXwB9](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=e0bde9be66&e=c0babbc643). You can also reach out to Mike Richardson on my staff directly with any questions at [mrichardson@smcgov.org](mailto:mrichardson@smcgov.org) In friendship,
David J. Canepa
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| | |
---

| | Peter, **we have exciting news: Brian has been named an inaugural recipient of the GIFFORDS Champion Award — Gabby Giffords’ organization leading the fight to end gun violence!**

The Champion Award is focused on uplifting the voices of a new generation of leaders in the gun safety movement. Gun violence is a daily crisis — from domestic violence to community violence to suicide. We need leaders who understand that and will fight to make us all safer. Brian is committed to seeing this fight through until the promise of a safe and just country becomes a reality for every person and community in America.

43,000 people die every year from gun violence. As a trauma surgeon, Brian has seen firsthand the devastating toll gun violence has on his patients, our communities, and our country. Change is possible, but we need leaders in office with frontline experience who are bold enough to take courageous action — Brian is that leader.

Rush a donation to our campaign ahead of our March 5 primary; anything you can contribute will go a long way.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78533974/453697307/1248488860?refcode=em24_240206_Gifford_fnd_gq_act___TW_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240206_Gifford_fnd_gq_act___TW_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=&zip=&refcode2=2842f3f4-52c5-ee11-b660-002248223197&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjg0MmYzZjQtNTJjNS1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=LlqAX3Pz-n_pzyLsEbbEcEvWWRoYZG5_Y-FDxgj__kU=)

clean_body: | | Peter, we have exciting news: Brian has been named an inaugural recipient of the GIFFORDS Champion Award — Gabby Giffords’ organization leading the fight to end gun violence! The Champion Award is focused on uplifting the voices of a new generation of leaders in the gun safety movement. Gun violence is a daily crisis — from domestic violence to community violence to suicide. We need leaders who understand that and will fight to make us all safer. Brian is committed to seeing this fight through until the promise of a safe and just country becomes a reality for every person and community in America. = = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- 43,000 people die every year from gun violence. subject: Join Rep. Andy Ogles & Speaker Mike Johnson in Nashville on February 8th!
body:
Speaker of the House Mike Johnson will be the featured guest at a luncheon for Rep. Andy Ogles on February 8th in Nashville. We'd love you to join! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/db76447649ad/join-rep-andy-ogles-speaker-mike-johnson-in-nashville-on-february-8th?e=0ad50b23ec)

| |
---
| |
#
# Hello Friends,

Just in case you missed the news, we wanted to send out one last reminder. Speaker of the House Mike Johnson will be the honored guest at a luncheon for Congressman Andy Ogles this Thursday afternoon, February 8th, in Nashville. It would be our absolute pleasure to have you with us!

Below, you'll find the RSVP link with all the details provided. Should you have any questions, don't hesitate to reach out to our team at [Events@AndyOgles.com](mailto:Events@AndyOgles.com?subject=Question%20About%20Event%20With%20Speaker%20Johnson). I'm eagerly looking forward to the opportunity to see you there.

Missourians can’t afford another six years of Hawley’s cowardice in the U.S. Senate.
**That’s why 13-year Marine veteran, antitrust advocate, and born-and-raised Missourian Lucas Kunce is on a mission to defeat Josh Hawley.** He’s built a record-breaking grassroots movement without a cent from corporate PACs to flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat and put real working people in charge of our country.

name: America Fitzpatrick, LCV
subject: Tell President Biden: Make History by Designating Chuckwalla National Monument
body:
Help us reach 5,000 signatures demanding a judiciary that works for people and our planet.

Tell Congress to Rein in the Supreme Court

The Supreme Court just heard arguments in two key cases that threaten the EPA's and other agencies' ability to protect the people from big business.

Congress must stop MAGA judges' right-wing power grab. Help us reach 5,000 signatures demanding that Congress rein in the Supreme Court and urgently prioritize confirming pro-environment, pro-democracy judges. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/j9y2f_ TAKE ACTION NOW https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/RZbkcvDx48t-

Peter - the Supreme Court just heard arguments in two critical cases - Relentless, Inc. v. Department of Commerce and Loper Bright Enterprises v. Raimondo - that could gut the federal government's authority to enforce even the most basic environmental protections.

In both cases, corporate interests backed by big oil are suing in order to hamstring federal agencies' authority to protect people from powerful special interests. If these plaintiffs get their way, it would move authority over every area of public policy from public-interest agencies like the EPA to the MAGA-dominated federal courts.

In the last two years, extremist Justices on the Supreme Court have already severely limited the federal government's ability to regulate climate pollution from power plants, stripped Clean Water Act protections from most of the wetlands in the United States, and overturned Roe v. Wade. Some even take lavish gifts like private jet flights from the same billionaires bringing cases like this for them to rule on. Now, they're looking to overturn a bedrock doctrine of the American legal system in order to increase their own power.

Our planet and our communities are counting on us - we need your help to make our voices heard. We're asking 5,000 LCV members to take action before midnight tonight. Tell Congress to take action to rein in the Supreme Court and fill judicial vacancies with pro-environment, pro-democracy judges before it's too late >> https://links.messages.lcv.

These critical cases target what's called the Chevron Doctrine. This longstanding Supreme Court precedent says that when something is unclear in a federal law administered by an expert agency, such as the way the EPA administers the Clean Air Act, federal courts should defer to agency experts' reasonable interpretations of what the law means. The Chevron Doctrine is critical to enforcing the laws that protect our environment and our communities from pollution and other harms. It touches every issue, from climate to democracy to healthcare, reproductive rights, consumer protection, workers' rights, student debt, and so much more.

Put simply, if the Supreme Court rules in favor of the plaintiffs in Relentless and Loper Bright, it will gut the ability of federal agencies like the EPA to implement the laws Congress passes, transferring that power to unelected right-wing judges. And if Congress doesn't act, far-right judges will keep control of our Supreme Court, and keep rolling back our rights, for decades to come.

Congress must stop this MAGA power grab. We need lawmakers to pass the Judiciary Act to expand and rebalance the Supreme Court. They must also pass the Supreme Court Ethics, Recusal, and Transparency (SCERT) Act to ensure our nation's highest court doesn't have the lowest ethical standards. And we need the Senate to prioritize confirming President Biden's pro-environment, pro-democracy judicial nominees to every vacancy on the federal bench.

We can rein in corrupt MAGA judges, Peter, but it will only happen if our movement joins together to demand it. Please, take action right now. Tell Congress to rein in the Supreme Court and fill judicial vacancies. It only takes a moment to help us reach our goal >> https://links.messages.lcv.

Thank you for joining LCV's campaign for a democracy that works for our planet and for our communities.

Onward,

Doug Lindner
Senior Director of Judiciary & Democracy
League of Conservation Voters

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=10572977&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTkyMDE0NDcyOQS2&spReportId=MTkyMDE0NDcyOQS2. Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=10572977&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTkyMDE0NDcyOQS2&spReportId=MTkyMDE0NDcyOQS2 from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, 7th Floor
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/w_

subject: PENDING Friend Request from President Donald Trump

name: www.officialderrickgates.com
subject: Very Impartant Update
body:
Important update I'm blessed to have had overwhelming support from my friends, supporters, and patriots around the nation and many right here in my D
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5257?id=177456.241.1.f4853ededdc5f5944af5b5bac4942456)
---
[](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5257?id=177456.242.1.35e7d69c8af3ed0d917fd674e0364ccb) |
---
# Important update
I'm blessed to have had overwhelming support from my friends, supporters, and patriots around the nation and many right here in my District. After thorough consideration, I have arrived at the decision to suspend any potential write-in candidacy for the upcoming election. Unfortunately, logistical constraints, particularly the unavailability of key figures like General Flynn and Roger Stone for a fundraising event within the next two weeks, would hinder our ability to launch a successful media campaign in the required timeframe. Despite this decision, my unwavering conviction remains unchanged: the endorsed candidate by both the LAGOP and the CAGOP poses a grave threat to our state party's commitment to conservative values. The mere thought of their candidacy sends shivers down my spine, recognizing the potential damage it could inflict upon our party's integrity. The current endorsed candidate's stance on critical issues such as federal funding for Planned Parenthood and other abortion clinics is a glaring red flag. Let me be unequivocal: my contemplation of entering this race was driven solely by the urgent necessity to combat liberal voices on the state party platform, as well as at the behest of esteemed colleagues. I firmly believe that some within the party have veered off course by supporting candidates they deem as the "best runners-up" rather than seeking out the candidates who truly align with our party's values and mostly God. It is disheartening to witness the misguided accusations levied against me for standing firmly for life and advocating against pro-choice voices within our platform. With all of that, I'm still on the ballot for Central Committee and in this position, I will be able to help find qualified candidates moving forward and remember that the 2026 cycle is right around the corner.
---
|
---
## Vote for me also on the 66th Assembly Central Committee
---
|
---
**Vote for me also on the Member, County Central Committee, 66th Assembly District**
Dear friends and fellow Conservatives,
I am thrilled to announce that I am running for an official seat on the 66th Assembly District Central Committee. As some of you may know, I have been serving as an alternate on the committee for some time now. Over the past two years, I have also been actively involved in multiple posts within the party. I am proud to have been elected to the California Republican Assembly state board of directors as the Senate director for the 24th District, chaired the Faith Outreach committee for the CRA, and served as a delegate for the California State party. These experiences have given me a deep understanding of the values and principles that are important to our party and have prepared me to effectively represent our district on the central committee.
As a member of the central committee, I will work tirelessly to ensure that conservative values remain at the forefront of our party's agenda. I believe that my position on the LAGOP, which is the largest Republican party office in the nation, will allow me to have a greater impact on decisions that affect our party and our community. I have already been able to influence many decisions as an alternate, and I am confident that I can make an even greater impact as an elected member.
While some have urged me to run for the congressional seat of the 36th district, I believe that my calling is to bring balance to the party for the next few years. This will not only benefit the party but also other candidates and myself in the long run. Federal races can be expensive to operate, and I have learned from my previous run for Congress that it takes time to build relationships and secure the support needed to win. My goal is to help fix the foundation of the party while building relationships with those who can help me in the future.
I am asking for your prayers and support as I take this important step on my journey. Please look for me on the primary ballot on March 5, 2024. Early voting begins on February 24, 2024. Your vote for me, Derrick R. Gates, for the 66th Assembly Central Committee, will help ensure that our conservative values continue to be represented in our district and beyond.
Thank you for your support and dedication to our party.
Sincerely,
Derrick R. Gates
[officialderrickgates.com](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5257?id=177456.243.1.2d1721730091c3cd08c91a0fe53b4f39)
|

subject: Happy Hour with David Kim This Friday!
body:
This Friday, we've got something special lined up: a "Happy Hour" with David Kim. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/davidkimforca/happy-hour-with-david-kim-this-friday?e=fee98d637f)
---
| |
---
| | Hey Friend,

Hope you're doing great! This Friday, we've got something special lined up: a "Happy Hour" with David Kim. It's the perfect chance to unwind, mingle, and chat about how we can all contribute to making our CA-34 community even better. [RSVP HERE](https://davidkimforca.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c05fe848bb5af5e7b9d690b2f&id=bf56e63a93&e=fee98d637f)!
---
|
---
| We're like one big family here, offering support and strength to each other. When we gather, it's more than just catching up—it's about sparking new ideas and getting ready to take action.

Besides the Happy Hour, there's another opportunity to make an impact. This Sunday from 1:00-3:00pm, we're canvassing in Boyle Heights. It’s a great way to meet neighbors, share our goals, and listen to what the community needs. Your voice and presence could really make a difference.
---
|
---
|
---
| **Ballots Have Been Mailed!**

Your ballot for the upcoming **March 5th primary** has officially been mailed out, and now is the perfect time to make your voice heard, early and effortlessly. Wondering where to drop off your ballot? Simply click [HERE](https://davidkimforca.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c05fe848bb5af5e7b9d690b2f&id=8a042097c4&e=fee98d637f) to find the most convenient location near you.

Why wait until Election Day when you can easily participate now, avoiding lines and ensuring your vote counts well in advance. Remember, every vote is a building block for our future—make sure yours is in the pile. Let's shape our community together, vote early!

---
|
---
| | | | | | | [](https://davidkimforca.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c05fe848bb5af5e7b9d690b2f&id=d5ae13e0c9&e=fee98d637f)

clean_body: Update Update from Derrick Gates I'm blessed to have had overwhelming support from my friends, supporters, and patriots around the nation and many r | | | Update | Update from Derrick Gates I'm blessed to have had overwhelming support from my friends, supporters, and patriots around the nation and many right here in my District. After thorough consideration, I have arrived at the decision to suspend any potential write-in candidacy for the upcoming election. Unfortunately, logistical constraints, particularly the unavailability of key figures like General Flynn and Roger Stone for a fundraising event within the next two weeks, would hinder our ability to launch a successful media campaign in the required timeframe. Despite this decision, my unwavering conviction remains unchanged: the endorsed candidate by both the LAGOP and the CAGOP poses a grave threat to our state party's commitment to conservative values. The mere thought of their candidacy sends shivers down my spine, recognizing the potential damage it could inflict upon our party's integrity. The current endorsed candidate's stance on critical issues such as federal funding for Planned Parenthood and other abortion clinics is a glaring red flag. Let me be unequivocal: my contemplation of entering this race was driven solely by the urgent necessity to combat liberal voices on the state party platform, as well as at the behest of esteemed colleagues. I firmly believe that some within the party have veered off course by supporting candidates they deem as the "best runners-up" rather than seeking out the candidates who truly align with our party's values and mostly God. It is disheartening to witness the misguided accusations levied against me for standing firmly for life and advocating against pro-choice voices within our platform. With all of that, I'm still on the ballot for Central Committee and in this position, I will be able to help find qualified candidates moving forward and remember that the 2026 cycle is right around the corner. Also Vote Derrick Gates for Central Committee | | JOIN THE SBCRA TODAY If you want to Join the fight, you can get started at this link! We meet currently at the El Segundo Public Library 111 W Mariposa Ave, El Segundo, CA Door opens at 6:30pm Meeting starts at 6:45 ©2024 South Bay CRA | South Bay CRA == "Share this on Facebook" | == "Web Version" == "Preferences" == "Forward" "Unsubscribe" |

name: Team Rosen
subject: We made a mistake, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
This is the worst time for us to face a fundraising gap

---
We messed up, friend.
After going through our recent fundraising reports, we realized our finance team made a mistake – **and it turns out we still have a $10,010 gap in our weekly budget.**
To make matters worse, polls show Sen. Jacky Rosen NECK and NECK with her extremist GOP opponent – and he just set a new GOP fundraising record.
It’s not easy to admit we made this mistake, but something like this could really set us back if we don't catch up soon. **_Any_ gap in our fundraising this election year could put our campaign and our Senate majority at risk. That’s why we need to urgently reach out to top supporters like you for help:**
[**Will you please rush $5 or more right now so that we can make up our fundraising gap and keep Nevada and the Senate blue? Every single dollar you chip in right now will be crucial in our efforts to win this battleground race and prevent Mitch McConnell and the GOP from retaking the Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78535122/453714336/2128632416?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3423-fr-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTE3ZTcwMy01ZWM1LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6r1VMpDg53S9D3g-zHjsiYyT98aoELAs-TYwZSjpq6I=)

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Just finished interviewing with Chris Hayes
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=5377%2E5257348%2ExC6FBm)
Derek — it’s Adam. I just finished interviewing live on _MSNBC_ with Chris Hayes.
**[Before I share the details of our discussion, I have to ask: California’s primary is 28 days away. Can you rush any amount to our campaign _tonight_ to help turn out voters?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=feb2024_abs_em.yNAKTE&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20240206_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=5377%2E5257348%2ExC6FBm)**
We discussed the do-nothing Republican majority’s failed attempt to impeach Secretary of Homeland Security Alejandro Mayorkas earlier today. The whole conduct of their impeachment proceedings — against Secretary Mayorkas and President Biden — is another abuse of the constitutional process.
They are using important protections — like impeachment or censure — as mere political tools, without any basis, and merely to distract from their complete lack of any legislative accomplishments or agenda. It’s so damaging to our institutions.
**Derek, we also discussed the D.C. Circuit Court of Appeals’ ruling that Donald Trump cannot claim presidential immunity from Special Counsel Jack Smith’s indictment for Trump’s actions inciting the Capitol insurrection.**
On the January 6 Committee, we laid out the clear evidence, and after Trump’s repeated attempts to use every trick in the book to evade prosecution, it’s time for a reckoning for the role he played.
One important reason I’m running for U.S. Senate is to continue defending our democracy and holding those who would tear it down to account. California needs a leader with a proven record of taking on the toughest fights and getting results. I’ve done that. Now, I’m ready to take that fight to the Senate.
**Early voting across California is happening NOW.** Can you rush $10 or whatever you can spare to help our campaign reach more voters?
If you can, please, use my personal link: **[secure.actblue.com/donate/feb2024_abs_em?refcode=MSNBC](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=feb2024_abs_em.yNAKTE&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20240206_PM2_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=5&akid=5377%2E5257348%2ExC6FBm)**
28 days to go. Your support means the world. Thank you.
— Adam

name: Vale Sloane, Atlas Network
subject: Are you concerned about the future of property rights?
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.libertyledger.)
---
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

Why would the loss of property rights in a place like Minnesota be important to you? Let me share the story of how one of Atlas Network's partner organizations helped an elderly homeowner, and in doing so, helped protect property rights for everyone in the United States. I’d also [love to hear](http://trk.libertyledger.)what you think about this vital issue below.

Geraldine Tyler, an elderly homeowner from Minnesota, had sadly lost her home due to unpaid taxes. Her condo was valued at $40,000, and after it was seized to pay $15,000 in property taxes, her county kept the difference!

This was _legal_ under state law, and even routine in many states. This practice, commonly known as Home Equity Theft, is an unjust practice that Atlas Network partner organization Pacific Legal Foundation rightly observed was unconstitutional under the Fifth Amendment’s takings clause.

As one of our more than 500 partners across the globe, we provide the team at Pacific Legal Foundation with training, grants, and mentorship with like-minded partners around the world, so they can raise their ambitions and make an even bigger impact with their mission.

After two years of legal battles that ultimately led to the United States Supreme Court, the Pacific Legal Foundation achieved a historic victory. This past spring, the Supreme Court rejected Home Equity Theft in a unanimous decision, marking a historic win for our partner and a significant step forward in protecting property rights. States are now legally bound to return the remaining proceeds of a seizure to the owner.

Geraldine Tyler is just one person among countless others who have been impacted by the lack of well-defined property rights.

At Atlas Network, we believe that property rights are essential for fostering economic freedom and prosperity within a society. We’d love to hear how you feel about this crucial topic by answering a short survey.

[I want to give my opinion.](http://trk.libertyledger._RGw5u8DPDXqXbA)

As a thank you for taking the time to answer these critical questions, we will send you a copy of _Freedom’s Champion_ , Atlas Network’s free digital magazine that celebrates organizations leading the charge for the global freedom movement.
Thank you,
Vale Vale Sloane | Director of DevelopmentAtlas Network

---

Atlas Network 4075 Wilson Blvd #310 Arlington, Virginia 22203
---
Liberty Ledger P.O. Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178 If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.libertyledger.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MDM4LTNiOGYwMjRhMzE4ODRiZjc4OWUxM2UzNzJlZDFkMzZjIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/xKCImVSf1AnkztE5GApBgw) to unsubscribe.
---

My name is Mazi Pilip- I'm the GOP candidate in the NY special election

---

Friend,

I never thought I'd have running water, let alone be running for Congress.

My name is Mazi Melesa Pilip, but you can call me Mazi for short!

I'm the Republican nominee running in the New York special election that was just declared.

If you don't already know- this is the one & only seat we absolutely have to win to defend the House Majority.

I'm a black, Jewish woman & I'm not afraid to tell you that I am 100% Pro-Law Enforcement, Pro-Border security, and Pro-Family.

Democrats & the liberal media have spent years saying the GOP will never support someone of my ethnicity & my creed.

They say women like me don't exist & that we can't be any of those things.

And now they're spending millions to bury me in negative headlines, hit pieces, and TV commercials.

They take great pleasure in laying waste to minority women who don't fall in line with their sacred narrative.

And without your help today- I'm afraid I'm going to be one of them.

The only way to stop them is to come out of the gates strong with the full weight and might of the conservative movement behind me.

I've just launched my campaign to keep NY-03 red & so I'm humbly asking you to stand with me as we embark on this sprint to the finish line.

Early voting begins in just a few days. That makes this the most important race in the nation right now.

I hope you'll step up & stand with me today to defeat the Democrats & hold the House Majority.

name: Steve Garvey
subject: Will you help me strike out this liberal lineup?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U
body:
Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?

| |
---
| | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683994%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PafY4AcI5FabdHc3oJM4GA&sysid=1)
---
| | Friend, **[**Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683905%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4Ti7GNYi%2b7CSvDs9WkZsxQ&sysid=1)** That’s the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November. I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to “choose” between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee... ...and that’s being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go “three up...three down” against this lineup of liberal career politicians. That’s a bit of baseball vernacular. No surprise, right? It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning. Then, it’s your team’s turn to go on offense. Well, that’s very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country. Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years - most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I’m reaching out to you today. **[Will you step up and help strike out this “lineup of liberals” through a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683906%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=n9AJndc9KdFy6tpSS3ZJRw&sysid=1)** Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California. Think about the daily reality of:
---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California. • Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don’t lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---
If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a “false choice” between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, **[**then I need you to take immediate action and rush a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683907%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=04Tm7JV%2bKMM7zkvVwDI%2b9w&sysid=1)** Winning this election requires a one-two punch:
---
1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign “connecting the dots” between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day.
---
In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That’s my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. **[But I need your help. I’d consider it a great honor to have you on my campaign team. I also consider your support a must have in order to win this race.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683908%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pFYmr7DRdAv9GqkTwBK3Ng&sysid=1)** With you on our side, I’m confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again.
---
| | With deepest appreciation,
---
---
Steve Garvey Republican for United States Senate
---
|
---
| | [**DONATE**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683909%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cBfAwtIeWjFYFiPZqtRmBA&sysid=1)
---
| | |
---
|
---
**MY VISION**
---
My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. As your U.S. Senator, I will serve with commonsense, compassion, and will work to build consensus to benefit all of the people of California. I’ve been fortunate to wear many hats in life - from professional athlete to businessman to philanthropist. But the one thing that has remained consistent is my love for this great state and my desire to make a difference. In baseball, it’s not about the individual; it’s about the team. I believe the same holds true for politics. It’s time we come together, find common ground, and work towards a brighter future.
---
[**More About Me**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683900%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=csr2cFfYNiTNOBgM2OuqXw&sysid=1)
