name: Hillsdale College via Trump Train News
subject: I hope you’ll join us
body:
This course goes about this task by examining the actual words and actions of the Founders

| | | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zve5cp6atfneshkc1ul1d1n462dalrmrkisuu49o_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cpg6co74cth2bs)
---
| |
Hello Friend,

Thomas G. West, professor of politics at Hillsdale College, is one of the great scholars and teachers of the American Founding.

That's why we're so excited to offer a course that explains his core teachings about the American Founding, **which is now available on DVD.**

In this course, Dr. West sits down with David Azerrad, his former student and current professor at Hillsdale's Graduate School of Government, to reveal the truth about the American Founding.

As Dr. West explains, the Founders' political theory is so foreign to Americans today--even to scholars and teachers of American history and politics--that the task of uncovering the truth about the Founding is like unearthing something from a "deep and long-forgotten pit."

This course goes about this task by examining the actual words and actions of the Founders, and it brings their theory to life by comparing it to the dominant views of contemporary America.

The result is an exciting and often surprising account of how the Founders established a free government in America and what they thought was necessary to sustain it.

As you know, our online courses are free. That's why we depend on the generosity of people like you to help us share the course with as many people as possible.

Would you consider making a tax-deductible donation to help promote this course?

And now, for any donation of $100 or more, you will receive this beautiful DVD box set for **" The Real American Founding: A Conversation,"** by clicking the link below.

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/real-american-founding-dvd](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcdcgnermppn0d9qmlu1kbb3i4uujagbc5tgh27g_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cpg6co74cth2bs)

I hope you'll join us in this fun and important work of sharing the truth about the American Founding with your fellow Americans.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

---
---
| |
---

Trump Train News
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

Fellow Conservative, Sam Brown is wrong for our Party and wrong for Nevada. His record is clear.

He’s carpetbagged to run for office before – down in Texas – and bolted as soon as he lost. He formed a business to collect federal COVID emergency funds, and doesn’t want to talk about the finer points now. He also formed a PAC and raised money, promising to help Republican candidates, and he doesn’t want to talk about those shady books either.

**This guy is a FRAUD – he's no conservative, that’s for sure.**

**He recently “endorsed” President Trump out of sheer desperation...****_after months of refusing to back our soon-to-be 2024 presidential nominee!_**

I am the only proven conservative in this race running to fight for you. I need your help. **[**Will you fuel our fight to DEFEAT the RINO establishment in this primary race?**](http://trk.secureandprosper.)**

The last thing we need is another Never Trumper in Washington. It’s time to Make America Great Again, AGAIN... and I’m all in to make it happen.

**I’m ready to lead the charge to send Jacky Rosen packing and TAKE BACK THE SENATE!**

It’s all hands on deck. **[I’m grateful for any support you can send today.](http://trk.secureandprosper._Asuax0shqsFBcf2GCdIg)**

Jim Marchant

name: Clarence for GA
subject: Help us get rid of Majorie Taylor Greene
body:
Marjorie Taylor Greene needs to go

| | |
### Clarence for Ga
---
# Help us get rid of Marjorie Taylor Greene!
---
---
Dear Friend, I hope this message finds you well. I am thrilled to officially announce my candidacy for Congress in Georgia's 14th Congressional District. My name is Clarence Blalock, and I am eager to represent our community with integrity, reason, and a commitment to unity. Now, more than ever, we need leaders who can bridge the divides that have fractured our political discourse. I am running to replace extremism with common sense, intolerance with understanding, and division with unity. It's time for a change from the divisive and extreme rhetoric that has characterized our representation in Congress. We cannot afford to be represented by someone like Marjorie Taylor Greene, whose actions and words have only deepened the divides within our community. Together, we can move beyond the partisan gridlock and work towards solutions that benefit everyone in our community. I invite you to join me on this journey. Together, we can build a brighter future for Georgia's 14th Congressional District. Visit my campaign website at [[https://clarenceforga.com/](https://clarenceforga.nationbuilder.com/r?u=-vEucXVDv74T9_-YlcW5Pq4MsL4XYWtiVceKH6qkNC0&e=6f1c74e2a45eca17656082602fe177d4&utm_source=clarenceforga&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=blast2&n=1&v=2)] to learn more about my platform and how you can get involved. Thank you for considering me as your candidate for Congress. Let's stand together for progress, unity, and a better tomorrow. Warm regards, Clarence Blalock

name: Steve Garvey
subject: Defeat Adam Schiff
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U
body:
Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?

| |
---
| | [](http://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkM2OpCAURp8Gd1SQH9GFi-qxrE07mThJz5IgXCwmogawO_32E5Oq_WxPbm7O-f4MatB-8ev8UwdoY1AxqcmqWcdP-MbJPLxzihLKMaGYSFUWtq0aKuuygLaURNKmbmpSPFqgomkaaqhmk7O1MIRLCeBqB5V2pSh8e_4hlEhSc8H5xdDJNlBJbiQhkxCIkwj7MS3e6DXov1v0-fuyQi6W9pHznhC7Itoj2icwR4TLl18j2IvZwskyfAJ-irst4iPhBKvOgGhvYSprykAY7dikBWL9kYNK2xENINa9dXc83j4QrU4cwPojINbdhicxOuzazyti3TOiVG_dXf2-_7iq93c13j7UryseX_fZINaNA34VF7G1-5dfFp8qiTiZg_bLKV7k_xn9XwAAAP__y_mEcQ)
---
| | Friend, **[**Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?**](http://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkM2OpCAURp8Gd1SQH9GFi-qxrE07mThJz5IgXCwmogawO_32E5Oq_WxPbm7O-f4MatB-8ev8UwdoY1AxqcmqWcdP-MbJPLxzihLKMaGYSFUWtq0aKuuygLaURNKmbmpSPFqgomkaaqhmk7O1MIRLCeBqB5V2pSh8e_4hlEhSc8H5xdDJNlBJbiQhkxCIkwj7MS3e6DXov1v0-fuyQi6W9pHznhC7Itoj2icwR4TLl18j2IvZwskyfAJ-irst4iPhBKvOgGhvYSprykAY7dikBWL9kYNK2xENINa9dXc83j4QrU4cwPojINbdhicxOuzazyti3TOiVG_dXf2-_7iq93c13j7UryseX_fZINaNA34VF7G1-5dfFp8qiTiZg_bLKV7k_xn9XwAAAP__y_mEcQ)** That’s the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November.I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to “choose” between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee......and that’s being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go “three up...three down” against this lineup of liberal career politicians.That’s a bit of baseball vernacular.No surprise, right?It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning.Then, it’s your team’s turn to go on offense. Well, that’s very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country.Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years – most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I’m reaching out to you today.**[Will you step up and help strike out this “lineup of liberals” through a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today?](http://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkM2OpCAURp8Gd1SQH9GFi-qxrE07mThJz5IgXCwmogawO_32E5Oq_WxPbm7O-f4MatB-8ev8UwdoY1AxqcmqWcdP-MbJPLxzihLKMaGYSFUWtq0aKuuygLaURNKmbmpSPFqgomkaaqhmk7O1MIRLCeBqB5V2pSh8e_4hlEhSc8H5xdDJNlBJbiQhkxCIkwj7MS3e6DXov1v0-fuyQi6W9pHznhC7Itoj2icwR4TLl18j2IvZwskyfAJ-irst4iPhBKvOgGhvYSprykAY7dikBWL9kYNK2xENINa9dXc83j4QrU4cwPojINbdhicxOuzazyti3TOiVG_dXf2-_7iq93c13j7UryseX_fZINaNA34VF7G1-5dfFp8qiTiZg_bLKV7k_xn9XwAAAP__y_mEcQ)** Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California.Think about the daily reality of:
---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California.• Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don’t lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---
If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a “false choice” between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, **[**then I need you to take immediate action and rush a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today.**](http://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkM2OpCAURp8Gd1SQH9GFi-qxrE07mThJz5IgXCwmogawO_32E5Oq_WxPbm7O-f4MatB-8ev8UwdoY1AxqcmqWcdP-MbJPLxzihLKMaGYSFUWtq0aKuuygLaURNKmbmpSPFqgomkaaqhmk7O1MIRLCeBqB5V2pSh8e_4hlEhSc8H5xdDJNlBJbiQhkxCIkwj7MS3e6DXov1v0-fuyQi6W9pHznhC7Itoj2icwR4TLl18j2IvZwskyfAJ-irst4iPhBKvOgGhvYSprykAY7dikBWL9kYNK2xENINa9dXc83j4QrU4cwPojINbdhicxOuzazyti3TOiVG_dXf2-_7iq93c13j7UryseX_fZINaNA34VF7G1-5dfFp8qiTiZg_bLKV7k_xn9XwAAAP__y_mEcQ)** Winning this election requires a one-two punch:
---
1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign “connecting the dots” between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day.
---
In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That’s my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. **[But I need your help. I’d consider it a great honor to have you on my campaign team. I also consider your support a must have in order to win this race.](http://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkM2OpCAURp8Gd1SQH9GFi-qxrE07mThJz5IgXCwmogawO_32E5Oq_WxPbm7O-f4MatB-8ev8UwdoY1AxqcmqWcdP-MbJPLxzihLKMaGYSFUWtq0aKuuygLaURNKmbmpSPFqgomkaaqhmk7O1MIRLCeBqB5V2pSh8e_4hlEhSc8H5xdDJNlBJbiQhkxCIkwj7MS3e6DXov1v0-fuyQi6W9pHznhC7Itoj2icwR4TLl18j2IvZwskyfAJ-irst4iPhBKvOgGhvYSprykAY7dikBWL9kYNK2xENINa9dXc83j4QrU4cwPojINbdhicxOuzazyti3TOiVG_dXf2-_7iq93c13j7UryseX_fZINaNA34VF7G1-5dfFp8qiTiZg_bLKV7k_xn9XwAAAP__y_mEcQ)** With you on our side, I’m confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again.
---
| | With deepest appreciation,
---
---
Steve GarveyRepublican for United States Senate
---
|
---

**MY VISION**
---
My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. As your U.S. Senator, I will serve with commonsense, compassion, and will work to build consensus to benefit all of the people of California.I’ve been fortunate to wear many hats in life – from professional athlete to businessman to philanthropist. But the one thing that has remained consistent is my love for this great state and my desire to make a difference.In baseball, it’s not about the individual; it’s about the team. I believe the same holds true for politics. It’s time we come together, find common ground, and work towards a brighter future.
---

clean_body: Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th? | | | | | | Friend, That’s the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November.I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to “choose” between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee......and that’s being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go “three up...three down” against this lineup of liberal career politicians.That’s a bit of baseball vernacular.No surprise, right?It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning.Then, it’s your team’s turn to go on offense. Well, that’s very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country.Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years – most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I’m reaching out to you today. Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California.Think about the daily reality of: • Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California.• Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don’t lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction. If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a “false choice” between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, Winning this election requires a one-two punch: 1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign “connecting the dots” between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day. In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That’s my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. With you on our side, I’m confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again. | | With deepest appreciation, Steve GarveyRepublican for United States Senate | | | | | | | MY VISION My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. As your U.S. Senator, I will serve with commonsense, compassion, and will work to build consensus to benefit all of the people of California.I’ve been fortunate to wear many hats in life – from professional athlete to businessman to philanthropist. But the one thing that has remained consistent is my love for this great state and my desire to make a difference.In baseball, it’s not about the individual; it’s about the team. I believe the same holds true for politics. It’s time we come together, find common ground, and work towards a brighter future. | | | | PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U.S. SENATE PO Box 532389Los Angeles, CA 90053-2389 | | | Republican Majority PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Tom Barrett for Congress
subject: Hertel Negotiates Six-Figure Kick-Back from Non-Profit
body:
He doesn’t even pretend to be embarrassed by it... | | | [](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=65c38d40b26b800022382dc2&u=https%3A%2F%2Ftombarrettforcongress.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D65c2663246fe1d250380c54a%26ss_email_id%3D65c38d40b26b800022382dc2%26ss_campaign_name%3DHertel%2BNegotiates%2BSix-Figure%2BKick-Back%2Bfrom%2BNon-Profit%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2024-02-07T14%253A05%253A51Z&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_65c2663246fe1d250380c54a&l=en-US&s=1zGE2hU_WXKNW6wbLYdnveqRqGc%3D)
---
| **Hertel Negotiates Six-Figure Kick-Back from Non-Profit**
---
(Lansing, Mich.) - Democratic candidate Curtis Hertel, Jr., who was appointed Governor Gretchen Whitmer’s top lobbyist after a 22-year career in elected office, including eight years in the State Senate, [negotiated a six-figure contract from a politically-connected non-profit](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=65c38d40b26b800022382dc2&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.detroitnews.com%2Fstory%2Fnews%2Fpolitics%2F2023%2F11%2F01%2Fcurtis-hertel-michigan-congress-greater-flint-health-coalition-jim-ananich-gretchen-whitmer%2F71385198007%2F&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_65c2663246fe1d250380c54a&l=en-US&s=4zXHvf3GKNUgXfcSh3B6TcsoLbc%3D) on his way out of the governor’s office.The $1.5 million in taxpayer funds were requested by Hertel’s former Senate colleague, Jim Ananich, CEO of the Greater Flint Health Coalition. Hertel’s wife, Elizabeth Hertel, Whitmer’s Director of Health and Human Services, then gave Ananich the $1.5 million as part of the FY2024 budget negotiated by...Curtis. Ananich [admitted to The Detroit News in a Nov. 1, 2023 article](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=65c38d40b26b800022382dc2&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.detroitnews.com%2Fstory%2Fnews%2Fpolitics%2F2023%2F11%2F01%2Fcurtis-hertel-michigan-congress-greater-flint-health-coalition-jim-ananich-gretchen-whitmer%2F71385198007%2F&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_65c2663246fe1d250380c54a&l=en-US&s=4zXHvf3GKNUgXfcSh3B6TcsoLbc%3D), that he and Curtis discussed the arrangement while negotiating the funding request.Hours after the budget was passed, Hertel announced his resignation and three days later received his first payment from the Greater Flint Health Coalition.
---
[_ _ End Corruption _ _](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=65c38d40b26b800022382dc2&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Ftom-barrett-for-congress%2Ffollow-the-money&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_65c2663246fe1d250380c54a&l=en-US&s=nU40WIcQ1jP4GTs8SUDcePH0RKM%3D)
---
| [](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=65c38d40b26b800022382dc2&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.detroitnews.com%2Fstory%2Fnews%2Fpolitics%2F2023%2F11%2F01%2Fcurtis-hertel-michigan-congress-greater-flint-health-coalition-jim-ananich-gretchen-whitmer%2F71385198007%2F&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_65c2663246fe1d250380c54a&l=en-US&s=4zXHvf3GKNUgXfcSh3B6TcsoLbc%3D)
---
[_ _ Stop the Grift _ _](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=65c38d40b26b800022382dc2&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Ftom-barrett-for-congress%2Ffollow-the-money&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_65c2663246fe1d250380c54a&l=en-US&s=nU40WIcQ1jP4GTs8SUDcePH0RKM%3D)
---
“People are tired of self-dealing from our government officials,” said Republican candidate Tom Barrett. “Curtis Hertel brazenly engineered a cushy contract for himself courtesy of Michigan taxpayers. On his last day in government, he gave this non-profit $1.5 million; three days later, his first day in the private sector, he took his cut from the same non-profit. He doesn’t even pretend to be embarrassed by it.”
---
|
---
###

name: Christine Drazan
subject: Measure 110 Public Hearing
body:
Register to testify
[](https://andor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xdlkhz-dihkkhuuli-r/) Friend,Tomorrow, Wednesday, February 7th, the Joint Committee On Addiction and Community Safety Response will convene **a public hearing to confront the failure of Measure 110 in addressing Oregon's escalating drug addiction and mental health crisis.** [REGISTER TO TESTIFY](https://andor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xdlkhz-dihkkhuuli-y/) Despite its promises, Measure 110 has fallen short of delivering the comprehensive solutions our communities urgently need. Instead, _it has exacerbated the very problems it aimed to solve, leaving our streets overrun with substance abuse and our mental health infrastructure strained beyond capacity._ Tomorrow the committee will also examine HB 4002 - _a bill masquerading as a solution,**threatening to deepen our state's drug crisis if left unchecked.**_ We must strongly oppose HB 4002. This bill offers false promises and empty solutions. It fails to confront the root causes of addiction and could plunge Oregon deeper into chaos. We cannot afford to let this bill pass unchallenged. [OUR RECOMMENDATIONS TO SOLVE OREGON'S DRUG CRISIS](https://andor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xdlkhz-dihkkhuuli-j/) We cannot afford to overlook the urgency of this moment. **The consequences of inaction are dire, with lives hanging in the balance every day. [That's why we implore all advocates for real change to step forward and testify at the hearing. Your voice is a beacon of hope for those struggling with addiction and mental illness across our state.](https://andor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xdlkhz-dihkkhuuli-t/)** [REGISTER TO TESTIFY](https://andor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xdlkhz-dihkkhuuli-i/) Details for the public hearing are as follows:**Date: Wednesday, February 7th
Time: 5:00pm PT
Location: Joint Committee On Addiction and Community Safety Response****[To make your voice heard, sign up to testify in person at the Capitol, submit written testimony online, or register to testify remotely via Teams by clicking here.](https://andor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xdlkhz-dihkkhuuli-d/)** Time slots are limited, so act swiftly to secure your opportunity to speak truth to power. [REGISTER TO TESTIFY](https://andor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xdlkhz-dihkkhuuli-h/) Now is the time for action. Let us unite in our demand for tangible solutions to Oregon's drug addiction and mental health crisis. Together, we can forge a path towards healing and recovery for all.Thank you for your unwavering commitment to this vital cause, Christine Drazan
Founder, A New Direction [OUR RECOMMENDATIONS TO SOLVE OREGON'S DRUG CRISIS](https://andor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xdlkhz-dihkkhuuli-o/) [](https://andor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xdlkhz-dihkkhuuli-b/)[](https://andor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xdlkhz-dihkkhuuli-n/)[](https://andor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xdlkhz-dihkkhuuli-p/)[](https://andor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xdlkhz-dihkkhuuli-x/) | [Preferences](https://andor.updatemyprofile.com/y-xdlkhz-172B6299-dihkkhuuli-m) | [Unsubscribe](https://andor.cmail19.com/t/y-u-xdlkhz-dihkkhuuli-c/)
---

name: Bob MacGuffie
subject: Jim Himes' Hamas Problem
body:
Campaign Update
---
| | | | | |
---
|
---
| BREAKING COMMENTARY
---
| |
---
| | |
---
February 7, 2024 Last week I penned an article which was posted in both The Times of Israel and The Connecticut Centinal. In it, I dissect how Himes is transiting the arc from being pro-Israel on the day of the Hamas attacks in October, to being increasingly sympathetic to the cause of Hamas.
Not that Himes doesn't try his political jujitsu, having it both ways, on most every major public issue requiring a principled stand, but this issue is highly-visible, and rather stark. The highly agitated Leftist base driving the leadership of the Democrat party, is demanding Himes travel that arc to their full-throated support of Hamas and the Palestinians.
In attempting to advance a significant step to comply, Himes thought it was a good idea to let the Council on American-Islamic Relations (CAIR) lead an online discussion on the Israel-Palestine conflict. CAIR is a well-documented supporter of Islamist terrorists, including Hamas and the Muslim Brotherhood, going back to the '90s. Yep, he lets a pro-terrorist group help him placate his radical base with his participation, while he let his lips get a little too loose, as he revealed some of his deep-seated thinking... and it's not pretty. I guess he was hoping we wouldn't notice. Here's my article:
___________________________________________________________
The Connecticut Centinal Established 1802
Jim Himes' HAMAS Problem
By Bob MacGuffie February 2, 2024
It seems that CT congressman Jim Himes has finally decided which side of the divide he comes out on regarding the HAMAS War.
According to a report by the website "Responsible Statecraft," (RS) which has thus far not been denied by the Himes Campaign:
"A senior Democratic lawmaker recently said that it's easier to back Israeli government policy, in many instances at the expense of the Palestinians, because pro-Israel lobbyists have a relatively more influential presence on Capitol Hill." [Himes-Israel-Lobby](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-QHZj6KFbg1E-O3OFLV6I6Cw_10cVrVqUS4vaGJyKIvYWkdZvF9u_FrxALH-od8bUwy0t0IZzpVAN-hGyQ8fqfithyOKpYdroFRP4jhS7784ypPZoqHEjKjaLFcKGSwDlsnSSJNp-rzbKkFKR6kGjvhG7jO_oLus9V0Pw6lp8aTRkBiHM28S0WgsVAtzh-BZ&c=phpmkUiBb3-US9SeUuFwEidAzoZVuMQBh9vdHUA5-blhLond_VwMwA==&ch=dnfzcVSOY2VLQyRW7wTHFTcXUhCH2j6ABeHZ0OYkAyg2s1c3thgDzA==)
While I welcome this dissembler's decision to take a clear stand, it is unfortunately, in agreement with the most RADICAL members of the Democrat party, and far from his incessant positioning while here in our District that he's a "moderate."
According to RS, in the October 23, 2023 meeting with constituents, Himes - a ranking member of the House Intelligence Committee - showed the cards he usually keeps so close to his vest. Himes said:
"The Palestinians have very legitimate claims" and have been "subject to brutal injustice..."
Himes is upset that pro-Israel groups such as J-Street and the American Israel Public Affairs Committee (AIPAC) exercise great pro-Israeli influence on Congress. He claims that this is not because Israel is one of America's most important allies... or because Israel is the ONLY Democracy in the Middle East... or because Israel is fighting on the front lines against a hideously cruel and barbaric form of Islamist Fascist Terrorism that is directed as much against the USA (the "Great Satan") as it is against Israel (the "Little Satan"); Oh no...Congress is pro-Israel because doing so is "the path of least resistance" - Himes' words.
Thus, Jim Himes hauls out one of the most historically specious antisemitic tropes; that is, that Israel is corrupting American politics via its spread of lucre, and by frequently visiting with politicians on Capitol Hill so as to bribe them into backing Israeli policies against the Palestinians........
You can read the complete article here: [Himes' HAMAS Problem](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-QHZj6KFbg1E-O3OFLV6I6Cw_10cVrVqUS4vaGJyKIvYWkdZvF9u_FrxALH-od8bsOLfTOjVlAonaKM-JlLBpdKd4k8VzS2dRlx4CRxXfb6HQR2dvDEPKSL1xBmfVl9EohhAYLavE6bpuf9z2QxAPWaYQL_Jx0Y3dpRFQZjXDivtN0y--p10ZNuxoymZK_cf&c=phpmkUiBb3-US9SeUuFwEidAzoZVuMQBh9vdHUA5-blhLond_VwMwA==&ch=dnfzcVSOY2VLQyRW7wTHFTcXUhCH2j6ABeHZ0OYkAyg2s1c3thgDzA==)
I will make the 2024 election a referendum on Jim Himes' failed 15-year rule.
If you want to help the candidate who will prosecute an effective and successful case against Himes, please contribute right here: [Donate](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-QHZj6KFbg1E-O3OFLV6I6Cw_10cVrVqUS4vaGJyKIvYWkdZvF9u_NlkW6gng2j5_ykRHLS-wkfdgB1O4GgDppy144QaR0n8K84ewbvqK1TXLEXgrINPu_MHs3fOOeoMfe6BfhleXhQCILl7jeL_cyQLfI8sQ71i08xH4CTLtlqXmEev8P9VjfbF-O935PNh1Xuuoy3c1Y-B8Em6_wm7Ipe_kJQoQnk7uVJlyfvsbBI=&c=phpmkUiBb3-US9SeUuFwEidAzoZVuMQBh9vdHUA5-blhLond_VwMwA==&ch=dnfzcVSOY2VLQyRW7wTHFTcXUhCH2j6ABeHZ0OYkAyg2s1c3thgDzA==)
Please re-circulate this message to any and all who are interested...or should be. Help is on the way,
Bob MacGuffie Candidate for Congress [www.BobMacforCongress.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-QHZj6KFbg1E-O3OFLV6I6Cw_10cVrVqUS4vaGJyKIvYWkdZvF9u_GSXWjxSezWpGb-ThhaTbsW3MVmqO6R443Ql-YVeObX2BTteD7SBClDo1cg_8SbdNGb3ZqTH7zeyj1CwAS-cu2rGg2WoWXKr1QS1BCYw8o-8&c=phpmkUiBb3-US9SeUuFwEidAzoZVuMQBh9vdHUA5-blhLond_VwMwA==&ch=dnfzcVSOY2VLQyRW7wTHFTcXUhCH2j6ABeHZ0OYkAyg2s1c3thgDzA==)

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Watch the trailer for our newest course, “The Exodus Story”
body:

subject: Nearly $5 million
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
we need to mobilize right now.
| | | | |

| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T71d12e18-4470-48a4-85da-c2dbcd0e67e5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._

| | | | | Peter, We’re here with some _**shocking**_ new developments in the special election to replace George Santos, which is just 6 days away. __**First:**__ Polling showed this race _**within the margin of error**_ and our time to convince voters is rapidly narrowing. __**Then:**__ National Republican Super PACs launched a $2.3 million ad buy to keep this seat **RED** , which means they’re spending _**thousands of dollars on attack ads every hour of every day!**_ __**Now:**__ National Republicans are pouring _**an additional $2.6 million into this race**_ in the final days, bringing their total to _**nearly $5 million!!**_ ** Peter, we need to fight back against these lies and correct the record!! With just 6 days until Election Day and early voting underway, we need all hands on deck!** [**Chip in now to fight back against the latest round of GOP attacks and flip NY-03 back to BLUE!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf9c73ce4-7277-4f0e-ac50-e740f618cc48/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| We really need you on board. -Special Election Alerts

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.

name: =?utf-8?Q?April=20Newland?=
subject: Will you be there for me?
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by April Newland for National Committeewoman
body:
I need you to show up and cast a vote.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/6b76a4196e6a/re-hey-9345737?e=d30db4cde8)
Friends,

I started my campaign to be your Republican national committeewoman on a positive note.

I’ll end my campaign on a positive note, even as two or three people try to manufacturer controversy where controversy does not exist.

I’m running for one simple reason: I want a real Republican Party.

Thanks to Chairman Gordon Ackley and so many members like you, we have rebuilt the Republican Party in the Virgin Islands in less than a year.

For the first time since at least 2012, we are going into the caucus and Republican nominating convention later this year as a unified party — a party that is slowly but surely becoming the political alternative to the ruling party that has failed our islands. We have even recruited credible candidates for Virgin Islands senator from each legislative district. Imagine how things in these islands can change if we elect Republicans senators in the Legislature.

Monday, Nikki Haley headlined her second event in as many weeks (https://newsfeed.wtjx.org/podcast/wtjx-newsfeed/2024-02-06/nikki-haley-comments-on-virgin-islanders-voting-for-president-and-refinery-issues) . It was great to have a standing room-only crowd at The Buccaneer on St. Croix, where interim National Committeeman John Clendenin got Ambassador Haley to commit to looking at full voting rights for the Virgin Islands and the other U.S. territories.

As the New York Post reported yesterday (https://nypost.com/2024/02/06/news/how-the-jeffrey-epstein-sex-scandal-became-a-key-issue-in-us-virgin-islands-gop-caucus/) , Ambassador Haley committed to appointing conservative Republicans to the important federal positions of U.S. attorney, U.S. marshal, and U.S. District Court judge. With billions in federal money having flown through the territory since 2017’s hurricanes, we need accountability.

Make no mistake. I’m not running to be national committeewoman to get my photo taken or turn the party into a sect for only the truest of true believers.

I’m running because you deserve better. We deserve better.

Your entire Republican leadership team is working together to continue the forward progress. It won’t be easy. Even after tomorrow’s election, there will still be plenty of work for all of us to do.

But, my friends, our fellow Virgin Islanders are desperate for an alternative. Our party, the Republican Party in the Virgin Islands, can be that alternative.

Tomorrow is the big day. Voting in the caucus is 7 a.m. to 6 p.m. at the La Reine Chicken Shack on St. Croix and Bluebeard's Castle on St. Thomas and 10 a.m. to 4 p.m. at Lovango Rum Bar on St. John.

Will you be at the caucus for me?

I need you to show up and cast a vote.

Thank you,

April Newland
Candidate for National Committeewoman
340-643-4347

============================================================

body:
A federal appeals court panel ruled that Donald Trump [isn't immune from prosecution](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGu4jAQAL8m6Yyc9ZJNihTX0HHtlZHxrmFPTmw5BsTfn7j6laNpRvPnul69Jt3vv_0mS4t59aHpS1YwZABX7HmJIiCul2UgS24YkVz_WCZGpulmaQ4IcR5udmZ3ZrQwg4uee13AAlqwNNgzWTw55oEQcIiTuCihQyusLdfT36x7e0hMn_ySegp569PyaK0cnfvVwaWDiy-7vI-v-kJtGpJ0cGn1uRUTfNGWk6mamylVDmXZm_pkdNueu7aP8aWITwbHAEwx0GQpsIMRaER2Z0GKbrbS14XLW1PSY6QO7X3zmv4HtZ_u_AsAAP__JBllqA) in his 2020 election interference case, just days after prosecutors publicly fretted the court was taking too long.

## Court Rejects Trump Immunity Appeal
A federal appeals court panel ruled that Donald Trump [isn't immune from prosecution](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGu4jAQAL8m6Yyc9ZJNihTX0HHtlZHxrmFPTmw5BsTfn7j6laNpRvPnul69Jt3vv_0mS4t59aHpS1YwZABX7HmJIiCul2UgS24YkVz_WCZGpulmaQ4IcR5udmZ3ZrQwg4uee13AAlqwNNgzWTw55oEQcIiTuCihQyusLdfT36x7e0hMn_ySegp569PyaK0cnfvVwaWDiy-7vI-v-kJtGpJ0cGn1uRUTfNGWk6mamylVDmXZm_pkdNueu7aP8aWITwbHAEwx0GQpsIMRaER2Z0GKbrbS14XLW1PSY6QO7X3zmv4HtZ_u_AsAAP__JBllqA) in his 2020 election interference case, just days after prosecutors publicly fretted the court was taking too long. In its decision, the court said that whatever protections Trump may have had from prosecution as president, they no longer held now that he was a private citizen. They gave him until Monday to appeal to the U.S. Supreme Court. The prosecution is frozen until the [appeals process runs out](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGO4yAQQL8GOiIYiHEKimvc5dorLWKGeE5gLDzOKn-_2tRbvyc96f27z_dIhbbn31gxcG5zXJheOIPyCtzsZAoZEdBKDMZrb83gvJVrMAaif4ywJDsM5mqSxyHeFgd-HDLkUVIADU6D9kZfvXYXm5LxDpzJI9qMi3AaE3Hrl_-NNl4xl3d7Yb8srcoSVub9EPaPgEnAxCuuVMoPEzB1fJ4lMrVNwLS0s7N6ROaCh4DJuau-3UBxP-t-KKr13Ijf6jj3jhXVxxcwyR7S_kWl0DF44fSzRvoEJP924jsAAP__OZBf1A), so the case will continue to be delayed while Trump appeals. Prosecutors have said they're concerned the delays will push the trial into election season or even past it.
## Credit Card Debt Hits Record $1.13 Trillion
Consumer credit card debt has [hit a record $1.13 trillion](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDGP4yAUhH8N7p4FDwJ2QXGNu1x7pUXgERNhsAgXa__9yltvM82MvhnNv_t6dymn8vzrdrI91tX5nj60IhhAtaoh2EiEJAeywnAjhVZGDpvVWvgZH1wHMU8uTNM0Rx7F7G_GKE23IVnkqDhyI_jNcDXKEIRRqEScSEbyTHEKqdc2vmoqfaOYv-qH2ujrPmS79X68mfzDcGG4nOc5-vLwl8lwudAMF46XaIaLbxcLvGsBHi674ukNr__7Ab1CoRPEcZUICb2lnFMt0MjXFsB1oBKgRkCOctz6nodmw3Fesbc2TPHn7lL-mdV_--g7AAD__w2nZhU), rising another $50 billion, or 5%, in the fourth quarter of 2023, according to a new report from the Federal Reserve in New York. Credit card delinquency soared as well, particularly among younger and lower-income borrowers. Part of the problem, analysts said, is that credit card interest rates have topped 20%, rising along with the Fed's string of 11 rate hikes. Auto loan delinquencies also [spiked to their highest level](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFu9CAQBOCnwR0WrNfGf0HxN-4ubUqLg-VuIwwXzJ2Tt4-cOs00I30jzftlvThOnG9vbiPbYlmdb_yiFaSRgCt2wUYioKEjq40yg57QDN3d6tErZQJGPV_neY4UR_9vwgn16H2Yrx1bUIAKlNFqNAr7IQRtEFDHmYZIXqCiwK3U_qNwbneK6bu8qPa-bF2y99Yeuxj-C1gELMdx9O6Ly362ApbTFrAoOGMSsLiNKnuXd-nryUrvapDu2YpMxWUZKHH-fFL2THtXbXgcnBLvkxGobpvj9Lvb_jrhJwAA___3sl0R) since the Great Recession in 2009. _" Even though the economy overall is doing great, there are pockets out there where people are overextended,"_ one analyst said.
## Country Music Star Toby Keith Dead at 62
[Toby Keith](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFyhCAURuGn0Q4HL6xsY5HGbtOmdFB-lARhB69rfPtMUqc-zZnv4zE-bIghLe92Q88-j3bm8MJIwgjSo65d7wGCqtG3RhrVdtqoeu3V7MneSUHbGyYYZ-9t58nfnHezNrIOPUnSkqRp5c1I3SjnWqNJt_4O5TFXWsIFzqX5zCHxCh-v_EJp5rzVsV-Zn3ul3ioaKhrO82x8_k44999e0YDEKGxD2pC4ooFLmA7GLp75KILzdIkvBF5FxILkbLnEnI_C2C9R4MS5BoaY4gGxh7SgCAfrREd16d3zDDGGvTOVlstmQ_yb4v-EfgIAAP__v8drmw), one of country music's biggest stars, died Monday of stomach cancer, leaving behind a legacy of music and philanthropy. Keith, an Oklahoma native known for his outspoken demeanor, sold 40 million albums and had 20 No. 1 songs, including _Courtesy of the Red, White & Blue_ (The Angry American), _Beer for my Horses,_ and _Should've Been a Cowboy --_[here's the video](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsjz1rwzAQQH-NtMXo45KLBw2FYigkXTp0NBfpFKuVo9RWbNJfX9I563vw4H0e-yOlnC7ndxrZ1Vh68jUt3JsNbgz0IIOLzIatZKdRodU7QCsH55GJEGxLmjgGxFafAsY27EOr1JZkckYZUEahVltU0NgQNIIBHfdsI3sBikOqZWq-SrrUgWO-l4WnxpdRZjfUep2FfRGmE6Zb17W5l1u9nfjhH4SqH4TtFmFf6e1HH5bfj8P8LScXrmvKOc07FKDOI6X8n6zP_v4CAAD__zCfUXY) for that song. Keith often donated his time and money to charitable causes. He participated in 11 USO tours and constructed the OK Kids Korral in Oklahoma City, a facility for pediatric cancer patients and their families. You can see [his life in pictures here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7Fu7CAQQNGvgY4VMIPxKyhe427TprQwDOtJsLFstNH-fZTUqa90pfN-n--RK--Pt7hR6KXNMXV-0myVVxZnlDkUIksgKRivPZgBPcg1EJXoU1xwARgTGsqLds65MuicAZLkYLVFbbU32nmNN8jZeLRoykhQKAnUlLm38_bReO8rlfpqTzpvqW2yhrX34xLwX9hJ2OmgdlT6ScJOvS0v9UncV1W5kOJdHWvr7VKjc_8QUJ4hH19cK1-DF6gfW-T6--1_Ib8DAAD__9V6UuY). Fellow country star Blake Shelton posted [his feelings about Keith's passing](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGymzAQheGnEd0yYlmQG4q4oHMaFykZGS1IsZA8aA3jt8849W3P15z5_9ymmw0xpPW33XiQJU92lnDwhGAAaaLKDQszclvx0Bht2qYn01Z-uCC1fUfUdeRYc480a6e17RZCarSpwoAaSaM2je6Mprp1rjFfXC7cLjwr0uyC5L3-m0MSz0v85IP3es5bFQcv8iqq_aVwVDie51lvJX1N4cgJ3kXh6NlG8QrHLJ53heMj2idD8RwlJ5htAoEHx8AHg-THB54cxEMosOb0nd6r5yKw2QQB-OAdNhaFo93hem38_e3v1T641xliDKU3ivS62RD_n5Sfiv0LAAD__6lLbRI) on social media: _"Thank you brother for being a friend, a hero and an inspiration. clean_body: A federal appeals court panel ruled that Donald Trump in his 2020 election interference case, just days after prosecutors publicly fretted the court was taking too long. | | | | | | WEDNESDAY, FEBRUARY 7, 2024 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1974, Mel Brooks premiered his Western comedy "Blazing Saddles" at a Burbank drive-in, with a twist: The guests watched not from their cars but on horseback. () Thanks to the nearly 100 Flyover readers who sent us their favorite wise quotations for "Wisdom Wednesday." All of them were excellent, and we want to highlight one of our favorites, from Mary West: " A candle loses nothing by lighting another." Do you have any feedback for The Editor? Hit reply and let us know what you think about today's edition. We look forward to hearing from you! In case you haven't signed up for The Flyover yet, you can do that here . Our sponsor today is , a tasty electrolyte drink mix that replaces vital electrolytes without the sugar and dodgy ingredients. | Court Rejects Trump Immunity Appeal A federal appeals court panel ruled that Donald Trump in his 2020 election interference case, just days after prosecutors publicly fretted the court was taking too long. In its decision, the court said that whatever protections Trump may have had from prosecution as president, they no longer held now that he was a private citizen. They gave him until Monday to appeal to the U.S. Supreme Court. The prosecution is frozen until the , so the case will continue to be delayed while Trump appeals. Prosecutors have said they're concerned the delays will push the trial into election season or even past it. Credit Card Debt Hits Record $1.13 Trillion Consumer credit card debt has , rising another $50 billion, or 5%, in the fourth quarter of 2023, according to a new report from the Federal Reserve in New York. Credit card delinquency soared as well, particularly among younger and lower-income borrowers. Part of the problem, analysts said, is that credit card interest rates have topped 20%, rising along with the Fed's string of 11 rate hikes. Auto loan delinquencies also since the Great Recession in 2009. " Even though the economy overall is doing great, there are pockets out there where people are overextended," one analyst said. Country Music Star Toby Keith Dead at 62 , one of country music's biggest stars, died Monday of stomach cancer, leaving behind a legacy of music and philanthropy. Keith, an Oklahoma native known for his outspoken demeanor, sold 40 million albums and had 20 No. 1 songs, including Courtesy of the Red, White & Blue (The Angry American), Beer for my Horses, and Should've Been a Cowboy -- for that song. Keith often donated his time and money to charitable causes. He participated in 11 USO tours and constructed the OK Kids Korral in Oklahoma City, a facility for pediatric cancer patients and their families. You can see . Fellow country star Blake Shelton posted on social media: "Thank you brother for being a friend, a hero and an inspiration. Turning Point USA is pleased to announce our newest Contributor, Chrissy Clark! Chrissy is a former TPUSA Chapter President, journalist, and content creator that prides herself on reporting the underreported stories that mainstream media ignores or under-represents. Chrissy got her start in conservative activism and journalism while studying at Michigan State University, where she was the president of her school’s TPUSA chapter for four years (2015-2019). Despite being in a sea of left-wing ideology, her team networked with like-minded conservatives on campus and organized to spread the values of TPUSA. _"I wouldn't be in this position were it not for the lessons TPUSA taught me in college. The activism I learned on campus and through leadership training seminars molded me into the commentator I am today." – Chrissy Clark_ With big goals to propel the conservative movement forward, she started her own podcast and garnered the reputation of creating unique content for her audience. On her podcast, _Underreported Stories_ , she provides the top five stories of the day with a unique and unfiltered perspective on America’s culture crisis. Chrissy can be credited to breaking news too, as she was the first to break the outrageous story about the left canceling several popular Dr. Suess childrens books and the controversy that erupted thereafter. Due to the success of Chrissy’s viral platforms, which have amassed over 460,000+ followers, she has used her reach to boldly fight the culture war! Based in Nashville, Tennessee, she has written for numerous media outlets including, The Daily Wire, Daily Caller, The Federalist, the Washington Free Beacon, and many more! Chrissy Clark joins TPUSA to bring her unique perspective on current events to TPUSA’s Social Media accounts, as well as her journalistic flavor to the TPUSA [Live Feed](https://d1K2-504.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DN+113/d1K2-504/VWdcyL3NNqsjW8TCFWq1nhxSnW6TYKFS59djG_N67vcnv3m2ndW6N1vHY6lZ3pBW4gVpFX4NSDc8W8mY5xR99DZFmW63w9tx6cDfpkN3cPw00CnHgfW40Pw-624RtnqW8PdncC7-2QwDW1_FsBX45NkdjW5cR7nd867NNZW5-tP8Y2dQ0JwW7rHPFr6hKwJmW3wLtHV7KfQvFW3FK2xp1GwDRSW5H1MSy75dQJsVcRmwR5GsYc9W10q5wx4gR-p2W1Tngwt2ZxfFLN1NJj1WV_Rl5W3QSqJx2FNcfLW2w5mwn4bJYPnW4Yj3Sr5zb1-PW8m1TMs8yX4CwW4Dt_pS811bwKdjjrzW04). Stay tuned for more! _"I'm ecstatic to be part of this growing and thriving team. Back in 2019, I was graduating from college and dreamed of having a Contributor position putting out original content for TPUSA. Just shy of five years later, here I am, doing exactly what I set out to do." – Chrissy Clark_ We know she will continue using her platform to tell the truth about our culture, while inspiring generations of young conservatives to do the same! Please find Chrissy and follow her on [Instagram](https://d1K2-504.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DN+113/d1K2-504/VWdcyL3NNqsjW8TCFWq1nhxSnW6TYKFS59djG_N67vcnv3m2ndW6N1vHY6lZ3msW7nX2rK2hqnjqW2ZMWzh2Y_Bt2W4pNhxy6y75kdW3t2rD-40h5G3W29p3kY1Pg5qdVJJMwc8f_p4lW4KcD1L35nBQbN9cnNkM2rMqSW6yWssJ791wHcN7gfx0XMrr0jN7b6txd39g20W3Ns17r4d_Gh-W4pTLDh98Cc4PW288L-v5FVPlXW5vrLfS5s-qtZW97dntb8w47JwVnVPZ87m454pW1nvrmj7tglGSW145Jt3152pSDW59X0dS57Nb6jW1__J0d3F1DGLVWGglB1Q31H6f4T1Cm604), [TikTok](https://d1K2-504.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DN+113/d1K2-504/VWdcyL3NNqsjW8TCFWq1nhxSnW6TYKFS59djG_N67vcnv3m2ndW6N1vHY6lZ3kDW8WHdGD8p9WkzW4m5p033WbZYtW1Fm0s37hx_YhW5mc7jD6GX3bQW1xF7-h42nGQHW6zqkKH53_BPfW8jH3dN37tFbmW3z12Qg2vRfNRW4hbmVQ6RQ3VKW3MQq0S5HJxm5W33ck2S3qyH9hW7XSNt89dmptsW5WQ9v375nt85W7jmp168s84XVN3_1T-TBNyJhW2p91b25jknCmW54dNgt90xNjVW5PJZmX5Q3wgVVZFkTk66yhcMW3nx5z64BwVQPW8VzHKK6cC-lrW3VfYg132Lr4_f1G6nDv04), [Twitter](https://d1K2-504.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DN+113/d1K2-504/VWdcyL3NNqsjW8TCFWq1nhxSnW6TYKFS59djG_N67vcnv3m2ndW6N1vHY6lZ3pTW7v9ZQ15_nSZRVmDVhl7TPjG-VP1WSt7LSvpLW3q9ttY9lxm0HVXRSgp3B_dwnW5pmx6D3pws7cW4DqlxV4gn5t0N2VC0T4Cn4QxW6YhJwb2XYYh2W3_Q2ws7sJS6pVgyWGL3NzjFwW1H_l2y8st-L9W4HgsW22yqGnwW5flBJX8kBq2LVKWWFk3JqJnvW6nCd2h6dbxGTW867Y8Y7tpsg8W2L8qMl3bg24WW3V_9l621JKfLW3TxpYt692PMDW8pt8KM1Ns_BFW5lTMr68xxJWRf2th0_v04), and [YouTube](https://d1K2-504.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DN+113/d1K2-504/VWdcyL3NNqsjW8TCFWq1nhxSnW6TYKFS59djG_N67vcnv3m2ndW6N1vHY6lZ3myW3fvl0m5hDqT1W7LdrTW4gm-9DW4Z4fQj9ffhlNW8jqN4F1Rt9wbN98dkvqPHQvKVCBnMP3hpVTqV2w0RH3n_337W1fYvVq2M9MMDMn0mZvSQ8pLW3jnkvY4F2w8XN3Xt5tTQbP1kW7brMg63ZCfMcW6y6NVq4RWjfLW77xG_93wkRHCW553R8_25zgpzVRzwvR7rj4sCW2jdwgr2jnrnLW4W0lmp3GNxx2N8tHw5lKy22SW7B_LCG48rqz0W3mKYvQ582t92VqLTx_25c4VFf7SNJ_q04).

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Let’s walk together along the path of Jesus Christ
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsOZoOHihN

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osOZoOHihN

Hello
Friend,
Many of
us are familiar with the life and teachings of Jesus Christ. But
have you ever wondered where these amazing stories took place?
In our
fast-paced society, the average American travels about 30 miles a
day. As a result, it can be hard to picture the ministry of
Christ as he walked from town to town and village to village
healing the sick, raising the dead, and giving sight to the
blind.
Jesus
didn't zoom around on the expressway, he walked an average of
about three miles-per-hour, slow enough to minister to everyone
His father put in His path.
To help
you better understand Jesus' area of ministry and the
world-altering impact it had, I created The Jesus Map. It traces
the life and ministry of Jesus Christ, including 52 key events
from His birth in Bethlehem to His ascension on the Mount of
Olives
This
unique reference tool will let you see where he fed the 5,000,
walked on water, and was tempted by Satan. As you walk with
Christ and the Apostles down those dusty Israeli roads, you will
better understand the questions people asked Him and the needs he
confronted.

I pray it
will also inspire you with ways God wants to use you in your area
of influence. Many times, we only need to slow down enough to see
what God has in mind.

clean_body: Hello Friend, Many of us are familiar with the life and teachings of Jesus Christ. But have you ever wondered where these amazing stories took place? In our fast-paced society, the average American travels about 30 miles a day. As a result, it can be hard to picture the ministry of Christ as he walked from town to town and village to village healing the sick, raising the dead, and giving sight to the blind. Jesus didn't zoom around on the expressway, he walked an average of about three miles-per-hour, slow enough to minister to everyone His father put in His path. To help you better understand Jesus' area of ministry and the world-altering impact it had, I created The Jesus Map. It traces the life and ministry of Jesus Christ, including 52 key events from His birth in Bethlehem to His ascension on the Mount of Olives This unique reference tool will let you see where he fed the 5,000, walked on water, and was tempted by Satan. As you walk with Christ and the Apostles down those dusty Israeli roads, you will better understand the questions people asked Him and the needs he confronted. I pray it will also inspire you with ways God wants to use you in your area of influence. Many times, we only need to slow down enough to see what God has in mind. Here's your link to get the map and begin your journey of discovery: Let's walk together along the path of Jesus Christ. Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system January 18, 2022. name: Kevin D. Roberts
subject: Open border extremism
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsS7DOHiBN

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osS7DOHiBN

Fellow
Conservative,

Because I
know your time is valuable, and because this issue is vital to
national security, I'll get straight to the point:

I'm
writing today to invite you to end President Biden's open border
extremism and complete a simple 1-minute survey using the link
below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62777748:sS7DOHiBN:m:3:2627245898:54D0737E24F21CADF9C0B50141EF999A:r

It's
critical that proactive citizens like you respond to this
national poll because despite the legacy media's deafening
silence on the issue, this crisis has now reached historic
proportions with more than 2 million reported encounters between
Border Patrol and illegal immigrants in 2022-as well as over 2
million encounters again in 2023.

This is
more encounters than ever before in our nation's history.

So when
people ask me what I think of President Biden's immigration
policy, I reply: what immigration policy?

Beginning
the day he took office, Biden's "policies" have created one of
the worst humanitarian crises our nation has ever seen.

And now,
untold scores of narcotics, violent criminals, and human
traffickers are flooding into American communities, practically
unabated, every single day.

Decades
of success advancing conservative policies have taught us that
policymakers in Washington tend to be more responsive when they
know that constituents are paying attention.

Will you
help us address this urgent matter of national security by
completing a brief 1-minute survey on Immigration Reform using
the link below?

name: Hillsdale College via Restore Our Nation
subject: Our course on the American Founding—Now on DVD
body:
This course goes about this task by examining the actual words and actions of the Founders

| | | This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/WjSJOWpM3IbIqnSRpcgTRQ~~/AARclAA~~~)
---
| |
Hello Friend,

Thomas G. West, professor of politics at Hillsdale College, is one of the great scholars and teachers of the American Founding.

That's why we're so excited to offer a course that explains his core teachings about the American Founding, **which is now available on DVD.**

In this course, Dr. West sits down with David Azerrad, his former student and current professor at Hillsdale's Graduate School of Government, to reveal the truth about the American Founding.

As Dr. West explains, the Founders' political theory is so foreign to Americans today--even to scholars and teachers of American history and politics--that the task of uncovering the truth about the Founding is like unearthing something from a "deep and long-forgotten pit."

This course goes about this task by examining the actual words and actions of the Founders, and it brings their theory to life by comparing it to the dominant views of contemporary America.

The result is an exciting and often surprising account of how the Founders established a free government in America and what they thought was necessary to sustain it.

As you know, our online courses are free. That's why we depend on the generosity of people like you to help us share the course with as many people as possible.

Would you consider making a tax-deductible donation to help promote this course?

And now, for any donation of $100 or more, you will receive this beautiful DVD box set for **" The Real American Founding: A Conversation,"** by clicking the link below.

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/real-american-founding-dvd](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/WjSJOWpM3IbIqnSRpcgTRQ~~/AARclAA~~~)

I hope you'll join us in this fun and important work of sharing the truth about the American Founding with your fellow Americans.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

---
---
| |
---

Restore Our Nation
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/C3jzejp9KG20LI4rGu3UIg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnpgmsP0RpaHR0cHM6Ly9vcHRvdXQucmVzdG9yZS1vdXItbmF0aW9uLmNvbS91bnN1YnNjcmliZS8_Yj1SZXN0b3JlLU91ci1OYXRpb24tT2ZmZXJzJmU9ZHB3aWxsaXM2NyUyNTQwZ21haWwuY29tVwNzcGNCCmW6rW3DZaJ3aPlSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/SJ4LPn3m_l3-ukr8shtaxQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnpgmsP0QraHR0cHM6Ly9yZXN0b3JlLW91ci1uYXRpb24uY29tL3ByaXZhY3kuaHRtbFcDc3BjQgpluq1tw2Wid2j5UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_

name: Anthony D'Esposito
subject: Fired up and ready to fight
body:
Peter,

Our democracy is under siege.

In a flagrant overstep, New York's Democrat-controlled Legislature is undermining our State Constitution and the people's will. Ignoring the decisive rejection of no-excuse absentee voting in 2021, they now scheme to introduce mail-in ballots, an apparent circumvention of required constitutional amendments.

name: Steve Garvey
subject: Help me strike out Adam Schiff
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U
body:
Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?

| |
---
| | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dd47b0102a464364ad5f3a99032ce45f&_e=5s5XzwzOK1Gsy9zMr4bVbPU4b5BPn07hUR2P7FTCePDfTb-saPmLaVUfsPEciFXO5lXYPIbTy4uAmjNVtGY8aGDaZVSjQo_ii2FPXu__jC7OQKK-EEg82cU-qPHANvnZiihCF2Qv9TrXz89rXD9d_dzLJoFGV9G3f-u5-_eMQGHJ_PkHMtJBbmiTxz6yUAl9E7zQ8MNJwVU_JQL6AN0ghN0Mw2kTRIkX6Rwbvbb0fxsF7kTrFThLwEmxLGRhuLbPEp5XGvmZBOL7-rpH1sz7tIrnlUqxEWfUd5JACkV_jvYQdim_iwHhjEAMu7GtLzjWxeuT8HZDneykSWoUDQxl0u7UvUDg5PPuQm0uFVRmu_fK3qwdYhkMzogs8F23HDUPEY9SIcCdxjBQG5OFThNnHw%3D%3D)
---
| | Friend, **[**Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dd47b0102a464364ad5f3a99032ce45f&_e=5s5XzwzOK1Gsy9zMr4bVbPU4b5BPn07hUR2P7FTCePDfTb-saPmLaVUfsPEciFXO5lXYPIbTy4uAmjNVtGY8aGDaZVSjQo_ii2FPXu__jC7OQKK-EEg82cU-qPHANvnZiihCF2Qv9TrXz89rXD9d_dzLJoFGV9G3f-u5-_eMQGHJ_PkHMtJBbmiTxz6yUAl9E7zQ8MNJwVU_JQL6AN0ghN0Mw2kTRIkX6Rwbvbb0fxsyfKWi24YypR3mfShlEpuuwjppOEqtiuUNqltttVRtfSwe5SYFM_s5z81LZWi8lTwP-Nob9yRuBo-f3PNIBRukT8bklVcL-K3C7bCEt1TZ7xipAQcuiOz1FTn3C-VwxY5_7NIfs5_lQYk_BJEVIQd-s3GKU2U2Snxs5pDwFIiVrw%3D%3D)** That's the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November. I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to "choose" between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee... ...and that's being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go "three up...three down" against this lineup of liberal career politicians. That's a bit of baseball vernacular. No surprise, right? It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning. Then, it's your team's turn to go on offense. Well, that's very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country. Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years - most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I'm reaching out to you today. **[Will you step up and help strike out this"lineup of liberals" through a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dd47b0102a464364ad5f3a99032ce45f&_e=5s5XzwzOK1Gsy9zMr4bVbPU4b5BPn07hUR2P7FTCePDfTb-saPmLaVUfsPEciFXO5lXYPIbTy4uAmjNVtGY8aGDaZVSjQo_ii2FPXu__jC7OQKK-EEg82cU-qPHANvnZiihCF2Qv9TrXz89rXD9d_dzLJoFGV9G3f-u5-_eMQGHJ_PkHMtJBbmiTxz6yUAl9E7zQ8MNJwVU_JQL6AN0ghN0Mw2kTRIkX6Rwbvbb0fxvigIqzF8e3v_7PHapfH8rt2-dTvKR3qh2slSEKf4iq4FFIbUlGbkPcUH5MlrwwigadbPaFcjlilWswNqShpa9-yhK3pKO7MvMpavdPM8IMgQ8Bq3jLfdjXLB9StzygOKHjD6AkqBH6P9QJNIpZUnZym9PpxkFjnlMwI5lm_l89Gw%3D%3D)** Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California. Think about the daily reality of:
---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California. • Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don't lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---
If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a "false choice" between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, **[**then I need you to take immediate action and rush a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dd47b0102a464364ad5f3a99032ce45f&_e=5s5XzwzOK1Gsy9zMr4bVbPU4b5BPn07hUR2P7FTCePDfTb-saPmLaVUfsPEciFXO5lXYPIbTy4uAmjNVtGY8aGDaZVSjQo_ii2FPXu__jC7OQKK-EEg82cU-qPHANvnZiihCF2Qv9TrXz89rXD9d_dzLJoFGV9G3f-u5-_eMQGHJ_PkHMtJBbmiTxz6yUAl9E7zQ8MNJwVU_JQL6AN0ghN0Mw2kTRIkX6Rwbvbb0fxsoQ9xS52rFB0LwasBbXI-eBE_z_FYRdEOaFDnVFhedg0uO5J0WpLxPfMM-IgkpuMIBBi_w7xi66DtCfByQlDg8D3ucg8cY_80JQbWgO59Sk1LaWaRz1RVQbtqKOX5-UsX8NoJKxUBpB5CDgG0b-lN0680JrPoqtZh6-mYDoRhUhg%3D%3D)** Winning this election requires a one-two punch:
---
1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign "connecting the dots" between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day.
---
In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That's my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. **[But I need your help. I'd consider it a great honor to have you on my campaign team. clean_body: Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th? | | | | | | Friend, That's the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November. I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to "choose" between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee... ...and that's being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go "three up...three down" against this lineup of liberal career politicians. That's a bit of baseball vernacular. No surprise, right? It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning. Then, it's your team's turn to go on offense. Well, that's very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country. Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years - most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I'm reaching out to you today. Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California. Think about the daily reality of: • Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California. • Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don't lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction. If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a "false choice" between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, Winning this election requires a one-two punch: 1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign "connecting the dots" between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day. name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Border Security Survey (please respond)
body:
I need to know what you think

| | Friend, Chuck Schumer and Mitch McConnell want to legalize ILLEGAL immigration.
The Senate border deal is nothing but surrender and bails out sanctuary cities and encourages MILLIONS of illegals to enter the country.
The Democrats just want the illegal votes and Mitch McConnell is rubber stamping it. Speaker Johnson has said this bill is dead on arrival but House Republicans need to hear from Americans like YOU. **That’s why I’m launching my Border Security Survey – and I need your feedback so I can show weak-kneed House Republicans what Americans think.** **[So please take a moment to complete my survey RIGHT AWAY.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zghue90q4fa5i1r5c09pv707eo73i4djvdr5p9f8_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cph6eo34cph2bs)**
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpkapk596h1gr8dl6jhnf4s4d7bcoaspg5593ka0_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cph6eo34cph2bs)
---
| **Name: Friend** **Survey Status:** **[**PENDING >>**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zfm9qq8ehhfg1hrkfr27l3sp1a9h7uq01b54hb18_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cph6eo34cph2bs)**
---
| | [**TAKE THE SURVEY**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zolhunuervhre1d9bo4qv4bpm2nergs6f9v7l6t8_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cph6eo34cph2bs)
---
|
---
Friend, this bill that the Senate came up with has a $118.28 BILLION price tag and doesn’t even remotely resemble a plan to secure our border. **This current border crisis isn’t something we can’t throw a wad of cash at and fix.** Not when Secretary Mayorkas has completely failed to uphold his oath of office and protect our homeland. Congress needs to get its priorities straight. That’s why I’m leading the charge to Impeach Secretary Mayorkas this week, not empower him with a legalized invasion of 1.8 million per year with amnesty while funding the defense of other country’s borders. But there is more that needs to be done to secure our border. **That’s why I want to know. What do you think we should do about the Border Crisis?**
* Should any border security bill focus on deporting those who entered our country illegally?
* Should we finish Trump’s wall?
* Do we need to Impeach Mayorkas?
* Does Texas have a right to protect its border when Joe Biden refuses to?
* Do you think the Democrats have ripped our border wide open so they can get the illegal votes?

name: Team Kennedy
subject: Best Candidate To Take On Big Pharma
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. will stand up for a healthier, happier America.

|
---
| | | **[Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. will stand up for a healthier, happier America.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=health_2_07_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=1)
**
---
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=health_2_07_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=2)
|
---
Dear Peter,
Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. has spent his career as an untiring crusader for Americans to live a healthy, vigorous life. His fight for our medical and health freedom will lead to a less drug dependent life for all Americans.
In other words, a healthier, happier America.
**_Surprisingly, pharmaceutical drugs are the number three killer in the U.S. behind cancer and heart attacks._** This is a man-made problem. Why?
There is a long history of corruption in the pharmaceutical industry.
RFK Jr. has spent his career litigating and writing about this, which makes him the best presidential candidate to root out this deep-seated corruption – and that includes with Big Pharma’s ‘ _financial partners_ ’ in our government agencies.
His goal is a healthier America. Yet, this worthy endeavor has been attacked by the most powerful corporations and government players.
He never threw in the towel from the onslaught of targeted propaganda hurled at him for standing up for what’s right. He fought for you and never wavered. He never will. Your health was his priority then and will be when he is in the White House.
| |
---
[As President, RFK, Jr. will end pharmaceutical advertising on television. ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=health_2_07_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=3)
RFK Jr. has a history of taking on the most powerful institutions and organizations in the world and holding them accountable. Despite their deep pockets and unsavory tactics, he has stood strong, steadfastly seeking justice and exposing the deceitful tactics of Big Pharma and corrupt government agencies – especially the NIH and CDC.
For example, when he reached out to high-ranking public health officials, he learned very few had read the most important studies on vaccines. He was told to go talk to the pharmaceutical companies.
That’s when he learned the pharmaceutical industry was granted immunity from liability because, as the Supreme Court described in a ruling, vaccines are “unavoidably unsafe.”
He also exposed the corrupt financial relationship between Big Pharma and our country’s government agencies. Big Pharma pays half their budgets. In other words, the NIH, CDC, FDA, etc. do not work for us; they work for Big Pharma.
These entities fear him because he seeks the truth – truths they do not want you to hear.
They also fear him because, as President, he will end pharmaceutical advertising on television.
[Help RFK Jr. continue to expose the truth by joining Team Kennedy with your gift of $10, $20, $50, $100 – whatever you can afford. ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=health_2_07_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=4)
[CONTRIBUTE $5 >>](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=5&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=health_2_07_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=5)
[CONTRIBUTE $10 >>](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=10&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=health_2_07_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=6)
[CONTRIBUTE $24 >>](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=24&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=health_2_07_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=7)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 >> ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=100&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=health_2_07_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=8)
[CONTRIBUTE $240 >> ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=240&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=health_2_07_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=9)
[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT >> ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=health_2_07_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=10)
Your financial support will help get Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. into the White House, where he will be even more impactful in the fight for a healthier country. Where he’ll also take on corrupt health institutions around the world, including the World Health Organization.
We need a fighter who understands the science as well as the challenges of taking on the corruption and deceit in our healthcare and pharmaceutical industries.
[Join Team Kennedy and together we can achieve healthier and happier lives for all Americans. ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=health_2_07_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=11)

Make sure to join us on Social Media to help spread our campaign's message and put Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. in the White House!
| |

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: This bill is an utter betrayal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Johnson for Louisiana
body:
It’s dead on arrival, Friend.

| | |
---

---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcmr7ugpjcchi095icln0gc32b2fsmj3037m2clo_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cph61o75c1h2bs)
---
Friend, Chuck Schumer has kept his so-called “border deal” under wraps for weeks – and now we know why. **_[**_The bill he and the open-borders left have created is an utter betrayal of all Americans._**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpk9cqmbepvn71gogodddbuuqpgtucj4bbc0eo18_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cph61o75c1h2bs)_**_**_**
I need you to stand with me in sending a message to Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer: **[**We The People will not accept this!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zt7adghdohkqck3h8b4l518an8hp0a83u7hfgn68_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cph61o75c1h2bs)******
---
[ **SEND A MESSAGE TO SCHUMER & BIDEN**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z39q3rl5av7sm7c7b458pc2bq6m7d8cm18s2slv8_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cph61o75c1h2bs)**
---
Chuck Schumer & Joe Biden want to allow 5,000 unvetted foreign nationals PER DAY to enter through the southern border. That’s 150,000 per month. Chuck Schumer & Joe Biden want to give them free HEALTHCARE. Chuck Schumer & Joe Biden want to give them free CELL PHONES. Chuck Schumer & Joe Biden want to give them free HOTEL ROOMS. Chuck Schumer & Joe Biden want to give them free FLIGHTS. Chuck Schumer & Joe Biden want to give them free FOOD STAMPS. Chuck Schumer & Joe Biden want to give them free LEGAL REPRESENTATION. **_[And Chuck Schumer& Joe Biden want to give the American people the Bill.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z34sdkht5a431or1s7u3o5f4p88r1l0iqfn1aj6g_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cph61o75c1h2bs)_**_** **_[**_THIS ABSOLUTELY WILL NOT STAND!_**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlodulia2ahli4hvi3rqmkl6mgd9f9damfcl75f8_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cph61o75c1h2bs)_**_**_** Here’s my threefold promise to you: 1\. If and when this bill makes its way to the House of Representatives, it will be DEAD ON ARRIVAL. 2\. I, along with House Republicans, will do everything in our power to force Biden and the Open-Border Democrats to the negotiating table. _**_**_**_ ** 3\. We will refuse to settle for anything less than a FULLY SECURE Southern Border. Friend, if we don’t defend and grow the GOP House majority this November, we’ll be forced to go along with at least two more years of this lawless insanity. I need your help to build the warchest we need to END the Left’s open-borders agenda and send Biden and Schumer a LOUD and CLEAR message.
---
[ **SEND A MESSAGE <> GROW THE MAJORITY**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdb0vlebd2do408kn066r57ftf494ksfk6rugnq0_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cph61o75c1h2bs)**
---
We can’t do this without your help, Friend. Sincerely,
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhipui5lcn1qgmjsp2docgbusblc86hivb4h0m5g_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cph61o75c1h2bs)
---

# [Sign: Tell the "Taylor-triggered" Republicans to "Get a life"](https://default.salsalabs.org/T672cbca6-a256-4ab4-ba38-22c1a48b1375/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | For some bizarre reason, Republicans appear to be "Taylor-triggered" by Taylor Swift and her relationship with NFL star Travis Kelce. Oh, and the fact that she has fun at football games. They are attacking her on social media and elsewhere, and making up absurd conspiracy theories about the couple being "[secret agents](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tda943fbc-b485-40b7-997b-3148c5e2289c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)" working on behalf of the deep state - even claiming that the whole NFL season has been secretly rigged to allow them to re-elect Joe Biden (go ahead, Google it, it's crazy). [**Tell these Republicans to "get a life" and let Taylor Swift get on with hers.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf232b686-93a4-4878-be25-a543fdfd1e55/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: This bill is an utter betrayal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Johnson for Louisiana
body:
It’s dead on arrival, Friend.

| | |
---

---
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683945%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZmlFlmryWn%2bqRgmegROGmQ&sysid=1)
---
Friend, Chuck Schumer has kept his so-called “border deal” under wraps for weeks - and now we know why. **_[**_The bill he and the open-borders left have created is an utter betrayal of all Americans._**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683946%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Hr2y4nB%2bvXoEKRA5Nnu9Lw&sysid=1)_**
I need you to stand with me in sending a message to Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer: **[**We The People will not accept this!**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683947%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=j8cKiNB73nWDT%2fOYxi8XAA&sysid=1)**
---
[ **SEND A MESSAGE TO SCHUMER & BIDEN**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683948%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BoYEW%2bwrNEkv9FdBkC8FTg&sysid=1)
---
Chuck Schumer & Joe Biden want to allow 5,000 unvetted foreign nationals PER DAY to enter through the southern border. That’s 150,000 per month. Chuck Schumer & Joe Biden want to give them free HEALTHCARE. Chuck Schumer & Joe Biden want to give them free CELL PHONES. Chuck Schumer & Joe Biden want to give them free HOTEL ROOMS. Chuck Schumer & Joe Biden want to give them free FLIGHTS. Chuck Schumer & Joe Biden want to give them free FOOD STAMPS. Chuck Schumer & Joe Biden want to give them free LEGAL REPRESENTATION. **_[And Chuck Schumer& Joe Biden want to give the American people the Bill.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683949%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=F2ylKizCFHO7tnJINcqHdw&sysid=1)_** **_[**_THIS ABSOLUTELY WILL NOT STAND!_**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683940%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LYIHVUUmFykaVfGUXpujTg&sysid=1)_** Here’s my threefold promise to you: 1\. If and when this bill makes its way to the House of Representatives, it will be DEAD ON ARRIVAL. 2\. I, along with House Republicans, will do everything in our power to force Biden and the Open-Border Democrats to the negotiating table. **_[**__**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683941%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=naPAsYLLR85l9g2RCGRZaQ&sysid=1)_** 3\. We will refuse to settle for anything less than a FULLY SECURE Southern Border. Friend, if we don’t defend and grow the GOP House majority this November, we’ll be forced to go along with at least two more years of this lawless insanity. I need your help to build the warchest we need to END the Left’s open-borders agenda and send Biden and Schumer a LOUD and CLEAR message.
---
[ **SEND A MESSAGE <> GROW THE MAJORITY**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683942%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LTqQfqpo3FG4mT3tlLyDjQ&sysid=1)
---
We can’t do this without your help, Friend. Sincerely,
---
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683945%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZmlFlmryWn%2bqRgmegROGmQ&sysid=1)
---
Speaker Mike Johnson

clean_body: It’s dead on arrival, Friend. | | | Friend, Chuck Schumer has kept his so-called “border deal” under wraps for weeks - and now we know why. I need you to stand with me in sending a message to Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer: Chuck Schumer & Joe Biden want to allow 5,000 unvetted foreign nationals PER DAY to enter through the southern border. That’s 150,000 per month. Chuck Schumer & Joe Biden want to give them free HEALTHCARE. Chuck Schumer & Joe Biden want to give them free CELL PHONES. Chuck Schumer & Joe Biden want to give them free HOTEL ROOMS. Chuck Schumer & Joe Biden want to give them free FLIGHTS. Chuck Schumer & Joe Biden want to give them free FOOD STAMPS. Chuck Schumer & Joe Biden want to give them free LEGAL REPRESENTATION. Here’s my threefold promise to you: 1\. If and when this bill makes its way to the House of Representatives, it will be DEAD ON ARRIVAL. 2\. I, along with House Republicans, will do everything in our power to force Biden and the Open-Border Democrats to the negotiating table. 3\. We will refuse to settle for anything less than a FULLY SECURE Southern Border. Friend, if we don’t defend and grow the GOP House majority this November, we’ll be forced to go along with at least two more years of this lawless insanity. I need your help to build the warchest we need to END the Left’s open-borders agenda and send Biden and Schumer a LOUD and CLEAR message. We can’t do this without your help, Friend. Sincerely, Speaker Mike Johnson | | | Paid for by Mike Johnson for Louisiana | American Update PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |
