name: Shift WA
subject: Your midway legislative update
body:
Despite facing challenges and resistance from Democrats who refused to hear many worthy bills proposed by Republicans, some noteworthy legislation has managed to stay alive by making it out of committee. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62782633:stUnjhiNR:m:1:2610672541:8CA13267D692F380CEF8E2A7E6D5E96C:r "Shift Washington")
---
|
Friends,

The first major deadline of the 2024 legislative session passed last week. Policy bills had to make it out of their committee of origin by January 31 to survive, meaning plenty of proposals went by the wayside.

Just a few days ago, on February 5th, the second major deadline occurred. Finance-related bills referred to the House fiscal committees and Senate Ways & Means and Transportation committees had to be voted out of their committees to stay in the running.

Despite facing challenges and resistance from Democrats who refused to hear many worthy bills proposed by Republicans, some noteworthy legislation has managed to stay alive by making it out of committee.

House Republicans have been diligent in tracking both "the good bills" and "the bad bills." You can find detailed information on their website here.

Here are some bills that have successfully passed out of their committees:

* House Bill 1967 - Sponsored by Rep. Cyndy Jacobsen (R-25th LD), aims to prohibit a defendant convicted of a fatal hit-and-run from being eligible for a first-time offender waiver.
* SB 5906 - Sponsored by Sen. Jeff Wilson (R-19th LD), creates a statewide drug overdose prevention and education campaign, emphasizing the dangers of methamphetamines and opioids, with a focus on fentanyl.
* SB 6134 - Sponsored by Sen. Chris Gildon (R-25th LD), initiates programs to prevent overdoses and illicit use of opioids, including developing a mapping system for overdoses, creating a Washington State Opioid Trends Review Committee, and restoring funding to local law enforcement task forces to combat drug trafficking.

We can certainly consider those efforts well-placed. Further, we can all breathe a sigh of relief at the news that a handful of the Democrats' insane bills have failed in committee, including:

* SB 5770: To repeal the voter-approved 1% property tax increase limit and replace it with a 3% limit.
* HB 2030: Allowing prisoners serving time to vote, serve on juries, and run for public office.
* HB 1868: Proposing a ban on small gas motors used in outdoor equipment.

Shift WA is committed to keeping you informed about the latest developments in the 2024 session, including which bills move forward and if Democrats attempt to sneak any of their failed bills back in during the budgeting process.

However, we need your support to continue our efforts. [_**Please consider contributing today to help us advocate for the values and principles that matter to hardworking Washingtonians.**_](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62782634:stUnjhiNR:m:1:2610672541:8CA13267D692F380CEF8E2A7E6D5E96C:r)

Thank you for your ongoing support,

The Shift WA team

| [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62782635:stUnjhiNR:m:1:2610672541:8CA13267D692F380CEF8E2A7E6D5E96C:r)
---
|
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can [click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=14417739&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=49000b887de404a22f48ed48dd2d4356&schema=echo3) to do so.

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, [click to unsubscribe](http://click.shiftwa.org/p/ostUnjhiNR).
---

body:
>>>>>

Friend,

Three things:

1\. I wanted to thank you for being one of my father's most loyal supporters from your city. Your continued support is essential to the success of the Make America Great Again movement.

2\. Our deadline is tonight, and it's your last opportunity to complete the **[REPUBLICAN PARTY AREA ASSESSMENT](http://links.electionsupdates.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=d599d65e722b423ead75dbb45a6f8c80&_e=kvQVv_vzyE_LcyKXilYyvfx5G0Rub_DiElciFlZzjPQ1NqgXzI9FyaH69mj5p5zx_Jv-3OpoxPRshlClQQZDupE10B-Mxuof7HYG3t4YfB0HxYzcJV206ft6519L_Rg_NF1KwWGoBfdRzFBwZoGt_sTba7ge9R6Qx0QUjl4tsO01hFyNYk5MgisY-eSHWibrJKGlmFTB4A6I8mnac93APxehkK7Y_WgcqintZ_XC8QDw5iNkqpD9zqh70dfFivxxssUBpIBIt-Od2c1fk6ckONRgImgHuf37J6uSgsNAN7nvEDH1d1guah0es5dCPPED1b3Gmu5sPVAoP4CV71sqIPK6d2qGzmIA-uXVQ2ue6xop8xPNOmUVh9q6SHawqOeu2NIN-dY7c057DKDWKWiW25HPRHfCvyyEqH1WE0PmxiO5DD7kjmpggG4jN_Pxl_tXsEDgDzpAESUdqMuaXPgX-Ro4HZ473myDMgFJW1oP2Mk%3D)** before it expires. Participating in the assessment is the most important thing you can do right now to help my father defeat Joe Biden and ensure America First conservatives find ourselves back in the Senate Majority next year. Thank you, Donald Trump Jr. ******************************************************************************************************** | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

_But we need to know where YOU stand! Please, respond before 11:59 p.m. to tell Kirsten:_

Friend: This is incredible news! Kirsten Gillibrand, a bold leader for gender equity, has introduced a new resolution to finally add the Equal Rights Amendment (ERA) to the Constitution!
**The ERA would classify gender-based discrimination as unconstitutional, giving us a legal basis to restore reproductive rights nationwide.** After 100 years of advocacy, the required 38 states have voted in favor of it. But now, an arbitrary, unbinding deadline is blocking us from finally adding the 28th Amendment to the Constitution!
Kirsten's resolution would allow us to circumvent this deadline and finally ensure that all Americans are treated fairly under our Constitution, regardless of gender identity. This is our best chance to restore reproductive rights and finally end gender-based discrimination — _that's why Democratic leaders like Chuck Schumer, Ayanna Pressley and so many others are rallying alongside Kirsten!_
**Right-wing extremists are already doing everything they can to sabotage this resolution — that's why it's so important to know if Americans support the ERA. You've been selected to represent 43614 in this live opinion poll, so please respond before midnight tonight to make your voice heard for gender equity:**
**Do You Support the Equal Rights Amendment?**

As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. **About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

** [ ** JOIN JIM ➞ **](http://links.teamjimjordan.com/u/click?_t=1b0bebbf1097419382210464ab5da85c&_m=1b9ccd2d19794ca4ab4d4f638b4329e4&_e=vEsYbgEKGjwHQ06MzATW1YxGlXx8ndBDV7UcnahyTa46epwJTOEntee-gHKEYSBoOKVPAJpkJvLVQ84gQJFQalP2rDJs-H1HP_zwFg2hR90M1z7vvYzZ-qxMS9sba0nltzaOs9s5KNqlDpT4u74C4BNRbNSAI0kY-5OJS1Bg7X-1SSu6kZnfjCrXbBtF0AAstTxq0oosvB0V6tRjqjmfQm_1XvgeQITqMsJIVzSfJ8MZFrhyjGEGnB7PSncUXk06c_Ej0_NdUaGS9MvJezQmhROVaOaGk96QEL10N3drkumryLzItGItdV0BGdM-XrjORRRoDVM_E4UCK0J6K1p7Jc5VueJI7oW2JFvnMZGFgaXD-GRFth4GGd1kecGugpqd2ci5viDZjYH28PyCHyxsK6gY8NJi2sQ6ORh8pPxFe4On-abVQH39G3Rl9JBYpRxW4oN1f-opwh1WvhqNB9PqAGlU_SYwCtqZ5m9Al4WYp82hR7HWKz0UzJYSei2hmsCHAaCPNMf5tBbv548VdbnU0Q%3D%3D)

| Friend,
This past week our team was humbled to receive the support of a very prominent Illinois patriot. Businessman Gary Rabine has officially announced his endorsement of my campaign for Congress and has pledged his support of our mission here in the Illinois 11th!
---
|
---
With his support and the support of others like you in this district, we will continue to build a movement and win in March! It will take more than just words though. Every dollar [raised](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013YKaZouxysGZDX-Ql_rXq97Q-9F8zCLq_0YtbZXnceBmRJ5teFAIHDDun-azW0-o3DDEeSN9xuQFHlBYqlvJMNESYIgzb69OIGcxIEpYYQB-PosLCaG7AtF6ylOUMj-5IFL5ClqoRMcKdDPxJaWjOd2Y2DZr9yvrJ9HHbp7mC2xtqMhD1EvuWBSzAyZSMgNiwQRP4Y53qsc=&c=TSDrsq-L243Ln3U5J3NuYSnfG2Wxprae9Jnz73f_8NBpzr9ATPO-VA==&ch=o-5gLzzin4aFe28-0Rv7I_1LVPhG211ABcSsNCRUwvLns9hYBG8DOA==) will go towards sharing our message with the people of the 11th and bring us closer to victory. [Donate now](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013YKaZouxysGZDX-Ql_rXq97Q-9F8zCLq_0YtbZXnceBmRJ5teFAIHDDun-azW0-o3DDEeSN9xuQFHlBYqlvJMNESYIgzb69OIGcxIEpYYQB-PosLCaG7AtF6ylOUMj-5IFL5ClqoRMcKdDPxJaWjOd2Y2DZr9yvrJ9HHbp7mC2xtqMhD1EvuWBSzAyZSMgNiwQRP4Y53qsc=&c=TSDrsq-L243Ln3U5J3NuYSnfG2Wxprae9Jnz73f_8NBpzr9ATPO-VA==&ch=o-5gLzzin4aFe28-0Rv7I_1LVPhG211ABcSsNCRUwvLns9hYBG8DOA==) to continue supporting our campaign and be a part of the shaping the future here in Illinois.
As we are approaching the March 19th primary, our campaign has begun reaching out to voters, but we need your help. We are looking for volunteers to sign-up to phone bank or knock on doors to help us get out the vote. If you would like to phone bank with our team, please sign up [here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013YKaZouxysGZDX-Ql_rXq97Q-9F8zCLq_0YtbZXnceBmRJ5teFAIHH8pv8U8PZWZOEubG0xDh5_w3q7fOqOHkNopbNEBHpmean6OwGZ8lCnz8JokKCcTVc9xZJaMy_PU5ABSXpH2pPo7Y0xPFnwjZ3qAQkK4HyQP&c=TSDrsq-L243Ln3U5J3NuYSnfG2Wxprae9Jnz73f_8NBpzr9ATPO-VA==&ch=o-5gLzzin4aFe28-0Rv7I_1LVPhG211ABcSsNCRUwvLns9hYBG8DOA==). Also, if you can join us to knocking doors in your neighborhoods, please sign up [here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013YKaZouxysGZDX-Ql_rXq97Q-9F8zCLq_0YtbZXnceBmRJ5teFAIHH8pv8U8PZWZzDfmHIpPh31lF2qRutzkk6Mp2BPXX3NR-aV2SH3u3gX9kkkhARfyURYoFkMgpJyKs3A8nskYSNjRHjdI-B2vdVm0p9XPS3FK&c=TSDrsq-L243Ln3U5J3NuYSnfG2Wxprae9Jnz73f_8NBpzr9ATPO-VA==&ch=o-5gLzzin4aFe28-0Rv7I_1LVPhG211ABcSsNCRUwvLns9hYBG8DOA==) and someone from the campaign will get in touch with you. I would very appreciate any time that you could volunteer.
For the cause,
Jerry Evans
P.S. I know that running a campaign is a team effort and that no candidate can win on their own. Therefore, I ask you to share this message with your friends, family, and neighbors who wish to join the campaign. A donation of just [$40](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013YKaZouxysGZDX-Ql_rXq97Q-9F8zCLq_0YtbZXnceBmRJ5teFAIHDDun-azW0-o3DDEeSN9xuQFHlBYqlvJMNESYIgzb69OIGcxIEpYYQB-PosLCaG7AtF6ylOUMj-5IFL5ClqoRMcKdDPxJaWjOd2Y2DZr9yvrJ9HHbp7mC2xtqMhD1EvuWBSzAyZSMgNiwQRP4Y53qsc=&c=TSDrsq-L243Ln3U5J3NuYSnfG2Wxprae9Jnz73f_8NBpzr9ATPO-VA==&ch=o-5gLzzin4aFe28-0Rv7I_1LVPhG211ABcSsNCRUwvLns9hYBG8DOA==) can help alter the course of this campaign forever. Also, if you can join us to knocking doors in your neighborhoods, please sign up == and someone from the campaign will get in touch with you. I would very appreciate any time that you could volunteer. For the cause, Jerry Evans P.S. I know that running a campaign is a team effort and that no candidate can win on their own. Therefore, I ask you to share this message with your friends, family, and neighbors who wish to join the campaign. A donation of just == can help alter the course of this campaign forever. Also, please visit our website at == to find out how you can help our movement here at home! | | == | | | | | | | | Jerry Evans for Congress | 1750 W Ogden Ave, P.O. # [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=1921%2E552475%2ETQ62l7)
Hi Peter,
When I say I’m proud of the team we are building together, I mean it. **We’re up against a wall of Republican money, and it’s folks like you who help us compete.**
This is not going to be an easy fight. We recently learned that a super PAC supporting my opponent received $10 million from a _single_ donor last quarter. What’s more, my opponent is already putting his own personal fortune behind his effort to defeat us.
[**The stakes this year couldn’t be higher, so I’m coming to you to ask: Can you chip in any amount to help power my re-election campaign?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240207-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20240207-1&refcode2=1921_552475_TQ62l7&akid=1921%2E552475%2ETQ62l7)
If we’re going to stand up to the money my opponent, out-of-state billionaires, and the national GOP are pouring into Pennsylvania, I need help from folks like you. Your support really does make a difference.
This race could decide our Senate majority.
[**Can you give whatever you’re able today so we can fight back and win?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240207-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20240207-1&refcode2=1921_552475_TQ62l7&akid=1921%2E552475%2ETQ62l7)

name: Shontel Brown
subject: Black History Month has never been more important.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
I hope you’ll join me in the fight against violence and discrimination.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78555183/453748823/950179054?refcode=EM_C_240207BHM_N_SB_90DO_4_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTQ0NmQ1ZS1jNWM1LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjM4NDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K6hiD7CvBaTojWAVLrlFCnrfq1yHHk1-L2lnL-dFBDY=) Peter,

Black History Month is not only a time to commemorate and celebrate the achievements of Black Americans but also a call to action. Decades after the successes of the civil rights movement, the fight for justice and equality continues.

Black people continue to face unjust violence, and states across the nation, including Ohio, have launched attacks on our schools through book bans, erasing the teaching of Black history, and depriving our children of the education they need to learn from our past. With recent acts of intensifying violence and repression toward Black Americans, **Black History Month has never been more important.**

We must continue the legacy of figures like Dr. King, Malcolm X, and Rosa Parks in the pursuit of justice and equality. We cannot allow our voices to be silenced and our history to be erased.

I hope you’ll join me in the fight against violence and discrimination. Let's get to work ensuring that our future is one of justice and equality for all.

Keep moving forward,

Shontel Brown | As a Cuyahoga County Council member and Chairwoman of the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party, Shontel Brown has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. Now, as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District, she will fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and equity and justice for all. **Will you join her and be the change we need?**
---
[DONATE TODAY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78555185/453748825/950179054?refcode=EM_C_240207BHM_N_SB_90DO_4_NG_N_Biobox&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTQ0NmQ1ZS1jNWM1LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjM4NDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K6hiD7CvBaTojWAVLrlFCnrfq1yHHk1-L2lnL-dFBDY=)

name: Nikki Haley
subject: One thing you should know about me…
body:
I won’t stop fighting for what’s right.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zagseafgtmue12m951j8mlp7n0ci2hdod0k6mt80_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cpj62oj2cjh2bs)
---

Friend,

The one thing you should know about me is - _**I won 't stop fighting for what's right. **_

70% of Americans don't want a Trump-Biden rematch.

They don't want temper tantrums.

_They want normalcy._

They don't want vengeance.

_They want sanity._

**That 's why it's so important that we get it right this election so we can restore normalcy and ensure a brighter future for America!**

If we choose Donald Trump again as our Republican nominee, he will not be focused on the people, or defeating Biden, or providing solutions for our country.

He instead will continue throwing temper tantrum after temper tantrum when he doesn't get his way.

He will continue caring more about vengeance instead of focusing on how we stop the out-of-control spending and inflation, or about how we were going to get kids reading again, or about securing the border and stopping the lawlessness, or about the wars that are happening around us.

That's a problem, Friend!

**[If you're ready to move on from the chaos, I'm asking YOU to chip in and support my fight for our future TODAY.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zuj37qsugkphqf8np2q1n919f1bnhi2aipmi1378_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cpj62oj2cjh2bs "If you’re ready to move on from the chaos, I’m asking YOU to chip in and support my fight for our future TODAY.")**

---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhqa6sc75b8gl25nmvksoq52dc9a9i5trk1jg9f0_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cpj62oj2cjh2bs)
---
| | [SUPPORT A GENERATIONAL LEADER](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0cclaqsh5556325te2s1o9287aa5d2dp7ehn3ro_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cpj62oj2cjh2bs)
---

On top of the drama and chaos that Trump brings...

Trump lost in 2018, 2020, and 2022. We lost the Senate. We lost the House. We lost the White House.

It's no secret that Democrats would LOVE to run against Trump again in 2024. They know Trump is the only Republican in the country who Biden can defeat.

**But when you put me up against Joe Biden, I defeat Biden handily. **

_It 's never been more clear than it is now that we deserve a **NEW** direction of conservative leadership!_

-> I'm a two-term governor and served our country as UN ambassador.
-> I have a vision for where our country can go.
-> I have a track record of getting things done.
-> Most importantly, the polls have confirmed, I am the **ONLY** candidate who can decisively win in a general election so we can get our country back on track.

**Our campaign is the last best hope of righting the ship to SAVE our future and stopping another Trump-Biden nightmare. **

I am committed to the fight, but I cannot do it alone.

**[That's why I'm urging you to put your trust in me as we fight for our country's future. Can I count on your support today?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdbah8vja4sa2sq3ma97qpfrcvhe45opvfh1mov8_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cpj62oj2cjh2bs "That’s why I’m urging you to put your trust in me as we fight for our country’s future. Can I count on your support today?")**

Thank you for everything.

_**Let's do this!**_
---

My very best,
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z43qqcploinmvd0uq5o3ua4er0pfdptfotq14ua0_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cpj62oj2cjh2bs)
---
Nikki Haley

---
| | [DONATE](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z63im24rdgbb6f21e8an1e3otg0lvttr5s1988v0_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cpj62oj2cjh2bs)
---
| | | | |
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsv68rh2354dnj04gd4bcsenr0nh8qlhg9jdk7pg_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cpj62oj2cjh2bs "NikkiHaley_Merch")
---
| | [GET YOUR HAT NOW](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmh152kdlcecikh3pt4bgnn68dthr55ac9vpp258_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cpj62oj2cjh2bs "Claim Your Mug")
---
---
| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z45839s8hj8nelpuep9sriunuosqkeqql2sevl48_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cpj62oj2cjh2bs "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjnu773u5t5ue196fatj917ec7sq2ds848a92jp8_rp22sh2s8i6eo37cpj62oj2cjh2bs "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

clean_body: I won’t stop fighting for what’s right. | | | | | | Friend, The one thing you should know about me is - I won 't stop fighting for what's right. 70% of Americans don't want a Trump-Biden rematch. They don't want temper tantrums. They want normalcy. They don't want vengeance. They want sanity. That 's why it's so important that we get it right this election so we can restore normalcy and ensure a brighter future for America! If we choose Donald Trump again as our Republican nominee, he will not be focused on the people, or defeating Biden, or providing solutions for our country. He instead will continue throwing temper tantrum after temper tantrum when he doesn't get his way. He will continue caring more about vengeance instead of focusing on how we stop the out-of-control spending and inflation, or about how we were going to get kids reading again, or about securing the border and stopping the lawlessness, or about the wars that are happening around us. That's a problem, Friend! "If you’re ready to move on from the chaos, I’m asking YOU to chip in and support my fight for our future TODAY." | | | On top of the drama and chaos that Trump brings... Trump lost in 2018, 2020, and 2022. We lost the Senate. We lost the House. We lost the White House. It's no secret that Democrats would LOVE to run against Trump again in 2024. They know Trump is the only Republican in the country who Biden can defeat. But when you put me up against Joe Biden, I defeat Biden handily. It 's never been more clear than it is now that we deserve a NEW direction of conservative leadership! -> I'm a two-term governor and served our country as UN ambassador. -> I have a vision for where our country can go. -> I have a track record of getting things done. -> Most importantly, the polls have confirmed, I am the ONLY candidate who can decisively win in a general election so we can get our country back on track. Our campaign is the last best hope of righting the ship to SAVE our future and stopping another Trump-Biden nightmare. I am committed to the fight, but I cannot do it alone. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1110%2E135344%2EB4xh8u)

Friends --
The Michigan Republican presidential primary is coming up fast this month and it would mean A LOT to me if you would chip in before then.
I am asking for a contribution — $3 or whatever you can afford — before Republicans vote in Michigan. If that's all you need to hear, please use this link to donate today:
**[https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/michigan-primary](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-feb24.z4X5uQ&refcode=em240207-1-650&t=2&akid=1110%2E135344%2EB4xh8u)**
Here's how former President Trump's likely nomination plays in our race:
Public polls show that President Biden and former President Trump are just about tied in a head-to-head race here in Michigan -- along with our race being a dead-heat. Given that the Senate race is the top of the ticket in the state, it’s just a matter of time until Trump turns his attacks toward us.
That means we can likely expect to see Trump in Michigan. And National Republicans will be doing everything they can to flip our state red and boost our ultimate GOP opponent in the Senate race.
So we need to continue building up our reserves if we are going to be able to fight back against the attack ads and outside spending and keep this seat blue in November.
The Michigan Republican primary is coming up fast.
[**It would be a huge help to our campaign if you would chip in and show your support before the primary. Our goal is to send a message that we are NOT letting them win back Michigan! Even a single $5 or $10 contribution goes a long way when lots of folks are chipping in.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-feb24.z4X5uQ&refcode=em240207-1-650&t=3&akid=1110%2E135344%2EB4xh8u)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/127?c0=ebs-em-feb24.PidIwI&amount=3&refcode=em240207-1-650&t=22&akid=1110%2E135344%2EB4xh8u)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/129?c0=ebs-em-feb24.kYsf1_&refcode=em240207-1-650&t=23&akid=1110%2E135344%2EB4xh8u)**

****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/127?c0=ebs-em-feb24.PidIwI&refcode=em240207-1-650&t=27&akid=1110%2E135344%2EB4xh8u)**

Thank you again. Your donation today — especially today — really means a lot.
Elissa

Hi Derek, When Chris announced that he is running for reelection last month, he kicked off the campaign at the IUPAT District Council 57 training center – a union that represents painters and allied tradespeople in Western PA. **Team Deluzio was so proud to have IUPAT and USW members and representatives in the audience because unions are at the heart of this campaign.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78558981/453758520/-1807168276?refcode=240307_team_unions_img&ms=240307_team_unions&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2E2M2I0Ny1jOWM1LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjM4NDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LERA0RtYCx9CXis8JFnwFrdan3efUvqxoZSeQLUZOVI=) **As a former union organizer, Chris fought alongside fellow workers in Western PA** and the United Steelworkers to secure a faculty union at Pitt. He knows what it takes to fight for – and win – union elections. He knows that unions help make sure workers earn better wages, benefits, and working conditions. **But far-right politicians and their corporate allies are fighting against Chris and unions every step of the way.** Chris is running for reelection to fight for the union way of life alongside his fellow union organizers and workers in Western PA. name: Team DASS
subject: Emailing you again…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78559604/453760216/-664527026?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYThhNTM4Zi1jOWM1LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjM4NDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UbfNToCtQmLnPIb_LoJRc5iLZ3JGNNHfwLDjLc4lZ6A=)
**Jena Griswold** emailed you.
**Adrian Fontes** emailed you.
**Gavin Newsom** emailed you.

[**STOP THE THEFT

Democrats charged the Department of Veterans Affairs with administering health care services to **illegal migrants** due to the sophisticated network of hospitals and clinics that were built to serve our veteran communities in all 50 states.

**My opponent, Democrat Jon Tester, is the Committee’s chairman.**

**Every time an illegal migrant is cared for at one of our nation’s VA facilities, our veterans pay the price.**

t’s time to stop prioritizing illegal immigrants over American service members. Please take a moment to sign my petition in support of our military vets.

[**STOP THE THEFT
SIGN MY PETITION->**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=03e935f34bd44c8cb0eff0ceeee32d40&_e=oV8Mo7gCse4DuDHE6AfsdRirUPUI8ZVsP-MheSfF58bwHwdEx6F0yoKhONraqKmpWEL2d01O3399IMD3A5d0wF-dVCgLpDikACilS-P74ayRMZssJcI9yxNr5D5yt4p6n2aloVWEo6mhb4SjwrpRYqZi2HxCwkfLLduS2Mni7riiKpLTQ3EMFeWN_qvBOBxB2s1jgRLOgNn3zqToEklQIedStgK9pEcobs49KjTS5E01y1KeToa-xnH964iG0Y17ZlIav-JRQpbHaJb6XrlTUDMFFDDBovEoCQh5msVD0FwP4VQOsfAzzMI05P0GP0SqsgnAREijlSJefLn3RZM7HO08Bb8-Pwkq0gcxySWx2CnjtI2se2ZvRRzonHx9NBRag1LFDfpyqdiI4zC0KyjAiSzHqccVEHjtVJwhw-e4ngg%3D)

**This Democrat-funded program** has created a backlog of veteran claims surpassing 378,000. Thanks to my opponent and Joe Biden, it’s reasonable for a veteran on the backlog list to expect _**they may never get the care**_ they need due to the president of the United States and Senate Democrats prioritizing illegals over veterans.

**Fellow Conservative, don’t you think it’s a double standard that President Biden and Democrat Jon Tester are eligible to see the best doctors in the world at Walter Reed Medical Center just outside of DC – WITH NO WAIT TIME – while illegal migrants are given priority over veterans at VA facilities?**

**[Sign my petition](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=03e935f34bd44c8cb0eff0ceeee32d40&_e=oV8Mo7gCse4DuDHE6AfsdRirUPUI8ZVsP-MheSfF58bwHwdEx6F0yoKhONraqKmpWEL2d01O3399IMD3A5d0wF-dVCgLpDikACilS-P74ayRMZssJcI9yxNr5D5yt4p6n2aloVWEo6mhb4SjwrpRYqZi2HxCwkfLLduS2Mni7riiKpLTQ3EMFeWN_qvBOBxB2s1jgRLOgNn3zqToEklQIedStgK9pEcobs49KjTS5E01y1KeToa-xnH964iG0Y17sftSnR_lyiLRccHbeYx7zj-Zhqc9JMF8avhtIUnK7sYa_Dg0-j-pMjfmXlZmF_1elLuVHLeG1Ht3OIIjpJttksjjXJoRTWVGez94zIHDFgI1QvlweOI0rPhgISUJvKAztxMY7ZEB_DIIUpS_k2v70YXkitRIvF3nPKX3OS9XpwM%3D)** demanding my opponent and Joe Biden forgo their government-funded healthcare services until every veteran who needs to be seen by a doctor is taken off the waitlist.

Tim Sheehy
Former Navy SEAL
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate

name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: Extremists are trying to take away our right to choose (again)
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T31904ed6-b43b-4d67-9389-d7dbbcf3aed1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | Peter — I'm furious. Just last month, Florida activists secured hundreds of thousands of signatures to put codifying reproductive rights on the ballot this November. But now, far-right extremists are SUING to remove this question from the ballot. Unfortunately, this is just the latest example of out-of-touch extremists trying to silence Florida voters. From abortion rights to voting rights, whether in the state house in Tallahassee or on the Senate floor in Washington, our leaders are forcing their extreme agenda on Florida families. [Ya no mas — enough is enough. I refuse to stand for it. That’s why I'm running for Senate to defeat Rick Scott, restore abortion rights nationwide, and give Florida the leadership that we deserve. And now, with all eyes on our state, I'm counting on you to stand with me: Please, will you split $10 between my campaign and Blue Amp Action’s before midnight tonight to help me flip Florida blue and fight for families?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T95ee7105-ed52-4858-be6c-f2cab041ac10/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [DONATE NOW!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te9735697-5c60-419f-a4a4-8168640bf21e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| It's no secret why far-right extremists are working so hard to take this question off the ballot: They know that Florida is ready to follow states like Ohio and Kansas to reject our radical abortion ban and choose to protect our right to privacy, our right to choice, and our most basic freedoms. No matter how many lawsuits they file or lies they spread, the GOP can't change it: Abortion is going to be the driving force at the ballot box this November. And that's why Rick Scott and his campaign are absolutely spiraling. He knows his record on choice is nothing short of abysmal. That's why he's panicking, and calling me a liar to the press every chance he gets. Peter, let me make this clear: Rick Scott co-sponsored a nationwide ban on abortions, just like the statewide one that his radical friend Ron DeSantis signed here in Florida last year. I am unapologetically pro-choice, and his accusations don't scare me. I will always fight to protect reproductive freedom. [I know that we can defeat Rick Scott this fall, but only if people like you believe in Florida and invest in our campaign. So I'm asking one last time: Please, will you split a donation between my campaign and Blue Amp Action’s to help me defend our Senate majority, flip Florida blue, and restore abortion access across all 50 states?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc5f2c5f8-e5cd-4d2a-9808-748303121af2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

---
| Thank you so much,

Debbie

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta72c6ed2-9a33-451a-b774-7b78b9f955b2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

And we've got a BIG one on our plates for the next 6 days: Finish collecting the 1,000 signatures we need for me to OFFICIALLY get on the ballot. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78564238/453771504/-2036188668?refcode=EM_FL_EHA_20240207_fr_GOTB1_cand_mf_30da_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjVkYzA0Zi1jZWM1LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjM4NDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eIO8_QiFWluAxZ6s--F5FU9jh5mVsH3Dr8ctF2jCKyU=)

We quite literally can't afford to take a break from raising money. Not when Fitzpatrick is accepting corporate PAC donations, and I’m not.
_**[My finance team has said we need to raise $4,750 from grassroots donors between now and Feb 13 to keep us on track. And we've got a BIG one on our plates for the next 6 days: Finish collecting the 1,000 signatures we need for me to OFFICIALLY get on the ballot. | = Right now, the entire team at HQ is focused on getting this done – because if we don't get on the ballot, the rest doesn't matter. But that also means I can't spend as much time fundraising as I usually do. We quite literally can't afford to take a break from raising money. Not when Fitzpatrick is accepting corporate PAC donations, and I’m not. = **** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thanks for being in this fight with me as my co-pilot, Ashley 🚁 | Ashley Ehasz is a U.S. Army veteran, Apache helicopter pilot, and proudly pro-choice Democrat running to unseat Republican Brian Fitzpatrick and represent Pennsylvania’s 1st Congressional District to defend our democracy, restore reproductive rights, tackle corporate greed, advocate for bold gun safety measures, and fight for working families across southeast PA. | = | Paid for by Ehasz for Congress Ehasz for Congress 1800 Byberry Road #1336 Bensalem, PA 19020 United States Ashley Ehasz is a former member of the U.S. Army. Use of her military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense or the Department of the Army. name: Greater Georgia
subject: ICYMI: NEW GREATER GEORGIA POLL SHOWS GOOD NEWS FOR CONSERVATIVES
body:
| | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE WEDNESDAY, FEBRUARY 7
ICYMI: NEW GREATER GEORGIA POLL SHOWS GOOD NEWS FOR CONSERVATIVES
ATLANTA - In case you missed it, Greater Georgia commissioned a recent poll of likely and Republican voters across the state ahead of the 2024 election. The poll, conducted by Guidant Polling & Strategy, delved into key areas such as the economy, public safety, and other issues of the day - including the Atlanta Public Safety Training Center, school vouchers, and election integrity reform. As the pollsters noted in their memo, the poll shows strong support for conservative leadership at the state level - and deep dissatisfaction with the status quo in Washington.
Read recent coverage about the poll from James Magazine [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JRl3_JuHUNIto9ecUKDcFmfdqTCVbykxe9ejXNsN1Vs7sEBVxD98J0gSNO67UfqEls9mR3LARXkEoCKZ2nm2PRcKcONSdm4Z4ARsNGz6G2NwEABQpOViRJ8yHpiBNTaig_xUFSgwGlP_TfToV--jLNE2KBZo8jYUzW5EcPj6P0IzzkKl9wFeQGNKiV_bcs9FY_2advBN8pjgrhxzLatVi4SCbYnHRa8HAu7AQjinqe1GuPQSRgnBSA==&c=4SaRbNULHDx0TvIBP6-g57xBQ-arZ3TeC8KyYubtsFF7lgfvKCCtJA==&ch=8F1ZmsUjQ4dmUZaER_y7-fNr-C7PZDF0TW3lcBeTJ5YhfvfUb5Mz3w==), or view excerpts below. You can also view the full memo [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JRl3_JuHUNIto9ecUKDcFmfdqTCVbykxe9ejXNsN1Vs7sEBVxD98J0gSNO67UfqEySKdjwf_9dtKeXXlFBogEL3vI9ykI3y4hoih-VuH-YzGJMOXV1grl5gdXRCGH_vJZYJtD5XOMIypQrHC7cUkOS4CH1fpyD93RrJIvHzpbcFpqNPL8gPDmhTqCvYp1RiYa7F9BBenBNeX2Cjm_YHPYhbhcjWuAkeqcopA66ivc-FPJVT2BtB9O_W5ofIpToKs&c=4SaRbNULHDx0TvIBP6-g57xBQ-arZ3TeC8KyYubtsFF7lgfvKCCtJA==&ch=8F1ZmsUjQ4dmUZaER_y7-fNr-C7PZDF0TW3lcBeTJ5YhfvfUb5Mz3w==).
"The basic conservative principles of economic opportunity, safety, and freedom cut across party lines - resonating not only with traditional Republican primary voters, but also with moderates and independents. From education to crime and immigration, to the economy, Republicans at the state level are winning on the issues - in contrast to the unpopular policies of Joe Biden and the Democratic Party.
"As we enter the 2024 election cycle, the good news for Republicans is that candidates on the ballot in Georgia will not have to compromise on their conservative values to win a broad coalition of voters. Primary and swing voters alike view Georgia's conservative leadership as a firewall to the chaos and big government policies of Washington - which means the path to victory relies on promoting the common-sense, conservative policies which are already a hallmark of this state."
---
| Greater Georgia, launched by former U.S. Senator Kelly Loeffler in 2021, is a 501(c4) nonpartisan nonprofit dedicated to growing participation in the democratic process by mobilizing and empowering voters. The group works year-round to educate and register voters, engage with diverse and underrepresented communities, and protect election integrity. ###

**_27 MILLION DOLLARS_**

_**Democrats just reserved more than 27 million dollars worth of attack ads against me this fall**_.

It’s clearer than ever that _**my candidacy scares the Democrat powerbrokers in D.C**_. If I’m going to have a real shot at winning this race, I’m going to need every conservative donor in the country to get involved.
[**MAKE AN EMERGENCY CONTRIBUTION ->** ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=210340b966424cd2b2f784d9c4e99915&_e=nJB9k53vzuOtyz7nz5yCqfS9yJLsOg12bL5cQVa1Ly-OwMc59IPgThrrRg7sB6_ddzCbCawlKFnsBTPzF39pHN0ZnFFXWagagkSWJnTW7w97NNjoF1kFTJjEWlefWk3MRk5Xbk29DTgRg2KPaQaETO-8NTnSJZQrCM4JgfUx2_qlaiOGavlX173FSBTnssnErqIfQF9VoTQd9bAnGMhhuS_TTTsasAVryDJkVhvMisI6T5vsy1RuHRSxVVYh8oeWQZGHzdWJNXN4y6BGFfsm8XT_XCF2GSP4vL8Qv2JutLC6Q9Td0QI_LvTc1QtOlPrlppapbR2XzDVREdoGM-qPd3Ypz3O_bx7yw4bSLwTeeX3q3qPIgbsPHHGD1EtwuR45F97zyJ8Cjct6H6pCyz_SEpzg3u340pscZkVTgVAC0pY%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

I’ve been saying since I got into this race that it would likely be one - if not the - most expensive Senate matchup in 2024. This week, Washington Democrats announced they will spend - AT LEAST - **$27 million attacking me on TV in Montana this fall**.

It turns out my instinct was right. My Democrat opponent hasn’t been in danger of losing his seat since he was elected in 2006. Now, with me in the race, Democrats are afraid there is a real risk of losing this critical Senate seat. **They said they’d spend heavily to defeat me, and now we know that when it comes to the Montana Senate race, Democrats mean what they say**.

[**MAKE AN EMERGENCY CONTRIBUTION ->** ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=210340b966424cd2b2f784d9c4e99915&_e=nJB9k53vzuOtyz7nz5yCqfS9yJLsOg12bL5cQVa1Ly-OwMc59IPgThrrRg7sB6_ddzCbCawlKFnsBTPzF39pHN0ZnFFXWagagkSWJnTW7w97NNjoF1kFTJjEWlefWk3MRk5Xbk29DTgRg2KPaQaETO-8NTnSJZQrCM4JgfUx2_qlaiOGavlX173FSBTnssnErqIfQF9VoTQd9bAnGMhhuS_TTTsasAVryDJkVhvMisI6T5vsy1RuHRSxVVYh8oeWQZGHzdWJNXN4y6BGFfsm8YFNxde-56pBahC2FpVd04dC5M0lqlwyvZ6MK8opnFmVQUFm9jdfBwrkP5zTWGVzO1Oi8Qx8YKkNwvA2vOPOaUjHPBdPT3LpPwBhm3jz_H5LDRMNVWr-C8eZUKwPjYFb0Hsz62HtqnQHMCiRJpQQ64k%3D)

Here is where things stand:
1. Democrats have already spent more than **11 million dollars** to blunt my momentum and have earmarked an additional 27 million for the fall. But trust me, this is just the beginning.

body:
You’re not going to believe what Republicans caved to Trump on now. | | |

Let’s get this straight. Everyone agrees the immigration system is broken. It’s why Joe Biden proposed comprehensive immigration reform on his first day in office. In contrast, Republicans have spent their time going on Fox News to fear-monger. But their actions belie their TV appearances: MAGA Republicans supported a budget that would cut 2,000 Customs and Border Patrol agents, while rejecting the President’s budget proposals to fund fixes to the border. The President has kept at it. At his instruction, a bipartisan group of Senators worked together for months on a national security bill that would make our border more orderly, humane, and secure. And it failed, all because Donald Trump says it should. Trump spent the last 24 hours calling around, pressuring his MAGA lackeys to kill this bill. It’s all because he thinks solving this problem helps the President, and doing nothing hurts him. He’s betting the American people won’t see through it. We need a president who understands that and will put working families first. ****_ The _**only choice**_**** is President Trump. name: Bill Spadea
subject: School choice is critical
body:
Peter, Did you know that in the city of Newark, just 29% of Newark students can read at grade level? We're spending nearly $
|
---
| Peter, Did you know that in the city of Newark, **just 29% of students can read at grade level?** We're spending nearly $40,000 a student to put them through school, yet the majority can't even meet basic literacy standards. New Jersey is failing to provide the foundational education that should be a right for every American. _But it doesn't have to be this way._ This is where school choice and educational savings accounts come into play. **Imagine a system where parents can choose the best educational path for their children, be it public, private, charter, or home schooling, without being penalized financially.** Thirteen states have already embraced this model, offering a lifeline to those trapped in underperforming schools. Yet, the journey ahead is met with opposition in our state. The status quo, maintained by politicians more interested in reelection than education, continues to stifle innovation and reform. **The Common Sense Club is championing a movement to break down these barriers, advocating for policies like educational savings accounts that put parents back in control of their children's education.** Our aim isn't to undermine public schools but to strengthen the entire education system through competition and parental empowerment. It's about offering every child, regardless of background, the opportunity to succeed. _This is where you come in._ **Join us in this vital mission. Your support enables us to fight for a future where every parent has a say in their child's education, and every child has a chance to thrive.**
---
| | [Click here to become a member, stand with us and support school choice.](https://xtz223.keap-link018.com/v2/click/85c12f98c9a96d517d1d992b5b322be5/eJyNkMEKgkAQht9lzqa5GYq3EAnROkSdY9Ept3Rdtikr8d1bKzoVdJ3_m2_4pwNCySUlBYRwpTtjE7BAYy6UQElRI4nnz5RNPXfiWlAJeZzr5qwg7L4uf4Bh7Aa-ZwHdFBpkvZpFabKcb7NkmRpScW1u_Ofxg-DjiRezJIO-_ynGWlB8Me4ThKTPODQqhGlFG10ZviRSp9Bx2ra1D42QVOJO7EtiY-bZeVM7WHNRjYbI2LhSKIv3K1K8vZz9Ay0sZwQ=)

| Now, more than ever, your involvement is crucial. Join our mission to transform education in New Jersey and:
* **Engage in Policy Advocacy:** Be part of the push for educational reform and school choice.
* **Access Exclusive Content:** Receive updates and insights from leaders in education reform, including myself.
* **Connect with Community Leaders:** Network with like-minded individuals committed to making a difference.
* **Participate in Strategic Discussions:** Help shape the future of education in New Jersey and beyond.

[**Joining the Common Sense Club**](https://xtz223.keap-link018.com/v2/click/d65bf00c80933f5c04c67f8287ad0b0c/eJyNkMEKgkAQht9lzpa5GZk3EQmxPESdY9Ept3Rdtimz8N1bKzoVdJ3_m2_45w6EkkuKc_DhSjfGxmCBxkwogZLCWhLPnimbuM7YsaAU8jjX9VmBf_-6_AH6sePNXAuoVWiQ9SoIkzidbxdxmhhScW1u_OeZet7HEy2DeAFd91OMlaDoYtwn8EmfsW-UC9OKNro0fEGkTr5tN00zPNRCUoE7sS-IjZg7zOrKxoqLctBHxsaVQpm_X5Fg-3J2Dy7eZwY=) is more than a membership; it's a pledge to uphold and fight for the foundational values of our society. Together, we can ensure a brighter future for all children, making school choice a reality across New Jersey and the nation. Looking forward to welcoming you to our Club, Bill Spadea

Let’s put rural communities above corporate profits | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/04f0d8762e37/a-new-way-forward-for-texas-12678718?e=b8ba94fd9b)
---
I recently rolled out my Rural Bill of Rights.
**It centers the needs of rural communities — the backbone of our economy — over corporate profits.**
It lays out 11 priorities that every rural community should expect as a basic right.
It takes on issues like food and broadband desserts, guarantees that international corporations don’t have more rights to your family land than you do and so much more.
[](https://tchenkofortexas.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93f02de4b9a588e8269491419&id=2587426d2b&e=b8ba94fd9b)
Learn more about my [Rural Bill of Rights](https://tchenkofortexas.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93f02de4b9a588e8269491419&id=8b2cb0ec94&e=b8ba94fd9b).
[**And then please, kick in $11 or more today to help us continue to spread the word about the Bill of Rights, and all the other important issues at play in this campaign.**](https://tchenkofortexas.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93f02de4b9a588e8269491419&id=1c7707eeae&e=b8ba94fd9b)
Thank you,Thierry

Peter,

**There is no doubt in my mind that Mayorkas, and Biden, have FAILED the American people.**

| [**CLOSE THE BORDER**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=85d36977a3d345aa86b78b9c014e66c1&_e=YHzKcXhqCJ2e3mbZWXAgGkgUydn7sW9avofUIyzMSe01TnfMDl9E3t5-jzx8EQ65jqey5_btRA7aKX7DRuIKys3XTD6sRUL5JLnuQHGTx7dAw7sem7KnVmgruLnNnZdmOR2jRCxUad9AbOB7PAzelSKRDbVqEdagLCKTZ_iG8_tzHkXonz28Sn-0nKbL_FK6z7JohQURXzAAHEvBtivV9GU7W-P9qSpM36BBQybMgUKWKohGpXGhDpU-yYWdze-WISxJUiRiaWyLi1To2uFWlbFPbK8KVvb7omgpBW2hc0C34ntB_wo3LScBoqKXLPFm)

[**FIRE MAYORKAS**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=85d36977a3d345aa86b78b9c014e66c1&_e=YHzKcXhqCJ2e3mbZWXAgGkgUydn7sW9avofUIyzMSe01TnfMDl9E3t5-jzx8EQ65jqey5_btRA7aKX7DRuIKys3XTD6sRUL5JLnuQHGTx7dAw7sem7KnVmgruLnNnZdmOR2jRCxUad9AbOB7PAzelTZZkippEB5AExjc1DlRPuhQPS58uSSXzmXA2jPjINbvTXlFLxcRljjOjse2rfK2c8MEAhlAIJISCZ__zmCbmEx5X35wE1kRBJD9hrT6MfFKX8g3ZszNEHKLnDoiTwDsqHKpOlM29Iw9mF_JnVZYOceUIEkW2p9mGjWNg6ZOvqPM)
---

_Mayorkas ought to be impeached for literally refusing to do his job. Even worse, the immigration proposal being schemed by the Left will NOT help the border crisis - it will only make it worse. This is a BAD DEAL.

Mayorkas wants to rubber-stamp amnesty and have unlimited power when it comes to granting asylum and eventually citizenship to ILLEGAL ALIENS - without any review of the case by an immigration court.

He wants to grant each and every asylum seeker - no matter their criminal history of drug trafficking, human trafficking, rape, violence, or Lord knows what else - work permits. _

**_Mayorkas and Biden may as well hop in a helicopter and toss thousands of green cards across the border for whoever wants them!_ **

I will **NEVER** support a bill that legalizes illegal aliens, doesn't secure our open border, and sends billions to radical open-border orgs. This legislation is a guaranteed way to amnesty hundreds of thousands of illegal aliens.

**"The border never closes"** is a good summary of Joe Biden's policy. **" Unmitigated bullshit"** is all I can say for this bill.

**[Click here if you agree.](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=85d36977a3d345aa86b78b9c014e66c1&_e=YHzKcXhqCJ2e3mbZWXAgGkgUydn7sW9avofUIyzMSe01TnfMDl9E3t5-jzx8EQ65jqey5_btRA7aKX7DRuIKys3XTD6sRUL5JLnuQHGTx7dAw7sem7KnVmgruLnNnZdmOR2jRCxUad9AbOB7PAzelTZZkippEB5AExjc1DlRPuhrPI276_xqvm_4aeN85W-Ep9grZzX-cCSBSBev7-QriENlGQX1hBKZSU8jtuIfN0UyPqERZZl_SxbIoUkUgCw812AHdf_tUCZ1JYrYHI7YhqHry2hw2oR4eceUEgc0IZZkzJ_atelowLZZTzSXbWMW)**

_- JD Vance_

**Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author.**
Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our
economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans.
Ohio needs JD Vance. If you'd like to support our campaign, you can click below to make a donation. I will NEVER support a bill that legalizes illegal aliens, doesn't secure our open border, and sends billions to radical open-border orgs. This legislation is a guaranteed way to amnesty hundreds of thousands of illegal aliens. "The border never closes" is a good summary of Joe Biden's policy. " Unmitigated bullshit" is all I can say for this bill. - JD Vance Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author. Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans. Ohio needs JD Vance. If you'd like to support our campaign, you can click below to make a donation. | | ---|---|--- Paid for by JD Vance For Senate Inc. name: Bob Lorinser
subject: 📺 Video: Bergman's Border BS
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/TOP.png]
Hogwash
My opponent, Rep. Jack Bergman made wildly exaggerated claims about the dangers of 'gotaways' at the Southern Border. We need border security and immigration reform , but his reckless statements are embarrassing America.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bobvsbergman24 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bobvsbergman24]
Your contributions are helping Democrat Dr. Bob Lorinser bring dignity and integrity back to the seat for Michigan's First District. If you've saved your payment information with Act Blue Express, your donation will process immediately:
CONTRIBUTE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bobvsbergman24?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
CONTRIBUTE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bobvsbergman24?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
CONTRIBUTE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bobvsbergman24?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50]
Friend,
Hogwash. BS. Baloney. Malarkey. My team and I tried to find the best politically correct synonym for the word we all know I'm trying to say.
Jack Bergman is lying on the House floor. Big blatant lies.
Based on the Homeland Security Republican's own website, out of 2.4 million encounters at the Southwest border in FY 2023, only 169 individuals appear on terrorist watchlists.
This is just 0.007%, likely a ratio similar to the 'gotaways'. The crime rate for undocumented immigrants is less than 1%, just as it is for citizens.
Bergman's claims of a potential 100% of one million people are absolutely baseless.
Border Security and immigration reform are essential to our nation, but Bergman is purposefully denying solutions because border chaos is better for GOP elections.
Facts matter, and my opponent's statement yesterday was intellectually dishonest and morally wrong.
Help me replace him.
-Dr. Bob
Bob Lorinser
Candidate for US Congress
Northern Michigan / Upper Peninsula
Democrat, MI01

PO BOX 936
Marquette, MI 49855
United States

subject: Biden's Inaction Unleashes $114.3 BILLION Debt Bomb (Prepare Now)
body:
Prepare yourself for a revelation that should send shivers down your spine.

|
# Biden's Lies Exposed: Inflation Crisis Skyrockets National Debt!
[ ](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ydnebYf3Q-7pzM3yoRu9yA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnpkIKP0RHaHR0cHM6Ly9laWdodC5wcmlvcml0eWdvbGQuY29tLzM5MTktZnJlZS1raXQtMjM1Lz9TdWJJRD1STS1ST04tMjAyNDAyMDdXA3NwY0IKZcOLrcNloCMcAVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~) Prepare yourself for a revelation that should send shivers down your spine. In a shocking twist, we've uncovered a nightmarish scenario unfolding in our nation's financial landscape, and it's all thanks to **President Biden's inaction** on inflation. While the White House and the mainstream media want you to believe that inflation is getting better, they conveniently left out a crucial fact — the consequence? A **jaw-dropping increase of $114.3 BILLION** in our national debt! It's time for patriots like you to take a stand and safeguard your financial future.
### A Financial Crisis by Biden's Inaction:
In a stark departure from the past, the Federal Reserve, which once operated with a surplus, is now hemorrhaging losses. These losses, my fellow Americans, are **being passed on to you** , the hardworking citizens, as the Treasury is forced to issue more debt to cover the Federal Reserve's shortfalls. In 2023, following an inflation-driven surge in the federal funds rate, the **Fed began hemorrhaging money at an alarming rate.**
### Your Financial Survival is at Stake:
Imagine a future where your hard-earned savings vanish, your retirement dreams crumble, and your financial security disintegrates. **This grim future awaits** unless we **act decisively and act NOW!** **Your Defense Strategy:[Download Your Complimentary "Ultimate 2024 Wealth Protection Kit"](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ydnebYf3Q-7pzM3yoRu9yA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnpkIKP0RHaHR0cHM6Ly9laWdodC5wcmlvcml0eWdvbGQuY29tLzM5MTktZnJlZS1raXQtMjM1Lz9TdWJJRD1STS1ST04tMjAyNDAyMDdXA3NwY0IKZcOLrcNloCMcAVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~) (Available at No Cost)** Within this arsenal, you will find **three critical guides:** [ ](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ydnebYf3Q-7pzM3yoRu9yA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnpkIKP0RHaHR0cHM6Ly9laWdodC5wcmlvcml0eWdvbGQuY29tLzM5MTktZnJlZS1raXQtMjM1Lz9TdWJJRD1STS1ST04tMjAyNDAyMDdXA3NwY0IKZcOLrcNloCMcAVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
* **"Gold and Silver: Your 2024 Wealth Shield”:** In the wake of Biden's inaction, the surging national debt has turned gold and silver into indispensable shields for your wealth. Discover how these timeless assets can be your financial guardians against the inflation-induced economic turmoil.
* "**Ironclad Retirement: Metals-Backed IRA":** As Biden's blunders fuel financial chaos, it's time to bulletproof your retirement. Learn the secrets of integrating gold and silver into your IRA. This strategy is not just a defense against the raging storm of inflation and debt – it's your blueprint for a resilient, metals-backed retirement. Plus, learn about a **little-known IRS tax law benefiting precious metals IRAs.**
* **"The Dawn of the Digital Dollar: Your Wealth & Privacy at Risk":** In an era where Biden's policies accelerate Central Bank Digital Currencies (CBDCs), your financial privacy hangs in the balance. This guide is your compass in understanding how CBDCs can upheave traditional monetary systems, and it offers strategic insights on preserving your wealth and privacy in the digital dollar era.

[ ](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ydnebYf3Q-7pzM3yoRu9yA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnpkIKP0RHaHR0cHM6Ly9laWdodC5wcmlvcml0eWdvbGQuY29tLzM5MTktZnJlZS1raXQtMjM1Lz9TdWJJRD1STS1ST04tMjAyNDAyMDdXA3NwY0IKZcOLrcNloCMcAVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
### Don't Wait - Act NOW!
Biden's inaction on inflation is nothing short of an economic disaster, and your financial security is on the line. [**Secure your zero-cost guides**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ydnebYf3Q-7pzM3yoRu9yA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnpkIKP0RHaHR0cHM6Ly9laWdodC5wcmlvcml0eWdvbGQuY29tLzM5MTktZnJlZS1raXQtMjM1Lz9TdWJJRD1STS1ST04tMjAyNDAyMDdXA3NwY0IKZcOLrcNloCMcAVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~) today and send a powerful message that you won't let Washington's negligence destroy your financial future. name: Gallego For Arizona HQ
subject: Peter — please, wait just a minute
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Give us a chance to explain why your donation is so important.
#

Peter:
If you care about winning in Arizona or holding the Senate, please — stick around a minute.
**Give us a chance to explain why your donation is so important.**
It wasn’t long ago that the wealthy and well-connected called the shots in campaigns like this. Just about every single dollar a campaign raised came from big checks written by the people who could afford to give them. Those are the people the folks in Congress and the Senate looked out for.
Now, a lot of people still fund their campaigns that way. **But not Ruben.**
The vast majority of the donations Ruben receives come from people like you who chip in. Our average donation is about $25. People like you are the core of this campaign, and when Ruben goes to Washington it’s going to be people like you who sent him there. He won’t forget that.
**That’s why you are so important.** Just a small percentage of Ruben’s supporters make a donation, because not everyone understands how critical Arizona is to holding our majority in the Senate.
**We hope you do, and that’s why we’re asking you to make that contribution.**
So please, if you can afford it:
[**Use this link to make your donation. Help us build a campaign powered by the people. And when Ruben defeats Kari Lake and helps Democrats hold the Senate, you’ll know that you made it happen.](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/2327?c0=ruben-em-feb24.-zvZm_&refcode=em240207-1-120&t=1&akid=1934%2E734936%2EsMKEpY)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

| Peter -
---
| All eyes will be on Nevada this week as our Republican Presidential Caucus is taking place from 5-7:30 pm this **Thursday, February 8th**. If you need help figuring out your caucus location, [click ](https://DrewForNevada.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=faca3bfedb5031bc3491ebbc8&id=a470ac049e&e=fc26432468)[here](https://DrewForNevada.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=faca3bfedb5031bc3491ebbc8&id=6a25c36cf3&e=fc26432468).

You can caucus for President Trump _AND_ help our campaign. We are **actively seeking volunteers** to assist us on Thursday evening at multiple caucus locations within CD-3. If you are interested in volunteering, please [email Linnea](mailto:linnea@drewfornevada.com?subject=I'd%20like%20to%20volunteer!).

Your involvement will be instrumental in ensuring that we _tell as many caucus attendees as possible about our campaign rooted in individual liberty and limited government_. Our amazing volunteers** ** have been the driving force behind our campaign, and I'm so grateful for each and every person who has contributed their time, energy, and passion.

Finally, **Fox News featured my latest column** and **_it went VIRAL_** \-- and for good reason. I caught the Biden administration cutting Medicare Advantage benefits, which makes healthcare worse for our seniors and increases costs for taxpayers. Make sure to scroll down to read the entire article!

As always, thank you for your [continued support of our campaign!](https://DrewForNevada.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=faca3bfedb5031bc3491ebbc8&id=3d6f8625e0&e=fc26432468) No matter the amount -- whether it's $5, $55, or $500 -- every dollar makes a difference!

# _**On the Campaign Trail**_
Drew and Sarah had a great time at the **inaugural meeting for Siena Patriots** , a dedicated group of volunteers and leaders helping to elect great conservative candidates in Nevada. Many of the attendees spent their weekend **collecting signatures to put a voter ID initiative on the ballot** in November.
---
|
---
Drew speaking to Siena Patriots
| Drew attended the **Trump Rally in Las Vegas** where he and a team of volunteers handed out literature, met constituents, and showed support for President Trump. **Drew[endorsed President Trump](https://DrewForNevada.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=faca3bfedb5031bc3491ebbc8&id=79c9d23bfe&e=fc26432468)** and will be caucusing for him on Thursday.
---
|

# _YOU Can Help Us Defeat Susie Lee!_
Want to help Drew and make sure Republicans maintain control of the House of Representatives? We need your help! This race is going to be tight, and **having supporters like you step up and lend a hand is vital!**

Here are the **_TOP 3_ ways _YOU_ can get involved:**

1. **Donate: **Simply chipping in a few dollars to support our efforts is incredibly helpful. Whether it's $3 or $3,000, every donation makes a _huge_ difference! Just $18 buys coffee and donuts for volunteers! **You can contribute to the campaign [HERE](https://DrewForNevada.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=faca3bfedb5031bc3491ebbc8&id=488a9615b0&e=fc26432468)**.

2. **Host a Meet-and-Greet for Drew** : Hosting a Meet-and-Greet in your home for Drew and inviting your friends, family, and neighbors is one of the _best ways to spread our message_. Whether it’s a casual coffee meeting, a wine and cheese event, or an energetic Golden Knights watch party, we can make hosting a get-together fun and easy. Interested in hosting a Meet-and-Greet? Email [linnea@drewfornevada.com](mailto:linnea@drewfornevada.com?subject=I'd%20like%20to%20host%20a%20Meet%20%26%20Greet%20for%20Drew!).

3. **Volunteer for the Campaign:** #TeamDrew is the secret weapon that will get Drew elected to Congress. We need to knock on tens of thousands of doors, write thousands of postcards, and make as many phone calls as possible to make this campaign a success...and **we can't do it without you**! Please visit** **[THIS](https://DrewForNevada.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=faca3bfedb5031bc3491ebbc8&id=9e66e3ca98&e=fc26432468) link to join #TeamDrew as a volunteer.

name: Add Your Name (via Left Action)
subject: Sign: Tell Speaker Mike Johnson to stop listening to Trump and put the border deal up for a vote
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Sign: Tell Speaker Mike Johnson to "man up" and put the border deal up for a vote](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tce9a2fb2-c15a-41a4-93fe-a00d79930715/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf9879914-9a02-49ab-a5c5-1a41dd75394d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | A bipartisan group in Congress has put together a deal to help improve the border situation. All indications are that it would be supported by a majority in both houses.* **But Speaker Mike Johnson refuses to put it up for a vote -- because Donald Trump told him not to.** Even though Republicans are in favor of the deal, Trump would rather have chaos at the border than solve the problem. And Johnson has been afraid to stand up to him. **It's time for Johnson to "man up" and do what's right for the country.** [**Tell Johnson to put the border deal up for a vote**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3a0dfa36-2228-43eb-b8f8-b40c145fac82/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc1de7dbd-0937-43f0-abf1-51348e6080b5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action _(*Note: the Senate voted against advancing the bill today, with multiple GOP members unwilling to move until they know it will get a House vote. So keep up the pressure!)_ (P.S. - Want to do something else? How about [helping this January 6th hero cop win a seat in Congress](https://default.salsalabs.org/T580b941e-2416-426c-9d12-caee10372b14/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9))
---
|
---
| | | | | **Other things you can do:**
* Follow us on [Facebook](https://default.salsalabs.org/T06ab8c18-47a1-40e0-8af8-67ae8323ad54/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) and [Twitter](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td0cfb29a-b7a0-455d-bd72-4f7888081dfe/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Go here for more actions you can take](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0a80acc8-6891-481c-913a-b044e845e856/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Help us out with a donation](https://default.salsalabs.org/T396679bc-72fd-4022-b4ba-66d82ab04c6e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---

name: Steve Garvey
subject: Help me strike out Adam Schiff
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U
body:
Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?

| |
---
| | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f363a5bd323549bd8be5388281b60e52&_e=ozG6ltpK9XcoDRRu1LE1x3LjAPh1pkYs9Vr5FdBU5wxrTZjUhJk2mWIs-MLGyYazbyRuVejnBjAmWPrn7XDVxFG-gHdIE1FICAaI6Br3QtW1gtXLtZkYfMdZRJXFiDCQql0d4Dz-dt2gJncyUcJjT6vE3Xq5vZ2mOxm9INLuLMR5H35PZ2pxPyF_CG7AIA_iCJ9g5DXSXRzyC7jimc0UZXDrJoWheP6DC94f3Mt3dQ9mwuPfau5rtbLsGGmaLPScBHcH8oXwiA_oLLsz-VJ_70zRd8z2rzisf0UamWaBk3qpyB3xFPn9p_NlnAdza2R7Tk0G5txp-oO_crzqn3OeifKtTyL-Eeb6sLyyPRINwn-XFYjI9BjdDtxh7nwpHLD0wVHf3shvEgCg_aYOj22f0Q%3D%3D)
---
| | Friend, **[**Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f363a5bd323549bd8be5388281b60e52&_e=ozG6ltpK9XcoDRRu1LE1x3LjAPh1pkYs9Vr5FdBU5wxrTZjUhJk2mWIs-MLGyYazbyRuVejnBjAmWPrn7XDVxFG-gHdIE1FICAaI6Br3QtW1gtXLtZkYfMdZRJXFiDCQql0d4Dz-dt2gJncyUcJjT6vE3Xq5vZ2mOxm9INLuLMR5H35PZ2pxPyF_CG7AIA_iCJ9g5DXSXRzyC7jimc0UZXDrJoWheP6DC94f3Mt3dQ8OSuVY56HyVxXIUmIRbi3e7BNfhIyQcCHY9yceFOr6OOx5HbJrZUPP36jPE_w7NPQhaTriwkHElM_hyBUCawk6SzPDEtgF_Gfd2Fntn_tVkOoX8sIeBtYckd8rJKBIIjDMFi2J3S50bebWAZo8oCWRH_-_j4EfANfq0q6wUvBFuw%3D%3D)** That's the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November. I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to "choose" between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee... ...and that's being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go "three up...three down" against this lineup of liberal career politicians. That's a bit of baseball vernacular. No surprise, right? It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning. Then, it's your team's turn to go on offense. Well, that's very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country. Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years - most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I'm reaching out to you today. **[Will you step up and help strike out this"lineup of liberals" through a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today?](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f363a5bd323549bd8be5388281b60e52&_e=ozG6ltpK9XcoDRRu1LE1x3LjAPh1pkYs9Vr5FdBU5wxrTZjUhJk2mWIs-MLGyYazbyRuVejnBjAmWPrn7XDVxFG-gHdIE1FICAaI6Br3QtW1gtXLtZkYfMdZRJXFiDCQql0d4Dz-dt2gJncyUcJjT6vE3Xq5vZ2mOxm9INLuLMR5H35PZ2pxPyF_CG7AIA_iCJ9g5DXSXRzyC7jimc0UZXDrJoWheP6DC94f3Mt3dQ_QGMw-vpsEzbb2J-U4vxR5mqNBaqykAWOk4AwxzOP7bYvgGgSe0uqG8mKDi4zr4D0AqjZ-UwaHT4T1Ye20fJXWvxEYlg_U8xJHNyeBs_mW64zGuW_yZX7RXVnbt8R1R3ZAJKQBd2SXox2T8D_8ltzToklWZcdArRmQKfa_UpiQxA%3D%3D)** Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California. Think about the daily reality of:
---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California. • Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don't lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---
If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a "false choice" between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, **[**then I need you to take immediate action and rush a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f363a5bd323549bd8be5388281b60e52&_e=ozG6ltpK9XcoDRRu1LE1x3LjAPh1pkYs9Vr5FdBU5wxrTZjUhJk2mWIs-MLGyYazbyRuVejnBjAmWPrn7XDVxFG-gHdIE1FICAaI6Br3QtW1gtXLtZkYfMdZRJXFiDCQql0d4Dz-dt2gJncyUcJjT6vE3Xq5vZ2mOxm9INLuLMR5H35PZ2pxPyF_CG7AIA_iCJ9g5DXSXRzyC7jimc0UZXDrJoWheP6DC94f3Mt3dQ_aVK7WQ7BBRxw_fx0_6qvTY56DOAixDfhGbf_Pt-0ngKQgvtOuLY_-sNrA7QcD7TTU5O-6uvAOkj7AsFReMz3CZQhqW5Su03eyvfKqrkhIHGgqTYPoPuSNYhpiHKcq1aSfGAoSuOqZVG9xUFKDHdmVThvu_e_oaz8nsdnuhRPBzg%3D%3D)** Winning this election requires a one-two punch:
---
1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign "connecting the dots" between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day.
---
In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That's my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. **[But I need your help. I'd consider it a great honor to have you on my campaign team. clean_body: Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th? | | | | | | Friend, That's the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November. I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to "choose" between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee... ...and that's being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go "three up...three down" against this lineup of liberal career politicians. That's a bit of baseball vernacular. No surprise, right? It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning. Then, it's your team's turn to go on offense. Well, that's very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country. Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years - most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I'm reaching out to you today. Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California. Think about the daily reality of: • Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California. • Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don't lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction. If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a "false choice" between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, Winning this election requires a one-two punch: 1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign "connecting the dots" between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day. In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That's my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. With you on our side, I'm confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again. | | With deepest appreciation, Steve Garvey Republican for United States Senate | | | | | | | MY VISION My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education.
