name: Lucas Kunce
subject: We've got some new information about Josh Hawley’s family business to ban abortion
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
[1]Lucas Kunce for U.S. Senate

Peter — from
overturning Roe to banning abortion drugs, Josh Hawley turned his mission
to criminalize abortion nationwide into a family business — and he’s
abused his power to do it. Please let me explain:

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43396?refcode=em20240207-4769&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=4769%2E614464%2EpYpxOP ]Tweet from Josh Hawley on June 24, 2022: For those who wondered why I
said, two years ago, I would vote to confirm ONLY Supreme Court Justices
who acknowledged Roe was wrong, this is why. Amy Barrett was the first
openly pro-life nominee of my lifetime. And she was the deciding vote.

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43396?refcode=em20240207-4769&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=4769%2E614464%2EpYpxOP ]DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY

IN 2017: Matt Kacsmaryk was nominated to be a federal judge for the north
Texas district court.

His confirmation stalled for years. We learned he even lied to hide just
how bizarre his obsession with controlling people’s bodies really is:

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43396?refcode=em20240207-4769&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=4769%2E614464%2EpYpxOP ]Headline from The Dallas Morning News: John Cornyn says Judge Kacsmaryk
should not have taken name off anti-abortion article. Excerpt: 'The
process only works if we... have candor and truthful answers. So that's
significant,' said Cornyn, a member of the Senate Judiciary Committee
responsible for vetting Kacsmaryk's nomination.

IN 2018: While his nomination languished in the Senate, Kacsmaryk made an
investment in his future.

He became a campaign donor to Josh Hawley, a fellow member of the
Federalist Society — a group of corporate activist lawyers with funders
including Chevron, Google, and the Kochs.

IN 2019: Now a U.S. Senator, Josh Hawley decided to make Kacsmaryk, his
campaign donor, a federal judge.

Hawley confirmed Kacsmaryk to the northern Texas district court — despite
bipartisan opposition over Kacsmaryk’s Big Brother views on contraceptives
and personal freedoms.

IN 2022: A lawsuit was filed in the northern Texas district court by
activist lawyers seeking to ban an abortion pill that millions have used
safely. Abortion medication accounts for over half of all abortions.

Josh Hawley’s wife led the suit. His donor was the judge.

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43396?refcode=em20240207-4769&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=4769%2E614464%2EpYpxOP ]Photos of Josh Hawley and Texas Judge Matthew Kacsmaryk on the left. On
the right, a Vanity Fair headline that reads: Erin Morrow Hawley is
leading the charge to ban abortion medication. She's also Josh Hawley's
wife.

APRIL 2023: Hawley’s donor judge ruled in favor of the suit led by
Hawley’s wife, calling for a near-immediate ban on the abortion pill
mifepristone in all 50 states.

This was the first time a judge has ever unilaterally tried to take a drug
off the market against FDA objections.

Then, in his official capacity as U.S. Senator, Josh Hawley submitted an
amicus brief demanding that the Supreme Court end a temporary injunction
blocking the ruling (in his wife's lawsuit) by a judge (his campaign
donor) to ban America's most commonly-used abortion medication.

AND NOW: We’ve learned that the mifepristone case, led by Hawley’s wife,
will be argued in front of the Supreme Court on March 26.

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43396?refcode=em20240207-4769&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1005&akid=4769%2E614464%2EpYpxOP ]POLITICO headline: Supreme Court sets date for high-stakes abortion
pill oral arguments. Excerpt: The Supreme Court on Monday set a date for
one of the highest-stakes and closest-watched cases of the term —
announcing it will hear oral arguments on how patients can access
mifepristone, the commonly used abortion pill, on March 26.

This is what corruption looks like — and this year, we’re going to make
Hawley own it. [ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43396?refcode=em20240207-4769&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1006&akid=4769%2E614464%2EpYpxOP ]So if you’re ready to end these Big Brother attacks on
abortion and send a real warrior for working people to represent Missouri
in the U.S. Senate, please rush a donation of $10 or
whatever you can afford to my grassroots campaign right now.

If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your

clean_body: [1]Lucas Kunce for U.S. Senate Peter — from overturning Roe to banning abortion drugs, Josh Hawley turned his mission to criminalize abortion nationwide into a family business — and he’s abused his power to do it. Please let me explain: [ ]Tweet from Josh Hawley on June 24, 2022: For those who wondered why I said, two years ago, I would vote to confirm ONLY Supreme Court Justices who acknowledged Roe was wrong, this is why. Amy Barrett was the first openly pro-life nominee of my lifetime. And she was the deciding vote. [ ]DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY IN 2017: Matt Kacsmaryk was nominated to be a federal judge for the north Texas district court. His confirmation stalled for years. We learned he even lied to hide just how bizarre his obsession with controlling people’s bodies really is: [ ]Headline from The Dallas Morning News: John Cornyn says Judge Kacsmaryk should not have taken name off anti-abortion article. Excerpt: 'The process only works if we... have candor and truthful answers. So that's significant,' said Cornyn, a member of the Senate Judiciary Committee responsible for vetting Kacsmaryk's nomination. IN 2018: While his nomination languished in the Senate, Kacsmaryk made an investment in his future. He became a campaign donor to Josh Hawley, a fellow member of the Federalist Society — a group of corporate activist lawyers with funders including Chevron, Google, and the Kochs. IN 2019: Now a U.S. Senator, Josh Hawley decided to make Kacsmaryk, his campaign donor, a federal judge. Hawley confirmed Kacsmaryk to the northern Texas district court — despite bipartisan opposition over Kacsmaryk’s Big Brother views on contraceptives and personal freedoms. IN 2022: A lawsuit was filed in the northern Texas district court by activist lawyers seeking to ban an abortion pill that millions have used safely. Abortion medication accounts for over half of all abortions. Josh Hawley’s wife led the suit. His donor was the judge. [ ]Photos of Josh Hawley and Texas Judge Matthew Kacsmaryk on the left. On the right, a Vanity Fair headline that reads: Erin Morrow Hawley is leading the charge to ban abortion medication. She's also Josh Hawley's wife. APRIL 2023: Hawley’s donor judge ruled in favor of the suit led by Hawley’s wife, calling for a near-immediate ban on the abortion pill mifepristone in all 50 states. This was the first time a judge has ever unilaterally tried to take a drug off the market against FDA objections. Then, in his official capacity as U.S. Senator, Josh Hawley submitted an amicus brief demanding that the Supreme Court end a temporary injunction blocking the ruling (in his wife's lawsuit) by a judge (his campaign donor) to ban America's most commonly-used abortion medication. AND NOW: We’ve learned that the mifepristone case, led by Hawley’s wife, will be argued in front of the Supreme Court on March 26. [ ]POLITICO headline: Supreme Court sets date for high-stakes abortion pill oral arguments. Excerpt: The Supreme Court on Monday set a date for one of the highest-stakes and closest-watched cases of the term — announcing it will hear oral arguments on how patients can access mifepristone, the commonly used abortion pill, on March 26. This is what corruption looks like — and this year, we’re going to make Hawley own it. [ ]So if you’re ready to end these Big Brother attacks on abortion and send a real warrior for working people to represent Missouri in the U.S. Senate, please rush a donation of $10 or whatever you can afford to my grassroots campaign right now. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: [ ]Contribute $10 [ ]Contribute $25 [ ]Contribute $30 [ ]Contribute $50 [ ]Contribute $100 [ ]Contribute $250 [ ]Give another amount Senators shouldn’t be in the business of using their position to benefit their family’s legal careers and activism — especially if there’s a financial incentive to do so. And there shouldn’t even be a hint of campaign donations impacting who, when, and how a judge gets on a court. When I’m in the U.S. Senate, I’ll vote to restore Roe v. Wade. But I’ll also fight to end corruption like this by: 1. Barring Senators from voting on judicial nominees who’ve given to their campaigns. 2. Barring Senators from lobbying any court to benefit an immediate relative. Everyday Missourians deserve a Senator who will stand up and fight for their personal freedoms — not another corrupt politician obsessed with controlling our bodies, families, and lives — and I’m ready to serve. [ ]If you’re with me, please rush a donation of $10 or whatever you can afford to our grassroots campaign to defeat Josh Hawley today. Real people like you are the only folks I ever want to be accountable to in the U.S. Senate, so your support means the world to me. [ ]DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY Thank you, — Lucas Kunce

| | Fellow American, **[**Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?**](http://links.maralagoraiders.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=585a85fe18d44e999657685952801906&_e=Nh-xWh9cJ-8cjiVxfYIi84iB_CEqUpNRHd5L1FS9IDFFA9gRBRFMhq8b3Tmq9ImJnqKwtHuYDWqmF1Q7RRhOZpBQFqGMSsFj0pPN2TuyglqzCMl7ifZilA6eN7MPmegJm3G95o19vmGFZXTgb7knrWfL8xVSzKSiTnUEf3kSSzVvq_DMawIT5hEZwK7eSEm3-7E9em4dM_PMod-2Kq10X0XunIPPW7DQreIUbZers0dqglSg4BvWr8DIf6XMmFtYI1jeU0DW8ojd8OQlMCp5aTN6sB_fKFsvQ0OYTRYOb-Kumt9huyh9tf54Laab78u3V-Tk1bhqSfeOrxUiOaqECeeUkFiCMs0DjIUOmnCJGuUYXSRiX9L151M-wbhvZ1uqbPolKeqqRlkrWUXG2uF1QA%3D%3D)** That's the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November. I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to "choose" between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee... ...and that's being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go "three up...three down" against this lineup of liberal career politicians. That's a bit of baseball vernacular. No surprise, right? It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning. Then, it's your team's turn to go on offense. Well, that's very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country. Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years - most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I'm reaching out to you today. **[Will you step up and help strike out this"lineup of liberals" through a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today?](http://links.maralagoraiders.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=585a85fe18d44e999657685952801906&_e=Nh-xWh9cJ-8cjiVxfYIi84iB_CEqUpNRHd5L1FS9IDFFA9gRBRFMhq8b3Tmq9ImJnqKwtHuYDWqmF1Q7RRhOZpBQFqGMSsFj0pPN2TuyglqzCMl7ifZilA6eN7MPmegJm3G95o19vmGFZXTgb7knrWfL8xVSzKSiTnUEf3kSSzVvq_DMawIT5hEZwK7eSEm3-7E9em4dM_PMod-2Kq10X0XunIPPW7DQreIUbZers0fCyhpDwo_1cjGLyoTad_R4hPhIA4PwVURjHtC_D74ALlYKNrNZuf9a0U60tNyht-rn9DfN30PIHZzjJ_szmkDlkuxnaCd-8aVoF8cklQByGpcpOk-pZvbnn9stVGsT8HOmT43g-y55MQNIeP4PLUMHvWCP_fs5dWDB4WW8QtmCDw%3D%3D)** Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California. Think about the daily reality of:
---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California. • Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don't lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---
If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a "false choice" between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, **[**then I need you to take immediate action and rush a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today.**](http://links.maralagoraiders.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=585a85fe18d44e999657685952801906&_e=Nh-xWh9cJ-8cjiVxfYIi84iB_CEqUpNRHd5L1FS9IDFFA9gRBRFMhq8b3Tmq9ImJnqKwtHuYDWqmF1Q7RRhOZpBQFqGMSsFj0pPN2TuyglqzCMl7ifZilA6eN7MPmegJm3G95o19vmGFZXTgb7knrWfL8xVSzKSiTnUEf3kSSzVvq_DMawIT5hEZwK7eSEm3-7E9em4dM_PMod-2Kq10X0XunIPPW7DQreIUbZers0eQkpSS3xxcUMxNaBgG4InQ_t7eZ_buyY913pNv6hNj_jKIQiaJRa95hDYYGnnCsrMFHzakPmIIIMbiriuN7PYUpLSEmAQJCzXi6mzxF9tvHnPUTmxjxzMeTIsufpXzrqe1fNHegCHjYBLfhXynx1ALtEjPRpAfsnThehpzUEvggw%3D%3D)** Winning this election requires a one-two punch:
---
1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign "connecting the dots" between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day.
---
In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That's my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. **[But I need your help. I'd consider it a great honor to have you on my campaign team. I also consider your support a must have in order to win this race.](http://links.maralagoraiders.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=585a85fe18d44e999657685952801906&_e=Nh-xWh9cJ-8cjiVxfYIi84iB_CEqUpNRHd5L1FS9IDFFA9gRBRFMhq8b3Tmq9ImJnqKwtHuYDWqmF1Q7RRhOZpBQFqGMSsFj0pPN2TuyglqzCMl7ifZilA6eN7MPmegJm3G95o19vmGFZXTgb7knrWfL8xVSzKSiTnUEf3kSSzVvq_DMawIT5hEZwK7eSEm3-7E9em4dM_PMod-2Kq10X0XunIPPW7DQreIUbZers0c-U4CatGGVLBkWhnvZa_B5MZNXKCtxKp56oCQYPftOWxXM98m6x0Vcbgu7IbzHPhyfFf7c69ztSvYV0GKrRZrUKIN7n_s-5yqvKBX8AfUKYpMqJ1uSaKlzwwSFTuNc-Jv5ZB7_uSFir4lBOSGqSGAAPWiNljFegZrkjzcEe-OpgQ%3D%3D)** With you on our side, I'm confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again.
---
| | With deepest appreciation,
---
---
Steve Garvey Republican for United States Senate

**MY VISION**
---
My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. As your U.S. Senator, I will serve with commonsense, compassion, and will work to build consensus to benefit all of the people of California. I've been fortunate to wear many hats in life - from professional athlete to businessman to philanthropist. But the one thing that has remained consistent is my love for this great state and my desire to make a difference. In baseball, it's not about the individual; it's about the team. I believe the same holds true for politics. It's time we come together, find common ground, and work towards a brighter future.

Peter, The Left-wing media reports the Virginia U.S. Senate race is a “sleeper race” with a guaranteed Democrat victory. _I’m here to tell you it’s not._ We have seen incredible momentum since we first launched our campaign, and that momentum hasn’t shown any signs of slowing down. The people of Virginia are sick of the same, swamp entrenched, Democrat establishment leadership. The voters told us this by electing Republican Gov. Glenn Youngkin just two years ago. Now, I think Virginia is ready for a fresh new conservative face in the U.S. Senate who isn’t afraid to put in the work and make tough decisions. I’m ready to be that leader, but I need your help. **If you haven’t already, will you pitch in now with the link below and become a founding donor for our U.S. Senate campaign?** [**https://secure.winred.com/hung-cao-for-virginia/dpwillis67@gmail.com**](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=36657f5e4fce4182b524a9d2659daf68&_e=utQvsqhUBVDXk1_9HelpdOceBo5B0u6FaAZFYGCJMj-Nuyl6EKxUCuD1WO2wrX55K2P6R_UdicUdaT60V0_jM0hD7sn2e0ACXd-T5P4BEQt9H-S4kUTnGjumFikuGj7J_FJ3ADU02YP17GUXNH9o0i_9m2DGv-OJevNjIHivOP0Ifj8lKjXL_WKV-fOb0Gursv8ppO9wGGNAG4YGdmDKc5B63JDvNoyqbBUMEX7JSR6RArXPMNPxexa59hg04veXl5anokZReZHwLAzxysdZEmTdcZfCRoA-zSa_w817ERGLf2rE8ejB1u4l2wubE03y28GFUlD1EjydDifj_ANd3-g4jxH-rN53cgRA9bQFcEnwmJFVFzvTboV979HV2TwjiX1nzt_YVfIp_qYGQN_VnA%3D%3D) **With your help, I know we can SHOCK the D.C. establishment and carry this race to victory. ** In Liberty,

I came to America with little besides the clothes on my back. But with faith, dedication, and hard work, my family and I made it in America. I’m running for Senate to defend the American Dream that gave me everything. The Left is on a war path against the values that make us the greatest country on Earth. I didn’t put my life on the line defending those values in Special Operations in the Navy to let the Left destroy them. [I know we can win this battle for our future, but I need your help. Can you chip in just $5 now to fuel our fight?](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=36657f5e4fce4182b524a9d2659daf68&_e=utQvsqhUBVDXk1_9HelpdOceBo5B0u6FaAZFYGCJMj-Nuyl6EKxUCuD1WO2wrX55gbPxFgNPUrHsbJFeyMeaL7OSkc9ZQz6g0UqC_hhYFaD1ArvA6OYywwgKGbVEVluFG4GYJHakbk4IQ6_kjupwg_-PvAu-w4BQhbRHFKJkX0-_Rpha7H7pVtoyovm6q12Vshf2EAvKppWdoU0BcrIa2NSLzwbe-j8mkT3n8TVhRlP6eSoUDIYmn9xT8utt1BDuSg2pUMhI_aq0ZGv7HRgYdDFubRfSaPVFhbw81G-3ZBU69NormC5gsivfXpMqvTtBZCjaWsTN9tkEb4qIgO3nsKK245SUZlu6ocoHTiZM_MpojzsUxlbgjikmtbJ93gUT) We are fueled by grassroots patriots like you. Team, Tammy’s hard work and leadership are making headlines. | | **TAMMY MURPHY TOUTS PROGRAM AIMED AT HELPING EXPECTANT AND NEW MOTHERS IN NJ**
_— KYW Newsradio_
* * *
_“New Jersey ranked 47th in the nation in maternal health. Now it ranks 27th.”_
---
When Tammy became First Lady in 2018, New Jersey ranked _47th in the nation_ in maternal health care. Black mothers were about 7x more likely than white mothers to die from pregnancy-related complications.
It was systemic racism, and Tammy saw it was morally wrong and clearly preventable. So she set out to fix it.
She worked with doulas, health care professionals, patient advocates, and many more to root out systemic racism in maternal health systems, and she launched the Nurture NJ program to ensure better, more equitable outcomes for every birthing mother in New Jersey.
**Tammy’s work makes a difference, but her opponents and men in the media are already trying to downplay its impact. It’s sexist and wrong.**
[**If you’re able, please chip in today to help Tammy fight back and share her record with more New Jersey voters.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78573667/453794227/959448484?refcode=AU_TMNJ_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240207_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDk1NzMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGU5MGFkNDUtZDhjNS1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzODQ4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WdD7SwxAtL9X-LDIg943rwnm_Oz5Sy70ffoVDpDb2y4=)

Tammy’s work makes a difference, but her opponents and men in the media are already trying to downplay its impact. It’s sexist and wrong. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = If people hear what Tammy has accomplished, we know they will turn out and vote for her. But we need to make sure we reach them early and often — before our opponents and detractors do. = Thank you, Team Tammy Tammy Murphy for Senate PO Box 378 Maplewood, NJ 07040 United States mailto:info@tammymurphyforsenate.com | Paid for by Tammy Murphy for Senate

**_27 MILLION DOLLARS_**

_**Democrats just reserved more than 27 million dollars worth of attack ads against me this fall**_.

It’s clearer than ever that _**my candidacy scares the Democrat powerbrokers in D.C**_. If I’m going to have a real shot at winning this race, I’m going to need every conservative donor in the country to get involved.
[**MAKE AN EMERGENCY CONTRIBUTION ->** ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b546fd4b89c64408ae501f4202eb44ea&_e=9OsrKAndB0aZae-HptxyXEDL9KS-NKobWfZNMO5kE5_gj_Wv89VAgrwgVi8hAuM7d51j835nvck04wrlI_NRHvi960nZANDps5IDLUg05N2RJPFfId3Lph5Dmh9iLdczxaF5spw8udtMskYmx9h4buAzdinK3B03bxLpoTpcfH2ROwbXOOvmswvhZ60SeDUZCfAge_x82l_0clHYQ5C7a90ZTX8HJ0nvX8-Kh9ZSDPNjZf9JznTkkQVfSFCW-MzWo8whzsIxCOY6JciCoxm6DfPjAZBNBi5wV_B8k4tRYc_Qq7vJEBeX90z5Uo9lUZNHXTHTut9ze75brCnBDsWb5MGeakSXqv4uBAG6P0NczSCoCvmRtnUqrAa7ivkLJoYz4Oa2JffOUebz7r9UQ0q00FcLLJFwYrVUEE0bkW4q0s4%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

I’ve been saying since I got into this race that it would likely be one - if not the - most expensive Senate matchup in 2024. This week, Washington Democrats announced they will spend - AT LEAST - **$27 million attacking me on TV in Montana this fall**.

It turns out my instinct was right. My Democrat opponent hasn’t been in danger of losing his seat since he was elected in 2006. Now, with me in the race, Democrats are afraid there is a real risk of losing this critical Senate seat. **They said they’d spend heavily to defeat me, and now we know that when it comes to the Montana Senate race, Democrats mean what they say**.

[**MAKE AN EMERGENCY CONTRIBUTION ->** ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b546fd4b89c64408ae501f4202eb44ea&_e=9OsrKAndB0aZae-HptxyXEDL9KS-NKobWfZNMO5kE5_gj_Wv89VAgrwgVi8hAuM7d51j835nvck04wrlI_NRHvi960nZANDps5IDLUg05N2RJPFfId3Lph5Dmh9iLdczxaF5spw8udtMskYmx9h4buAzdinK3B03bxLpoTpcfH2ROwbXOOvmswvhZ60SeDUZCfAge_x82l_0clHYQ5C7a90ZTX8HJ0nvX8-Kh9ZSDPNjZf9JznTkkQVfSFCW-MzWo8whzsIxCOY6JciCoxm6DXaKKZmIQFHtOV4ysOriUjmdIKfDKteQRAB-baVZIkLy6c7XglaxINRHpHfAY8PBHtrxIa8fnr4Hrb7410DieH8hRmpccvXlLGeMmk8_pLr1yoiUVGfYCvX0yDnzR8v75p0T08dDRr3WcER2fnG2Hts%3D)

Here is where things stand:
1. Democrats have already spent more than **11 million dollars** to blunt my momentum and have earmarked an additional 27 million for the fall. But trust me, this is just the beginning.

2. Last quarter, my opponent raised 5.5 million dollars - a record - and his quarterly fundraising totals will only increase with each quarter that passes.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b546fd4b89c64408ae501f4202eb44ea&_e=9OsrKAndB0aZae-HptxyXEDL9KS-NKobWfZNMO5kE5_gj_Wv89VAgrwgVi8hAuM7d51j835nvck04wrlI_NRHvi960nZANDps5IDLUg05N2RJPFfId3Lph5Dmh9iLdczxaF5spw8udtMskYmx9h4buAzdinK3B03bxLpoTpcfH2ROwbXOOvmswvhZ60SeDUZCfAge_x82l_0clHYQ5C7a90ZTX8HJ0nvX8-Kh9ZSDPNjZf9JznTkkQVfSFCW-MzWo8whzsIxCOY6JciCoxm6Df1lqpndLVnVg2JI6wnCU6LSfZJBZK-YRnLRi8TcGtEJV40Ct9gNKupgEKOcN8aElqefRf-2hV6514xz17l5aUQQYW4XrFGNRUYvavJb94I8OYgU3GjgbFP3_f-i8SlblwTbQoXNg_L-3H8G0d18_BE%3D)
[**MAKE AN EMERGENCY CONTRIBUTION ->** ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b546fd4b89c64408ae501f4202eb44ea&_e=9OsrKAndB0aZae-HptxyXEDL9KS-NKobWfZNMO5kE5_gj_Wv89VAgrwgVi8hAuM7d51j835nvck04wrlI_NRHvi960nZANDps5IDLUg05N2RJPFfId3Lph5Dmh9iLdczxaF5spw8udtMskYmx9h4buAzdinK3B03bxLpoTpcfH2ROwbXOOvmswvhZ60SeDUZCfAge_x82l_0clHYQ5C7a90ZTX8HJ0nvX8-Kh9ZSDPNjZf9JznTkkQVfSFCW-MzWo8whzsIxCOY6JciCoxm6DXH5YZnGbdd3MyX6b4JDx_Y-ltg0pRW1v1h_NAQjlk6W5GHqaP8VQSOT3wZq0CJyMn8pDiYU0O0FyU1dmgLelJZOr4wqzeEVhqSBFNJ89j4WJe0i7Vrvv9T6rj__KCuVPCxctu9KIAjS334jT40Ybho%3D)

Fellow Conservative, without your support, there is no way I will win this race. My opponent will spend and do whatever it takes to win another term - **even if that means destroying me, my family, and my business with his lies**.

I need to raise $10,000 by the end of the day today, or else I may never get ahead. If you’ve previously contributed to my campaign, I’m asking you to double your investment. **[If you’ve not yet contributed to my campaign, there is no better time than the present](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b546fd4b89c64408ae501f4202eb44ea&_e=9OsrKAndB0aZae-HptxyXEDL9KS-NKobWfZNMO5kE5_gj_Wv89VAgrwgVi8hAuM7d51j835nvck04wrlI_NRHvi960nZANDps5IDLUg05N2RJPFfId3Lph5Dmh9iLdczxaF5spw8udtMskYmx9h4buAzdinK3B03bxLpoTpcfH2ROwbXOOvmswvhZ60SeDUZCfAge_x82l_0clHYQ5C7a90ZTX8HJ0nvX8-Kh9ZSDPNjZf9JznTkkQVfSFCW-MzWo8whzsIxCOY6JciCoxm6Da1vaSgv0czbnsrzPlLu0h8PdVigaDPiF3r-JvXmrxtTXXPrsdkgMl7sJ1x6pb3gcYBp8uJiW2Jx34WenRNes4wQNLMImQ4aKv_2YR4xIXdufL85nI5BSPuohEXppN7_xL18EZUrTSdwCdUguukWhbU%3D)**.

This race is far too important for any single conservative to sit on the sidelines and watch. **[We need you on the field](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b546fd4b89c64408ae501f4202eb44ea&_e=9OsrKAndB0aZae-HptxyXEDL9KS-NKobWfZNMO5kE5_gj_Wv89VAgrwgVi8hAuM7d51j835nvck04wrlI_NRHvi960nZANDps5IDLUg05N2RJPFfId3Lph5Dmh9iLdczxaF5spw8udtMskYmx9h4buAzdinK3B03bxLpoTpcfH2ROwbXOOvmswvhZ60SeDUZCfAge_x82l_0clHYQ5C7a90ZTX8HJ0nvX8-Kh9ZSDPNjZf9JznTkkQVfSFCW-MzWo8whzsIxCOY6JciCoxm6DS3xE_JSJ4eahUy0GpaUgyFOPd7IZ0d8IuxAFB3BtO-WvB5wuyNF7waU2Qqemec9OwlSBxIjVA2ElAUIAlOiBKLfF4tF55jsO5utRXVh9sSe70gspMzNAOhjvr9f34NvwEg_9eWCYyf_FwzTrm8Khug%3D)**.

If you can’t donate today, that’s OK, but please don’t delete these messages or unsubscribe from my supporters list. In the coming months, you’ll hear more about this race with every passing day; it might not seem like a priority to you today, but when you realize that flipping the Senate depends on victory in Montana, perhaps you’ll **[consider sending us a contribution.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b546fd4b89c64408ae501f4202eb44ea&_e=9OsrKAndB0aZae-HptxyXEDL9KS-NKobWfZNMO5kE5_gj_Wv89VAgrwgVi8hAuM7d51j835nvck04wrlI_NRHvi960nZANDps5IDLUg05N2RJPFfId3Lph5Dmh9iLdczxaF5spw8udtMskYmx9h4buAzdinK3B03bxLpoTpcfH2ROwbXOOvmswvhZ60SeDUZCfAge_x82l_0clHYQ5C7a90ZTX8HJ0nvX8-Kh9ZSDPNjZf9JznTkkQVfSFCW-MzWo8whzsIxCOY6JciCoxm6DearcwjtCKKAvIw7VC2JfkF3awipUhvbC1kSSLlnkqLHm-dzUffO_7LYUnWtcXZQ78mJMTA8LzINK-Mx_imHNf9XwOXFbwDJylYK3NzuqF_qFNcpIx-Xr8r_jnO6UTp89ADyBvil7O3ThcNyY52E6w4%3D)**

For America's Future,

Tim Sheehy
Former Navy SEAL
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate

|
* * *

"
"I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL."

subject: GOP politicians still working to overrule the will of Ohio voters

body:
they don’t care that Ohioans made our position clear
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78575207/453798404/91474986?refcode=odp_em_240207_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjQwZTk1My1kYWM1LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjM4NDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z-w3zNMzYlxFEHusNF28XOJS4VpIzrG4kmYKSiIaupM=) Team, Remember when the entire GOP Ohio Senate field celebrated when _Roe v. Wade_ was overturned? And of course, we can’t forget how in last month’s debate, they all doubled down on their pledge to intervene federally and pass a national abortion ban — directly overruling the will of Ohioans who made their voices heard last November and voted to protect abortion access. **The worst part is, since Senate control could very well come down to Ohio if _any_ of them win in November, they could take back the Senate majority and get it done.** And then there’s Republican Attorney General Dave Yost who over the weekend argued in court filings that parts of Ohio’s extreme abortion ban should still be upheld, even after Ohio voters voted to strike down the law. These GOP politicians think they know better than Ohioans. They all have absolutely no problem overruling your will and banning abortion. **[Can you donate today to give us the support and resources we need to continue our work at the ballot box to tell these out-of-touch politicians that we won’t go back?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78575208/453798406/91474986?refcode=odp_em_240207_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjQwZTk1My1kYWM1LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjM4NDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z-w3zNMzYlxFEHusNF28XOJS4VpIzrG4kmYKSiIaupM=)** Thank you, Team Ohio Dems | ****Control of the House and Senate runs right through Ohio this year. name: Sen. Brad Pfaff
subject: The State Senate majority will come down to my race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pfaff for State Senate
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pfaff-email?refcode=20240207_em_fr_b1_BP_NGP [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pfaff-email?refcode=20240207_em_fr_b1_BP_NGP]
Hi Friend, it's Sen. Brad Pfaff. I'm a lifelong resident of La Crosse County and like so many others in the community, I grew up on my family farm.
We all know we need to work together to build a better future.
Friend, my race is going to be one of the most competitive across the state in 2024. I need to build a large grassroots coalition to protect my seat.
This race is going to be expensive, and extremist Republicans are going to throw millions of dollars to try to flip my seat. Can you donate any amount to my reelection campaign so that we can win a majority in Wisconsin? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pfaff-email?refcode=20240207_em_fr_b1_BP_NGP]
SUPPORT BRAD [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pfaff-email?refcode=20240207_em_fr_b1_BP_NGP]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pfaff-email?refcode=20240207_em_fr_b1_BP_NGP [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pfaff-email?refcode=20240207_em_fr_b1_BP_NGP]
If I've learned anything while growing up in western Wisconsin, it's this: Good neighbors help each other mend fences, they don’t tear each other down.
The same can be true in politics, Friend.
Unfortunately, GOP extremists are out of touch with our values.
When I stood up for farmers as Secretary of Agriculture, Trade and Consumer Protection, Republican politicians removed me from office. They thought I was " politicizing the office " when I supported a program to reduce suicides and support our kids.
Then I ran for State Senate, and I won.
In 2024, I'm the top target for MAGA Republicans. My district is tough, but it's worth fighting for. Democrats must campaign on our pro-choice, pro-democracy values everywhere, and I'm determined to hold my seat and help Senate Dems win the majority.
Friend, we need to work together to build a better future, and that starts by winning this district. I'm asking you personally: can you chip in $35 or any amount to keep this seat blue and help Senate Dems take back the majority in 2024? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pfaff-email?refcode=20240207_em_fr_b1_BP_NGP]
CHIP IN >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pfaff-email?refcode=20240207_em_fr_b1_BP_NGP]
In solidarity,
Sen. Brad Pfaff
Brad Pfaff is a proud son of the rolling hills, coulees, and valleys of northern La Crosse County where he was raised on his family's dairy farm. Hard work, resilience, appreciation for the land, and respect for one's neighbors and community are the values that guided Brad's life. Chip in today to defend his Senate District!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pfaff-email?refcode=20240207_em_fr_b1_BP_NGP [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pfaff-email?refcode=20240207_em_fr_b1_BP_NGP]

Pfaff for State Senate
P.O. Box 684
La Crosse, WI 54602

name: =?utf-8?Q?Gordon=20Ackley?=
subject: Two congressmen coming tomorrow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Party in the Virgin Islands
body:
St Thomas and St John plus election night party | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/e29836c8d570/re-hey-9345849?e=d30db4cde8)
---
| |
---
| | Fellow Republican,

I'm pleased to confirm that Congressman Jack Bergman and Congresswoman Anna Paulina Luna will campaign in the Virgin Islands during the caucus tomorrow, Thursday.

Bergman is a retired lieutenant general in the United States Marine Corps. In Congress, Paulina Luna serves on the House Committee on Natural Resources, which has jurisidiction over the Virgin Islands and the other four territories.

They will make appearances at the Lovango Rum Bar on St. John between 12 and 4 p.m. and Bluebeard’s Castle on St. Thomas between 4 p.m. and 6 p.m. before attending the big Election Night Party at Morningstar Buoy House, Frenchman's Reef from 6:30 p.m. until close.

**As I have said since the beginning, we welcome all the candidates and their campaign surrogates. Your vote in the caucus tomorrow will decide the trajectory of the 2024 Republican campaign.**

Polls on St. Thomas at Bluebeard’s Castle and on St. Croix at the La Reine Chicken Shack are open from 7 a.m. to 6 p.m. On St. John, voting at the Lovango Rum Bar in Cruz Bay is between 10 a.m. and 4 p.m.

Make a plan to vote tomorrow,

Republican Chairman Gordon Ackley
---
| | **2024 VIRGIN ISLANDS CAUCUS**
Thursday, February 8 (all voting in-person)
Pre-register to vote by [clicking here](https://protonmail.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9e6c445a9ccf2aeca06760698&id=4c9bb79cb3&e=d30db4cde8)
St. Croix: 7 a.m. to 6 p.m. Atlantic at La Reine Chicken Shack, Christiansted
St. John: 10 a.m. to 4 p.m. Atlantic at Lovango Rum Bar, Cruz Bay
St. Thomas: 7 a.m. to 6 p.m. Atlantic at Bluebeard's Castle, Charlotte Amalie
---
| **_Paid for by the Republican Party in the Virgin Islands.
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
www.republicanpartyinthevirginislands.com_**

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://protonmail.us14.list-manage.com/profile?u=9e6c445a9ccf2aeca06760698&id=4a1e7eb3fa&e=d30db4cde8&c=706cceae8d) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://protonmail.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=9e6c445a9ccf2aeca06760698&id=4a1e7eb3fa&t=b&e=d30db4cde8&c=706cceae8d).

clean_body: | | | Peter, Sen. Ossoff needs our support! It was recently leaked that Marjorie Taylor Greene might run for Sen. Ossoff’s seat and take her MAGA agenda to the next level. And she could WIN! We hate to say it, but MTG is extremely well-known in Georgia, and her MAGA ties could push her across the finish line against Senator Ossoff in 2026. If that happens, we could be facing SENATOR Marjorie Taylor Greene. So we’re asking for every member of this grassroots team’s help. = Today’s donor drive will be critical as we work to shore up Democratic support all across Georgia this year and into 2026! | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = = – GA Dems | | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.georgiademocrat.org | Democratic Party of Georgia P.O. BOX 89202 Atlanta, GA 30312 United States

name: Mandela Barnes and The Long Run
subject: One year ago today, we launched this powerful movement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
Friends,
**One year ago today, Mandela reached out to you to announce his next step: The launch of his PAC and our movement, The Long Run.**
Today, as we celebrate all that we have accomplished over the past year, we wanted to re-share Mandela’s initial message with you and reaffirm our commitment to electing changemaking candidates up and down the ballot this November and beyond.
Since our launch, we have received a wealth of support from this grassroots coalition, and the response has been humbling. Over ten thousand of you have chipped in since then to build a true grassroots movement ready to take back the House majority and protect the Senate.
But as we approach November, we are going to need your continued support to sustain the momentum of this movement. The only way we can continue supporting Democrats is with you by our side.
[**So if you can, please contribute $3 or whatever you can afford to our movement today.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-feb24.ocq2fh&refcode=em240207-1-tt&t=1&akid=5192%2E196590%2E1mVwN5)
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-feb24.ocq2fh&refcode=em240207-1-tt&t=2&akid=5192%2E196590%2E1mVwN5)
Thank you for being a part of this team. Please see Mandela’s launch message below.
The Team at the Long Run
* * *

Team,
Running has taught me winning a race isn’t about what you do on race day — it’s about how you’ve trained and prepared. You have to devote time and resources in early phases to prepare for that run. And it takes a community supporting you every step — and every mile — of the way.
Running for office is the same. It’s hard. It’s grueling. It takes a lot of time, patience, and most importantly, people believing in you from the outset.
Today, I am launching The Long Run PAC to support diverse candidates who are ready to fight for our democracy.
Supporting candidates nationwide will require all of us working together, and it will take a significant amount of resources. So today, I am relying on your support to ensure we can start as strong as possible.
[**If you are ready to join me in creating change, please become a donor to The Long Run PAC today. Contributing now will help us support and inspire the future generation of candidates.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-feb24.ocq2fh&refcode=em240207-1-tt&t=4&akid=5192%2E196590%2E1mVwN5)
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-feb24.ocq2fh&refcode=em240207-1-tt&t=5&akid=5192%2E196590%2E1mVwN5)
All over America, changemaking candidates are stepping up in ways we’ve never seen before. They are shattering ceilings, breaking new ground, and redefining what a winning candidate looks like and where they come from.
And, like I was, every single one of them is being asked countless times: “Can you win?”
The answer is yes. But it takes support, resources, and people believing in them.
The Long Run PAC is my way of helping to support those candidates. Young Candidates. Candidates of Color. LGBTQ+ Candidates. Working Class Candidates. Candidates who are breaking the mold and positioned to win crucial races all over America.
Candidates who will help us retake the House, flip state chambers, and make real and lasting change up and down the ballot.
Candidates who will work to rebuild the middle class, protect their communities against special interests, and work to ensure everyone, regardless of their ZIP code, has a fair shot at the American Dream.
So I am asking you to join me today in our initiative to support candidates that are going to bring the change this country needs.
[**Will you become a donor to The Long Run PAC? If you are ready to join me, please make a contribution today at this link.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-feb24.ocq2fh&refcode=em240207-1-tt&t=6&akid=5192%2E196590%2E1mVwN5)
Together, we’re going to make sure these candidates have support throughout their long run, ensuring their final sprint is a sprint to win. Because winning a race depends on what you've put into it from the start.
Onwards,
Mandela Barnes
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-feb24.ocq2fh&refcode=em240207-1-tt&t=7&akid=5192%2E196590%2E1mVwN5)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=8&akid=5192%2E196590%2E1mVwN5). You can also [**sign up to receive fewer emails.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=9&akid=5192%2E196590%2E1mVwN5)
The Long Run PAC is funded by grassroots donors giving what they can, when they can. [**Make a contribution to The Long Run PAC today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/longrunpac-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=10&refcode2=5192_196590_1mVwN5&akid=5192%2E196590%2E1mVwN5)
Submit this form to [**update your contact information.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/update-contact-info/?source=em-footer&t=11&akid=5192%2E196590%2E1mVwN5)
Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P.O. Box 597 Milwaukee, WI 53201, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

But as we approach November, we are going to need your continued support to sustain the momentum of this movement. The only way we can continue supporting Democrats is with you by our side. Thank you for being a part of this team. Please see Mandela’s launch message below. The Team at the Long Run * Team, Running has taught me winning a race isn’t about what you do on race day — it’s about how you’ve trained and prepared. You have to devote time and resources in early phases to prepare for that run. And it takes a community supporting you every step — and every mile — of the way. Running for office is the same. It’s hard. It’s grueling. It takes a lot of time, patience, and most importantly, people believing in you from the outset. Today, I am launching The Long Run PAC to support diverse candidates who are ready to fight for our democracy. Supporting candidates nationwide will require all of us working together, and it will take a significant amount of resources. So today, I am relying on your support to ensure we can start as strong as possible. All over America, changemaking candidates are stepping up in ways we’ve never seen before. They are shattering ceilings, breaking new ground, and redefining what a winning candidate looks like and where they come from. And, like I was, every single one of them is being asked countless times: “Can you win?” The answer is yes. But it takes support, resources, and people believing in them. The Long Run PAC is my way of helping to support those candidates. Young Candidates. Candidates of Color. LGBTQ+ Candidates. Working Class Candidates. Candidates who are breaking the mold and positioned to win crucial races all over America. Candidates who will help us retake the House, flip state chambers, and make real and lasting change up and down the ballot. Candidates who will work to rebuild the middle class, protect their communities against special interests, and work to ensure everyone, regardless of their ZIP code, has a fair shot at the American Dream. So I am asking you to join me today in our initiative to support candidates that are going to bring the change this country needs. Together, we’re going to make sure these candidates have support throughout their long run, ensuring their final sprint is a sprint to win. Because winning a race depends on what you've put into it from the start. Onwards, Mandela Barnes

subject: Enough of the political theater!

body:
We need to focus on the real issues. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78577264/453804613/-1295403277?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNGZkNmQ2Yi1kY2M1LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjM4NDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pBy0TIC1GhMOucztW3JRvHqtv2XlhHB-kgz5PkyF070=&emci=780bd8c4-31c5-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=34fd6d6b-dcc5-ee11-b660-002248223848&ceid=15529135) | Dear friend, Yesterday, Congress held a vote on the impeachment of Homeland Security Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas. This was a politically motivated distraction to get people to forget that Republicans are refusing to pass legislation, offer resources or any real solutions to address the crisis at our border. Not only are the claims against Sec. Mayorkas unfounded, they failed to identify an impeachable crime. **Even other House Republicans agree that Sec. Mayorkas does not deserve to be impeached. ** The Biden Administration has asked for funding for our southern border and policy changes that would give authority to close the border when needed. Additionally, Sec. Mayorkas worked for months with a bipartisan group of Senators to reach a deal to secure our border — which is now being rejected because Donald Trump doesn’t want the problem solved. Once again, Congressional Republicans are not serious about securing our border and have opted for yet another partisan charade, driven by political agendas rather than a genuine concern for solving our nation’s problems. **We cannot continue on this way. ** Instead of wasting time and resources on baseless impeachment efforts, we should be focusing on meaningful legislation that addresses border security and the ongoing immigration crisis. [**Friend****, I need your support to fight back against this dysfunction and ensure that our priorities remain focused on the issues that matter most to the American people. clean_body: We need to focus on the real issues. | | Dear friend, Yesterday, Congress held a vote on the impeachment of Homeland Security Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas. This was a politically motivated distraction to get people to forget that Republicans are refusing to pass legislation, offer resources or any real solutions to address the crisis at our border. Not only are the claims against Sec. Mayorkas unfounded, they failed to identify an impeachable crime. Even other House Republicans agree that Sec. Mayorkas does not deserve to be impeached. The Biden Administration has asked for funding for our southern border and policy changes that would give authority to close the border when needed. Additionally, Sec. Mayorkas worked for months with a bipartisan group of Senators to reach a deal to secure our border — which is now being rejected because Donald Trump doesn’t want the problem solved. Once again, Congressional Republicans are not serious about securing our border and have opted for yet another partisan charade, driven by political agendas rather than a genuine concern for solving our nation’s problems. We cannot continue on this way. Dear Friend,
---
The first Kingdom to the Capitol stop of 2024 is IN THE BOOKS, and the Hawaiian Islands couldn't contain the presence of God!!! The Holy Spirit MOVED!!!

We worshiped with Believers picking up the pieces of their lives in the wake of the devastating Lahaina fires, then praised, worshiped, and sought the Lord at the State Capitol. If this was a taste of what God has in store for the rest of the year, then we can expect MORE BIG THINGS!!!
---

Check out the highlight video and stay tuned for updates on our next Kingdom to the Capitol stops!
---
Till All Hear,
---
---
Sean

The Holy Spirit MOVED!!! We worshiped with Believers picking up the pieces of their lives in the wake of the devastating Lahaina fires, then praised, worshiped, and sought the Lord at the State Capitol. If this was a taste of what God has in store for the rest of the year, then we can expect MORE BIG THINGS!!! Check out the highlight video and stay tuned for updates on our next Kingdom to the Capitol stops! Till All Hear, Sean | | | | INTERNATIONAL DONORS — DONATE Donate by Check or Money Order Sean Feucht Ministries310 Third Street NEWashington, DC 20002 Contributions are tax-deductible. | | Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Let Us Worship

---
Folks: Today, the Florida Supreme Court heard oral arguments on the ballot language and title of Amendment 4 – the initiative to protect reproductive freedom in our state. Opponents of abortion access hinged their arguments purely on semantics. They aimed to create confusion around the ballot language and twisted the interpretation beyond recognition. _It's deceitful and wrong._ I've been a strong proponent of reproductive freedom, and believe that our state Supreme Court should see through the charade of these anti-abortion extremists and accept the ballot language as it was filed. And we can't forget that **over 1.4 million Floridians signed a petition to put this Amendment on the ballot** – their voices cannot be ignored. Reproductive health decisions should be made between Floridians and their doctors – not our state government. I stand firmly with the organization that's fighting to secure abortion access, Floridians Protecting Freedom. They'll need our support to organize folks across our state behind Amendment 4. [**That's why I'm asking you to make a split contribution between Floridians Protecting Freedom and our campaign. Any amount would be greatly appreciated.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78580082/453808930/320015360?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2024.02.07_B1_FLSC_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGE1MTYzMy1kZmM1LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjM4NDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NHPPXOiisRu7w-ZIXr5uxRUEd0yUuOHVX3TVejBCDOE=) If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation for Jared Moskowitz and Floridians Protecting Freedom will go through immediately: | | [CHIP IN $25 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78580083/453808931/320015360?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2024.02.07_B1_FLSC_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGE1MTYzMy1kZmM1LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjM4NDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NHPPXOiisRu7w-ZIXr5uxRUEd0yUuOHVX3TVejBCDOE=)

subject: America stands with Israel
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY REDDY FOR KANSAS
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/6dcc10b8ddad76db322761119fed00b9/43823/2816e1f3893499203947229f28c3afba/091099dafedf9a32c3d6b838967d376c/43823)

| | America must always unequivocally stand with Israel, our friend and ally 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 **[That’s the message of my new op-ed, which I hope you’ll take some time to read by clicking here or below. ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/6dcc10b8ddad76db322761119fed00b9/43823/2816e1f3893499203947229f28c3afba/b86264b61bfe2a2ec3d6b838967d376c/43823)****

---
|
---
When it comes to supporting our ally and condemning anti-Semitic hate, Sharice Davids has failed. She has put her party’s most extreme leaders and elements before what’s right. This is no time for moral bankruptcy. It is time for a change. To save the American Dream, we must stop rewarding extremism and political cowardice. That’s why I’m running for Congress.
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/6dcc10b8ddad76db322761119fed00b9/43823/2816e1f3893499203947229f28c3afba/ca360bdec37930e3c3d6b838967d376c/43823)

Dr. Prasanth Reddy

---
** __Meet Dr. Prasanth Reddy:__**__ ** Dr. Reddy is a cancer physician and immigrant who's lived the American Dream. In the aftermath of 9/11, he answered his country's call. He became a citizen, joined the U.S. Air Force Reserve, and still serves as Lt. Colonel today. Dr. Reddy is running for Congress against a Democrat who votes with Joe Biden 100% of the time, in one of the most competitive House districts in the country. Dr. Reddy is a different kind of candidate. He's an outsider, a problem solver, and someone who's spent his career taking action. Let's flip Kansas' 3rd District and send an independent voice to Congress. **[Chip in here or below.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/6dcc10b8ddad76db322761119fed00b9/43823/2816e1f3893499203947229f28c3afba/3810eee15f56ef57c3d6b838967d376c/43823)****

subject: On the campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Allyson for Congress
body:
I’ve now been campaigning for over eight months, friends.

It’s been one of the greatest honors of my life. From one-on-one conversations with fellow Californians to hosting local events to marching in parades, I’ve loved hearing from voters in CA-40. Here are some of my favorite pictures so far:

Here’s my campaign manager, Sarah and me:

And here’s me hanging out with some local supporters at a meet-and-greet in Rancho Santa Margarita:

Team, one thing that I hear over and over again is this: Young Kim needs to go. Folks are just tired of her cowardly leadership.

I’m running for congress to restore BOLD leadership that authentically represents CA-40. How? Simple. By prioritizing constituents, not corporate special interests. Can you contribute $50 to our campaign for Congress and help me DEFEAT Young Kim?

CONTRIBUTE $50 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_email_2024q1?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2024.02.07_B2_PhotoReel_Resend_FriendsAndFamilyList&amount=50]

This is one of my favorites. My mother and daughter both joined me for a lively conversation about the importance of fighting for reproductive freedom:

What I love most about campaigning is the opportunity to reflect on your concerns and work to find solutions. I’m a solutions based candidate, so I’m starting the work early to deliver results.

I take a grassroots approach to campaign and a grassroots approach to fundraising. That means our effort is funded by folks like you giving what you can to emails like this one. So will you please contribute $50 or any amount to help us DEFEAT Young Kim?

CONTRIBUTE $50 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_email_2024q1?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2024.02.07_B2_PhotoReel_Resend_FriendsAndFamilyList&amount=50]
CONTRIBUTE $75 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_email_2024q1?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2024.02.07_B2_PhotoReel_Resend_FriendsAndFamilyList&amount=75]
CONTRIBUTE $100 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_email_2024q1?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2024.02.07_B2_PhotoReel_Resend_FriendsAndFamilyList&amount=100]
CONTRIBUTE $200 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_email_2024q1?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2024.02.07_B2_PhotoReel_Resend_FriendsAndFamilyList&amount=200]
CONTRIBUTE ANOTHER AMOUNT >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_email_2024q1?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2024.02.07_B2_PhotoReel_Resend_FriendsAndFamilyList]

Thank you, I appreciate your help!

– Allyson

That means our effort is funded by folks like you giving what you can to emails like this one. So will you please contribute $50 or any amount to help us DEFEAT Young Kim? CONTRIBUTE $50 >> [] CONTRIBUTE $75 >> [] CONTRIBUTE $100 >> [] CONTRIBUTE $200 >> [] CONTRIBUTE ANOTHER AMOUNT >> [] Thank you, I appreciate your help! – Allyson Paid for by Allyson for Congress Allyson for Congress PO Box 1813 Tustin, CA 92781-9998 United States CONTRIBUTE $25 >> [] If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

body:
Good Afternoon, I want to thank you for your support of my run for Congress and for your interest in helping out the campaign. We are scaling up our volunteer efforts this week as people have begun casting their ballots. I am encouraged by our progress to have so many residents join our canvassing, phone banking, and postcard writing to help us reach every voter.

We created this _[form on the website](https://joaquinbeltran.com/volunteer)_ so you can share which ways you'd like to volunteer and your availability.

Thank you again for your support. - Joaquín Beltrán

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: Starting Something NEW Tonight!
body:
Happening Tonight! Over the last several years at Sheridan.Church, I have adjusted my preaching/teaching style to a more in-depth, verse-by-verse app
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6382049.2285.1.d29b930b1edc4070653272b52c943abb) |
---
## Happening Tonight!
---
Over the last several years at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6382049.2286.1.d23cce9859a35f04019dea6cd1f56d79), I have adjusted my preaching/teaching style to a more in-depth, verse-by-verse approach. We have gone through the Books of **Genesis** , **Revelation** , **Daniel** and are currently making our way through **Acts** on Sunday mornings. Tonight, we will launch a whole new study for our mid-week services over the Gosepl of **Matthew**. I want to invite you to join me as we go through **Matthew** literally verse-by-verse. Service Time: 7pm CT
Service Location: 7901 E 41st St Tulsa, OK Online: [https://m.youtube.com/@sheridanchurch](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6382049.2287.1.2005049a02777d93ae3c3e03b13f2537)
---
---
## Updates At Sheridan.Church
---
**BIG THINGS** are happening at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6382049.2288.1.b1e6d30e919381ad1c298e1f45288cc5) Tulsa + OKC in 2024 and I would love to share with you what is ahead. Every year, we host a **Vision Night Banquet** that I want to encourage you to be apart of and catch the vision. You can RSVP with the links for Tulsa + OKC below. **-Friday, February 9 @6:30pm** : Vision Night Banquet Tulsa - RSVP: [https://clr.cm/jWeS](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6382049.2289.1.6209b2986b4ba8375f99f37f7850a60f) **-Sunday, February 11 @4:30pm** : Vision Night Banquet OKC - RSVP: [https://clr.cm/IxJC](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6382049.2290.1.0a3c13a347fc77de95e46b86a619414c) **Upcoming Services/Events:** **-Wednesday, February 7 @7pm | Tulsa:** The Book Of Matthew Pt. 1 w/Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer **-Sunday, February 11 @5pm | Tulsa:** Super Bowl Party **-Wednesday, February 11 @7pm | Tulsa:** LIVE Q&A w/Dr. Randy Caldwell **-Wednesday, March 6 @7pm | Tulsa:** Rabbi Jonathan Cahn **Darryl Strawberry** , **Perry Stone** , **Bishop Darrell Hines** & **Dr. Randy Caldwell** are coming back to [Sheridan](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6382049.2291.1.5074a0f07d81d9a6cea85c6636157529) in September for **IGNITE 2024**! View schedule here: [https://www.sheridan.church/events](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6382049.2292.1.b719739937c4468ac0be416e8f39b848) Thank you,
Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---
| | [ Partner w/Sheridan.Church ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6382049.2293.1.7aa55715459dd5e09c00cb6671c5513b)
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6382049.2294.1.a75649bc101b27fbb8e88b43716b6afb)
---
---
## A Journey...
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6382049.2295.1.5b73705163181458e1b493b6ad7232bd)
---
It has now been 6 months since [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6382049.2296.1.3db6493c5d7247586165b9828e258cd5) purchased the **Caravan Nightclub** in Tulsa, OK. **Phase 1** of turning a _club_ into a _church_ is **COMPLETE**! The auditorium is fully operational. We are now in **Phase 2** of turning a _tavern_ into a _tabernacle_.
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6382049.2297.1.2e23595acf4d3f27c7d3124e9c35f3a9) Children/Youth Wing
---
**Phase 2** includes:
-Full Remodel of the **Children/Youth Wing**
-Full Remodel of the **Women's Bathroom**
-Addition of a **Family Bathroom**
-**Lobby/Entry** Remodel
-**Parking Lot** Striping
Thank you for your generosity that has allowed for the progress up to this point but please consider giving towards the completion of Phase 2.
I need **YOUR** help to finish this project!
You can help by visiting: [https://www.sheridan.church/give ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6382049.2298.1.dc5b118713282218de319ae6ae0f48e2)
---
## What To Do To Be Ready For 2024
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6382049.2299.1.da148928366318afca3caa56679c9cc1)
---
I am _not a prophet neither the son of the prophet_ but I am willing to bet the farm that 2024 will be **WILD**! The **Deep State Globalists** will pull out all the stops in this upcoming election year just like in 2020. The question then becomes: **what should we do to be ready for 2024?** I preached about this subject on Sunday at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6382049.2300.1.97edfed5937c45fd6c772017627096df) and I encourage you to check it out because it will help prepare you for what is coming. Watch the [sermon](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6382049.2301.1.ea79ccab8890925a6d05a1a85622e89c) here: [https://youtube.com/live/YG782xgZ_y8?feature=share](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6382049.2302.1.51c02d38f370e0daf73df93a790279d5) If you are looking for a church in 2024 know that you are invited to join me at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6382049.2303.1.07ee4fd82f5e88941842b9c6b9fc7d3f) Tulsa & OKC **Sundays @10am | 7901 E 41st St Tulsa, OK** **Sundays @6pm | 3100 N Meridian OKC, OK** Let's start 2024 _STRONG_! You can also partner with [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6382049.2304.1.b4c49e3232935e885a3a0dd57e62a177) by making a donation at [www.sheridan.church/give](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6382049.2305.1.bd8b2e803cd2a8414a85e10b63f61e44)
---
| | [ Read Through The Bible In 2024 ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6382049.2306.1.1db4a864d717f06145c886a62c1556d0)
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6382049.2307.1.9df6eae5f70c93e67c3dea1b0ad81989)
---
Join the [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6382049.2308.1.b02ba7963652196931fdc488a3569ffb) family in reading through the **ENTIRE** Bible in 2024.
Click the QR code or visit: [Sheridan's Bible Reading Plan](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6382049.2309.1.7e5e282a71233ab397dd0a5f5e603344)
---

**_27 MILLION DOLLARS_**

_**Democrats just reserved more than 27 million dollars worth of attack ads against me this fall**_.

It’s clearer than ever that _**my candidacy scares the Democrat powerbrokers in D.C**_. If I’m going to have a real shot at winning this race, I’m going to need every conservative donor in the country to get involved.
[**MAKE AN EMERGENCY CONTRIBUTION ->** ](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=404c15f12a4843ae81a64d1d8a562707&_e=GOShc-9Z8D1hbxwRVXeDvJUhJdrV373sgDSXxBuiy7y8ymRbCdaZH0xEzi20AOSxOH8rmSJiwdhxpOrrpsyiDpOI_1LSQYpFcoMghN7Y0heKlUHDOPSLnIvX3Ap5Kz9VQ8vEUXdEpHPz7dVSxU0uzKkS-NZmFpdrnCDRobLRrGytBEDp8-cX13gFUpWoLR3d2RAB8lqABw5-D9Whny_X7XhAfL3DwhkIICXgslorLlUuJMsxK2Mqq8p2lerlH3JbceC5D57I8wUC_-OGsDZCXXxB_zCBXkDCrA2jVTHHoRnMggpTTI9lSCXhdjr0jdeHvAQjX3nPtiHs51qHa9q5MJNC9uhV72O6u8F7WdzZ-5r4PqkmaAjW6FXMRj8lml2_3D1Y1jQF1fdDClxZ2C72uHKqssRg-lA_v1DoXolhGpM%3D)

Peter,

I’ve been saying since I got into this race that it would likely be one - if not the - most expensive Senate matchup in 2024. This week, Washington Democrats announced they will spend - AT LEAST - **$27 million attacking me on TV in Montana this fall**.

It turns out my instinct was right. My Democrat opponent hasn’t been in danger of losing his seat since he was elected in 2006. Now, with me in the race, Democrats are afraid there is a real risk of losing this critical Senate seat. **They said they’d spend heavily to defeat me, and now we know that when it comes to the Montana Senate race, Democrats mean what they say**.

[**MAKE AN EMERGENCY CONTRIBUTION ->** ](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=404c15f12a4843ae81a64d1d8a562707&_e=GOShc-9Z8D1hbxwRVXeDvJUhJdrV373sgDSXxBuiy7y8ymRbCdaZH0xEzi20AOSxOH8rmSJiwdhxpOrrpsyiDpOI_1LSQYpFcoMghN7Y0heKlUHDOPSLnIvX3Ap5Kz9VQ8vEUXdEpHPz7dVSxU0uzKkS-NZmFpdrnCDRobLRrGytBEDp8-cX13gFUpWoLR3d2RAB8lqABw5-D9Whny_X7XhAfL3DwhkIICXgslorLlUuJMsxK2Mqq8p2lerlH3JbceC5D57I8wUC_-OGsDZCXdQzHJArHckVCa_YgOBE9uGu7GrBNr9RIBJ8EIaa7ZilsMpfBPbH8IWkEm8VubuOXX70j4h5TM3_lee_mpZaC6gagD240R-rcqbmwbeQG8ohbNtoNb-5PUrXiOyqpAnc2_G-97dzGiAPNfPueBLKyhY%3D)

Here is where things stand:
1. Democrats have already spent more than **11 million dollars** to blunt my momentum and have earmarked an additional 27 million for the fall. But trust me, this is just the beginning.

2. Last quarter, my opponent raised 5.5 million dollars - a record - and his quarterly fundraising totals will only increase with each quarter that passes.

name: Stand with Bernie via Our Revolution
subject: Add your name: Bernie's call to end U.S. complicity in Netanyahu's war on the Palestinian people
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis, political
infighting over Israel and ‘border security’ is happening in both parties.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14537?source=email-20240207&t=1011&akid=5306%2E5885482%2E-5382V ][IMG]

After the Senate negotiated for months on a bipartisan bill for 'stricter
border enforcement' and funding for Israeli weapons, the GOP might vote it
down. But not because they oppose funding Israel’s horrific bombing
campaigns in Gaza.

In the House, some Democrats supported Mike Johnson’s bill to fund Israeli
weapons because, more than disagreeing with the GOP, they want to support
Netanyahu’s war.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14537?source=email-20240207&t=1012&akid=5306%2E5885482%2E-5382V ][IMG]

These are all political games, because when it comes down to it, as NPR
reports, both parties still want to pass a bill to fund Israel’s war.

There have been a select few clear, courageous voices including Bernie,
Barbara Lee, and Rashida Tlaib calling on the U.S. government to end U.S.
support for the killing of so many people in Gaza. Our Revolution is in
this fight with them because the question of whether or not to fund
Netanyahu’s war shouldn’t be a foregone conclusion or a cynical political
game, it should be a moral choice — a choice to say no more funding and no
more weapons for Israel’s war in Gaza.

Now is the time to stand with Bernie and keep the pressure on to end U.S.
support for the war in Gaza.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14537?source=email-20240207&t=1013&akid=5306%2E5885482%2E-5382V ]Add your name: We must tell Congress it’s not time to find another way
to fund Israel’s war, it’s time to end U.S. complicity in the murder of
27,000 Palestinians and humanitarian disaster in Gaza.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14537?source=email-20240207&t=1014&akid=5306%2E5885482%2E-5382V ][IMG]

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14537?source=email-20240207&t=1015&akid=5306%2E5885482%2E-5382V ]ADD YOUR NAME

The United States sends billions of dollars to Israel every year.
President Biden unilaterally sent $250 million worth of weapons to Israel
during this war. The U.S. role in this war is undeniable, and
unacceptable.

Support for the moral choice has been building in Congress and across the
country thanks to the advocacy of Bernie, Barbara Lee, Tlaib, and our
progressive movement for peace. That’s why now, as both parties are
fighting over the next step on national and international funding bills,
we need to keep the pressure on.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14537?source=email-20240207&t=1016&akid=5306%2E5885482%2E-5382V ]Add your name: Join Bernie, Barbara and Rashida in urging Congress to
make the moral choice. No more funding and no more weapons for Netanyahu’s
brutal war in Gaza!

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=5306%2E5885482%2E-5382V ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=5306%2E5885482%2E-5382V ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=5306%2E5885482%2E-5382V ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=5306%2E5885482%2E-5382V ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=5306%2E5885482%2E-5382V ]Website |

name: Nina - Digital Desk

name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: I’m personally asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC**
body:
|
#
---
Team, We’ve made Michigan one of the best places to live and raise a family — expanding abortion rights, tackling the climate crisis head-on, providing free breakfast and lunch to all K-12 Michigan public school students, and more. **But there’s still work to do.** Too many people aren’t able to exercise their fundamental freedoms because of where they live. These same freedoms could be under attack _everywhere,_ including Michigan, if Republican extremists win in 2024. Just last week, anti-abortion activists filed a lawsuit against me to overturn our state’s abortion protections. And you can be sure that this is only one small step in their larger efforts to attack abortion rights in Michigan and nationwide. clean_body: | Team, We’ve made Michigan one of the best places to live and raise a family — expanding abortion rights, tackling the climate crisis head-on, providing free breakfast and lunch to all K-12 Michigan public school students, and more. But there’s still work to do. Too many people aren’t able to exercise their fundamental freedoms because of where they live. These same freedoms could be under attack everywhere, including Michigan, if Republican extremists win in 2024. Just last week, anti-abortion activists filed a lawsuit against me to overturn our state’s abortion protections. And you can be sure that this is only one small step in their larger efforts to attack abortion rights in Michigan and nationwide. That’s why it’s time to take our fight nationwide by supporting President Biden, Vice President Harris, and Democrats up and down the ballot who will defend our fundamental rights and fight like hell to deliver real, meaningful change for hardworking Americans. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = People like you make me more hopeful than ever before about the future of our country. clean_body: Can you chip in, friend? Friend, The far-Left is coming at me with everything they've got -- Chuck Schumer and his allies plan to spend an unprecedented amount of money to defeat me this November, and a new poll shows this race is within the margin of error: This is a flashing red warning sign, friend. If we don't start to match the Democrats' fundraising, we can kiss the Senate Majority GOODBYE for a generation. ****************************************************************************************************** **************************************************************************************************** **************************************************************************************************** **************************************************************************************************** **************************************************************************************************** Thank you, Ted Cruz U.S. Senator from Texas ****************************************************************************************************** | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Keep Congress Republican PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: David Hogg
subject: We’re rising up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Friend, here’s the unfortunate truth:
Special interest groups, far-right extremists, and those hoarding power have done everything they can to preserve the status quo—and this is what it’s gotten us:
Children slaughtered in school.
A burning planet.
Forced birth.
A border crisis worsened by Trump's Derailing of immigration reform
And every day, Republican governors in Red states, along with their right-wing legislatures, take greater steps to go after women, people of color, and our LGBT family.
But I’m here to tell you that young people won’t accept the status quo.
Our generation is rising up to run for office — from state legislatures to Congress — to create a government that actually works for us and protects us.
But to win, young people need our support. Leaders We Deserve is committed to electing young leaders who will fight for the change we know is possible, and we’re only able to do that with your help.
Can you split $25 to Leaders We Deserve and Serve America today so we can flip the script, fight against the status quo, and usher in the next generation of young leaders? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-lwd]
Thank you!
David Hogg
Co-founder, Leaders We Deserve
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-lwd [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-lwd]
https://www.facebook.com/sethmoulton [https://www.facebook.com/sethmoulton] https://twitter.com/sethmoulton [https://twitter.com/sethmoulton] https://www.instagram.com/sethmoulton/?hl=en [https://www.instagram.com/sethmoulton/?hl=en] https://www.linkedin.com/company/seth-moulton-for-america/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/seth-moulton-for-america/]

My jaw **dropped**.

_**I couldn’t believe my eyes when I saw the receipt at the grocery store this weekend.**_

As a father of six children, **I can see the damage this inflation is doing to American families.**

And thanks to Joe Biden, the number at the bottom of everyone’s receipts are **SKY-HIGH.**

This is Senator Markwayne Mullin.

Thanks to Joe Biden and his gaggle of Radical Left SOCIALIST allies in D.C. Americans all over the country are hurting, and if we want **ANY** chance of turning this ship around and putting our country back on the right track, it’s this November.

I know times are tough, **but I wouldn’t ask this from you if it weren’t urgent, patriot.**

Right now, the Democrats in D.C are ramping up their fundraising numbers to CRUSH Republicans on Election Day.

They’ve already raised over **$100,000,000** \- and I’ll be frank: Republicans are **FAR** behind them.

**[That’s why I’m humbly asking for your help, patriot. name: Kerry McQuisten
subject: Oregon's RNC Meeting Success!
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
Photo: Solomon Yue, standing second from right, as the Temporary Committee on Presidential Debates was recognized during general session.

**THE RNC MEETING
**
Solomon and I are back from the RNC's winter meeting in Las Vegas. While Solomon is Oregon's National Committeeman, I attend these as a sponsored guest, which means there are a couple things I can't do such as sit in on the members-only breakfast or cast a vote. The guest group is fascinating to be part of; it is often composed of past and present candidates for all sorts of offices, heads of major national organizations and think tanks, diplomatic staff from consulates and embassies at times, elected officials, donors, campaign staff for federal races... Each of the 168 members can sponsor two guests. There can be far more meetings going on during these weeks than what's scheduled during the actual RNC agenda.

For Oregon, this meeting was a huge success. Solomon, who is known as one of the RNC's foremost policy leaders, authored the following:

* [Resolution Condemning Biden's Open Border Policy Deliberately Inviting a Massive & Systematic Illegal Invasion of the US](https://sptr.eocampaign1.com/f/a/FuqJXexaEbo4h_Ihv8IZIw~~/AAAHUQA~-k6JxUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAABfYw~~)

He whipped support from co-sponsors in quite a number of states, put the resolution through the committee process, and saw the resolution passed on the floor.

After the meeting, he submitted three of his RNC resolutions to be incorporated into the 2024 RNC National Platform. I know we often feel unheard here in deep blue Oregon.** Solomon is making sure the voice of Oregon's grassroots helps shape the direction of the RNC. **The process took two years to achieve. President Trump has already talked about these policy positions during his media interviews and at his rallies. The party also hopes our congressional and senatorial nominees run on these issues. These new planks will be based on the new resolution, and also these two:

* [Resolution to Protect Children from Unsafe Sex Trait Modification and Experimentation](https://sptr.eocampaign1.com/f/a/uIlQe6P6Thj7ZMoQPfFkuA~~/AAAHUQA~)
* [Resolution to Hold Communist China Accountable](https://sptr.eocampaign1.com/f/a/XT3nBZ2HpE09VoX9VLETqg~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRnpk1NP0UgMDFlMWU5YTNkMGZlZDczYzViZWYzYjQ1YWQzZTVlZDVEVmh0dHBzOi8vcHJvZC1zdGF0aWMuZ29wLmNvbS9tZWRpYS8xLVJFU09MVVRJT04tVE8tSE9MRC1DT01NVU5JU1QtQ0hJTkEtQUNDT1VOVEFCTEUucGRmVwVzcGNldUIKZbtNyMNlvpOicVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAX2M~)

Among other meetings, I attended the RNC Western Region breakfast meeting. An election was held for the RNC Contest Committee. This committee adjudicates challenges to delegations at the 2024 National Convention, so the members have to be known and respected for their honesty and integrity. Hawaii’s NCW Laura Nakanelua was nominated last-minute from the floor and won. Oregon’s current NCW Tracy Honl had been vying for the position and was soundly defeated. Laura will do a fabulous job! It looked to me as if most of the regions leaned toward solid, grassroots-supporting members in their elections.

**NCM/NCW RACES**

In Oregon, the next election for National Committeeman and National Committeewoman happens March 16. More on that next time! There will be several big turnovers in the membership of the 168 in the next few months. My observation is that some of the members are there for the photo ops, food, and flowers ... while Oregon and America deserve better.

Over & Out,
_**Kerry**_
---
|
---
