clean_body: I hope you'll take the time to read this. | | | Friend, this message is a bit on the longer side, but I hope you'll take the time to read it. = I can still remember the first time that I came to Florida. I was working on my Masters degree and had just gotten the news that my beloved father had been killed by a criminal with a gun in Ecuador, where I was born. As I grappled with my grief, I found myself missing Ecuador more than I had in years. I missed its warmth, lush greenery, and close-knit communities that I grew up with. My older sister, Monica, knew our family was struggling, so she convinced me to visit her in Miami, where she had recently moved. When I stepped outside of the airport, it was like stepping into another world. It was warm, wonderfully humid, bustling with lively, diverse communities, lush, and all so, so beautifully green. We spent the next few days visiting all of Monica's favorite places in her new city — the spots with the most beautiful views and the best cafes to get a cafecito. The people we met were even warmer than the weather. Everyone was welcoming, friendly, and proud to call this state their home. I boarded my plane back to my home with a heavy heart but a new resolve. As soon as I was able, I sold my car and moved across the country to make a new home in Miami.(My mom, always my closest confidant, wasn't far behind.) Since moving here all those years ago, I've had the privilege to build a beautiful life in the Sunshine State. I fell in love here, found the community I had longed for, raised a family of my own, and dedicated my career to serving this state. I've helped protect the Everglades, expanded access to health care, worked for Florida International University, and became the first South American immigrant elected to Congress, right here in Florida. I've spent my life serving this state and getting to know the communities who call it home. But my opponent, Rick Scott, has spent his career scamming Floridians, lying to voters, and making himself richer. He wants you to think that Florida families agree with his extreme, hateful agenda.But I can promise you, friend, that couldn't be further from the truth. Listen, my campaign is deeply personal because of my love for this state — and more importantly, because of what it will mean for my fellow Floridians. Rick Scott wants to sow division and undo decades of meaningful progress. He wants to destroy reproductive rights, gun safety laws, and vital public services, like Medicare and Social Security, that support millions of his constituents, including my own mother. Florida is ready for a change — I hear it from voters every day as I travel around all 67 counties. I know this November, Floridians will choose unity, progress, and kindness over Rick Scott's extremist agenda. But the truth is, we're up against a mega-millionaire who spent $64 million of his personal fortune to buy this seat last time. If we're going to break through Rick Scott's lies, build unstoppable grassroots momentum, and win this critical race, I'll need your help. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for taking the time to read this and fight for a better future for Florida. With gratitude, Debbie | * | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

body:
| | | Peter, I talked with President Trump, and he had SO MANY wonderful things to say about the people of Missouri.

He knows we stand with him, and he’s so grateful for your support.

He mentioned he may hold a rally in Missouri, and asked if that’s something you’d like.

name: Jim
subject: Could be my last email
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Friend...

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ab0860dc94ab4fbeb5338507352a9422&_e=_s9SYCNlcOl2HRNsC0JtdNMFg8CrlxgFi1nN7Szg3VsqFulPJAZWPagB9Y59xUvkS8Kzz6YcI3XB74LzbhTZCTrTpFgorwr3iou_1tg_usxm8gu7J9lGjbqKMkBGajAR9yZ5sivfXR13UtBW3naChXvKTSxw_txzUmxDKucslVz486kXp-BXZnQAp432TlmgVDTZYjjiCLcD_QX2sUt43WIatYqBFvCpn8cpzCNePt-1b9x0rLnz0cryUhRS6fUIku_z-XxRjjo6SnOZGs6dQMoVRjLLivoovL_VJICr-3rf4wLwESN92Ovd_Xc9R6nGt_gg6-gLiQ-QBn54mfidi5pVk_ea3GSsiU-nQMz18qFjT0xlsNqzcsriztrmIc1wVkPZZ-KKtsGZW6L8Y1iaGedtyoNyL3EKSH6-yvllR6VNuk4B2WdPzxaCg65_2LLef9LLrBdLSVNYZ8m5k9vbEA%3D%3D)

Hello...

This could be the last email I ever send you, Friend.

But I have to be honest with you -- no matter how weary I am about opening up.

**[Right now, the odds are stacked against us, and I need to know how you'll react to this email to understand how to move forward. Your response could change everything.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ab0860dc94ab4fbeb5338507352a9422&_e=_s9SYCNlcOl2HRNsC0JtdNMFg8CrlxgFi1nN7Szg3VsqFulPJAZWPagB9Y59xUvkS8Kzz6YcI3XB74LzbhTZCTrTpFgorwr3iou_1tg_usxm8gu7J9lGjbqKMkBGajAR9yZ5sivfXR13UtBW3naChXvKTSxw_txzUmxDKucslVz486kXp-BXZnQAp432TlmgVDTZYjjiCLcD_QX2sUt43WIatYqBFvCpn8cpzCNePt-1b9x0rLnz0cryUhRS6fUIku_z-XxRjjo6SnOZGs6dQMoVRjLLivoovL_VJICr-3ox8IJWiJTE43BOGFMTNMAzu8VObJSRBCPV_DELA1-oSLoR7wBgmMI1CC9BDwYxI_FtynRk6wcpsZtvvmV1X0SWAEzHPdkk3ZCG8HN61WU103h10Yv5es0mIdQveFPEjCoqtZf0atfggRIfI8WQVhp_vYxzZPPBqH6pdVVGNDKcyQ%3D%3D)**

My name is Jim Banks. If you haven't heard of me, I'm an Afghanistan veteran from Indiana now serving in Congress.

I worked hard to serve my community alongside my wife, Amanda. And above all, I am a father to three amazing girls.

**[Now, I am also a Senate candidate in a crucial race in Indiana. The outcome of this election will determine if we can take back the Senate.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ab0860dc94ab4fbeb5338507352a9422&_e=_s9SYCNlcOl2HRNsC0JtdNMFg8CrlxgFi1nN7Szg3VsqFulPJAZWPagB9Y59xUvkS8Kzz6YcI3XB74LzbhTZCTrTpFgorwr3iou_1tg_usxm8gu7J9lGjbqKMkBGajAR9yZ5sivfXR13UtBW3naChXvKTSxw_txzUmxDKucslVz486kXp-BXZnQAp432TlmgVDTZYjjiCLcD_QX2sUt43WIatYqBFvCpn8cpzCNePt-1b9x0rLnz0cryUhRS6fUIku_z-XxRjjo6SnOZGs6dQMoVRjLLivoovL_VJICr-3p5W3f0qSZR9YGuI1rdKh3Didbr_fshKX6Kj1vXZLv5JSwConUebmmBuPbwOJG_mCMMrxN2r7cLrNW63O5-2Actbt4rp-2VUVwwTxTwChsmcvtYmAkIbKBUKttfqze9M77rFj3Sn98eJjI4ZFGEhWQSGI26Fnea0YJXQbb0RGNyng%3D%3D)**

Joe Biden and his Leftist collaborators are pouring millions into key races across the country in an effort to wipe out GOP candidates. But I won't let them win so easily.

**[That's why I'm reaching out today and humbly asking you for support.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ab0860dc94ab4fbeb5338507352a9422&_e=_s9SYCNlcOl2HRNsC0JtdNMFg8CrlxgFi1nN7Szg3VsqFulPJAZWPagB9Y59xUvkS8Kzz6YcI3XB74LzbhTZCTrTpFgorwr3iou_1tg_usxm8gu7J9lGjbqKMkBGajAR9yZ5sivfXR13UtBW3naChXvKTSxw_txzUmxDKucslVz486kXp-BXZnQAp432TlmgVDTZYjjiCLcD_QX2sUt43WIatYqBFvCpn8cpzCNePt-1b9x0rLnz0cryUhRS6fUIku_z-XxRjjo6SnOZGs6dQMoVRjLLivoovL_VJICr-3rW_EIZ88Ztie72O2p1XZVGqabV9GWpLCnCxQzZPkWZv0RKnsKzWp-vN9gzhUod6Jh87uOTQ_nUQMxX17ZJfcosqORzgv9ZCsv9vs818NnIWiCEUPCWeO6Q4x1w3pW4XUgRoHFaqO5E-8nAlw95vQYcxQQGU9t22RmBGETDzqWEhA%3D%3D)**

The Democrats have planted a fake Republican in my race to stop me from winning. They don't realize that I've been in this community for years, and I know that Americans are fed up with the progressive narrative.

I'm not usually the type of person to ask for help, but there's no way I can make it on my own.

The Democrats are attacking us from ALL angles because they hate what we stand for: freedom and American pride.

**[So please help me out this one time, Friend:](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ab0860dc94ab4fbeb5338507352a9422&_e=_s9SYCNlcOl2HRNsC0JtdNMFg8CrlxgFi1nN7Szg3VsqFulPJAZWPagB9Y59xUvkS8Kzz6YcI3XB74LzbhTZCTrTpFgorwr3iou_1tg_usxm8gu7J9lGjbqKMkBGajAR9yZ5sivfXR13UtBW3naChXvKTSxw_txzUmxDKucslVz486kXp-BXZnQAp432TlmgVDTZYjjiCLcD_QX2sUt43WIatYqBFvCpn8cpzCNePt-1b9x0rLnz0cryUhRS6fUIku_z-XxRjjo6SnOZGs6dQMoVRjLLivoovL_VJICr-3pGAyxzjaWaG1tB7uHym9xaUiPJnfAAvip8xmVTB4shSX5kyf4K5BdB9zA47juXSt_tuDX2y7Q7OjWPW9J_GCKE5_d5OE2e3sjdO_ljKk0n7obxArKFmkw50DNBfDqc4SfMHhuExzWeTW-37pKt0VN4_7h0li__UkN3tzYJq1v8GA%3D%3D)**

clean_body: Friend... Hello... This could be the last email I ever send you, Friend. But I have to be honest with you -- no matter how weary I am about opening up. My name is Jim Banks. If you haven't heard of me, I'm an Afghanistan veteran from Indiana now serving in Congress. I worked hard to serve my community alongside my wife, Amanda. And above all, I am a father to three amazing girls. Joe Biden and his Leftist collaborators are pouring millions into key races across the country in an effort to wipe out GOP candidates. But I won't let them win so easily. The Democrats have planted a fake Republican in my race to stop me from winning. They don't realize that I've been in this community for years, and I know that Americans are fed up with the progressive narrative. I'm not usually the type of person to ask for help, but there's no way I can make it on my own. The Democrats are attacking us from ALL angles because they hate what we stand for: freedom and American pride. ****************************************************************************************************** **************************************************************************************************** **************************************************************************************************** **************************************************--************************************************** Friend, I'm not an establishment politician who will play games with the American people. I am a Patriot who wants to save America for the next generation. That's why I'm being so candid with you today. I'm not going to make false promises and tell you I can fix our country overnight. But I can promise you that I will make it my mission to restore faith in our government and put the American people before political deals. I intend to make you proud. God Bless, Jim Banks ****************************************************************************************************** | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Defend the Constitution PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

Team,

We wouldn’t be reaching out to you for support if we didn’t absolutely need you. Trump’s win in New Hampshire and his legal victory here in Illinois is a harbinger of what’s to come in 2024, and we know that his name on the ballot turns out his MAGA cult voters and inspires other extremist Republicans.

If we don’t prepare and invest now, we’re in for trouble in November.

That’s why we need your help. Can you make a contribution to fight back against Donald Trump in our state?

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/idcca-email-feb24?refcode=IDCCA_EMAIL_060124_FR_EOM-Missed-3&amount=15 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/idcca-email-feb24?refcode=IDCCA_EMAIL_060124_FR_EOM-Missed-3&amount=15]

# FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Dear Reader, It's no secret that our economy is in shambles.

At fault, more than anything, is our addiction to printing money. We need sound fiscal policies to get back on the right track and we need them now. The New York Sun, one of my favorite newspapers, is leading the charge in the press.
---
| | [Join the Sun For 1¢ ->](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=d06c80826e114eeb840f35c0e40151ec&_e=ct0WdniR0g9ww8n5qMgD-xV5_7xIs78W6Z0TxBrWskkk_idRzULIvHRaJsMNVQFOJGkLTMYQhByXjGp_CbaX033Lv3WbdvJj9RVdwY2jEyxxIczWIeqcLxWvnGnuglhueCwXUuWSOZOEMWeYzlxg8bQr4kgOv1he_jSTdTuoDD0N9ixm0EP3PU9I1kt5BQ7Jy5w1s4S3tRLk64Kp1WaALF6Qi0GC2UlKQAWOa6_FnMrA17yWeUVDtf_h8JQP7fOahaRb6OjO_cKhGQXSP_xm2URNisIPVzKxZdw70Wi3ax3lZd8LPZFZdD0UhdHQ5Xrm5Zxwsjo593nv_0wGmWHmQYnsWk9x2XNSPe-enf3moW-IXdmiy2smotLmO6er-ClYxjXMuCfUU_CzFofOIx0umA%3D%3D)
---
| | In a recent and exclusive column in the Sun, I wrote:
With the right tax incentives, more people working to produce more goods, and holding the gold-commodity value of the dollar stable, we'll get lower inflation with faster economic growth. The Sun is the one paper in America that has fought steadfastly for these sound common-sense principles. It has done so since it was founded all the way back in 1833. It's a paper that always places principle over politics and people over party. And what principles? American principles. Constitutionalism, sound money, small government, traditional values, sensible foreign policy, and a distaste for corruption and political overreach in all forms. Simply put, the Sun is a national treasure. I've been inspired by its rapid reemergence since it burst back on the scene a little while ago. Which is why I'm asking you to consider joining me and the Sun at this time.
---

clean_body: Our economy is a mess The Sun knows how to fix it | | | | FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW | | Dear Reader, It's no secret that our economy is in shambles. At fault, more than anything, is our addiction to printing money. We need sound fiscal policies to get back on the right track and we need them now. The New York Sun, one of my favorite newspapers, is leading the charge in the press. | | | | In a recent and exclusive column in the Sun, I wrote: With the right tax incentives, more people working to produce more goods, and holding the gold-commodity value of the dollar stable, we'll get lower inflation with faster economic growth. The Sun is the one paper in America that has fought steadfastly for these sound common-sense principles. It has done so since it was founded all the way back in 1833. It's a paper that always places principle over politics and people over party. And what principles? American principles. Constitutionalism, sound money, small government, traditional values, sensible foreign policy, and a distaste for corruption and political overreach in all forms. Simply put, the Sun is a national treasure. I've been inspired by its rapid reemergence since it burst back on the scene a little while ago. Which is why I'm asking you to consider joining me and the Sun at this time. | | | | Believe me when I say that America needs the Sun, now more than ever. And the Sun needs you. Join our movement now. body:
| | As a doctor, I focus on the facts backed by science and data, and here's the truth, Peter: **In Texas, our healthcare outcomes are some of the worst in the nation.**

In 2021, nearly 20% of Texans were uninsured. Texas children were more than twice as likely as children in other states to be uninsured. Texas also ranks #49 in the nation for women’s healthcare.

From the frontlines in our hospitals, I've seen how our broken healthcare system fails so many in need — I’m determined to find solutions. That’s why I went to Congress to serve as a Health Policy Advisor where I fought alongside Speaker Pelosi to deliver better care and lower costs for all Americans. [**Before I share my plan, I’m asking for your help with a donation to my campaign >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78589249/453843808/1248488860?refcode=em24_240207_HCRF2_fnd_gq_nopn___DBW_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240207_HCRF2_fnd_gq_nopn___DBW_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=&zip=&refcode2=8b5ef3cb-f1c5-ee11-b660-002248223848&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGI1ZWYzY2ItZjFjNS1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzODQ4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gbe19rGlLkrOpfBoRWyMddFPWbD3tSDcL8PE4D8JscM=)

Texans deserve better. That's why in Congress, I will fight to:
* Offer a public option for health insurance so Americans will have expanded access and more choices in the marketplace.
* Lower prescription drug costs.
* Fight for expanding Medicaid and support legislation to help millions of Texans receive the coverage they need.
* Increase transparency for patients in the healthcare system.
* Ensure women have the right to make decisions about their health – _without_ the interference of politicians.

In 2022, I worked with Democratic leaders in Washington on legislation to lower healthcare costs, improve diversity in clinical trials, and increase accessibility to quality healthcare. **I am ready to continue this work as your Congressman for TX-32.**

[**But I can only do that if our campaign has the resources to win in November. That’s why I hope today you’ll make a donation of $5 or whatever you can afford name: Judicial Watch Corruption Chronicles
subject: Judicial Watch Sues Mississippi for Counting Absentee Ballots Received after Election Day
body:
Judicial Watch announced recently it filed a civil
rights lawsuit on behalf of the Libertarian Party of
Mississippi, challenging a Mississippi election law permitting
absentee ballots to be received as long as five business days after
Election Day.

[alt_text]

[*****]
February 07, 2024

[article-image]
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66959&L=31320&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY291bnRpbmctYmFsbG90cy1hZnRlci1lbGVjdGlvbi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Y29ycnVwdGlvbitjaHJvbmljbGVzJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=55fdff476340d71f2261645f874ef2d080bf949bab19371cc2c4fc723df1663e]

Mississippi, challenging a Mississippi election law permitting
absentee ballots to be received as long as five business days after
Election Day.

name: Team Baldwin
subject: One of the top 10 seats most likely to flip
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| We’re counting on the early support of this grassroots team to fight back.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1972%2E35263%2EqJL3dk)
Peter — CNN released its _first_ Senate rankings of the year — **and Wisconsin's Senate seat was named one of the most likely to flip this November.** **[We’ll explain more in just a moment, but first, please rush in a donation of any amount to help Tammy Baldwin keep Wisconsin’s toss-up Senate seat blue.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-feb24.S4bXxm&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240207_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=1972%2E35263%2EqJL3dk)** | [DONATE NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-feb24.S4bXxm&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240207_AM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=1972%2E35263%2EqJL3dk)
---
Wisconsin’s Senate race could determine control of the Senate. If we’re going to reelect Tammy and defend our Senate majority, we can’t afford to take any days off.
Megamillionaire Republican Eric Hovde is expected to launch his campaign _any day now_ — so we need to ensure that we’re ready to compete with his virtually unlimited war chest.
Republicans poured $77 million into our state to win Wisconsin’s other Senate seat in 2022, and we can expect even more money to be spent to defeat Tammy this year.
**We’re counting on the early support of this grassroots team to fight back and overcome the tens of millions of dollars Republicans are gearing up to spend to flip Wisconsin red.**
**[Will you rush in a contribution today to help us keep Wisconsin and our Senate majority blue?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-feb24.S4bXxm&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240207_AM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=1972%2E35263%2EqJL3dk)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

body:
Folks, We have something ridiculous to tell you, but first we need to ask if you can donate to John’s campaign to defeat Lauren Boebert.
__ | | | [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=e09d1dfd40944b1d9cb3a16c83bf2a1c&_e=iSWG9BCSYV0OgrGtj4NtMFnVY9mL_LyBkmRJibgOy01TvxuTFUFidDJABjV7IaQpd9C13vCCWKjXpUX2DR1km3Hc-vrjV2wosg6XXel8yW_o0v7qKIjrgE5ILHZ1D2dmRMh8d2cO8d1ixySbUINpJPubcxIz_f-0J3QKU1-OcEJQp6T6eTXjoQTSs4aeklxv_cA2kvCtic_Kdh2YLCFvsyXssoZHzUeg7y8AA1mFfzZh38Wo_QmK1UkaNzBLAuhFy5du2EMrM0pX7BTzxzUOem6V9ZI0226FgP-z8WZr8UXSBC32OYnkunm8IPqvHnMYKLzWIfWtfdKOqI_a1-5cgk4NLTIqqa2P7nJpeVSbUrlDwYYyA2cay0x5ReRMkB2D8F7w-R_Hn8ieNgsRJycJyA%3D%3D) Folks, We have something ridiculous to tell you, [**but first we need to ask if you can donate to John’s campaign to defeat Lauren Boebert.**](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=e09d1dfd40944b1d9cb3a16c83bf2a1c&_e=iSWG9BCSYV0OgrGtj4NtMFnVY9mL_LyBkmRJibgOy01TvxuTFUFidDJABjV7IaQpd9C13vCCWKjXpUX2DR1km3Hc-vrjV2wosg6XXel8yW_o0v7qKIjrgE5ILHZ1D2dmRMh8d2cO8d1ixySbUINpJPubcxIz_f-0J3QKU1-OcEJQp6T6eTXjoQTSs4aeklxv_cA2kvCtic_Kdh2YLCFvsyXssoZHzUeg7y8AA1mFfzZh38Wo_QmK1UkaNzBLAuhFNirspubtoC0v5NJJ1ZRItjtQlqJGFZwIKI5_k59cL-2i3-Puz1Ypv6HvpLF5DOs1_1VEE2sPQA8OnFCmNCU1ZA1sKnAg4QYoqHFm5SfZ5tgmT66Tti5P9_ZvuZ8XCTF_MXMbd2ZQVq_5P-3lNvSldQ%3D%3D) One of the things that changes VERY QUICKLY when Lauren Boebert moves into your race is that you know there will always be news stories about her being absolutely absurd. [****](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=e09d1dfd40944b1d9cb3a16c83bf2a1c&_e=iSWG9BCSYV0OgrGtj4NtMFnVY9mL_LyBkmRJibgOy01TvxuTFUFidDJABjV7IaQpd9C13vCCWKjXpUX2DR1km3Hc-vrjV2wosg6XXel8yW_o0v7qKIjrgE5ILHZ1D2dmRMh8d2cO8d1ixySbUINpJPubcxIz_f-0J3QKU1-OcEJQp6T6eTXjoQTSs4aeklxv_cA2kvCtic_Kdh2YLCFvsyXssoZHzUeg7y8AA1mFfzZh38Wo_QmK1UkaNzBLAuhFpntR7bCcqZlBuCX7PPuAwUm6nk6qn11iC4klKRWk1uaDteP27ZXSdxquX7Vl5t4RHjLJe-6nsLlegjqOCPChtDB3PJXuHaj_1MAgYGopWuHdgrEvJMGWWw_nzrvERmMyBh4mOBCHCPKO_uxO02sLXA%3D%3D)**Most recently, amidst the crisis at the border, Boebert suggested that the United States “deploy” alligators to the border to serve as a deterrent to migrants.********[RESPOND ASAP](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=e09d1dfd40944b1d9cb3a16c83bf2a1c&_e=iSWG9BCSYV0OgrGtj4NtMFnVY9mL_LyBkmRJibgOy01TvxuTFUFidDJABjV7IaQpd9C13vCCWKjXpUX2DR1km3Hc-vrjV2wosg6XXel8yW_o0v7qKIjrgE5ILHZ1D2dmRMh8d2cO8d1ixySbUINpJPubcxIz_f-0J3QKU1-OcEJQp6T6eTXjoQTSs4aeklxv_cA2kvCtic_Kdh2YLCFvsyXssoZHzUeg7y8AA1mFfzZh38Wo_QmK1UkaNzBLAuhFLIIxlWZj7YbQI8mMdQZlsQ93aR2OW0TuLj3Mh7L8Wg2PvGXamzmKemznUufdjKBnhBLSdSQ2dq8eaPU6SwSvjD83S3LSeeCncGWR2BdSinP3_os9wQ5tfXhS45GDl37j9PkmeoHODyoj4txIxmPIdQ%3D%3D)** Let’s break this one down. First of all, one doesn’t deploy alligators. We don’t have some secret stockpile of military-grade gatorforce that we send into combat when our $700 billion human and mechanical resources can’t get the job done. Second, this is the border we’re talking about, not a medeival castle moat or the lake in Neverland. It’s thousands of miles long, much of it isn’t around very much water, and alligators don’t just hang out in the sun all day long. And third, Boebert wants alligators at the border because she either wants them to scare migrants trying to come into the country, or she wants the gators to attack and hurt or kill them. So this idea is stupid, ineffective, and comes from a place of violent and evil intent. **But that’s the Lauren Boebert brand in a nutshell. Stupid, ineffective, and harmful.** [**We can’t afford to allow her to represent the Fourth District. Will you help make sure John defeats her by rushing a $10 or $20 donation to his campaign?**](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=e09d1dfd40944b1d9cb3a16c83bf2a1c&_e=iSWG9BCSYV0OgrGtj4NtMFnVY9mL_LyBkmRJibgOy01TvxuTFUFidDJABjV7IaQpd9C13vCCWKjXpUX2DR1km3Hc-vrjV2wosg6XXel8yW_o0v7qKIjrgE5ILHZ1D2dmRMh8d2cO8d1ixySbUINpJPubcxIz_f-0J3QKU1-OcEJQp6T6eTXjoQTSs4aeklxv_cA2kvCtic_Kdh2YLCFvsyXssoZHzUeg7y8AA1mFfzZh38Wo_QmK1UkaNzBLAuhFLvQ-W6dRGSo1FZyqR3KM5ZBlrnt8hvAzTiFuZf8JYnl2eATCFQGTYvvODUZWSxwjoadpY8NPcrT1TPfOlGImkzdtPK7H_YNZjkpRkOsBevWaP7bbRz7ICwTKgkLvmhdheg-BUeizXGK6dx2Mije3tA%3D%3D) We thank you. – Team Padora I'm John Padora, a Democrat running for Congress in CD-04. Lauren Boebert recently jumped into my district in a desperate attempt to stay in DC. My campaign is powered by grassroots donations - donate anything you can monthly to keep Boebert OUT of this seat. Friend,
I’m running to defeat Jim Jordan and replace him in Congress—and as a single mom, small business owner, a former military wife, and longtime volunteer in my community, I know what it takes to fight for working and middle-class Americans.
Every day, I travel this district and connect with people. And every day, I see why Jim Jordan has an extraordinarily low approval rating here: he never shows up, he breaks promises, and the people are fed up. I met a powerful local organization yesterday that recently retracted their endorsement of Jordan and they are open to endorsing me!

That’s why Jordan is running scared. He knows he's vulnerable and unpopular, and that I have what it takes to beat him. In fact, a PAC has _already_ started running ads on his behalf. They wouldn't do this so early if they weren't nervous!
**I need your help to strike while the iron is hot and ramp up the momentum.** We are prepared for a fight, but we need our message to dominate the entire district.
Friend:**I am spoiling to take Jordan on and expose him for the fraud he is** , and I’m counting on you to help me build the resources I need to defeat Jim Jordan and help Democrats flip the House. name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20NPP?=
subject: One of many attacks on voting rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project
body:
We have to be prepared. | | | | | [](https://newpaproject.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e6e5141dda36b4ba08999c131&id=0ea0ee8707&e=95417d7e87)
---
Fellow activist,

PA Republican legislators recently filed an anti-voting rights lawsuit with the goal of making it more difficult for voters to cast their ballots.

**Here’s the scoop:**

According to _CBS News_ , a lawsuit was filed by 24 Republican state lawmakers, “challenging the legality of a 2021 executive order by Biden that orders federal agencies _to consider ways to expand access to registering to vote and information about voting.”_

Additionally, the lawsuit challenges two Democratic pro-voting state-level actions: The implementation of PA’s **automatic voter registration** and the directive “that counties cannot reject a voter registration application solely on the basis of finding that the applicant submitted a driver's license number or Social Security number digits that don't match what is in a government agency database.”

**As the CBS News article confirms, “The lawsuit is expected to be one of many to litigate voting and election rules in a battleground state that is critical to 2024's presidential contest.”**

**We’ve seen this before. In 2020, Trump fought against mail-in voting and ran a smear campaign against PA’s election systems in an attempt to overturn the results.** [**Now, with the 2024 presidential election coming up fast and PA being a key battleground state, we have to be prepared for anything. Help us prepare to defend voting rights in PA by rushing $25 or more today →**](https://newpaproject.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e6e5141dda36b4ba08999c131&id=c83cf773b8&e=95417d7e87)
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$25 »**](https://newpaproject.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e6e5141dda36b4ba08999c131&id=368eeccd62&e=95417d7e87)

In solidarity,

Team NPP
| | _The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education, and mobilization. NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth._

**Will you support us with a monthly contribution today?** [DONATE MONTHLY](https://newpaproject.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e6e5141dda36b4ba08999c131&id=c593169e0f&e=95417d7e87)

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: No more blank checks for war
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

This week, the Biden Administration tried to pass a legislative package
with cruel, anti-immigrant, GOP border policies tied to more money for
bombs and weapons for Israel.

Democrats can't take on Republican extremism by trying to pass a
Republican anti-immigration bill and turning their backs on Dreamers,
asylum-seekers, and migrant families. Our progressive Squad knows this and
opposed this bad bill from the beginning.

Despite Biden giving Republicans what they wanted, it still wasn’t enough
for GOP extremists, so they separated the immigration reform and military
spending into separate bills in an attempt to pass $17 billion in
additional military funding to Israel with no conditions and no
humanitarian aid.

Every Justice Democrats incumbent voted against this blank check for
genocide in Gaza. While 45 Democrats — largely bankrolled by AIPAC — voted
for it, it wasn’t enough to pass.

It goes to show that our pro-peace movement is growing, and it
demonstrates why we need to protect and expand our progressive bloc in
Congress this year as they face tens of millions of dollars in attacks
from AIPAC and their right-wing network.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240207.01OKyH&refcode=em20240207-33217&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1001&akid=33217%2E1203867%2EuHgbz3 ]Help us re-elect our progressive champions with the moral courage to
vote against blank checks for war and keep up the fight for peace: pitch
in a grassroots donation of $3 or more to fuel our 2024
election work →

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240207.01OKyH&refcode=em20240207-33217&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1020&akid=33217%2E1203867%2EuHgbz3 ]Contribute $3

With primary elections beginning in less than three months, we can’t
afford to waste any time. If we’re going to stop AIPAC’s war chest of
right-wing mega-donor money, we need to rapidly build our resources here
and now.

Thanks for all you do to fuel our fight,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time.

There are other ways to make an impact in support of peace and equality in
Israel and Palestine: please urge your member of Congress to support a
ceasefire through [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139873?t=1021&akid=33217%2E1203867%2EuHgbz3 ]Adalah Justice Project’s petition or by calling them
using [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139874?t=1022&akid=33217%2E1203867%2EuHgbz3 ]Jewish Voice for Peace’s dialer here. Your voice matters in this
critical moment.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20240207-33217-footer&t=1023&refcode2=33217_1203867_uHgbz3&akid=33217%2E1203867%2EuHgbz3

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=33217%2E1203867%2EuHgbz3

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Derek Marshall
subject: Sign ON: Defend women’s right to abortion, pass the WHPA!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
| | |
**[Sign your name to end the human rights crisis in America. Tell Congress to pass the Women’s Health Protection Act (WHPA)!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm9hFWYg4Cpvcku7P80uO4mlKMW8lkJmwg7OnNwRSGkC2v4fnUnlHDsZFlhY32G4s0Ey10P9B6dUcrkwwqsTBG_x_0pvsELd1loeadax3nEGh6v5Xu-b-0tYJce9jWZwUnzPhW9EuadXKEZdSYGGcQumRcD1jUipj0WmucCcN_gfyJGu80Ev_1wL8diQG-QEQrDYAFb8Yropt4z2I9VRuMbD3yT3irXuCFgT9iAUx0WPuy0em7B6L3QIVmpBapU8akwIdcOSCpgVbyV2MzbjGsVgzOJoxlM8rXf6_VN1mZpVlJ_cvE2hUgEFu1QJeH962RDV8axtT3v4efGI2Xq-D2G8nBqehQBYpHcX2Am-idGIYdp7rw7UUZyVPmwb9EvZxkGcTfwwIg7yP3pCDCOBD2Xw1E8ahyNMYxha3vXeNxecxin7nQsOZDbl06oycsHakyr_TD7rTmmTqLTjmZuLkiuNn_FoxIDd2_z7y2vB_zXU9l2YQHH3F5n2j3BaLD1zg1CaWAYqndYmkc8fMYtoF0uThyOYtUwuu1pQpc2SjReHKI0mc3be_5j2SPbsNxeQ5atr6hNFhrsskZr0YVMXztZ/43n/_VotfGSgSnqDxpJLpErmpQ/h0/mLmjJvW9kaP2Y7VbH8hburJgVf2gO5RDoG5n48pPzZc) **
Ever since the Supreme Court’s decision to overturn Roe v. Wade, women across America have found themselves in unthinkable dilemmas. In fact, Human Rights Watch declared a [human rights crisis](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDKlNSOOEsUeYg_8i9nfDDqZwJ1RGGO4h4ZFZXWEMZuK3onPP15wGhDOBT27x5nNAIIGEPaPaAR19zeo23RA_Gvy4_jpbg953BPhV5v8SteDtfL1nYSpOTr5TWejWgZAMLR0CixscDSDw-LZYzeaPSc_8AkUvnRb7j93AMGMLLyXBqLjcDVJbsJ1Sm3EwL8KVhBq9TcyuWB0NBxVYVbz5DbA1o1LeDe1e_qqOraC4ToMfOCV-EbYgbo4XD2lxIrKtpN-1Rt-dDcwK6I3ljz08zweSHAB-7wDiC1AJcGnpezgmL_PtiqrKyETEPPDMp96X25D7P8Wx6hkwldNxPYu20aF2xxkOAdSQJYabkDEZ2fET/43n/_VotfGSgSnqDxpJLpErmpQ/h1/cyRnNnL54uCRbqN9O5-gRIxeY5_aWutR42-CpGFeibE) in America as a result.
The Court’s ruling has led Republican-led states to criminalize abortion and impose severe restrictions on access to abortion services. As a result, countless individuals are being pushed into desperate, even deadly circumstances.
**To restore abortion access and prevent extreme abortion bans, Democrats have introduced the Women's Health Protection Act (WHPA).**

**This race is getting attention because it isn’t just about South Texas. It’s about turning Texas blue, regaining our majority in the House, and fighting for the people of TX-15.**
The primary is just the beginning. If we want to get Michelle in Congress and get to work creating stronger, healthier communities for all of us, we need to start playing a long game.

clean_body: The time is NOW for us to push as hard as we can until the primary— and to start preparing what comes after. | | | Peter, you know that we’re only a few weeks away from the primary. That means the time is NOW for us to push as hard as we can to turn out voters — and to start preparing for what comes after. While we are working day and night to reach as many South Texans as possible, we also need to get a headstart on the next phase of our campaign. Republicans are already spending BIG money on this race. They know how important TX-15 is and they are scared of what will happen if we get Michelle in office. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll instantly process your contribution to Michelle Vallejo: | Michelle is ready to fight for South Texas. We know the GOP is only interested in maintaining the status quo and protecting their own. This race is getting attention because it isn’t just about South Texas. name: Rick Larsen
subject: The Opioid Epidemic is Devastating Northwest Washington
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
Content warning: addiction, drug use
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78591305/453851130/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Y2UwYjRiMC1mNmM1LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjM4NDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_GynkKqqQ5gBnyHii3LLpmVefXkDi83aZWrRrWCnvE4=&emci=163c21e5-4dc5-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=9ce0b4b0-f6c5-ee11-b660-002248223848&ceid=9494239)
---

| | We need to talk about the opioid epidemic in concrete terms, but more importantly: we have to take action. Last month, I released an opioid report that analyzes the ongoing opioid epidemic in our communities. Here are some topline findings from the report:
* **From February 2022 - February 2023, Washington state had the largest percentage increase of drug overdose deaths in the United States.**

* In the five counties in our district – Island, San Juan, Skagit, Snohomish, and Whatcom – most overdose deaths can be attributed to synthetic opioids like fentanyl.
* In 2022, upwards of 75% of Washington's total drug overdose deaths were linked to opioids.
* Broadly, the United States saw a 3% decline in overdose deaths overall during this year-long period. But at home in Washington, deaths increased by more than 21%, continuing devastating trends which began during the height of the COVID-19 pandemic.

**We know that these drugs are destroying lives, families, and entire communities. It is time to regain the momentum to combat the opioid epidemic and save precious lives.** I know that Congress and the Biden administration can and must do more to coordinate with local governments, Tribal communities, law enforcement, health care providers and community partners who are on the front lines of the epidemic. **That is why my report also includes actionable federal policy recommendations to address many of the concerns of constituents, local leaders, and organizations on the ground.** These are in four primary pillars:
* Preventing individuals from turning to opioids;
* Interdicting the flow of opioids into communities;
* Expanding treatment; and
* Supporting long-term recovery for individuals and building resilience in local communities.

**Ending the opioid epidemic begins with understanding the challenges communities are facing and working together to break down barriers to lasting solutions.** I know we can achieve this. Soon, I will have some updates for you on legislation I am introducing aimed at creating a dedicated funding source for multijurisdictional drug task forces, and provisions that will help communities that have been hurt economically by the opioid epidemic to recover. clean_body: Content warning: addiction, drug use | | | | We need to talk about the opioid epidemic in concrete terms, but more importantly: we have to take action. Last month, I released an opioid report that analyzes the ongoing opioid epidemic in our communities. Here are some topline findings from the report: From February 2022 - February 2023, Washington state had the largest percentage increase of drug overdose deaths in the United States. In the five counties in our district – Island, San Juan, Skagit, Snohomish, and Whatcom – most overdose deaths can be attributed to synthetic opioids like fentanyl. In 2022, upwards of 75% of Washington's total drug overdose deaths were linked to opioids. Broadly, the United States saw a 3% decline in overdose deaths overall during this year-long period. But at home in Washington, deaths increased by more than 21%, continuing devastating trends which began during the height of the COVID-19 pandemic. We know that these drugs are destroying lives, families, and entire communities. It is time to regain the momentum to combat the opioid epidemic and save precious lives. I know that Congress and the Biden administration can and must do more to coordinate with local governments, Tribal communities, law enforcement, health care providers and community partners who are on the front lines of the epidemic. That is why my report also includes actionable federal policy recommendations to address many of the concerns of constituents, local leaders, and organizations on the ground. These are in four primary pillars: Preventing individuals from turning to opioids; Interdicting the flow of opioids into communities; Expanding treatment; and Supporting long-term recovery for individuals and building resilience in local communities. Ending the opioid epidemic begins with understanding the challenges communities are facing and working together to break down barriers to lasting solutions. I know we can achieve this. Soon, I will have some updates for you on legislation I am introducing aimed at creating a dedicated funding source for multijurisdictional drug task forces, and provisions that will help communities that have been hurt economically by the opioid epidemic to recover. Thank you, Rick | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen. | This email was sent by . Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen PO Box 326 Everett, WA 98206 United States Email is an important way for Rick Larsen to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. Too much email? or . Questions or concerns? . |

body:
Short Session - Priorities will be coming soon | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/1c5b1c0a2f81/n41kepo7ku-12679291?e=25844e23a8)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=e63fe996d8&e=25844e23a8)
---
| | Peter,
---
|
* Legislative Update February 7th, 2024
* EDUCATION
* LIFE & CONSTITUTIONAL FREEDOMS
* AGRICULTURE
* ECONOMY
* PUBLIC HEARINGS

---
|
---
|
## Legislative Update February 7th, 2024
---
|
---
|
## EDUCATION
---
| **LB1386:
Introduced by Blair Sen. Ben Hansen, would establish the Nebraska Student Savings Account Support Fund, which would provide up to $1,500 annually to students attending approved or accredited private, denominational or parochial K-12 schools. Uses of the funds could go for expenses such as tuition, fees, school supplies, educational therapies or any other materials approved by the State Board of Education. Private schools can be expensive where families must pay twice to educate their children through property taxes and school tuition. LB1386 had its public hearing on Jan 31, 2024. The committee has taken no action on the bill. **
**LB1027:
Laws regulating Nebraska schools that choose not to meet accreditation requirements would be relaxed under this bill. Sen. Robert Clements, who sponsored the bill reports the goal of the bill is to eliminate “cumbersome administrative barriers” for parents who educate their children in exempt schools.** **Under the bill, the application process to attend an exempt school would be the same as the requirement for public schools, with only one parent required to apply to the state Department of Education. Current law requires two parents or guardians to apply for their child to attend an exempt school.** **LB 1027 makes these changes:
1\. Allows one parent or guardian to apply to NDE for their child to attend an exempt school. This aligns the requirements of exempt schools with those of public schools.** **2\. Eliminates the annual renewal requirement for exempt schools to eliminate the significant delays, confusion, and burdensome workload placed upon parents and NDE. Renewal delays over the past few years have put parents in a legally nebulous situation each school year, leaving them unsure if they are allowed to continue to educate their child in an exempt school.** **LB 1027 will also make these additional changes to harmonize the statute with current NDE practice:** **1\. Remove language regarding subject matter testing for employees of exempt schools, which has never been applied by NDE. This aligns requirements for exempt school employees to those of public school teachers, who are no longer required to complete the Praxis exam.** **2\. Remove allowance for NDE visitation and inspection of exempt schools which has never been implemented.** **3\. Remove allowance for NDE achievement testing of exempt school students, which has also never been used.**
**During its public hearing on 1-22-2024, it had the support of several home school families. There was no testimony in opposition. The committee took no immediate action on it.** **LB1399:
Changes provisions relating to the involvement of parents, guardians, and educational decision makers in the education of their children. This bill had its hearing on 2-5-2024. The committee took no immediate action.
The intent and purpose of the bill is as follows:**
* **LB 1399 directs public school districts to develop a policy to provide transparency. Upon request by a parent, school districts would be required to provide access to certain school materials within 10 days of such request.**

* **LB 1399 would require school districts with a digital library check-out software to allow parents to opt-in to an email notification when a student checks out a book.**
* **LB 1399 would allow a parent to request to present on any material used by a school.**
* **LB 1399 would require parental notice to be given prior to the administration of a survey with the parent's ability to refuse consent.**

**School districts that would not be in compliance and have not made a good faith attempt to comply with these guidelines would be subject to appropriate remedial action within the Commissioner of Education's authority.** **LB1330:
The public hearing date is set for 2-13-2024 in room 1525 at 1:30 PM.
LB1330 aim is to prohibit public educational institutions from taking certain actions relating to diversity, equity, and inclusion. Public educational institution means the University of Nebraska, the state colleges, and the community colleges. ** **A bit of what the bill states is:
A public educational institution shall not:
(a) Require an employee to engage in a diversity, equity, and inclusion program;
(b) Spend public money on a diversity, equity, and inclusion program;
(c) Require, as a condition of a contract, participation in a diversity, equity, and inclusion program;
(d) Spend public money to acquire services, supplies, information technology, or goods for a diversity, equity, and inclusion program;
(e) Establish, support, sustain, or employ an office or individual whose duties include coordinating, creating, developing, designing, implementing, organizing, planning, or promoting diversity, equity, and inclusion programs.** **LB1339:
A bill to change provisions relating to possession of firearms in schools and authorize schools to provide emergency response mapping data to public safety agencies had it’s hearing on 2-6-2024.** **Safeguarding our children and school staff is the ultimate goal of this bill.** **The bill would eliminate a conflict in Nebraska statutes relating to the possession of firearms by off-duty and qualified retired law enforcement officers. This conflict of laws would be resolved by this bill in favor of officers being able to legally possess and carry firearms on school grounds and at school-sponsored events.** **Second, this bill would authorize the governing bodies of schools to adopt a written policy to utilize armed staff, faculty, or contractors for school security. Any such policy would be required to address personal qualifications, training, appropriate firearms and ammunition, and appropriate use of force. The bill leaves adoption of such a policy to local control.** **Third, the bill would provide that grants be available from the School Safety and Security Fund for the creation of school facilities maps for use by agencies providing an emergency response. The bill provides parameters for such maps to ensure interoperability with coordinating agencies.**
---
|
---
|
## LIFE & CONSTITUTIONAL FREEDOMS
---
| **##2024 Pro-Life ALERT##** If we do not clean up our Photo Voter ID to be _SPECIFIC_ to presenting the Photo ID as you __**CAST**__ your ballot, we will lose the Pro-Life battle in Nebraska for a long, long time. If we do not require a ballot be directly **HANDED or TURNED** into an election official while the voter **PRESENTS** a qualified **PHOTO ID** , our Nebraska Constitution will forever have Abortion as a _**Right**_ in Nebraska.

The ballot initiative to alter the Nebraska constitution will MORE than likely gain the sufficient petition signatures to be placed on our November ballots. Those who persist to enshrine Abortion as a Human Right will ballot harvest throughout **Lancaster, Douglas, and Sarpy** counties and they WILL get the 50% +1 "votes" they need.

__**The biggest Pro-Life bill for Nebraska in 2024 is Photo Voter ID requirements cleanup bill and we cannot amplify this message enough.

Save babies with a Photo Voter ID cleanup language.**__
**LB925:
A bill intended to prohibit government entities from contracting with businesses that discriminate against the firearms industry was considered by the Government, Military and Veterans Affairs Committee 2-1-2024.** **LB925 The bill would prohibit government entities from entering into any contract for goods or services with a company unless the contract includes a written certification that the company currently does not engage in discrimination against firearm entities or firearm trade associations.** **The bill’s provisions would not apply to contracts with a value of less than $100,000 or to companies with fewer than 10 full-time employees. ** **“Many successful businesses in the firearm and ammunition industries have faced discrimination by providers of financial services or insurance companies due to the very nature of their legal and regulatory-compliant businesses,” Aguilar, the bills sponsor, said.**
**LB1269 commonly referred to as the “Stand Your Ground” bill:
This bill changes provisions relating to the duty to retreat when using force in self-defense or defense of another and provide for criminal and civil immunity.** **Simply stated LB1269 seeks to make two changes.** **1\. NRS 28-1409 is amended to remove the duty to retreat and allows for use of force in self defense when an actor is legally allowed to be at a location.** **2\. Creates immunity from criminal prosecution or civil liability when an actor uses force in self defense as allowed in the amended NRS 28-1409.** **LB1060:** **This bill creates the option for a parent or guardian to refuse infant screenings over 60 genetic conditions.**
**Current law requires that all infants born in the state be screened for various genetic disorders before they can be released from a hospital or birthing facility. ** **While medical professionals in opposition to this bill state the importance of early detection, intervention and treatment, which often can prevent or minimize the development of severe symptoms and complications, others believe this is an issue of constitutional freedom to choose what medical care one receives. The bill has its public hearing on 1-31-2024. The committee took no immediate action.**
**LB308:
The Genetic Information Privacy Act, although sponsored by a democrat, is enjoying much Republican support. We at the NEGOP are watching this closely. On “face value” this appears to be a good bill. LB308 safeguards the privacy, confidentiality, security, and integrity of consumer genetic data. LB308 requires express consent for the sharing, storage, and usage of consumer genetic data by direct-to-consumer genetic testing services.

As genetic testing has become popular in recent years, it is said that approximately one in five Americans have taken one. These genetic testing kits are not regulated in the same manner as genetic data arising from medical tests, thus the need for regulation and consumer protections is needed.** **Under the bill, a direct-to-consumer genetic testing company could not disclose a consumer’s genetic data to any entity offering health, life or long-term care insurance or to an employer without written consent. The measure also would require a process by which consumers could delete their accounts and their genetic data. LB308 advanced to FINAL READING on 2-2-2024.**
---
|
---
|
## AGRICULTURE
---
| **LB1301
This bill would adopt the Foreign-owned Real Estate National Security Act and modernize existing statutes relating to the state’s restrictions on foreign persons or foreign-owned companies from owning agricultural land. ** **The bill would clarify and update the exemptions, enforcement mechanisms, and penalty provisions in Chapter 76, Article 4 to better secure Nebraska agriculture and safeguard sensitive military installations from the threats posed by foreign adversaries.** **Living in the heartland, many near me claim agricultural land and preserving it’s ownership to American citizens is a matter of National Security. I cannot disagree. ** **What I believe also needs to be considered and included in this bill is restrictions on foreign persons or companies from purchasing easements on our agricultural lands. Let’s hope and pray this bill gains steam and passes through the many stages and is signed by Gov. Pillen.**
---
|
---
|
## ECONOMY
---
| **LB872:
LB 872 would prohibit political subdivisions or state agencies from accepting a central bank digital currency (CBDC) as a method of cash payment of any tax, levy, excise, duty, custom, toll, interest, penalty, fine, license, fee, or assessment of whatever kind or nature.** **The programmable nature of a CBDC could be a threat to the privacy of citizens and also has the potential to be used by a centralized entity to control what we buy and sell.

The public hearing was on 1-5-2024. The committee took no immediate action.** **LB1302 - PUBLIC HEARING SET FOR 2-8-2024 at 1:30pm in Rm 1507:
LB 1302, The Cybersecurity Preparedness Act, gives power to and asks that the Office of the Chief Information Officer (OCIO) and specific political subdivisions to bolster cybersecurity. Support cybersecurity preparedness activities. Procure tools, hardware, software, or services that enhance or expand the state's cybersecurity defense and response capabilities. Strengthen and expand cyber risk management activities for the state. Expand vulnerability monitoring, identification, and management. Increase and maintain cyber incident response capabilities. Promote cybersecurity training and awareness within the state. Support cybersecurity workforce development within the state.** **LB1303 - PUBLIC HEARING SET FOR 2-8-2024 at 1:30pm in Rm 1507:** **LB1303 creates a position within the Nebraska State Patrol for an Ethical (White Hat) Hacker, for cybersecurity purposes.** **Both LB1302 & LB1303 are very much needed in today’s day and age. They both can assist in protecting our economy, our constitutional freedoms, our very way of life.**
---
|
---
|

Under the bill, the application process to attend an exempt school would be the same as the requirement for public schools, with only one parent required to apply to the state Department of Education. Current law requires two parents or guardians to apply for their child to attend an exempt school. LB 1027 makes these changes: 1\. Allows one parent or guardian to apply to NDE for their child to attend an exempt school. This aligns the requirements of exempt schools with those of public schools. 2\. Eliminates the annual renewal requirement for exempt schools to eliminate the significant delays, confusion, and burdensome workload placed upon parents and NDE. Renewal delays over the past few years have put parents in a legally nebulous situation each school year, leaving them unsure if they are allowed to continue to educate their child in an exempt school. LB 1027 will also make these additional changes to harmonize the statute with current NDE practice: 1\. Remove language regarding subject matter testing for employees of exempt schools, which has never been applied by NDE. This aligns requirements for exempt school employees to those of public school teachers, who are no longer required to complete the Praxis exam. 2\. Remove allowance for NDE visitation and inspection of exempt schools which has never been implemented. 3\. Remove allowance for NDE achievement testing of exempt school students, which has also never been used. During its public hearing on 1-22-2024, it had the support of several home school families. There was no testimony in opposition. The committee took no immediate action on it. LB1399: Changes provisions relating to the involvement of parents, guardians, and educational decision makers in the education of their children. This bill had its hearing on 2-5-2024. The committee took no immediate action. The intent and purpose of the bill is as follows: LB 1399 directs public school districts to develop a policy to provide transparency. Upon request by a parent, school districts would be required to provide access to certain school materials within 10 days of such request. LB 1399 would require school districts with a digital library check-out software to allow parents to opt-in to an email notification when a student checks out a book. LB 1399 would allow a parent to request to present on any material used by a school. LB 1399 would require parental notice to be given prior to the administration of a survey with the parent's ability to refuse consent. School districts that would not be in compliance and have not made a good faith attempt to comply with these guidelines would be subject to appropriate remedial action within the Commissioner of Education's authority. LB1330: The public hearing date is set for 2-13-2024 in room 1525 at 1:30 PM. LB1330 aim is to prohibit public educational institutions from taking certain actions relating to diversity, equity, and inclusion. Public educational institution means the University of Nebraska, the state colleges, and the community colleges. A bit of what the bill states is: A public educational institution shall not: (a) Require an employee to engage in a diversity, equity, and inclusion program; (b) Spend public money on a diversity, equity, and inclusion program; (c) Require, as a condition of a contract, participation in a diversity, equity, and inclusion program; (d) Spend public money to acquire services, supplies, information technology, or goods for a diversity, equity, and inclusion program; (e) Establish, support, sustain, or employ an office or individual whose duties include coordinating, creating, developing, designing, implementing, organizing, planning, or promoting diversity, equity, and inclusion programs. LB1339: A bill to change provisions relating to possession of firearms in schools and authorize schools to provide emergency response mapping data to public safety agencies had it’s hearing on 2-6-2024. Safeguarding our children and school staff is the ultimate goal of this bill. The bill would eliminate a conflict in Nebraska statutes relating to the possession of firearms by off-duty and qualified retired law enforcement officers. This conflict of laws would be resolved by this bill in favor of officers being able to legally possess and carry firearms on school grounds and at school-sponsored events. Second, this bill would authorize the governing bodies of schools to adopt a written policy to utilize armed staff, faculty, or contractors for school security. Any such policy would be required to address personal qualifications, training, appropriate firearms and ammunition, and appropriate use of force. The bill leaves adoption of such a policy to local control. Third, the bill would provide that grants be available from the School Safety and Security Fund for the creation of school facilities maps for use by agencies providing an emergency response. The bill provides parameters for such maps to ensure interoperability with coordinating agencies. | | LIFE & CONSTITUTIONAL FREEDOMS | ##2024 Pro-Life ALERT## If we do not clean up our Photo Voter ID to be SPECIFIC to presenting the Photo ID as you CAST your ballot, we will lose the Pro-Life battle in Nebraska for a long, long time. If we do not require a ballot be directly HANDED or TURNED into an election official while the voter PRESENTS a qualified PHOTO ID , our Nebraska Constitution will forever have Abortion as a Right in Nebraska. The ballot initiative to alter the Nebraska constitution will MORE than likely gain the sufficient petition signatures to be placed on our November ballots. Those who persist to enshrine Abortion as a Human Right will ballot harvest throughout Lancaster, Douglas, and Sarpy counties and they WILL get the 50% +1 "votes" they need. The biggest Pro-Life bill for Nebraska in 2024 is Photo Voter ID requirements cleanup bill and we cannot amplify this message enough. Save babies with a Photo Voter ID cleanup language. LB925: A bill intended to prohibit government entities from contracting with businesses that discriminate against the firearms industry was considered by the Government, Military and Veterans Affairs Committee 2-1-2024. LB925 The bill would prohibit government entities from entering into any contract for goods or services with a company unless the contract includes a written certification that the company currently does not engage in discrimination against firearm entities or firearm trade associations. The bill’s provisions would not apply to contracts with a value of less than $100,000 or to companies with fewer than 10 full-time employees. “Many successful businesses in the firearm and ammunition industries have faced discrimination by providers of financial services or insurance companies due to the very nature of their legal and regulatory-compliant businesses,” Aguilar, the bills sponsor, said. LB1269 commonly referred to as the “Stand Your Ground” bill: This bill changes provisions relating to the duty to retreat when using force in self-defense or defense of another and provide for criminal and civil immunity. Simply stated LB1269 seeks to make two changes. 1\. NRS 28-1409 is amended to remove the duty to retreat and allows for use of force in self defense when an actor is legally allowed to be at a location. 2\. Creates immunity from criminal prosecution or civil liability when an actor uses force in self defense as allowed in the amended NRS 28-1409. LB1060: This bill creates the option for a parent or guardian to refuse infant screenings over 60 genetic conditions. Current law requires that all infants born in the state be screened for various genetic disorders before they can be released from a hospital or birthing facility. While medical professionals in opposition to this bill state the importance of early detection, intervention and treatment, which often can prevent or minimize the development of severe symptoms and complications, others believe this is an issue of constitutional freedom to choose what medical care one receives. The bill has its public hearing on 1-31-2024. The committee took no immediate action. LB308: The Genetic Information Privacy Act, although sponsored by a democrat, is enjoying much Republican support. We at the NEGOP are watching this closely. On “face value” this appears to be a good bill. LB308 safeguards the privacy, confidentiality, security, and integrity of consumer genetic data. LB308 requires express consent for the sharing, storage, and usage of consumer genetic data by direct-to-consumer genetic testing services. As genetic testing has become popular in recent years, it is said that approximately one in five Americans have taken one. These genetic testing kits are not regulated in the same manner as genetic data arising from medical tests, thus the need for regulation and consumer protections is needed. Under the bill, a direct-to-consumer genetic testing company could not disclose a consumer’s genetic data to any entity offering health, life or long-term care insurance or to an employer without written consent. The measure also would require a process by which consumers could delete their accounts and their genetic data. LB308 advanced to FINAL READING on 2-2-2024. | | AGRICULTURE | LB1301 This bill would adopt the Foreign-owned Real Estate National Security Act and modernize existing statutes relating to the state’s restrictions on foreign persons or foreign-owned companies from owning agricultural land. The bill would clarify and update the exemptions, enforcement mechanisms, and penalty provisions in Chapter 76, Article 4 to better secure Nebraska agriculture and safeguard sensitive military installations from the threats posed by foreign adversaries. Living in the heartland, many near me claim agricultural land and preserving it’s ownership to American citizens is a matter of National Security. I cannot disagree. What I believe also needs to be considered and included in this bill is restrictions on foreign persons or companies from purchasing easements on our agricultural lands. Let’s hope and pray this bill gains steam and passes through the many stages and is signed by Gov. Pillen. | | ECONOMY | LB872: LB 872 would prohibit political subdivisions or state agencies from accepting a central bank digital currency (CBDC) as a method of cash payment of any tax, levy, excise, duty, custom, toll, interest, penalty, fine, license, fee, or assessment of whatever kind or nature. The programmable nature of a CBDC could be a threat to the privacy of citizens and also has the potential to be used by a centralized entity to control what we buy and sell. The public hearing was on 1-5-2024. The committee took no immediate action. LB1302 - PUBLIC HEARING SET FOR 2-8-2024 at 1:30pm in Rm 1507: LB 1302, The Cybersecurity Preparedness Act, gives power to and asks that the Office of the Chief Information Officer (OCIO) and specific political subdivisions to bolster cybersecurity. Support cybersecurity preparedness activities. Procure tools, hardware, software, or services that enhance or expand the state's cybersecurity defense and response capabilities. Strengthen and expand cyber risk management activities for the state. Expand vulnerability monitoring, identification, and management. Increase and maintain cyber incident response capabilities. Promote cybersecurity training and awareness within the state. Support cybersecurity workforce development within the state. LB1303 - PUBLIC HEARING SET FOR 2-8-2024 at 1:30pm in Rm 1507: LB1303 creates a position within the Nebraska State Patrol for an Ethical (White Hat) Hacker, for cybersecurity purposes. Both LB1302 & LB1303 are very much needed in today’s day and age. They both can assist in protecting our economy, our constitutional freedoms, our very way of life. | | PUBLIC HEARINGS | Here is a list of bills that have Public Hearings scheduled as of Monday, name: Working Families Party
subject: Drowning out the noise of right-wing attacks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | Peter, With internal documents showing a $90 million fundraising haul in the last three months of 2023, the right-wing group AIPAC has the resources this cycle to launch even more attacks on WFP champions calling for a ceasefire and humanitarian aid in Gaza. We can counter these attacks and beat AIPAC-funded challengers to WFP-endorsed champions including Reps. Ilhan Omar, Summer Lee, Jamaal Bowman, and Cori Bush. But it’s not going to be easy. **[In order to defend our congressional champions and elect new progressive leaders across the country, we need your help. Can you pitch in to help power our grassroots organizing in this critical election year?](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYU2BSceJx6ufgF06utrDRxnr_iV8j-MvHCMMkkEpEih-JuXzzCyj4IvwTfkbeYcSlTcPvkiCx_FZg01PqCetljApdx_-Td_32Ebwt7vvao7qSgQDm19aoxrrM-NLrrB3VD-YnOzs07bNyXJBXKg_ruGIG4PYgdy1zIrjnPKiqdJDHqurELXPdSZ0qtgrJQl5hSCd2fvp3AnODrERo2TLLmlj5U2k_fUqVTNFruqd3OZKbS_FCryQKVVKe1xc_TxgBAkATgvFWU1a5wNy6mQ7WZVM5E5UGWB_S-SHxI_zj6I7PIxKwIaGj15wl827i2u_aRhPwKjVruLUm-V5jEGjZXly8Tj5ZwGubJqFDF2E2iIkQC8-CmFr7qaKdOrk7WnfH3vwAtb5ASjTB9nXm_kF4moQ/43n/e0ztBg_iTeKwxtXU2NmlOg/h0/Mbgmz-_RHq6pR1wd0g7y4KLDa8kXOWmpolyWIcBt-sI)** **[Contribute $10 »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYU2BSceJx6ufgF06utrDRxnr_iV8j-MvHCMMkkEpEih-JuXzzCyj4IvwTfkbeYcSlTVJWM4j32W7rQjDvOS8VWHi7U6ghgVA8bwXcn2SlXdC0i46HRyKjXnAiAgwHawpoOSza9ENuC9t-SQS_5KRBUW9MJgEHttFm4jL-q0zMT8U9OM8aqfxOf6GQ6ycFxTkgJfzMwjJMNMo8rRJ9Hq1lKlPJz8NSYMP4OIjRoQ9WvFbR4bdNgvaDBVkTFQFcXADgN3uq5fVJLNDg-zUuzqD-g8WQlLkOemu6IOgnVNJkMwRSWn5d_Y444ydYrLIYdk2psxru5kHigFuizRkmzdukOJMNtMX42rlfcSJ3PM6NiuJhyxMHxxCRFZMRnBOvOAn_f-IopLCnaSvcAm2WXWCslIQ/43n/e0ztBg_iTeKwxtXU2NmlOg/h1/wcpj7o7HepRvDttscuqoHDsjtKZDncg1gEIYLezoNyQ)** In 2022, AIPAC and its super PACs spent more than $26 million on federal elections — much of which went to attacking WFP champions like Reps. Rashida Tlaib, Ilhan Omar, Summer Lee, Jamaal Bowman, Delia Ramirez, and Cori Bush. **This year, they reportedly plan to quadruple that spending with the help of megadonors like leaders of the Blackstone Group, Goldman Sachs, OnlyFans and other one-percenters.** And the members of Congress bravely calling for a ceasefire are going to be major targets. AIPAC’s CEO Howard Kohr recently told a donor-only meeting that they would have to “demonstrate in even more dramatic ways” their support for politicians who provide unconditional aid to Israel’s military during its siege on Gaza — which has already killed over 25,000 Palestinians, 70% of whom were women and children. **[We will continue to stand with leaders who stand up for what’s right — but we can’t do it alone. Can you make a contribution today to help continue building our grassroots movement across the country and ensuring that voters hear our champions’ message over the noise of right-wing spending?](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYU2BSceJx6ufgF06utrDRxnr_iV8j-MvHCMMkkEpEih-JuXzzCyj4IvwTfkbeYcSlT6hAz8tG5CBh-bdOm61CcdpfLHnehGR7JA5VFa4HKv3xc5A2uQLPNYynC6rSRXq-GjFVOllbKsdCoM6E2mAPaT43Mgg3r0A_TIIFK4zacLxMGokfOWctVYcfnwCAjSxIPhzydgN69FXyAZb5PS7hRMuEAymLg5LSkQRrY23Hu8v0pRTzBqs2BovVMhFptL716X5fTAGZHHP8VIQUOnMrEm-diuozjwayorboPmMNswBYOgamyx4AdxKGN3fEMqMhJkF8aSJy0vvzyFH6Kdj_k53-2F74SsxqZcQzYcKO31nglhPF5AcyUqX_7keS7NzpUtvIIA2jJx0cue8c3v5E8sg/43n/e0ztBg_iTeKwxtXU2NmlOg/h2/xjN4coxXULvv8uLLzXQj8E7zAMnbC1VBV83GkyAgdlE)** Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, **[sign up here.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDMdk0Xc5F3XT7oWSkA6eoLmBoUmYUo_wSdx0pFcnYTU0w_8AncWIqNan9U2nrgb-RoY_NfmPsDfBU9lMh4xb3eG5iGZflIlkgWSIeKo4Da9Xd7IfBN7c0K1I9IrXAcPPaLM0hkE1LNUe9pAsX4oRZepKV62OTPH9sdXYZQc5YXKk0s-mBJu66S9TYPa4Yu8g1oiMzUHiLf7LqFbGN_g30AX5tj8uM7D4N2CHS0sh99B_r3JYtmElEfXoY4huEwUiVhhbJt1zXJxEFY-6Xwi5HbQIeia8qbqi-Ufo1OF53EJk/43n/e0ztBg_iTeKwxtXU2NmlOg/h7/HkNewZqc643Rkf-AV0_ZKeT8iESGgdsYCZQCKPlaAvo)** The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. clean_body: | | | Peter, With internal documents showing a $90 million fundraising haul in the last three months of 2023, the right-wing group AIPAC has the resources this cycle to launch even more attacks on WFP champions calling for a ceasefire and humanitarian aid in Gaza. We can counter these attacks and beat AIPAC-funded challengers to WFP-endorsed champions including Reps. Ilhan Omar, Summer Lee, Jamaal Bowman, and Cori Bush. But it’s not going to be easy. In 2022, AIPAC and its super PACs spent more than $26 million on federal elections — much of which went to attacking WFP champions like Reps. Rashida Tlaib, Ilhan Omar, Summer Lee, Jamaal Bowman, Delia Ramirez, and Cori Bush. This year, they reportedly plan to quadruple that spending with the help of megadonors like leaders of the Blackstone Group, Goldman Sachs, OnlyFans and other one-percenters. And the members of Congress bravely calling for a ceasefire are going to be major targets. AIPAC’s CEO Howard Kohr recently told a donor-only meeting that they would have to “demonstrate in even more dramatic ways” their support for politicians who provide unconditional aid to Israel’s military during its siege on Gaza — which has already killed over 25,000 Palestinians, 70% of whom were women and children. In solidarity, Working Families Party Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . subject: The personal is political

body:
A proud Arizonan and lifelong Democrat, Conor O'Callaghan is running to represent Arizona's 1st Congressional District and unseat MAGA Republican David Schweikert. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://action.conorforaz.com/p/pKfVwCqeNUy4NM7F4Jx-eQ2?unsubscribedata=%2F%2Fd8IKmXb%2BRBzN6H4GfyfuY1RYtDuzGoT9OEo%2Fk5vaJ%2BX%2B3x%2BUT6A2mGb8d0XljYlyR5MhLnoL46es4K%2BMhCg9UTQ5M%2FPGOo6qkOfkTrKwPBa1F%2FJUcrOZWSrR1rwq7p1uhucuDPLHsDxwzrF6%2F22FVe0FOCGrrm5wTWtG%2Bf0f62DSdUlaaxFyQRFUVqQpEyEERy5OUDtWgYc0sXjVjfFIMKzVqG8DuhIQxdLQWrdmaDYHT6NE%2FCBhcMqx7s5QFVzeOwZG%2FJrP5ZZPrxlZ6WPKK%2FPWwdv1ACJBI%2F6MVycPX1mqYI8XP9PE9Dtcr72HlwCH7pnKLRasjeF5sN5YhwUBknw%2B9HCi6MIamtb3M9MGlRZL5LWpv8PIUNSjNtq%2FqXZf4uBtg8Ylr6Oo5epxGvY4YPwJtcIOLeeo9HlULPrKCaZJKi%2Bw7nU3hea%2B3VgsWe)

| |
---
Hi there, Peter. It's Tina O'Callaghan, Conor's wife. We are facing a critical juncture in the abortion debate, and I need your support to ensure that personal stories like mine are heard. In a recent op-ed I wrote for the _Arizona Capitol Times_ , I shared my deeply personal experience with a miscarriage and the crucial role that a medical procedure called Dilation and Evacuation (D&E) played in providing closure and preventing further complications. **But because of Republican extremists like our current Congressman David Schweikert, D &E could soon be permanently out of reach for Arizona women.** Conor and I have three wonderful boys, and we can't imagine how challenging it would be for women without access to the medical options we often take for granted. That's why, after the fall of _Roe v. Wade_ , Conor made a commitment to take action and run for Congress. **Unlike David Schweikert, Conor understands that the personal is political and that stories like mine matter.** If David Schweikert wins again in November, we're in danger of losing not only women's reproductive rights but also facing a crisis of common sense. We cannot take that chance. Your support is crucial in safeguarding women's rights. [**We are not Democrats or Republicans; we are women, and we deserve to be heard. Will you consider making a donation of $10 or $25 to Conor's campaign today? Together, we can make a difference and protect the reproductive rights of all women.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78592490/453854789/1674320777?amount=25&source=SBD_CO_EM_FR_020824_1_1_Tina&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc0NDIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWE4Njc2ZGEtZmFjNS1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzODQ4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=76UuLLoQB3-NTpKH0V3vQxIMQwGia3Hs8b30S3rilWM=) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.

clean_body: A proud Arizonan and lifelong Democrat, Conor O'Callaghan is running to represent Arizona's 1st Congressional District and unseat MAGA Republican David Schweikert. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Hi there, Peter. It's Tina O'Callaghan, Conor's wife. We are facing a critical juncture in the abortion debate, and I need your support to ensure that personal stories like mine are heard. In a recent op-ed I wrote for the Arizona Capitol Times , I shared my deeply personal experience with a miscarriage and the crucial role that a medical procedure called Dilation and Evacuation (D&E) played in providing closure and preventing further complications. But because of Republican extremists like our current Congressman David Schweikert, D &E could soon be permanently out of reach for Arizona women. Conor and I have three wonderful boys, and we can't imagine how challenging it would be for women without access to the medical options we often take for granted. That's why, after the fall of Roe v. Wade , Conor made a commitment to take action and run for Congress. Unlike David Schweikert, Conor understands that the personal is political and that stories like mine matter. If David Schweikert wins again in November, we're in danger of losing not only women's reproductive rights but also facing a crisis of common sense. We cannot take that chance. Your support is crucial in safeguarding women's rights. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for your time and support. Sincerely, Tina O'Callaghan On behalf of Conor O'Callaghan's Campaign for Congress | | | ---|---|--- = As a proud Arizonan and lifelong Democrat, Conor O'Callaghan is wholeheartedly committed to enshrining Roe v. Wade into law, safeguarding our communities against gun violence, addressing the urgent challenges posed by climate change and our water crisis, and ensuring our tax code is fair and equitable and works for small businesses and the middle class. name: =?utf-8?Q?John=20Teichert=20for=20Senate?=
subject: N. Dakota Senator Kevin Cramer Endorses John Teichert for U.S. Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Teichert for Senate]()
body:
| | | | |
---
**N. Dakota Senator Kevin Cramer Endorses John Teichert for U.S. Senate**
**BALTIMORE, Md.** – Retired Brigadier General and candidate for U.S. Senate, John Teichert, has been met with overwhelming support from state senators, state delegates, law enforcement officials, and more. Today, he’s proud to add U.S. Senator Kevin Cramer of North Dakota to his list of endorsers.
Senator Cramer commended General Teichert for his years of service in his statement of endorsement, stating in part, “As a member of the Senate Armed Services Committee, I know how important it is to have strong and principled leaders who can defend our nation and uphold our values. This is why I am endorsing General John Teichert for U.S. Senate in Maryland.”
The senator further praised the 33-year Air Force veteran by saying, “General Teichert is a decorated combat veteran, a visionary innovator, and a proven commander who has served our country with honor and distinction for over 30 years. He has the experience, the courage, and the integrity to represent Maryland and fight for our common interests in Washington. He also has the experience, the vision, and the integrity to lead Maryland forward in these challenging times."
Senator Cramer’s endorsement, among others, is yet another testament to Teichert’s strong leadership and principled policy stances; reminding Marylanders of why he is the only suitable candidate to represent their needs in the federal government.
# # #
|

**[I am 400% impact matching every donation before the end of the day to gain major ground on the Radical Left!](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=a0dced7138ae4f58b31c844ac15ba8d9&_e=koZtp-hq8kckJystyaiZ2KRUfNTLdFYET4c7hrgc84ACHdNreDlQS-1zRuiR2B1SX3gicsfE7zLxkMjYGodjnamS2AjnNdJKQaMlcsXzl8hEHQuRnaLgNvUo0SNcOMBMtHfYEPDI3prGr8XbSN3OWKAobuUDv5Gr04FnDvrWwZzHQ-xg7BchEaFkupiAuw0xfxZFADgO5eua6auZuDYSkx0Wdrp3YRsm6wPyp-Lt3Rn8PAOoUkbNP47bjIwddC3VOicP7QvGg3OdZ56T6-lk-uSBRCFR3TeuoVA-h1T20hJ3qINxmIV5pkLKs6IfM_kRqLcF_ymWTBZYJu3gTFNIP9pE3S69f9x7jYszwpn_FFVIk0qCLwV9f8VXPBztKzeCou9SuoDtxjqK5pvdHApzO0aOTExgDeMXRKXMCtKTd7A%3D)**
