Fellow American, I received some concerning news, and I'm asking you to read this entire memo about the state of my re-election campaign. My Democrat opponent just filed to run against me in Kentucky's first congressional district and it is alarming.
| [ **RE-ELECT COMER** ](http://links.thegopreport.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=66e04bded93b41f39065bdd401287db2&_e=n8Ephkk7r5Lb6IU4GPGQwMd1RwyUS37CY5CW8KN2J-jGkX9UyoD_Q1vk1EXoUEpzMtlstXoaOdacxUQ3kVVFop8OMqws54H-49B1iNfSqZgBfzzE6EO2DZzt85amML_wqtxTrAZTnl5hZIUDFihVOElm40Alp4JTsnVIluOlejdOMneqybpgkwuoqEBvGHW4IdRm2Xu5ZTXDrVd7YnAf_w8uVqWmu7s34IDKDYb0RLWyYJRcDrJ6Xk8YG4FfEHRgKnoyaROesBTAcAzZx4tMdwxzQaqeBIDwJGF-Tfsd1xyIFv2LV-7MI8kjZmuB21Ck)
---
My opponent is a Far-Left activist who worked for the Hillary Clinton campaign, and she's already raising tons of money on ActBlue from liberal online donors around the country. She is determined to defeat me and end my investigation once and for all. **You and I both know we can 't let that happen.** But it's not only that. She's hired Amy McGrath's campaign manager. You may not remember Amy McGrath, but I sure do. McGrath raised $88 Million dollars in her 2020 campaign for Kentucky Senate. **$88,000,000!**
| [ **RE-ELECT COMER** ](http://links.thegopreport.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=66e04bded93b41f39065bdd401287db2&_e=n8Ephkk7r5Lb6IU4GPGQwMd1RwyUS37CY5CW8KN2J-jGkX9UyoD_Q1vk1EXoUEpzMtlstXoaOdacxUQ3kVVFop8OMqws54H-49B1iNfSqZgBfzzE6EO2DZzt85amML_wqtxTrAZTnl5hZIUDFihVOElm40Alp4JTsnVIluOlejfDAT1cCh2Zm-ESgcpPYaHhwkZetODpwtWIfEvq-CD98Z4WhVExR2zr-qGnlu7qGPs-fB18zeUUfjcXGdfj7Eez9BukOMpm7vTex3KTLKUNJFRgKZwWfC9w4QU-I89OoMgZJ130S-HBauvNku7ATCf6)
---
That's an astounding amount of money, and her campaign manager's rolodex is stuffed to the brim with democrat mega-donors chomping at the bit to take me down. They know their investment in the Biden administration is at serious risk due to the findings of my investigation, and they will do whatever it takes to defeat me in November and end my inquiry into the Biden Family's corruption racket and cover-up. I'm asking everyone who reads this memo to stand with me today as my 2024 campaign kicks off in earnest. We must show national Democrats that our campaign is strong enough to weather anything... _or this campaign could get really rough for me in the fall._ If you're able, I'd love to have your renewed support. Thank you for everything, James Comer
| [ **RE-ELECT COMER** ](http://links.thegopreport.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=66e04bded93b41f39065bdd401287db2&_e=n8Ephkk7r5Lb6IU4GPGQwMd1RwyUS37CY5CW8KN2J-jGkX9UyoD_Q1vk1EXoUEpzMtlstXoaOdacxUQ3kVVFop8OMqws54H-49B1iNfSqZgBfzzE6EO2DZzt85amML_wqtxTrAZTnl5hZIUDFihVOElm40Alp4JTsnVIluOlejflh25gUk_gQCruFaj-cMhJ7rmwK7zFy0PZGWSxT7u7gjZ_wEBJwskTJXlgCEyg9vs4VUd06h9o0WozSYVONLxR6FMOVLF3Gkp6adjkxj1EXwH_EnkKuEfJAmWD7igWV60iIiG4Cr6UwMsH23bH49n7)

_Cook Political Report_ has rated all four of these races as _toss ups_. I'm keeping a close eye on these races, Peter, and here's why you should too:
* Arizona became a swing state after Democrats won in 2020's presidential election by less than three points. That means that **Marlene Galán-Woods (AZ-01)** and **Kirsten Engel's (AZ-06)** races against their Republican incumbent opponents will be hard-fought.
* New York's 4th Congressional District and Oregon's 5th Congressional District were flipped by Republicans in the 2022 midterms, and this year, they're anyone's game. **Laura Gillen (NY-04)** and **Janelle Bynum (OR-05)** can help Democrats regain both seats this November, but they'll need our help to get the job done.

name: Katie Porter
subject: My newly released Housing for All plan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
We urgently need to drive down costs, here’s how to do it.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=37386%2E3422442%2EqxNT88)
Today I’m releasing my **Housing for All plan** —to urgently build more homes, bring down and stabilize rental costs, and increase homeownership opportunities for Californians.
Housing is the top issue for Californians, but career politicians in Washington have been too slow to provide solutions. I saw this firsthand as a consumer protection attorney on the front lines of the foreclosure crisis, and now as a parent who doesn’t want my kids to leave California just because they can’t afford to live here. **My Housing for All plan is below—[if you’d prefer to watch me break it down on my whiteboard, click here.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240207-1?refcode=em20240207-37386&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=37386_3422442_qxNT88&akid=37386%2E3422442%2EqxNT88)**
1. **Create a Select Committee on Housing:** Despite a decades-long housing crisis, Congress has no committee solely focused on increasing housing and reducing costs. I’ll create and lead a committee that delivers the housing solutions that California’s communities and families need, not just what boosts Wall Street’s profits.
2. **Urgently increase the supply of homes for purchase:** It’s virtually impossible to develop starter homes profitably and at scale, so I’ll push for improved tax credits and government loan guarantees, which will spur Wall Street to provide financing for homes that working people can actually afford.
3. **Washington must close the housing gap for low-income families:** High costs push people into homelessness or housing instability. We should fully fund housing rental vouchers for the most severely housing-burdened families. To address the wealth inequalities that limit first-time homeowners, particularly people of color, we should make a federal investment in tools like down payment assistance and interest rate buy-downs.
4. **Unleash private capital for home construction:** In the 1930s, Congress established government-sponsored enterprises (today known as Fannie Mae, Freddie Mac, and Ginnie Mae) to connect Wall Street capital to everyday Americans, who previously could not get mortgages. The result was a rocketing homeownership rate. We should expand these structures to guarantee the construction of one-to-four unit starter homes. With strong oversight, these agencies can tap into global capital markets to scale up the construction of modest-density homes that working people can afford to buy.
5. **Break down local barriers:** Solving the housing crisis requires all levels of government to engage. I’ll give incentives to communities that make it cheaper to build all the kinds of housing Californians need. Costs go up when cities require certain home styles or building materials, or impose oppressive rules like mandatory parking requirements.
6. **Unlock government land:** I’ll press federal, state, and local agencies to release large swaths of buildable land that they own.
7. **Encourage innovative homebuyer programs:** Innovative mortgage lending programs can stop house prices from spiraling out of control. I’ll make it easier to form “land trusts,” in which communities and homebuyers share in the value of home appreciation. The land trust’s share of the appreciation is then used to lower entry costs for future homeowners in the development, creating a virtuous cycle of affordable homeownership for the future.
8. **Develop leases for Californians with fixed incomes:** I’ll support new kinds of leases that help Californians who aren’t served well by traditional rental agreements. Seniors should be able to put down a small portion of their retirement savings in exchange for locking in long-term rental rates that don’t outpace Social Security’s cost of living adjustments. We should also develop a government-backed program for four-year leases that allow college students to lock in rental costs during their time in college.
9. **Invest in modern home manufacturing technologies:** We have been manufacturing homes the same way for decades. I’ll make it easier for builders to develop and use the latest manufacturing techniques, like 3-D printed homes, which can reduce the cost of producing homes by 30% or more, and create high-paying, union jobs. These modern techniques are energy-efficient and use climate-resilient materials.
10. **Protect homebuyers from Wall Street greed:** Increasingly, Wall Street firms are buying up houses, driving up rental prices and preventing families from buying a home. I’ll tax firms that buy up large numbers of homes so that we put an end to this trend.

**[Derek, can you please be one of the first people to endorse this plan?](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-housing-for-all-plan/?source=em20240207-37386&t=2&akid=37386%2E3422442%2EqxNT88)**
[Endorse Katie’s Housing For All Plan](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-housing-for-all-plan/?source=em20240207-37386&t=3&akid=37386%2E3422442%2EqxNT88)
I’ve made housing the top issue of my campaign since day one because Californians can’t wait any longer. Washington must act, and I’ll lead the fight to get this done. I’m so grateful to have you on our team.
Katie Porter
P.S. I have no problem standing up to Wall Street to get this done because I don’t take a dime from corporate PACs or Big Bank CEOs. I will only be elected to the U.S. Senate because of grassroots support, and so anything you can give today will be especially meaningful. [Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240207-1?refcode=em20240207-37386&refcode2=37386_3422442_qxNT88&akid=37386%2E3422442%2EqxNT88)
---

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=em20240207-37386&amounts=&t=4&refcode2=37386_3422442_qxNT88&akid=37386%2E3422442%2EqxNT88)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=5&akid=37386%2E3422442%2EqxNT88)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=37386%2E3422442%2EqxNT88)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

Senate Democrats on Tuesday blocked the passage of a resolution that would deem the influx of illegal entries by foreign nationals over the southern border an “invasion.” Since the Biden administration assumed office, millions of foreign nationals have illegally entered the country and been apprehended by the U.S. Border Patrol.

Read more https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683094%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ip6mX4BfqNCEnNeqEpiNsg&sysid=1

The “None of These Candidates” option received more support than former U.N. Ambassador Nikki Haley in the Nevada Republican presidential primary on Tuesday, according to The Associated Press. Haley chose to compete in the state-run primary rather than the Nevada GOP-run caucus, which former President Donald Trump is participating in on Thursday instead.

show your thanks!
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/61634?t=6&akid=12838%2E878179%2E-lYKKS) We can’t believe how much Biden has done for our country, so we’re sending him a HUGE card to thank him for his hard work!

[**So you’ve been personally selected to sign our letter thanking President Biden for fighting for the American people! Please, we need 10,000 signatures by midnight to demonstrate massive support! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/61634?t=7&akid=12838%2E878179%2E-lYKKS) | [Donate $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/61634?t=8&akid=12838%2E878179%2E-lYKKS)
---
TO: President Biden
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: I’m so grateful.

**Dear President Biden,

I’m so thankful for everything you’ve done as President!

**Despite MAGA turmoil, over the last three years, you’ve fought TIRELESSLY for the American people — defending abortion rights, confirming an incredible Supreme Court Justice, saving Social Security from GOP cuts, and creating millions of jobs for the people.**

I know standing up to MAGA Republican attacks isn’t easy, but it is always the right thing to do.

So as the 2024 race kicks into high gear, I wanted to show my support and thank you for being such an amazing leader for our country!

[**I hope you know that there are MILLIONS of us across the nation who stand with you. That’s why I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to thank you and to keep electing incredible Democrats up and down the ballot »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/61634?t=9&akid=12838%2E878179%2E-lYKKS)** | [SPACE RUNNING OUT: Donate $3 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/61634?t=10&akid=12838%2E878179%2E-lYKKS)
---

| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=12838%2E878179%2E-lYKKS). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=12838%2E878179%2E-lYKKS).**

This is our FIRST major test of this election year and everyone will be watching to see how we perform. By retaking New York’s Third Congressional District, after George Santos brought shame to the halls of Congress for far too long, we will send a clear message to extreme Republicans: Your days in power are numbered. Let’s flip this seat blue and hand Republicans their first massive defeat of the year. >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78593716/453859143/85248897?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4790-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTY4ODQzZS1mZGM1LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjM4NDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ILcGgkLTRMorfZIlsv8DGl7DO84h38b1qM8DNkidbhQ=)_
I need you to understand three critical things:
**1. **The election to replace serial fraudster George Santos is 6 days away.

**2.** The latest poll shows Tom Suozzi is within striking distance of winning this special election.

**3.** Republicans are looking at this same poll and scheming ways to flood the airwaves with attack ads to retake the lead at the last second.
**I need a historic response – 592 donations before midnight – to fend off every GOP smear and build a strong foundation to reclaim the House.**

body:
If you have been waiting for the absolute perfect time... | | |
---
Peter -- If you have been waiting for the absolute perfect time to make your first online donation to President Biden's reelection campaign, we are here to tell you that TODAY is that day. Why today? There are the obvious reasons: defense of democracy, abortion access, protecting the Affordable Care Act, and not letting Trump back into the White House for four more years of division and destruction. But there's also the practical reason: we have very real fundraising goals we need to reach in order to win. These are not arbitrary goals. They are numbers we must reach to fund a campaign that can beat what Trump and the outside groups are spending to beat us. And the fact is, almost all of our donations come in response to emails and texts like these. The President doesn't expect anyone to give to every email we send. But right now we're in danger of falling behind on our goals for February, so he's really hoping you'll give to this one. What do you say? clean_body: If you have been waiting for the absolute perfect time... | | | Peter -- If you have been waiting for the absolute perfect time to make your first online donation to President Biden's reelection campaign, we are here to tell you that TODAY is that day. Why today? There are the obvious reasons: defense of democracy, abortion access, protecting the Affordable Care Act, and not letting Trump back into the White House for four more years of division and destruction. But there's also the practical reason: we have very real fundraising goals we need to reach in order to win. These are not arbitrary goals. They are numbers we must reach to fund a campaign that can beat what Trump and the outside groups are spending to beat us. And the fact is, almost all of our donations come in response to emails and texts like these. The President doesn't expect anyone to give to every email we send. But right now we're in danger of falling behind on our goals for February, so he's really hoping you'll give to this one. What do you say? | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thank you in advance for stepping up to help the President today. The response to these messages is so important. Team Joe

name: Adam Schiff
subject: We really need to hit this goal by midnight
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=5385%2E5257348%2Ec4TOCX)
Derek, we set an emergency fundraising goal to raise **$150,000 before midnight _tonight_**. Before I update you on our progress, here’s why:
**California is the most populous state in the nation.**
With over 22 million registered voters and not one, not _**two**_ , not **_three_** , but **_FOUR_** of the nation’s 50 most expensive media markets, it costs an arm and a leg to run even one week of advertising.
And with 27 candidates and multi-millionaire Republican Steve Garvey surging in this race, we can’t afford the budget crunch we’ll be facing if we don’t reach this midnight fundraising goal.
**[Derek, my finance team tells me we’re about two-thirds of the way to our $150,000 midnight goal. I’m personally counting on your support to get us there. Can you pitch in $10?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=feb2024_abs_em.yNAKTE&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240207_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=4&akid=5385%2E5257348%2Ec4TOCX)**

clean_body: House Republicans embarrassed themselves again yesterday | | Dear Peter, House Republicans embarrassed themselves again yesterday by bringing a ridiculous vote to the floor to impeach Homeland Security Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas — and then ultimately didn’t even have the votes to pass the measure. Like Becca always says, House Republicans have a majority in name only. There are countless pressing issues facing our nation right now, but Republicans are instead wasting time and taxpayer dollars doing absolutely nothing. name: Nikki Block
subject: Introducing myself
disclaimer_text: paid for by the DFL House Caucus DFL House Caucus
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dflhc-feb24?refcode=020724 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dflhc-feb24?refcode=020724]
Hi friend,
I ’m Nikki Block, field director for the Minnesota House DFL campaign. I worked as part of our field team in 2020 and am excited to be back to help protect our House DFL majority. We’ve seen what a DFL trifecta can do: protect abortion access, fund public education, invest in state infrastructure, create a paid family medical leave program, and more. But we’ve also seen what extreme MAGA Republicans are doing across the country: banning abortion, defunding schools, prioritizing large corporations over individuals. If we want to keep that from happening in Minnesota, we need to protect our House DFL majority.
A big part of my job is making sure we get out and talk to Minnesotans about what is at stake this election. We’ll be hiring one of our largest staffs so we can talk with as many Minnesotans as possible. Hiring and training good staff takes money though. If we want to continue investing in the future of Minnesota, we need the resources to run a strong campaign.
Friend, we need your help. Will you donate $10, $25, $75, or even $150 dollars today to help protect and expand our House DFL majority?
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Donate $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dflhc-feb24?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=020724]
Donate $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dflhc-feb24?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=020724]
Donate $75 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dflhc-feb24?express_lane=true&amount=75&refcode=020724]
Donate $150 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dflhc-feb24?express_lane=true&amount=150&refcode=020724]
Or, another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dflhc-feb24?express_lane_other=true&refcode=020724]
T hanks, friend. I’m excited to see what we can accomplish working together in 2024. With your support, I know we will be able to make a Minnesota that works better for everyone.
Nikki Block
Field Director
Minnesota House DFL

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e8796f3bc88b45b481963ab1e54ebfbe&_e=9ZYT9pvz-lL-IKENJuyPpfY15tH5N2PN7iJa_X7R7a2z6rDUBJ66yh9b1SzEoB3ldck9nUCqePZYNEmY4gnZVXnMaOFHTU5uVS-pVB-2MzqfiWKSv93SC6TSdK2bP-XX4-efxOoZZygFqq8quPSIIsQymW_Ayli_VIzNytkpIGoGgU18HmJy5i0eHBDOu0TJ0oxwN-ATwe1rR-uAf4-nXRB_emwDHbswODX0yWByz7Sfk_4U935GpZIoep6kBKS3ZFYUwnRry1ZMPQxl_ODSFjbopQv5AnDLTuTYzHUrMh0Nx5R6TnAO-03opYD1zgv5Dt8RWWcoJXeZr9fA3dc9DBmE_UYwgrVY59IOJBMZ3GAviLv6cdo9oZMDxE0_Lcm2DJfD7eFdPjoLn72aC3KspQ%3D%3D)

| Peter,

Our Republican House Majority could come down to **Marc Molinaro.**

When Marc flipped NY-19 RED by just 1.7% in 2022, he laid the blueprint for taking back districts that Democrats had controlled for years.

Now, the Democrats are out for revenge. Defeating Marc is critical to their larger goal of retaking the House Majority. And I don’t need to tell you that this race will be EXTREMELY CLOSE.

[**We need every grassroots Conservative to rally behind Marc**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e8796f3bc88b45b481963ab1e54ebfbe&_e=9ZYT9pvz-lL-IKENJuyPpfY15tH5N2PN7iJa_X7R7a2z6rDUBJ66yh9b1SzEoB3ldck9nUCqePZYNEmY4gnZVXnMaOFHTU5uVS-pVB-2MzqfiWKSv93SC6TSdK2bP-XX4-efxOoZZygFqq8quPSIIsQymW_Ayli_VIzNytkpIGoGgU18HmJy5i0eHBDOu0TJ0oxwN-ATwe1rR-uAf4-nXRB_emwDHbswODX0yWByz7Sfk_4U935GpZIoep6kBKS33BddT0h0Bwv1dseGVVx99qAa_XC5arcRF49AKg2Eg2uUr19TvfqOOiLzVag2Po6R64XHxyLVluLUBe3A5bpsZgZV0EFDfWoxrqfX-INmXSwstSj3ku9kaiKXQ58SOTufVsGWWh0wdhp9Ra8w7pfKFg%3D%3D) as he takes on the full weight of the Democrat fundraising machine in 2024. It’s plain and simple. We can’t afford to lose this seat. Every dollar donated will matter. Thank you, Steve Scalise House Majority Leader | | Paid for by Marc for US

### Nevada Caucus is 1 Day Away!
Tomorrow is the Nevada Caucus, the only event in the state where candidates can earn delegates for the Republican Convention. Ryan is one of only two candidates on the Caucus ballot. If you live in Nevada, cast your vote for Ryan tomorrow.
|
####
**In the News**

---
| | [ ](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=aa86a99ebc&e=c1403f41d3)
---
### Ryan Shoots for Nevada
The Last Vegas Sun published an article about Binkley's efforts in Nevada ahead of the caucus. While acknowledging he's a 'long-shot,' Ryan remains optimistic and will not back out of the race. [___Read here_](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=bc3a594303&e=c1403f41d3)

|
####
**Coming Up**

---
| |
---
### Nevada Caucus Telephone Townhall
On the eve of the Caucus, Ryan wants to answer your questions and discuss his plans for America. Call 855-756-7520 and enter the number 102332. The call starts at 7:30 PT.
---
|
### Events in Nevada
Check out these other events happening tomorrow:

4235 S Fort Apache Rd #250, Las Vegas, NV 89147

860 E Twain Ave Suite #130, Las Vegas, NV 89169

subject: Let’s celebrate and PROTECT women in sports!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Burchett for Congress**
body:
| | | |
---
| | [](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=3154240f6ba845b9823f5991e65bb437&_e=00e3Bja70TcHmNyCc0e1tYgzkwfSudp2hwqSI-KNyRKny8lRW4E90bo48jsBuy85Fd9HD79txLdk8QTXuWV7LhKBp7yMNyF5dDaEAlrRO7ZQDJRiBdjpAX1CkQqmantLGHd03Qb4c_539_kUAkdsiJMIija1nNnGkvMbcfvDemxrco9qD7ZK-QP6hvekcinrhSYnV7qIThR84sY55ZLOmFKNF7dL3IVOmWmRZ0PQYYZMD_aSRROtd5-PpgxBuI8T0LjuqpFcLkuf_W4x7mAfGih1knSV-PaHyzTyak-HOGe876JTHCPzoqRdxcfkcCpkGSRKKzR6Y9hEsd_wLkTTTgEHidak2ja_oyp_oYRalRM%3D)
---
| | Friend, Today is [National Girls & Women in Sports Day](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=3154240f6ba845b9823f5991e65bb437&_e=00e3Bja70TcHmNyCc0e1tXeu67dMDZNFtXJlq3EaJwW68LFqZtYoySIBjyrOGlpZZkXkv5geDR08xYgseSRgOiucu5EvbEULVhzt9SWFRrOpZPpOpRZjX6XzEHPpaSNv0z4Gt_9aktX8lOC2VJ5_eTKVVQZ4oXOm_4ync_BNy_QXkIwnKhJH6CmMq-uyXcNo2cNe5UQc6NDw1Z41WyXbxrSAKIzPZjGs456399h3MKDAaAueWMefjDdnTYfhV2UE), and there has never been a more crucial time to double down in support of this occasion. I’ve watched my daughter, Isabel compete in various sports over the years, and I stand firmly with young ladies like her who deserve a shot at some fair and square competition. The radical Left continues to degrade women’s sports at nearly every level by allowing [biological men](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=3154240f6ba845b9823f5991e65bb437&_e=00e3Bja70TcHmNyCc0e1tSMDAse8IcWcuUZ4GgFb3kOAzj1Y4RmFddRHn71VWkchpRzzXz60VCmC6z_Hl3IsdIp5g_H7tzQngu8eMnUPOPBMQdtH32rSuAHjQSHkeB4X6uLtFVBAd9SpId55juvyhIY9FPX_N-oA2RLOMlf0dBmHcwR2tk_xSgK1rtImW6LdWzQBVv5T3NtzEfSQ-j6Phyeo8mYqasn0alT5xhJIsRCbzRbaiyofEpdmL-ur813TAQwZzxCJZfhaVkvsfMeySsAr0Rrl9F2T-hC9gsYFh9Q%3D) to compete in their arena. It’s not fair or [safe](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=3154240f6ba845b9823f5991e65bb437&_e=00e3Bja70TcHmNyCc0e1tda9sGdPKKnwkTFS1i2nZSEx-fAHhjn5zaTPLYIxnbu0ewbbo7Qa8ZUe7IaDdsNHD-D0xXzbc6YJevW6v-XievJjEj2DcjKu84HI9MN8I2k3C45GhjVUk1Ed7JiqXfy8SjpoAluEZItoKRNf5SLFCvhVEmRzKR9MFvxm3QMWwiAQyXgzFPYE_gHEnETZk2UNBf1TxvYVDgVZnuiNmtCjErAblZbURkGGqj0mu6fU_Lwv11_kMr6S-OqzCjk83ZFWJMgth4XmkTDpTEcC8500HToqNsVNW4Wmac5D9Ii22giy)—and it’s a slap in the face of any progress this country has made when it comes to women’s rights. This is why I welcome every opportunity to shine a light on this issue, including a recent [hearing](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=3154240f6ba845b9823f5991e65bb437&_e=00e3Bja70TcHmNyCc0e1tV7UNHwN9wsNKOJ5yMrn9i5fte1dOmleInqBXWw7djgSnpyZFPY9bhCIAUmYb56Tw0FBFSCUR2Y3wrb53Ogm0_HTsXURFAe2fHisy0MUzVhjjmvBrfPj9K4s__n0F-qMDeqIyHS8U1Njlel_12JmhiTEj7rTx0dMPOkN8-HHmNiLghavHkinqPls7vOLzNvY6sE0Y4mxyzPcasszMta19x_lC2cIzgpyiBr9X7i7eqBxOngicIq0YRc9c4ifhb92u6Y8a3o4nXH4HDOAoZuXHN5SjKlu8Q1pniKvN784hZ6MC7NJgSvRHFXdEDyFECIf7w%3D%3D) on Capitol Hill. I want my daughter and every other girl across the country to know that hard work does pay off, which is why I won’t let progressive radicals continue their assault on women’s sports. **[Will you show your support as I continue to tackle this important issue? We can’t back down, especially when it concerns our daughters.](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=3154240f6ba845b9823f5991e65bb437&_e=00e3Bja70TcHmNyCc0e1tYgzkwfSudp2hwqSI-KNyRKny8lRW4E90bo48jsBuy85Fd9HD79txLdk8QTXuWV7LhKBp7yMNyF5dDaEAlrRO7ZQDJRiBdjpAX1CkQqmantLGHd03Qb4c_539_kUAkdsiJMIija1nNnGkvMbcfvDemxrco9qD7ZK-QP6hvekcinrhSYnV7qIThR84sY55ZLOmAAFgJFNBcPVAYjTJpXmBOzhRI-LUUEs-Jm04_XDlTe14GFOuVTkqlcy4yCs6AWVEJAsVnakiMyKWiUwHn_gqQ_HBJtyU36BVwWa12A9IhwUIWkKwFrvceZqtvDZRWzmxL6irf8afG8WXybsIdQ1_qs%3D)**
---
[ **Take A Stand With Me**](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=3154240f6ba845b9823f5991e65bb437&_e=00e3Bja70TcHmNyCc0e1tYgzkwfSudp2hwqSI-KNyRKny8lRW4E90bo48jsBuy85Fd9HD79txLdk8QTXuWV7LhKBp7yMNyF5dDaEAlrRO7ZQDJRiBdjpAX1CkQqmantLGHd03Qb4c_539_kUAkdsiJMIija1nNnGkvMbcfvDemxrco9qD7ZK-QP6hvekcinrhSYnV7qIThR84sY55ZLOmGUyt7KEMF4OfiqgVWFahg2xDuUQRFEI4H2_UtHH7JbpIep8ny-jUifCM3uR10fycryhS7autBCk70UQsVXCsoGwvPt5jIuxog8lte72et_UnLZwgl2qsXf6lGVyBJnnYNVIoV9X0igC-Gw2W4HHipQ%3D)
---
To all of the girls and women across America, thank you for your contributions in sports—and I will continue to fight for you! Sincerely,

Tim Burchett

body:
We outraised John Lee almost 6x |
---
| | [ ](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=3e55a2100f&e=273c9a71fb)
---
| Peter,

The battlelines are drawn and it has become abundantly clear that there are two sides to this conflict.

_Grassroots conservatives like you and me._

VS.

_Liberal Establishment Elites._

I have one opponent in this Republican primary, and the Liberal Establishment Elites are behind him.

Well I am pleased to announced that despite all the wealthy special interests behind him, **we beat them at their own game:**

[****](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=d57f2cbfd6&e=273c9a71fb)

Thanks to countless patriots like you, Peter, we were able to outraise liberal Democrat Mayor John Lee BY NEARLY SIX TIMES OVER!

This is incredible! I’m no career politician like John Lee who has been in office for decades, I’m just an Air Force Combat veteran who started a business. This campaign has always been about putting America First. Strong Leadership and Small Government.

I won’t lie to you, the other side will see this and probably want to double down on their investment but I got something they never counted on that has always come through for me.

[**COUNTLESS PATRIOTS LIKE YOU.**](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=3ade453f12&e=273c9a71fb)

I know you have already been generous, and thanks to you we got this far, [_but I still need your help._](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=0a32c2081e&e=273c9a71fb)

[Donate what you can](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=c29ad85eb3&e=273c9a71fb) and if you can’t donate, [p](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=7298298f82&e=273c9a71fb)[lease volunteer for our campaign so we can take our message out to voters that is already resonating with so many people.](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=172ddea5c8&e=273c9a71fb)

clean_body: We outraised John Lee almost 6x | | | | Peter, The battlelines are drawn and it has become abundantly clear that there are two sides to this conflict. Grassroots conservatives like you and me. VS. Liberal Establishment Elites. I have one opponent in this Republican primary, and the Liberal Establishment Elites are behind him. Well I am pleased to announced that despite all the wealthy special interests behind him, we beat them at their own game: Thanks to countless patriots like you, Peter, we were able to outraise liberal Democrat Mayor John Lee BY NEARLY SIX TIMES OVER! This is incredible! I’m no career politician like John Lee who has been in office for decades, I’m just an Air Force Combat veteran who started a business. This campaign has always been about putting America First. Strong Leadership and Small Government. I won’t lie to you, the other side will see this and probably want to double down on their investment but I got something they never counted on that has always come through for me. I know you have already been generous, and thanks to you we got this far, and if you can’t donate, | | For America, | | David Flippo, Lt. Col. (USAF Ret.) Candidate for U.S. Congress, NV-4 | | | | | | | | | | | | "Paid for by The Committee To Elect David Flippo" | | Copyright © 2024 Committee To Elect David Flippo, All rights reserved.

body:
VOTE MACKENZIE APRIL 23rd

https://www.mackenzieforcongress.com/

** THE MACKENZIE MINUTE
------------------------------------------------------------

Fellow American,

Thanks to our amazing volunteers, #TeamMackenzie had another great week!

We were able to submit another round of petitions. We want to add to that number though, so if you are still circulating petitions for me please start getting them back to the campaign by Saturday, February 10th. You can call my campaign (484) 347-8777 or mail it to the campaign at Mackenzie For Congress, P.O. BOX 747, Emmaus, PA 18049. We will be filing the final batch of petitions on Tuesday, February 13th.

I’m also happy to say that we were able to add another great local endorsement for my candidacy.
* Macungie Council President Ron Karboski Endorsement
* Petition Return Events
* Around PA-7

Thank you again to everyone who is working so hard to help us.

All the Best,

RYAN MACKENZIE

Macungie Council President Ron Karboski Endorsement

I am happy to receive the endorsement of Macungie Council President Ron Karboski.

Ron said “In my capacity as Macungie Borough Council President, Ryan has been a wealth of information and resources that have essentially helped me navigate through many tough decisions.

As long as I have known Ryan, he has had a vested interest and genuine passion for the Macungie Borough residents and the surrounding area.

During my 13-plus years working for the Borough of Macungie, Ryan and his team have always been known to be the highest of character, a measure of excellence, and people whom Macungians could always count on.”

-Ron Karboski

PETITION RETURN EVENTS

Please join my campaign (Tomorrow) Thursday, February 8th or Friday, February 9th to return any final petitions you may have or bring other Republicans who may want to sign. Details for both events are below.

Thursday, February 8th between 6:00 pm and 8:00 pm

Delizioso Italian Grill | 1985 Brookside Rd. Macungie, PA 18062

Friday, February 9th between 6:00 pm and 7:30 pm

Casa Mia Pizzeria | Saucon Valley Square 3711 PA-378, Bethlehem, PA

AROUND PA-7

#TeamMackenzie and I continue to work hard every single day to spread Republican victories across our communities and up-and-down the ballot. Please become a team member today to help us be successful. name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: Two American Dream stories
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dave McCormick
body:
I’m reaching out to share two stories about the American Dream.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_s=c44112fb54a4407893c89b1ea22199ea&_t=e0EcoeRQLTDN5cHTmasBMGdXy5QlmwzlSKrzoeTy-TkrzM7jU-BExxg0BCkFgCedK1oSKsXl2yj4wYgDOQ2HoVBoGRPoroH6VlJWPRLdjfk%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_s=c44112fb54a4407893c89b1ea22199ea&_t=e0EcoeRQLTDN5cHTmasBMGdXy5QlmwzlSKrzoeTy-TkrzM7jU-BExxg0BCkFgCedK1oSKsXl2yj4wYgDOQ2HoVBoGRPoroH6VlJWPRLdjfk%3D)

Friend,

I'm reaching out to share two stories about the American Dream.

One is about a 19-year-old boy who won $5,000 in the lottery and used that money to start his own business, Kevin O's Deli, out of his uncle's yogurt shop in Bakersfield, CA. That is how he put himself through college. He learned how hard it was for small business owners to handle all the government regulations, tedious paperwork, and burdensome taxes while also trying to actually run the business.

**This also motivated him to get into politics so that he could change the system.** He started in college, then moved to the state level, then the national level by serving in Congress, and finally reached the top by becoming Speaker of the House of Representatives.

You've probably guessed it, this American Dream story is my story, and I am so grateful for the opportunities that America offers so that I could live it.__**_But I am worried that this American Dream is slipping away and not possible in Biden 's America._ So is my friend Dave McCormick.**

Dave has also been able to live his own American Dream story in Pennsylvania. Dave is a 7th-generation Pennsylvanian who was recruited to wrestle at West Point. After serving in the 82nd Airborne in Iraq, Dave was able to grow a business in Pittsburgh, then serve in the highest levels of government, and finally run one of the largest financial institutions in the world. Talk about an inspiration!

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=c44112fb54a4407893c89b1ea22199ea&_e=N4XXtdEDbVTKDnaBDRfmhQyeb53kGGI-Kyrpl-XSDaOz5MxE60fQFqPdSmoS_F4nvjTpEttQTkYALE-mDuUX8uvQ6_rloTZmv4t1u5JlZHeKWKgss8-SzzI35ltr2fmdB9HosOpkGDa-XltmTdbAH-l7nC0gXIKugoN4j8lTl6IgNph0FvMW22x77rT_Ak_-09iCS3sYgnJyDgYXTgkAewTfHLSpfg9hkDLqPQLxspzjTUozrr0ffK5kZ6vN53UNt2l0ZkUn5JeDXqtGdApKutjRZXm7pOh2iPGyO9ZayAExe5ypCRSUmuiYpJNCN3jnk4yWIWrDZMpclkYuexzinoqIla9VBB39DxSBkfl5D7w%3D)

But Dave and I are not content to end it with our stories. **We want to ensure that this next generation can live their own American Dream stories. That is why Dave is running for Senate in Pennsylvania.**

_A recent WSJ poll said that only 36% of voters said that the American Dream still holds true, which is down from 53% in 2012.**We should be concerned about this.**_

**That 's why I am supporting Dave and hope you will, too.**

Dave wants to shake things up in Washington by cutting rampant spending and inflation, projecting American strength abroad, securing our border, and implementing common sense ideas.

I truly believe this is what we need to turn our country around and restore the promise of the American Dream. Dave has lived it and he appreciates it, so we need to help him fight for it.

[Will you join me in supporting Dave today?](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=c44112fb54a4407893c89b1ea22199ea&_e=N4XXtdEDbVTKDnaBDRfmhQyeb53kGGI-Kyrpl-XSDaOz5MxE60fQFqPdSmoS_F4nvjTpEttQTkYALE-mDuUX8uvQ6_rloTZmv4t1u5JlZHeKWKgss8-SzzI35ltr2fmdB9HosOpkGDa-XltmTdbAH-l7nC0gXIKugoN4j8lTl6IgNph0FvMW22x77rT_Ak_-09iCS3sYgnJyDgYXTgkAey4NrkJ2ozvPFRmpxEOPqnIcUvhOtGf01zNxCl5FSJI8l_n7rtS3v3qrtbI5-DHtAlSu3EY7ZyZ0FJgQ0fW4As1AiseK8IELScxQeXygLIzVik43ttPsgKFiEgOIpNJ156svBhR0qEC3mlRWzABUwuI%3D) **[Just chip in $15 and we can send this battle-tested leader to return a hopeful and prosperous future for our next generation.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=c44112fb54a4407893c89b1ea22199ea&_e=N4XXtdEDbVTKDnaBDRfmhQyeb53kGGI-Kyrpl-XSDaOz5MxE60fQFqPdSmoS_F4nvjTpEttQTkYALE-mDuUX8uvQ6_rloTZmv4t1u5JlZHeKWKgss8-SzzI35ltr2fmdB9HosOpkGDa-XltmTdbAH-l7nC0gXIKugoN4j8lTl6IgNph0FvMW22x77rT_Ak_-09iCS3sYgnJyDgYXTgkAe1HBV6hrXr_jlRzDU7Ppjm8gvCmNnMAJOUP9Jgdktqh7ZIThkvKL6hQesfQnNI6a6JcFfz1cLDmC7NVlqLJUBmwW-ZJNa17SzI3x8ABDLkLhHWpyxhe_DXDT9M7aQTLXBIa00kIS_SS6igeuEceue1U%3D)**

Thank you,
Kevin McCarthy
55th Speaker of the House of Representatives
[DONATE](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=c44112fb54a4407893c89b1ea22199ea&_e=N4XXtdEDbVTKDnaBDRfmhQyeb53kGGI-Kyrpl-XSDaOz5MxE60fQFqPdSmoS_F4nvjTpEttQTkYALE-mDuUX8uvQ6_rloTZmv4t1u5JlZHeKWKgss8-SzzI35ltr2fmdB9HosOpkGDa-XltmTdbAH-l7nC0gXIKugoN4j8lTl6IgNph0FvMW22x77rT_Ak_-09iCS3sYgnJyDgYXTgkAe0c2q5PB-i6oz_PIdyjbVnZqd6kg6qloymzkBAQCxI_y6vR5lPlY0bBxxZeiVv1C5mng9qnyy1irOXyS8mi_SIzkntNRENdixua75nrM1LNDxUUZIvCVN8qHR-l3YY4T3og1V9rOj5r0pKfs_o1IAHE%3D)
---

[Privacy Policy](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=c44112fb54a4407893c89b1ea22199ea&_e=N4XXtdEDbVTKDnaBDRfmhfJoSfR4H72hd8dY1Ttu7cE9Z-iz04LoKrpiK9fCKjjx-qs_dF5ydDXtf-99zDA9vGP9zGtbgvX94u1qeslNbc0wWvf7YStXx2qhD5_OTzxpy_2r-1eQDu2es-5oHuD7OiHpNXqsV-vVR6oPU318Z7mYR01rKgRwu-CiAfnvU90Y8yfLmrw4DJphRIryOxQM6_SXgVJ2ONBRYQJx4iVim_c%3D)

name: Team Lucas Kunce
subject: Our record-breaking coalition of working people to defeat Josh Hawley
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Lucas just earned another major endorsement.
#
Peter — over the last year, Lucas Kunce has built a record-breaking coalition of working people to defeat Josh Hawley and flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat.
He’s earned support from leaders across the state, major national organizations like End Citizens United and the League of Conservation Voters, and he’s united Missouri’s election-winning labor movement behind his campaign, with support from dozens of local unions and the earliest endorsements for a Senate challenger ever from statewide unions like the Missouri AFL-CIO + the Missouri Fire Fighters.
**[ENDORSE LUCAS →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/lk-email-20240207_endorse-lucas?t=1&akid=4771%2E614464%2EFni4VL)**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/lk-email-20240207_endorse-lucas?t=2&akid=4771%2E614464%2EFni4VL)
Earlier this week, the Missouri Kansas Laborers District Council, which represents over 12,000 members working in construction or the public sector, became the latest union to endorse Lucas — the only real warrior for working people in this race.
**[Will you join thousands of workers and everyday people across Missouri by adding your personal endorsement of Lucas Kunce today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/lk-email-20240207_endorse-lucas?t=3&akid=4771%2E614464%2EFni4VL)**
**[ENDORSE LUCAS →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/lk-email-20240207_endorse-lucas?t=4&akid=4771%2E614464%2EFni4VL)**
When you add your name to personally endorse Lucas, make a donation of any amount toward our campaign, or even just share Lucas’ message with your family and friends, you’re helping us continue to build a powerful movement capable of defeating Josh Hawley and flipping this Senate seat on November 5.
Thanks for everything,
Team Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20240207-4771-footer&t=5&refcode2=4771_614464_Fni4VL&akid=4771%2E614464%2EFni4VL)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/lucaskuncemo/) | [](https://twitter.com/lucaskuncemo) | [](https://www.instagram.com/lucaskuncemo/)
Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=4771%2E614464%2EFni4VL). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

body:
We must fight for fairness in women's sports! | |
---
| | | [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=e7995424e3&e=1050d051da)
---
| Patriot,

Women and girls are losing the chance to compete in sports fairly.

Liberals in the swamp can't even define what a woman is but yet they are **HELLBENT** on allowing biological men to play for girls' sports teams, share sleeping quarters, and use female locker rooms. **It’s disgusting, unfair, and un-American.**
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=b31cbc5b94&e=1050d051da)

---
| On National Girls & Women in Sports Day, I am reaffirming my commitment to ending this madness and demanding fairness and safety for women as they compete in sports. I proudly voted to pass the **Protection of Women and Girls in Sports Act** to solidify women’s rights under Title IX and cut funding from public schools that do not comply.

name: Sharice Davids
subject: I need to hear from you on this
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
| Hi, I wanted to fill you in:

**Last week, I voted in support of major bipartisan tax cuts for middle-class families and small businesses across Kansas.**

This is a big deal—and it’s already passed the House. Before I tell you more, can you fill me in on your thoughts on this legislation by answering my one-minute survey before the end of the week? | **[Answer now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78595996/453866637/-767113922?source=EM_NBI_SD_20240207_SV_1.1_0_3MO_candidate_NA_NA_taxbill&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDFiMTc3Yi0wNGM2LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjM4NDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EJWjSAN-Y17QgvljHtWJIMdpQMxXgWA84t5cmCeY5x4=&emci=481b177b-04c6-ee11-b660-002248223848&emdi=541b177b-04c6-ee11-b660-002248223848&ceid=22117458)**
---

Here’s some of the big pieces of this bill:

→ It includes an **expansion of the Child Tax Credit** which will benefit nearly 150,000 children in Kansas

→ It supports **local small businesses to help them compete globally**

→ It has components that focus on **enhancing affordable housing**

I have been consistent in Congress: I will work with anyone regardless of party to get results for Kansas working families. With extremists in charge in the House, it took a lot of work to make this measure successful.

**_[As it makes its way to the Senate, I want to hear from you: Which of these provisions will make the biggest difference in your life? Answer before the end of this week to have your response recorded→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78595999/453866645/-767113922?source=EM_NBI_SD_20240207_SV_1.1_0_3MO_candidate_NA_NA_taxbill&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDFiMTc3Yi0wNGM2LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjM4NDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EJWjSAN-Y17QgvljHtWJIMdpQMxXgWA84t5cmCeY5x4=&emci=481b177b-04c6-ee11-b660-002248223848&emdi=541b177b-04c6-ee11-b660-002248223848&ceid=22117458)_**

Your input is crucial, in understanding what I need to prioritize to support you and your families best. That’s why I’m asking to hear from you.

**_[https://act.shariceforcongress.com/a/tax-cuts](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78596001/453866648/-767113922?source=EM_NBI_SD_20240207_SV_1.1_0_3MO_candidate_NA_NA_taxbill&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDFiMTc3Yi0wNGM2LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjM4NDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EJWjSAN-Y17QgvljHtWJIMdpQMxXgWA84t5cmCeY5x4=&emci=481b177b-04c6-ee11-b660-002248223848&emdi=541b177b-04c6-ee11-b660-002248223848&ceid=22117458)_**

Thanks,

Sharice

name: Col. Mike Waltz
subject: Terrorism on TikTok?!
body:
| | | [](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=aafc90293d8c415aa923e81e569e2fa3&_e=hGulsr1mG77IF1C4903cC2Nc767dx3DlLlQPqk9XeGZuVpisxbi9xo9cr48XM_VzcMEalpJBsve5fajukWjSoELigA26sj9cPPVolOOFBATJt5e8SPJuy9Uq2O1yCNgQ8w_L3RfjgFb3r2PGxbrlFmy1O_p0VPsM2oVIEkskgLRDMCjwG2k2ip6WhC0492j3kgydsPVETrPIjAtuhBFBMRz7EAZ6pTOdAILG1W_NACMZEr289mRg-1fiJ6FOAqxoMzDbyVI1oWDn8pUQwdv4qeU0ZX7E5GucfrlyXTgLJg8%3D)

As a veteran, a congressman, and a parent, I'm extremely disturbed.

Our kids are being inundated with **pro-terrorist messaging on TikTok.**

From defending Hamas to _even praising Al Qaeda_ , these messages are extremely dangerous to the next generation.

**I 'm taking action to STOP this new wave of terrorist sympathy in America, but I want your opinion. **

name: [RAPID RESPONSE] via Team Keir
subject: BREAKING: Florida AG plans to ask Supreme Court to block abortion ballot
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KEIR FOR AG
body:

body:
It’s time to hold extremists messing with abortion rights accountable
Peter, I'm writing today to share some news.
**My friend Gina Ortiz Jones – a fellow Texan and progressive – is launching a new organization called _Find Out PAC_. They are dedicated to holding three Texas Supreme Court justices accountable for their attacks on abortion rights and reproductive freedom.**
**These partisan judges F’d around with abortion rights, now they’re going to _FIND OUT_.**
Abortion access is in a state of emergency in Texas and across the nation.**[Can you chip in whatever you can to split a donation between Find Out PAC and Team Casar to help power this work and deliver progress on abortion rights?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78596282/453867741/195526504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlY2NjNTE3Ny0wNWM2LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjM4NDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EmDUS8EC7YlUsq0lK75wraRpRzXmX2Psq2Ta0g0XGfM=)**

Texas has become a testing ground for some of the most extreme far-right policies. And Texas’s near-total abortion ban—and the Texas Supreme Court’s enforcement of it—is no different.
Last month, the Texas Supreme Court told a pregnant mother of two that she wasn’t close enough to death or infertility to qualify for the state’s medical exception to the state’s abortion ban. Really?**Because her DOCTOR thought she was.**
Three extremist justices on the Texas Supreme Court – Jimmy Blacklock, John Devine, and Jane Bland – are up for reelection in 2024.
**We have the opportunity, and the responsibility, to send a message to these officials that gutting reproductive freedoms will cost you at the ballot box.**
[**Consider making a split donation today to support Team Casar and help get Gina’s Find Out PAC off the ground. They’ll be fighting to defeat TX Supreme Court extremists at the ballot box, and they’ll need all the help they can get from dedicated folks like you.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78596286/453867745/195526504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlY2NjNTE3Ny0wNWM2LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjM4NDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EmDUS8EC7YlUsq0lK75wraRpRzXmX2Psq2Ta0g0XGfM=)

Thank you,
-Greg
****

clean_body: It’s time to hold extremists messing with abortion rights accountable Peter, I'm writing today to share some news. My friend Gina Ortiz Jones – a fellow Texan and progressive – is launching a new organization called Find Out PAC. They are dedicated to holding three Texas Supreme Court justices accountable for their attacks on abortion rights and reproductive freedom. These partisan judges F’d around with abortion rights, now they’re going to FIND OUT. Abortion access is in a state of emergency in Texas and across the nation.= **= Texas has become a testing ground for some of the most extreme far-right policies. And Texas’s near-total abortion ban—and the Texas Supreme Court’s enforcement of it—is no different. Last month, the Texas Supreme Court told a pregnant mother of two that she wasn’t close enough to death or infertility to qualify for the state’s medical exception to the state’s abortion ban. Really?Because her DOCTOR thought she was. Three extremist justices on the Texas Supreme Court – Jimmy Blacklock, John Devine, and Jane Bland – are up for reelection in 2024. We have the opportunity, and the responsibility, to send a message to these officials that gutting reproductive freedoms will cost you at the ballot box. = Thank you, -Greg Greg Casar Congressman Texas Congressional District 35 ****=** | ****** ---|---

Friend, I thought I was done with politics. I’d have been happy to never see the inside of the Capitol again. I was ready to devote my full attention to my cybersecurity career in the private sector. But when duty calls, I answer. This is Mike Rogers, and when I left Congress in 2015, I truly thought I’d never run for office again. But our country has a lot of problems and I can’t in good conscience sit on the sidelines. **-A practically nonexistent southern border** **-Chinese threats breathing down our necks** **-More inflation than a busy tire shop** **[That’s why I’ve made the decision to run for the U.S. Senate in Michigan–and I need your help to win.](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=79aa7c6b2d1e42d09beb1d0caa86be35&_e=W3WsEeZF_GXnGgHU4s2Dx-VzoPh3EJudWLhl6s7itRbOF3mX1vR8Amj2a9dPKaCiePF--I_Z-fdQArCMxXxeRbNY8QWWFjwDYViwuDVJikvXZ-Dsdlj5xoVfwfPk1UsMQXPigtkaFdvQu4n5kXv7E0Ies1OqkpKS8FigCFouAdRKwqFJ5Nzo-fN8A4B8Mln6vZizdfq1FEON2lex3rN5qJfOKSyngAXtR8VN8fqsgy4l4mvb28bxrsmx4cJbNmIM9NepKByJZK6KSwOucnhy2rTI-OPg1XCLHWRwEg6jhLom7IgVGRZSjdSDOc4F8SBX8p9VI95WcFeOAU75eodbXwA4EI57yPOZ2yrV0pV9sRnpdcZUQYWqWUokvltlL3WqY_NafUapf7UNnERrENRZCg%3D%3D)** Friend, I’ll be blunt: If Democrats stay in power for another two years, America as we know it could cease to exist. And Chuck Schumer’s handpicked-candidate Elissa Slotkin has already raised **MILLIONS** of dollars to defeat me. **Here are three reasons you should invest in saving America's future by helping me defeat the radical Democrats in Michigan (whether you’re from California, Texas, Florida, or Hawaii)** 1: **Michigan is the only open seat that’s truly up for grabs by either party.** With no incumbent running, this is one of the best opportunities to flip a seat from blue to red. 2: **As goes Michigan, so goes America.** In 2008, 2012, 2016, and 2020, the party that won Michigan took **BOTH** the White House and The Senate. If WE take Michigan this year, it virtually guarantees that Chuck Schumer and Joe Biden will lose their power. 3: **This race is going to be CLOSE.** I won my first House election by about 100 votes. This year’s Senate election could be decided by even less! Your donation of $10 could help us reach HUNDREDS of voters and could be the difference between 4 more years of total Democrat control and a TOTAL Republican VICTORY! So, Friend, can I count on you to **[**contribute any amount**](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=79aa7c6b2d1e42d09beb1d0caa86be35&_e=W3WsEeZF_GXnGgHU4s2Dx-VzoPh3EJudWLhl6s7itRbOF3mX1vR8Amj2a9dPKaCiePF--I_Z-fdQArCMxXxeRbNY8QWWFjwDYViwuDVJikvXZ-Dsdlj5xoVfwfPk1UsMQXPigtkaFdvQu4n5kXv7E0Ies1OqkpKS8FigCFouAdRKwqFJ5Nzo-fN8A4B8Mln6vZizdfq1FEON2lex3rN5qJfOKSyngAXtR8VN8fqsgy4l4mvb28bxrsmx4cJbNmIMolxwbZacnr5App7zPDoStFWOgeeNykbIIhIC7VwoVVldy5jmn3hB7qAowmWEf0buyL05hXJ5k2HyYWcZAel33csS2EV7u81EtbIB1Qo2R6-FqxBTCTZtuMTCzmidSv-QZigyILQd27zwddxrQpeXTg%3D%3D)** to make sure our country is in the **RIGHT** hands? Anything you can give will be monumental in helping us win. Thanks for your support. Sincerely, Mike

clean_body: Former U.S. attorney thinks it's “likely” Trump will be disqualified from the Ballot. | | Peter, It’s former Navy SEAL and current U.S. Senate candidate Tim Sheehy with a brief warning for you today: The Supreme Court is on the verge of allowing states to kick President Trump off their ballots. The result of a Supreme Court verdict barring a former commander-in-chief from running for public office would be both horrific and historic. Never in the history of our Republic has one individual been more vilified than Donald J. Trump. My opponent wants Trump off the ballot because he knows with President Trump at the top of the ticket, he’ll lose his seat in the Senate. National Democrats want President Trump off the ballot because they know that if he’s given a fair shot at winning back the White House, he’ll have next to no trouble beating Joe Biden. As a Navy SEAL , I have a knack for reading people, and I can tell you that having met President Trump, he is a patriot through and through.Donald Trump LOVES America , and we cannot let Democrats remove him from the ballot because they know they can’t beat him. I’m working to gather at least 1 million signatures before Trump appears before the Supreme Court on Thursday, urging them to smack down the sham effort to remove Trump from your ballot in November. Please Stand with President Trump by telling the Supreme Court to instruct ALL 50 STATES to allow President Trump’s name to appear on your ballot this November. For America's Future, Tim Sheehy Former Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate P.S. TRUMP'S HEARING IS TOMORROW. DON'T WAIT. name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: The hypocrisy on immigration, explained
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1114%2E135344%2En3i0Kk)

Friend,
A few weeks ago, I sent you an email detailing DC Republican leaders’ hypocrisy on immigration: After more than a year of saying that immigration and border security are their number one priority, they are now refusing to support a bipartisan deal -- or anything else, until after the 2024 election.
Why?
Because Donald Trump opposes the deal. He doesn’t want a deal because then he can’t use immigration as the #1 issue in his campaign. And the rest of the GOP leadership all started flipping on the compromise, and trashing the very deal they themselves had asked for, and then negotiated. It was sad to watch up close, and to watch them go after the very leaders they had asked to negotiate on their behalf. All because they were scared, to a man, to even slightly contradict Donald Trump.
I joined local TV this week to talk about the absurdity of immigration politics right now. [**You can watch that interview by clicking here.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/2182?t=2&akid=1114%2E135344%2En3i0Kk)
**[WATCH NOW](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/2182?t=3&akid=1114%2E135344%2En3i0Kk)**
Thank you,
Elissa Slotkin

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
P.O. Box 4145
East Lansing, MI 48826
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=1114%2E135344%2En3i0Kk).

[ Sign up here to receive fewer emails.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/signup/users-fewer-emails/?t=5&akid=1114%2E135344%2En3i0Kk)

Elissa Slotkin served in the Central Intelligence Agency and the Department of Defense. Use of her job titles and photographs during service do not imply endorsement by the Central Intelligence Agency OR the Department of Defense.

subject: THIS SATURDAY: Fight for the Common Good
body:
Battle Creek petition drive THIS SATURDAY and a recognition from Vote Common Good. | | | | |
---
# BATTLE CREEK PETITION DRIVE IS JUST TWO DAYS AWAY!
Reminder: Team Alfonso will be in Battle Creek this Saturday collecting petition signatures to get Joseph Alfonso on the ballot this August. We are on our way to reaching our goal of 2000 signatures—however, the work is far from over. We need YOUR help THIS SATURDAY to cross the finish line.
**Where: Café Rica: 62 E Michigan Ave, Battle Creek, MI 49015****When: February 10th from 2 pm to 3:30 pm**
Please share with family and friends in the area!
# VOTE COMMON GOOD RECOGNITION
**Vote Common Good** recently recognized Joseph Alfonso as a **Candidate for Common Good.**

### What is Vote Common Good?
Vote Common Good champions a values-driven approach to politics. They focus on energizing people of faith to make **common good** their voting criteria. Here’s what makes this recognition so unique:
1. **Guided by the Common Good:** Candidates endorsed by Vote Common Good commit to leading with values consistent with the common good. This means they prioritize policies and governance that benefit everyone, not just a select few.
2. **Non-Partisan and Inclusive:** Vote Common Good’s recognition is non-partisan. It transcends party lines, focusing on candidates who genuinely seek to serve their communities and uphold shared values.
3. **The Love in Politics Pledge :** Joseph Alfonso has taken the [Vote Common Good Love In Politics Pledge](https://alfonsoforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bb75364011dcc8a637f1fdd6f&id=0e8efd0667&e=16d812e81c). By doing so, he pledges to govern with compassion, empathy, and a commitment to justice.

###
As we move forward, Joseph will continue to advocate for policies that promote affordable healthcare, quality education, environmental stewardship, and economic justice. His alignment with Vote Common Good reinforces our campaign’s mission: to create positive change for all.
Sincerely, The Alfonso for Congress Team

| [GIVE TODAY](https://alfonsoforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bb75364011dcc8a637f1fdd6f&id=d3e3e31df3&e=16d812e81c)
---
| [GET INVOLVED](https://alfonsoforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bb75364011dcc8a637f1fdd6f&id=bd8bdc63af&e=16d812e81c)
---

name: James Comer
subject: 40 FBI Informants --
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Comer for Congress**
body:
In the Biden Family
|
---
| [ ](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=98517d316b684198bb444c909b17a8e6&_e=Ps9iTWyGvaYWIYhcdlXJszUv_WBsxmxBZIhedbKrqe41Zj5GCTketBesLLor14YREUYvVQ-7YaLlAq3NWGXO_4AaGgQ8w1RE3oItQJ_8GbPkZxwAmAfLeuXZsI5MozDiHbENtLF57OaM-mPNq0P7YFjph1d0J84Ltf97ZZ81LOCyXSRpcc5eHSA3wsyp8fVwuho0OiPZ-Q9dxdlkDIEt-9DLcolKg8HBkZzU_dOAur_ng5QAhQ6tA3LXOjgzLx5gzKaXYumD-9dEooABmJlHOtd4TQpYXtZn-4YYHxEUqgQMVgQuv-ZUm3zHeC3NDbSvejDdHJE1UDje4VdEHcSTLmhtpjUNd1i3RdyNdiTynK7HU2hQxnOcM_S5xcnhSgXS)
---
Friend, Just a year ago, it was unfathomable to me that I would be writing this email. It's a bit long, but I would ask you to read it in its entirety. I spent a lot of time writing it and did my best to make every word count. I write it with great sadness and astonishment, sadness for our country which I hold so dear, and astonishment at Joe Biden's desecration of the Oath of Office he took with his hand on the Bible in front of the world. **It has come to light that the Federal Bureau of Investigation has had 40 informants inside the Biden family over the past 15 years.** For 15 years, Credible Informants have been providing criminal information against the Biden's to FBI Field Offices across the country, and for 15 years, everytime the information has been brought to FBI HQ, the leadership of the FBI shuts it down. But it's not just the FBI, it's the Department of Justice as well. I heard sworn witness testimony that the Biden Bribery allegations on the FD-1023 Form were CREDIBLE, and that he referred the criminal matters originating from it to three separate U.S. Attorney's offices in Brookly, Manhattan and Delaware for further investigation. Then, just like at the FBI, nothing happened. **As I 've been saying since I started this investigation; the allegations about Joe Biden are being covered up... because they are TRUE!** While words don't have any meaning to the Left, they still mean something to me and the law in this country. **CONSPIRACY NOUN** con*spir*a*cy An agreement between two or more people to commit an illegal act, along with an intent to achieve the agreement's goal. The media loves to talk about how Republicans believe in "conspiracy theories" like the Russian-Collusion Hoax, the origins of COVID, and the Steele-Dossier... _but they sure have been silent about the conspiracy at the highest levels of government to cover up the expansive criminal operation being run by the Biden Crime Family._
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=98517d316b684198bb444c909b17a8e6&_e=Ps9iTWyGvaYWIYhcdlXJszUv_WBsxmxBZIhedbKrqe41Zj5GCTketBesLLor14YREUYvVQ-7YaLlAq3NWGXO_4AaGgQ8w1RE3oItQJ_8GbPkZxwAmAfLeuXZsI5MozDiHbENtLF57OaM-mPNq0P7YFjph1d0J84Ltf97ZZ81LOCyXSRpcc5eHSA3wsyp8fVwuho0OiPZ-Q9dxdlkDIEt-9DLcolKg8HBkZzU_dOAur8d2yOFstGgnmonLx0q0YtwL65IqpjLG9oImkt_vB5e-hnbdDstyPwGi1mtIGH2qTLhtbXDRvRsl3HQf-HVN5ViqbyE7_EYWW82NMSqXD622vZdQ-OC5Mvcq3LCskJ6qmNO-h_s1C_KdxBwhx5WoMrP)
---
It's because they are complicit in the cover-up. I've said it before, and it's more true today than ever before; I am facing down and exposing the rotten corruption of the most powerful and unholy triumvirate in American history, the Biden Family, the Federal Bureaucracy, and the Corporate Media. They are hellbent on stopping my investigation and they are throwing everything they have at me. **I 'll be honest, it is brutal... but I'm a country boy from West Kentucky who was taught to stand up for what's right, and who certainly doesn't back down from a fight.**
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=98517d316b684198bb444c909b17a8e6&_e=Ps9iTWyGvaYWIYhcdlXJszUv_WBsxmxBZIhedbKrqe41Zj5GCTketBesLLor14YREUYvVQ-7YaLlAq3NWGXO_4AaGgQ8w1RE3oItQJ_8GbPkZxwAmAfLeuXZsI5MozDiHbENtLF57OaM-mPNq0P7YFjph1d0J84Ltf97ZZ81LOCyXSRpcc5eHSA3wsyp8fVwuho0OiPZ-Q9dxdlkDIEt-9DLcolKg8HBkZzU_dOAur9InF_OjLe1inegNAvy3bjSgCIsC-2utgJf3Uut8hFLKXKM7rRuLoa81k54Ji26E8zJiVZCFVWX-Nn9u_i7nM9WuRS7t4L0wbEqAZbsUH4jhaBkTmYb0UxPNrqphfHWuoDl6Ztkt6zfoYemlRgUMjcz)

I've only been able to weather the attacks with the support of patriotic Americans across the country, and I'm once again asking for your help to defend my good name as I delve deeper into the belly of the corrupt beast that is ravaging our country: THE BIDEN CRIME FAMILY.

I spent a lot of time writing it and did my best to make every word count. I write it with great sadness and astonishment, sadness for our country which I hold so dear, and astonishment at Joe Biden's desecration of the Oath of Office he took with his hand on the Bible in front of the world. It has come to light that the Federal Bureau of Investigation has had 40 informants inside the Biden family over the past 15 years. For 15 years, Credible Informants have been providing criminal information against the Biden's to FBI Field Offices across the country, and for 15 years, everytime the information has been brought to FBI HQ, the leadership of the FBI shuts it down. But it's not just the FBI, it's the Department of Justice as well. I heard sworn witness testimony that the Biden Bribery allegations on the FD-1023 Form were CREDIBLE, and that he referred the criminal matters originating from it to three separate U.S. Attorney's offices in Brookly, Manhattan and Delaware for further investigation. Then, just like at the FBI, nothing happened. As I 've been saying since I started this investigation; the allegations about Joe Biden are being covered up... because they are TRUE! While words don't have any meaning to the Left, they still mean something to me and the law in this country. CONSPIRACY NOUN conspiracy An agreement between two or more people to commit an illegal act, along with an intent to achieve the agreement's goal. The media loves to talk about how Republicans believe in "conspiracy theories" like the Russian-Collusion Hoax, the origins of COVID, and the Steele-Dossier... but they sure have been silent about the conspiracy at the highest levels of government to cover up the expansive criminal operation being run by the Biden Crime Family. | It's because they are complicit in the cover-up. I've said it before, and it's more true today than ever before; I am facing down and exposing the rotten corruption of the most powerful and unholy triumvirate in American history, the Biden Family, the Federal Bureaucracy, and the Corporate Media. They are hellbent on stopping my investigation and they are throwing everything they have at me. name: Valerie Foushee
subject: Reflecting on Black History Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Foushee for Congress
body:
As we celebrate this rich history, this month also invites us to reflect on the work still ahead of us to achieve racial justice and true equity in our nation.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78597696/453872516/1540225365?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWM3NDA1Zi0wYmM2LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjM4NDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=60OOLcLBKMzcIPcAPi-u4_9VGHhjDdxPt20t0JAw7Vs=&emci=081efd57-0bc6-ee11-b660-002248223848&emdi=aac7405f-0bc6-ee11-b660-002248223848&ceid=799895)
---
| Peter,

We recognize February as Black History Month – a time to honor and celebrate the diverse contributions of Black Americans to our nation’s history. North Carolina’s cultural, political, and economic landscape is enriched by the achievements of generations of Black Americans.

As we celebrate this rich history, this month also invites us to reflect on the work still ahead of us to achieve racial justice and true equity in our nation.

My roots in North Carolina instilled in me the values of hard work, community, and service. As we see relentless efforts to strip away the progress we’ve made, I’m proud to have these values lead my fight towards social justice in Congress — championing racial equity through voting rights, tackling disparities in education and healthcare, addressing the disproportionate impacts of climate change, and combating discrimination in the criminal justice system.

This is work I’m proud to take on. This month, let’s reaffirm our commitment to an equitable future for our children, grandchildren, and the generations after.

Onward,

Valerie
---

body:

**News just broke that a Mitch McConnell-aligned super PAC is reserving nearly $83M of TV airtime in Ohio ALONE to attack my record and flip this seat red.**

body:
open this email if you care about our Senate majority
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78597823/453872821/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk768-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGQ0YmYyZTYtMGJjNi1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzODQ4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gs1YE3J0aHf7pmIDWCnaobEsoicfiOeRHRL0gfnzvpQ=)
Hi there, it's Paul Begala. You might've seen me talking politics on TV. I've spent my life helping Democrats win tough elections alongside folks like my buddy James Carville. So you can trust me on this: **If you care _at all_ about defending our Senate majority this November, you need to invest in Debbie Mucarsel-Powell's campaign right now to help flip Florida blue.**
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78597824/453872822/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk768-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGQ0YmYyZTYtMGJjNi1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzODQ4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gs1YE3J0aHf7pmIDWCnaobEsoicfiOeRHRL0gfnzvpQ=)
---
It's simple math: Democrats have a narrow 51-49 Senate majority — and now that Joe Manchin is retiring, we're all but guaranteed to lose our seat in West Virginia. **That means that even if we defend _every other Democratic seat_ (and I'm talking about incredibly tough states like Montana and Ohio), we could STILL lose our majority. Our only viable path forward is flipping a red seat blue. **
I know we can do that here in Florida. Rick Scott is ranked as one of the top 10 most vulnerable senators in the nation, and polling shows that this race is already neck and neck. **[So please, if you care about defending our Senate majority, will you rush $5 or more before 11:59 p.m. to help my friend Debbie flip this seat blue and save our Senate majority? | Raquel Terán is running to represent Arizona's 3rd Congressional District as the first Latina congresswoman from Arizona.

For nearly 20 years, she's been fighting for higher wages for workers, healthcare for all, and better schools for our children.

She's helped build broad and diverse coalitions that have beaten Republicans like Donald Trump, Joe Arpaio, and Kari Lake. **[Now she's ready to take the fight to Congress, but we'll need your support to win. name: Team Kennedy
subject: An Exclusive Preview of Upcoming Events!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
Join us at one of these inspiring events for a powerful vision of a better future.

|
---
| | | [](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=upcoming_events_2_7_24_a2&n=1)
---
|
---
An Exclusive Preview to Memorable Experiences with RFK, Jr.!
From free voter rallies to exclusive private receptions, each event promises a unique opportunity to engage with RFK, Jr., hear his vision for the future, and get a memorable selfie with our future president!
Seize the moment and be part of an unforgettable experience! [RSVP now!](https://www.kennedy24.com/events?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=upcoming_events_2_7_24_a2&n=2)
|
* * *
---
Free Voter Rallies & Events
[Grand Rapids, Michigan](https://www.kennedy24.com/grand-rapids-voter-rally?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=upcoming_events_2_7_24_a2&n=3) \- Saturday, February 10th at 1:00 PM
Don't miss the thrilling opportunity to see RFK, Jr. discuss our efforts to secure a spot on the MI ballot and unveil his platform of truth and honesty. Join us for an event you won't want to miss!
[Brooklyn, New York](https://www.kennedy24.com/brooklyn-bhm-event?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=upcoming_events_2_7_24_a2&n=4) \- Sunday, February 18th at 1:30 PM
Come join us for a Black History Month celebration where Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. will present his plan for Black America. This event will feature a round table, African performers, and an interview with Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. followed by Q&A.
|
* * *
---
Private Receptions & Events
[Jackson Hole, Wyoming](https://www.kennedy24.com/jackson-hole?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=upcoming_events_2_7_24_a2&n=5) \- Thursday, February 8th at 4:30 PM
The private reception with RFK, Jr. will include Jackson Hole’s finest wine and most delicious bites. Join us for a special Q&A session and get your picture with the future President!
[Livonia, Michigan](https://www.kennedy24.com/detroit-reception?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=upcoming_events_2_7_24_a2&n=6) \- Saturday, February 10th at 6:30 PM
Experience an exclusive evening of support and connection at a private reception. Enjoy heavy hors d'oeuvres, cocktails, inspiring remarks, and a unique photo opportunity with RFK, Jr.
[Upper Saddle River, New Jersey](https://www.kennedy24.com/bergen-county?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=upcoming_events_2_7_24_a2&n=7) \- Saturday, February 17th at 6:30 PM
Attend an exclusive event in the Metropolitan NYC area, offering a rare opportunity for an intimate Q&A session with RFK, Jr. with hors d’oeuvres, cocktails, and photo opportunities.
[Los Angeles, California](https://www.kennedy24.com/night-of-laughter-la?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=upcoming_events_2_7_24_a2&n=8) \- Wednesday, February 21rd at 7:30 PM
Experience an unforgettable evening of laughter as Cheryl Hines hosts "A Night of Laughter with RFK, Jr." Secure your tickets now to enjoy performances by Tim Dillon, Rob Schneider, and more!
[Newport Beach, California](https://www.kennedy24.com/newport-reception?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=upcoming_events_2_7_24_a2&n=9) \- Saturday, February 24th at 7:30 PM
Join us at a private venue in the heart of Newport Beach for a special event. Experience an intimate Q&A session with RFK, Jr. while enjoying hors d'oeuvres, cocktails, and memorable photo opportunities.
[Las Vegas, Nevada](https://www.kennedy24.com/march-las-vegas-reception?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=upcoming_events_2_7_24_a2&n=10) \- Friday, March 8th at 6:00 PM
Please join Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. and Cheryl Hines at this in-person fundraising event which includes hors d’ oeuvres and cocktails, remarks from the candidate, Q&A, and a photo opportunity.
[Austin, Texas](https://www.kennedy24.com/austin-private-dinner?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=upcoming_events_2_7_24_a2&n=11) \- Friday, March 15th at 6:30 PM
Along with a very special dinner with RFK, Jr., this exclusive gathering includes business leaders, entrepreneurs, leading podcast hosts, media personalities, celebrities, and industry influencers.
|
* * *
---
Thank you for your continued support. Every dollar you give moves us one step closer to the White House.
[DONATE >>](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?=&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=upcoming_events_2_7_24_a2&n=12)
|

”Joe Biden not only failed at his job but is being dishonest about his ability to do anything about it. I am proud to join Gov. Greg Abbott, and other GOP governors, to stand with Texas and call on Biden to actually do his job and protect the American people.”\- Gov. Sarah Huckabee Sanders
---
| | **Governor Sanders has made it clear:****She stands with Texas and every other state as it defends itself from Biden’s intentional border crisis. Will you stand with them?****
