name: Ro Khanna
subject: Why I voted against Republicans' blank check for Netanyahu
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]

Friend,

Last night, many House Democrats and I voted against a $17 billion aid package for Israel that would fuel a war that has killed thousands, primarily women and children. This package is a blank check for Netanyahu and his far-right government with zero humanitarian assistance for the people of Gaza, hundreds of thousands of whom face famine and lack access to medical treatment.

Israel had the right to defend itself following the October 7th Hamas attack, but the U.S. should never have given Netanyahu and his administration the green light to bomb civilians in the manner we've witnessed over the past many weeks.

Sign if you agree: We need a ceasefire and release of all hostages. [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/gaza-ceasefire-israel-aid-petition?contactdata=ztLCcWrOZDjWVx1q8ndI5G4Gv5yIAVU7q7XiMllnmJFRfgBDn81qIan2NYEiVqa0N/ZZEOmkIfVsb+MEINECFTbqurz6AAiQa21AL2iuOoo8uOtSoUTtS8hE/xYmDTbIllujZ9U5tgR9AJXNYdQ5Kw==]

https://twitter.com/RoKhanna/status/1755017631562616880?s=20 [https://twitter.com/RoKhanna/status/1755017631562616880?s=20]

The Leahy Law makes it clear: The United States must make sure any military assistance to any foreign security force is consistent with upholding human rights and international law.

What is needed today is to stop the bombing in Gaza, release of all hostages, and peace in the Middle East with a Palestinian state with equal rights co-existing alongside Israel.

TAKE ACTION: Demand a permanent ceasefire and release of all hostages. [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/gaza-ceasefire-israel-aid-petition?contactdata=ztLCcWrOZDjWVx1q8ndI5G4Gv5yIAVU7q7XiMllnmJFRfgBDn81qIan2NYEiVqa0N/ZZEOmkIfVsb+MEINECFTbqurz6AAiQa21AL2iuOoo8uOtSoUTtS8hE/xYmDTbIllujZ9U5tgR9AJXNYdQ5Kw==]

Sign the Petition [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/gaza-ceasefire-israel-aid-petition?contactdata=ztLCcWrOZDjWVx1q8ndI5G4Gv5yIAVU7q7XiMllnmJFRfgBDn81qIan2NYEiVqa0N/ZZEOmkIfVsb+MEINECFTbqurz6AAiQa21AL2iuOoo8uOtSoUTtS8hE/xYmDTbIllujZ9U5tgR9AJXNYdQ5Kw==]

Thank you for your activism and all that you do.

In solidarity,
Ro

subject: Laura Miller just endorsed Sam!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sam Eppler for Congress

name: Roy Cooper
subject: re: GOP supermajority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Delivering for North Carolina relies on breaking the GOP supermajority.
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78598522/453875333/823540626?refcode=ea.7bbcf4cf-0ec6-ee11-b660-002248223848&ms=ea.7bbcf4cf-0ec6-ee11-b660-002248223848&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YmJjZjRjZi0wZWM2LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjM4NDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OKKmC1Wui-4CWsgTPSVeVks2AAlGNlIiTUJPJb5CsWE=&emci=350cd0a4-eec5-ee11-b660-002248223848&emdi=7bbcf4cf-0ec6-ee11-b660-002248223848&ceid=1049176)
Last year, a North Carolina representative deceived the Democratic voters who elected her and switched parties — Republicans a one-vote supermajority in the state House of Representatives. Since then, the far-right GOP has had the chance to advance their extremist agenda; but they’ve also proven that their party is far more concerned with fighting culture wars than with governing and that their political infighting will derail and delay even the most essential legislation. **Peter, Republicans are terrified about losing their supermajority — because they _know_ that North Carolina is a 50-50 state. As long as Democrats stand together, we have the strength to defeat them.** **[North Carolinians need our legislature to get back to work. That’s why I’m leading the fight to _break the GOP supermajority_ and elect Democratic leaders this November. Can you help me?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78598523/453875334/-1724542601?refcode=ea.7bbcf4cf-0ec6-ee11-b660-002248223848&ms=ea.7bbcf4cf-0ec6-ee11-b660-002248223848&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YmJjZjRjZi0wZWM2LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjM4NDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OKKmC1Wui-4CWsgTPSVeVks2AAlGNlIiTUJPJb5CsWE=)** Since I’ve been governor, we’ve made progress on everything from expanding Medicaid to investing in clean energy to creating jobs across the state — but I know there’s still so much more to do. We have to improve and secure reproductive health care access, protect voting rights, and increase funding for our public education system. **[Democratic candidates across the state are ready to fight for these priorities and more after November’s election, but first, we have to help them win. Your grassroots support is the power behind our work, Peter. Please, donate anything you can now to help.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78598524/453875335/-1724542601?refcode=ea.7bbcf4cf-0ec6-ee11-b660-002248223848&ms=ea.7bbcf4cf-0ec6-ee11-b660-002248223848&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YmJjZjRjZi0wZWM2LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjM4NDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OKKmC1Wui-4CWsgTPSVeVks2AAlGNlIiTUJPJb5CsWE=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78598525/453875336/-1724542601?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=ea.7bbcf4cf-0ec6-ee11-b660-002248223848&ms=ea.7bbcf4cf-0ec6-ee11-b660-002248223848&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YmJjZjRjZi0wZWM2LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjM4NDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OKKmC1Wui-4CWsgTPSVeVks2AAlGNlIiTUJPJb5CsWE=)

clean_body: Delivering for North Carolina relies on breaking the GOP supermajority. | Last year, a North Carolina representative deceived the Democratic voters who elected her and switched parties — Republicans a one-vote supermajority in the state House of Representatives. Since then, the far-right GOP has had the chance to advance their extremist agenda; but they’ve also proven that their party is far more concerned with fighting culture wars than with governing and that their political infighting will derail and delay even the most essential legislation. Peter, Republicans are terrified about losing their supermajority — because they know that North Carolina is a 50-50 state. As long as Democrats stand together, we have the strength to defeat them. = Since I’ve been governor, we’ve made progress on everything from expanding Medicaid to investing in clean energy to creating jobs across the state — but I know there’s still so much more to do. We have to improve and secure reproductive health care access, protect voting rights, and increase funding for our public education system. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = = I’m grateful for your help, Roy Cooper = = = Send donations via check to: Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Thank you! mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. name: Hillary Scholten
subject: this Black History Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten for Congress
body:
This month, as we embrace this rich history, we’re also reminded of the work still ahead of us to achieve racial justice and true equity in our nation.

| We recognize the month of February as Black History Month — a time to honor and celebrate Black Americans’ monumental contributions to our nation’s history. The cultural landscape of West Michigan, much like the rest of our country, is deeply enriched by the diverse achievements of Black Americans.

This month, as we embrace this rich history, we’re also reminded of the work still ahead of us to achieve racial justice and true equity in our nation.

I’m proud to have spent my career working towards social justice — championing racial equity through voting rights, tackling disparities in housing and education, and combating discrimination in the justice system. I look forward to continuing this work in Congress.

Wishing you a happy Black History Month!

Sincerely,

Hillary
---

name: Whitney Shanahan
subject: The story of my pregnancy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Defeat Republicans PAC (www
body:
This fight can’t wait. |
---
_Our friend Whitney Shanahan is an abortion rights activist running against MAGA Rep. Darrell Issa in California’s 48th Congressional District.[Click here to chip in to Defeat Republicans and her campaign.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78598603/453875728/2109438718?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240207_1_2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY1YjlhNzFiLTEwYzYtZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzg0OCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3PPS4po2GqQySGYbVGXW7v2XS9tlkKw7jga3rm3CGFg=)_
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78598605/453875729/2109438718?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240207_1_2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY1YjlhNzFiLTEwYzYtZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzg0OCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3PPS4po2GqQySGYbVGXW7v2XS9tlkKw7jga3rm3CGFg=)

Peter – I, like millions of women out there, had a difficult pregnancy when I was carrying my son.

On a bitterly cold January afternoon in 2019, I started experiencing extreme pain alongside other complication symptoms. I knew something was very wrong. So, I had my husband race me to the emergency room.

Once we arrived, I felt some relief knowing I was in the care of medical professionals. I was sobbing through the pain, and all I could think was that I must be having a miscarriage.

But once I was about to receive care, the staff separated me from my husband and started interrogating me about what I did to cause this. And the truth was, I did nothing, I was experiencing severe complications through no intention of my own. But for some reason, their concern was not with saving me or my pregnancy, it was to attempt to put the cause of these complications, and the potential miscarriage, on me.

Once I got home from the ER, still in complete shock with what happened, my natural next step was to try to find a sense of community and comfort. I began to research online, seeing if this intense interrogation had happened to other pregnant women. To my surprise, not only had it happened to other women, but I found stories of women being further investigated, detained, and arrested for potentially “causing” their miscarriage.

In this moment, my life changed forever. It lit a fire under me, and I began my journey to fight for the right to our bodily autonomy. At this time in Ohio, where I was living at the time, Republicans were working to pass a 6-week abortion ban. So, I marched up to the Statehouse and stood strong in protest.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78598607/453875732/2109438718?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240207_1_2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY1YjlhNzFiLTEwYzYtZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzg0OCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3PPS4po2GqQySGYbVGXW7v2XS9tlkKw7jga3rm3CGFg=)
But I didn’t just go alone, I started to build a coalition of other women, both pregnant and not, to rally behind our rights to our own bodies. Our protest went viral – and I launched Pro Choice with Heart.

Since the first protest, I have spent the last five years holding hundreds of protests across the country and have built a network of thousands of activists working to defend abortion rights – all the while raising my son.

**Now, with _Roe v. Wade_ being overturned, this fight can’t wait. **We cannot stand by and let Republicans like Congressman Darrell Issa win their seats without any competition. That’s why I’m stepping up to the plate and taking this fight one step further by running for Congress.

**But to take on Republican Darrell Issa, I need your help, Peter.** [That’s why I am personally reaching out to ask if you can split a donation between Defeat Republicans and my campaign to help us bring this fight to the House chambers? Every dollar counts, and with your support, we can win! ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78598609/453875733/2109438718?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240207_1_2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY1YjlhNzFiLTEwYzYtZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzg0OCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3PPS4po2GqQySGYbVGXW7v2XS9tlkKw7jga3rm3CGFg=)

**[Other Amount](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78598624/453875748/2109438718?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240207_1_2&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY1YjlhNzFiLTEwYzYtZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzg0OCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3PPS4po2GqQySGYbVGXW7v2XS9tlkKw7jga3rm3CGFg=)**

This campaign is about making sure what happened to me, and the further escalations of detainment and arrest, doesn’t happen to anyone ever again.

I hope you join me in this fight.

clean_body: This fight can’t wait. | Our friend Whitney Shanahan is an abortion rights activist running against MAGA Rep. Darrell Issa in California’s 48th Congressional District.= = Peter – I, like millions of women out there, had a difficult pregnancy when I was carrying my son. On a bitterly cold January afternoon in 2019, I started experiencing extreme pain alongside other complication symptoms. I knew something was very wrong. So, I had my husband race me to the emergency room. Once we arrived, I felt some relief knowing I was in the care of medical professionals. I was sobbing through the pain, and all I could think was that I must be having a miscarriage. But once I was about to receive care, the staff separated me from my husband and started interrogating me about what I did to cause this. And the truth was, I did nothing, I was experiencing severe complications through no intention of my own. But for some reason, their concern was not with saving me or my pregnancy, it was to attempt to put the cause of these complications, and the potential miscarriage, on me. Once I got home from the ER, still in complete shock with what happened, my natural next step was to try to find a sense of community and comfort. I began to research online, seeing if this intense interrogation had happened to other pregnant women. To my surprise, not only had it happened to other women, but I found stories of women being further investigated, detained, and arrested for potentially “causing” their miscarriage. In this moment, my life changed forever. It lit a fire under me, and I began my journey to fight for the right to our bodily autonomy. At this time in Ohio, where I was living at the time, Republicans were working to pass a 6-week abortion ban. So, I marched up to the Statehouse and stood strong in protest. = But I didn’t just go alone, I started to build a coalition of other women, both pregnant and not, to rally behind our rights to our own bodies. Our protest went viral – and I launched Pro Choice with Heart. Since the first protest, I have spent the last five years holding hundreds of protests across the country and have built a network of thousands of activists working to defend abortion rights – all the while raising my son. Now, with Roe v. Wade being overturned, this fight can’t wait. We cannot stand by and let Republicans like Congressman Darrell Issa win their seats without any competition. That’s why I’m stepping up to the plate and taking this fight one step further by running for Congress. But to take on Republican Darrell Issa, I need your help, Peter. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately by clicking a button below. | = = = = This campaign is about making sure what happened to me, and the further escalations of detainment and arrest, doesn’t happen to anyone ever again. That means federally codifying the right to an abortion and protecting every single persons’ bodily autonomy. I hope you join me in this fight. Thank you for being PR❤️ CHOICE! – Whitney Defeat Republicans | Paid for by Defeat Republicans PAC (www.DefeatRepublicans.org) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. **[I need your unfiltered opinion on a pressing question:](http://links.markwalkerfornc.com/u/click?_t=6fc2ebfb23714a63b96314a1ce86a7f7&_m=d3460d181a504f67916e452cd9850fce&_e=T1FNXnD18zOF93O6ntt-pp0LaHsp2PSM92jEurw2ZcWvi6jbXbEjs8jddsXeidzLzW6SyOxCfCFJj4McDy09VuFnJFZbskwOnyB3VQqGAxpIt60A1RxtzDjFmdoXs0ICM1RT-aL-BY2uK9yE795ElrXNMN7UbJDHf9ExsUS4F26jldZrQDLlACqi9AEFlHW1uNlfNYx5aE3GSVAbYWdNA_jLO2pSBctrJBAQpF0fWzuCDzJmDaNRaL1fsacxAzTy_s1KUANPpfI9pKSzXITl8KR98WZU7Y8-xEd6I9t3cfZdQCaOpga8GoXdlBUMJsk1kgr6chdGg05QNqGhOqRvPyO2xU7vfBNWeMLff6g9Cp3uYC5jrEa2XtlI-E5bljxh) **

**The contrast between the previous administration's approach and the current one is stark.** We cannot ignore the consequences of Biden’s policy decisions that impact the safety and well-being of Americans.

I’ve seen it firsthand, Peter. As the former ranking member on Homeland Security’s Intelligence and Counter-Terrorism subcommittee, I’ve had conversations with border security agents. We can’t let the gravity of this situation go unnoticed.

**Now we’re feeling the consequences of failed border policy here in Greensboro. With Joe Biden’s taxpayer-funded academy for illegals.** Every state is a border state under Joe Biden, including North Carolina.

We need leaders who understand that **a secure border is not negotiable, and the safety of American citizens is non-negotiable.**

Let's make it clear that we will not tolerate weak stances on border security – **[respond now to our poll and let us know who has handled this crisis better, Trump or Biden?](http://links.markwalkerfornc.com/u/click?_t=6fc2ebfb23714a63b96314a1ce86a7f7&_m=d3460d181a504f67916e452cd9850fce&_e=T1FNXnD18zOF93O6ntt-pp0LaHsp2PSM92jEurw2ZcWvi6jbXbEjs8jddsXeidzLzW6SyOxCfCFJj4McDy09VuFnJFZbskwOnyB3VQqGAxpIt60A1RxtzDjFmdoXs0ICM1RT-aL-BY2uK9yE795ElrXNMN7UbJDHf9ExsUS4F26jldZrQDLlACqi9AEFlHW1uNlfNYx5aE3GSVAbYWdNA_jLO2pSBctrJBAQpF0fWzuF2G3RLjYW5DhBDkJ7PJztODXEy43QtKb0NzanAIoMDen35Hlqul4HxCyFJb3Bk88jLpGyLwmdwJmLNhhJvLKhumwYnJ4-1QBro9yk-2XSgkTU52HaHIvWjfogztax7OFLYZTBPAWo1uZBDQtjl8A-)**

body:

#

Peter,
It isn't every day that you can help win a Senate race.
It isn’t every day that you can help shape the future of our democracy.
It isn’t every day that you can help kick someone like Kari Lake to the curb and all of her QAnon, MAGA-right, election denial conspiracies with her.

name: Wes Moore
subject: Today, I delivered the 2024 State of the State Address
body:
Friend,

Today, I delivered my 2024 State of the State Address and talked about our strategic mission, our success over the last 12 months, and this year's plans to make Maryland safer, more affordable, more competitive, and the state that serves.

I am proud to say that our state is strong. I am proud of the work we’ve done so far. One year into my governorship, we’ve accomplished big things, but there is so much more left to do.

Our state has boundless opportunities and potential, and it’s up to us to make that happen. To make sure this is Maryland’s decade, we cannot leave anything on the table. We have promises to keep, and Marylanders deserve our most attentive focus to be making their lives better, and not to fall into the trap of political games.
Fulfilling the promise of Maryland is the goal, and strong partnership is how we get there. Our state is going to be better because of it. It is on all of us to work together to fulfill the potential of what Maryland can be.
I am proud to work with a bold coalition of partners across the state to unveil a comprehensive plan to guide our work together – the first State Plan in nearly a decade.

The State Plan will guide our work for the next three years. We’ve built this agenda by listening to the people who sent us here. Great public servants listen to and center the voices of their constituents and the State Plan will guide our work to do just that. We need better public servants to set the example because service will save us.

I’ll share more as we unveil the full details of the State Plan. This will be Maryland’s decade. In Maryland, we go fast. In Maryland, we go far. And in Maryland, we go together.

Thank you for your trust.

Elevate,
Wes Moore

---
This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: let me introduce myself
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC
body:
Peter – I'm running for reelection in Nevada, and right now, I need your help. But first, let me share a little bit about myself.
I'm the proud granddaughter of Jewish immigrants and the daughter of a World War II veteran. Growing up, my family always taught me the values of hard work, determination, and persistence.
It's these values that have guided me on every step of my journey – from becoming the first in my family to graduate from college to defying the odds and unseating a Republican Senate incumbent in 2018.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78599239/453877670/-548991962?amount=3&refcode=UTS_FR_90DO_240207_1_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJjYWE4ODhjLTEyYzYtZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzg0OCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mtQnqBjEFUKCqmLgPMpz5rA9fDar9vjZZucirxgp6ro=)

clean_body: Peter – I'm running for reelection in Nevada, and right now, I need your help. But first, let me share a little bit about myself. I'm the proud granddaughter of Jewish immigrants and the daughter of a World War II veteran. Growing up, my family always taught me the values of hard work, determination, and persistence. It's these values that have guided me on every step of my journey – from becoming the first in my family to graduate from college to defying the odds and unseating a Republican Senate incumbent in 2018. = My path to Congress has been anything but traditional, and I wouldn't trade it for the world. I'm all in to keep delivering real progress to working families in Nevada and across the country – but there's a problem: With experts at FiveThirtyEight saying that Nevada could once again decide Senate control, the GOP is doing everything it can to defeat me. I need to raise $100,000 before the weekend to fight back and win – but unfortunately, I'm falling short. = If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: = = = = = = Thank you for reading my story – and for standing with me.
